                  ```
                       1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4→import { withAuthHeaders } from "@/lib/auth";
     5→
     6→const API_BASE = "/api";
     7→
     8→interface Stats {
     9→  documents: number;
    10→  flashcards: number;
    11→  quiz: number;
    12→  fiches: number;
    13→  flashcards_a_reviser: number;
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface Flashcard {
    17→  id: number;
    18→  question: string;
    19→  prochaine_revision: string;
    20→}
    21→
    22→interface QuizData {
    23→  id: number;
    24→  titre: string;
    25→}
    26→
    27→interface Matiere {
    28→  id: number;
    29→  nom: string;
    30→  nb_documents?: number;
    31→}
    32→
    33→interface AnimatedNumberProps {
    34→  value: number;
    35→  duration?: number;
    36→}
    37→
    38→// Animated counter component
    39→const AnimatedNumber: React.FC<AnimatedNumberProps> = ({ value, duration = 1000 }) => {
    40→  const [display, setDisplay] = useState(0);
    41→
    42→  useEffect(() => {
    43→    const start = Date.now();
    44→    const interval = setInterval(() => {
    45→      const progress = Math.min((Date.now() - start) / duration, 1);
    46→      setDisplay(Math.floor(progress * value));
    47→    }, 16);
    48→
    49→    return () => clearInterval(interval);
    50→  }, [value, duration]);
    51→
    52→  return <>{display}</>;
    53→};
    54→
    55→// Skeleton loader for stats card
    56→const StatCardSkeleton = () => (
    57→  <div className="p-6 rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/30 animate-pulse">
    58→    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
    59→      <div className="flex-1">
    60→        <div className="h-4 w-24 bg-slate-700 rounded" />
    61→        <div className="mt-3 h-8 w-16 bg-slate-700 rounded" />
    62→        <div className="mt-3 h-3 w-12 bg-slate-700 rounded" />
    63→      </div>
    64→      <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-slate-700 rounded-xl" />
    65→    </div>
    66→  </div>
    67→);
    68→
    69→export default function Dashboard() {
    70→  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({
    71→    documents: 0,
    72→    flashcards: 0,
    73→    quiz: 0,
    74→    fiches: 0,
    75→    flashcards_a_reviser: 0,
    76→  });
    77→  const [revisions, setRevisions] = useState<Flashcard[]>([]);
    78→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    79→  const [currentDate, setCurrentDate] = useState("");
    80→
    81→  useEffect(() => {
    82→    // Set current date in French
    83→    const date = new Date();
    84→    const formatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("fr-FR", {
    85→      weekday: "long",
    86→      day: "numeric",
    87→      month: "long",
    88→      year: "numeric",
    89→    });
    90→    setCurrentDate(formatter.format(date));
    91→  }, []);
    92→
    93→  useEffect(() => {
    94→    const fetchData = async () => {
    95→      try {
    96→        // Fetch all data in parallel
    97→        const [fcRes, qzRes, revRes, fichesRes, matiereRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
    98→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards`, withAuthHeaders()),
    99→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz`, withAuthHeaders()),
   100→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`, withAuthHeaders()),
   101→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches`, withAuthHeaders()),
   102→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`, withAuthHeaders()),
   103→        ]);
   104→
   105→        let flashcardCount = 0;
   106→        let quizCount = 0;
   107→        let revisionsData: Flashcard[] = [];
   108→        let fichesCount = 0;
   109→        let documentsCount = 0;
   110→
   111→        // Process flashcards
   112→        if (fcRes.status === "fulfilled" && fcRes.value.ok) {
   113→          const data = await fcRes.value.json();
   114→          flashcardCount = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
   115→        }
   116→
   117→        // Process quiz
   118→        if (qzRes.status === "fulfilled" && qzRes.value.ok) {
   119→          const data = await qzRes.value.json();
   120→          quizCount = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
   121→        }
   122→
   123→        // Process revisions
   124→        if (revRes.status === "fulfilled" && revRes.value.ok) {
   125→          const data = await revRes.value.json();
   126→          revisionsData = Array.isArray(data) ? data.slice(0, 5) : [];
   127→          setRevisions(revisionsData);
   128→        }
   129→
   130→        // Process fiches
   131→        if (fichesRes.status === "fulfilled" && fichesRes.value.ok) {
   132→          const data = await fichesRes.value.json();
   133→          fichesCount = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
   134→        }
   135→
   136→        // Process matieres and count documents
   137→        if (matiereRes.status === "fulfilled" && matiereRes.value.ok) {
   138→          const data = await matiereRes.value.json();
   139→          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
   140→            documentsCount = data.reduce((sum, m: Matiere) => sum + (m.nb_documents || 0), 0);
   141→          }
   142→        }
   143→
   144→        setStats({
   145→          documents: documentsCount,
   146→          flashcards: flashcardCount,
   147→          quiz: quizCount,
   148→          fiches: fichesCount,
   149→          flashcards_a_reviser: revisionsData.length,
   150→        });
   151→      } catch (error) {
   152→        console.error("Erreur chargement dashboard:", error);
   153→      } finally {
   154→        setLoading(false);
   155→      }
   156→    };
   157→
   158→    fetchData();
   159→  }, []);
   160→
   161→  const statCards = [
   162→    {
   163→      label: "Documents",
   164→      value: stats.documents,
   165→      icon: (
   166→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   167→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m2.25 0H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   168→        </svg>
   169→      ),
   170→      bgGlow: "bg-blue-500/10",
   171→      textColor: "text-blue-400",
   172→      borderColor: "border-blue-500/20",
   173→    },
   174→    {
   175→      label: "Flashcards",
   176→      value: stats.flashcards,
   177→      icon: (
   178→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   179→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   180→        </svg>

   217→      ),

   222→    {

   224→      value: 0,
   225→      icon: (
   226→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   227→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v6.75a.75.75 0 0 1-.75.75h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 12c-.414 0-.75.504-.75 1.125v6.75c0 .621.336 1.125.75 1.125h2.25a.75.75 0 0 0 .75-.75v-6.75a.75.75 0 0 0-.75-.75h-2.25ZM15.75 12c-.414 0-.75.504-.75 1.125v6.75c0 .621.336 1.125.75 1.125h2.25a.75.75 0 0 0 .75-.75v-6.75a.75.75 0 0 0-.75-.75h-2.25Z" />
   228→        </svg>
   229→      ),
   230→      bgGlow: "bg-cyan-500/10",
   231→      textColor: "text-cyan-400",
   232→      borderColor: "border-cyan-500/20",
   233→    },
   234→  ];
   235→
   236→  if (loading) {
   237→    return (
   238→      <div className="space-y-8">
   239→        {/* Header skeleton */}
   240→        <div className="space-y-3">
   241→          <div className="h-10 w-64 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg animate-pulse" />
   242→          <div className="h-4 w-96 bg-slate-700 rounded animate-pulse" />
   243→        </div>
   244→
   245→        {/* Stats skeleton */}
   246→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   247→          {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
   248→            <StatCardSkeleton key={i} />
   249→          ))}
   250→        </div>
   251→
   252→        {/* Section skeleton */}
   253→        <div className="h-64 bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/30 rounded-2xl animate-pulse" />
   254→      </div>
   255→    );
   256→  }
   257→
   258→  return (
   259→    <div className="space-y-8">
   260→      {/* Welcome Header */}
   261→      <div className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800/50 via-slate-800/30 to-transparent border border-slate-700/30 p-8 backdrop-blur-sm">
   262→        {/* Decorative gradient orbs */}
   263→        <div className="absolute -top-20 -right-20 w-40 h-40 bg-violet-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl" />
   264→        <div className="absolute -bottom-20 -left-20 w-40 h-40 bg-blue-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl" />
   265→
   266→        <div className="relative z-10">
   267→          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-400 via-blue-400 to-cyan-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent mb-2">
   268→            Bienvenue sur IACA
   269→          </h1>
   270→          <p className="text-lg text-slate-300 mb-4">
   271→            Préparez les concours administratifs avec l&apos;IA
   272→          </p>
   273→          <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 capitalize">
   274→            {currentDate}
   275→          </p>
   276→        </div>
   277→      </div>
   278→
   279→      {/* Stats Grid */}
   280→      <div>
   281→        <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4">Votre progression</h2>
   282→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   283→          {statCards.map((card) => (
   284→            <div
   285→              key={card.label}
   286→              className={`group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50 border ${card.borderColor} p-6 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800/80 hover:border-slate-600/50`}
   287→            >
   288→              {/* Decorative gradient background */}
   289→              <div className={`absolute -right-8 -top-8 w-20 h-20 rounded-full ${card.bgGlow} blur-2xl opacity-40 group-hover:opacity-60 transition-opacity`} />
   290→
   291→              <div className="relative flex items-start justify-between">
   292→                <div className="flex-1">
   293→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-400">{card.label}</p>
   294→                  <p className="mt-2 text-4xl font-bold text-white">
   295→                    <AnimatedNumber value={card.value} duration={800} />
   296→                  </p>
   297→                  {card.value > 0 && (
   298→                    <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-1">
   299→                      <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   300→                        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M7.5 13.5V3m0 0H3m4.5 0l-4.5 4.5m9 0v13.5m0 0h4.5m-4.5 0l4.5 4.5" />
   301→                      </svg>
   302→                      <span className="text-xs font-medium text-emerald-400">Actif</span>
   303→                    </div>
   304→                  )}
   305→                </div>
   306→                <div className={`p-4 rounded-xl ${card.bgGlow}`}>
   307→                  <span className={card.textColor}>{card.icon}</span>
   308→                </div>
   309→              </div>
   310→            </div>
   311→          ))}
   312→        </div>
   313→      </div>
   314→
   315→      {/* Révisions du jour */}
   316→      <div>
   317→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
   318→          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Révisions du jour</h2>
   319→          <a
   320→            href="/flashcards"
   321→            className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 transition-colors"
   322→          >
   323→            Voir tout →
   324→          </a>
   325→        </div>
   326→
   327→        <div className="rounded-2xl bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/30 p-6">
   328→          {revisions.length === 0 ? (
   329→            <div className="text-center py-12">
   330→              <svg className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-emerald-500/30 mb-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   331→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   332→              </svg>
   333→              <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-300">Tout est à jour !</p>
   334→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-2">
   335→                Vous n&apos;avez pas de flashcards à réviser aujourd&apos;hui
   336→              </p>
   337→            </div>
   338→          ) : (
   339→            <div className="space-y-3">
   340→              {revisions.map((revision) => (
   341→                <div
   342→                  key={revision.id}
   343→                  className="flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/50 transition-all group"
   344→                >
   345→                  <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-1 h-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-400 to-violet-400" />
   346→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   347→                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-200 line-clamp-2">
   348→                      {revision.question.length > 80
   349→                        ? revision.question.substring(0, 80) + "..."
   350→                        : revision.question}
   351→                    </p>
   352→                  </div>
   353→                  <a
   354→                    href="/flashcards"
   355→                    className="flex-shrink-0 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-colors"
   356→                  >
   357→                    Réviser
   358→                  </a>
   359→                </div>
   360→              ))}
   361→            </div>
   362→          )}
   363→        </div>
   364→      </div>
   365→
   366→      {/* Quick Actions */}
   367→      <div>
   368→        <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4">Actions rapides</h2>
   369→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   370→          <a
   371→            href="/flashcards"
   372→            className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600/20 to-violet-600/5 border border-violet-500/30 p-6 hover:border-violet-500/50 transition-all"
   373→          >
   374→            <div className="absolute -right-12 -top-12 w-24 h-24 bg-violet-500/20 rounded-full blur-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
   375→            <div className="relative z-10">
   376→              <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-violet-500/20 w-fit mb-3">
   377→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   378→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   379→                </svg>
   380→              </div>
   381→              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">Commencer une révision</h3>
   382→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   383→                {stats.flashcards} flashcards disponibles
   384→              </p>
   385→            </div>
   386→          </a>
   387→
   388→          <a
   389→            href="/quiz"
   390→            className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600/20 to-blue-600/5 border border-blue-500/30 p-6 hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-all"
   391→          >
   392→            <div className="absolute -right-12 -top-12 w-24 h-24 bg-blue-500/20 rounded-full blur-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
   393→            <div className="relative z-10">
   394→              <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/20 w-fit mb-3">
   395→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   396→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   397→                </svg>
   398→              </div>
   399→              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">Faire un quiz</h3>
   400→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   401→                {stats.quiz} quiz disponibles
   402→              </p>
   403→            </div>
   404→          </a>
   405→
   406→          <a
   407→            href="/fiches"
   408→            className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-600/20 to-emerald-600/5 border border-emerald-500/30 p-6 hover:border-emerald-500/50 transition-all"
   409→          >
   410→            <div className="absolute -right-12 -top-12 w-24 h-24 bg-emerald-500/20 rounded-full blur-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
   411→            <div className="relative z-10">
   412→              <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-emerald-500/20 w-fit mb-3">
   413→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   414→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   415→                </svg>
   416→              </div>
   417→              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">Lire les fiches</h3>
   418→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   419→                {stats.fiches} fiches disponibles
   420→              </p>
   421→            </div>
   422→          </a>
   423→
   424→          <a
   425→            href="/vocal"
   426→            className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-600/20 to-rose-600/5 border border-rose-500/30 p-6 hover:border-rose-500/50 transition-all"
   427→          >
   428→            <div className="absolute -right-12 -top-12 w-24 h-24 bg-rose-500/20 rounded-full blur-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
   429→            <div className="relative z-10">
   430→              <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-rose-500/20 w-fit mb-3">
   431→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-rose-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   432→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 18.75a6 6 0 0 0 6-6v-1.5m-6 7.5a6 6 0 0 1-6-6v-1.5m6 7.5v3.75m0 0h3.75m-3.75 0H9M3 12a9 9 0 0 1 9-9m0 0v3.75m0 0h3.75M3 12a9 9 0 0 0 9 9" />
   433→                </svg>
   434→              </div>
   435→              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">Prof vocal</h3>
   436→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   437→                Réviser en parlant
   438→              </p>
   439→            </div>
   440→          </a>
   441→        </div>
   442→      </div>
   443→    </div>
   444→  );
   445→}
   446→
                  ```

                ```
    85→  gradient: "from-slate-600/20 to-slate-900/10",

    88→
    89→function getMatiereStyle(matiereName: string) {
    90→  return matiereColors[matiereName] || defaultColor;
    91→}
    92→
    93→/** Render fiche section content with better formatting than plain whitespace-pre-line */
    94→function FormattedContent({ text }: { text: string }) {
    95→  const paragraphs = text.split(/\n{2,}/);
    96→  return (
    97→    <div className="space-y-3">
    98→      {paragraphs.map((para, i) => {
    99→        const trimmed = para.trim();
   100→        if (!trimmed) return null;
   101→        // Detect bullet lists
   102→        const lines = trimmed.split("\n");
   103→        const isList = lines.every(l => /^[\s]*[-\u2022\u2013*]\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());
   104→        if (isList) {
   105→          return (
   106→            <ul key={i} className="space-y-1.5 ml-1">
   107→              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => (
   108→                <li key={j} className="flex gap-2 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">
   109→                  <span className="text-blue-400/60 mt-1 shrink-0">
   110→                    <svg className="w-3 h-3" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="6" cy="6" r="3" /></svg>
   111→                  </span>
   112→                  <span>{line.replace(/^[\s]*[-\u2022\u2013*]\s*/, "")}</span>
   113→                </li>
   114→              ))}
   115→            </ul>
   116→          );
   117→        }
   118→        // Detect numbered items
   119→        const isNumbered = lines.every(l => /^[\s]*\d+[.)]\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());
   120→        if (isNumbered) {
   121→          return (
   122→            <ol key={i} className="space-y-1.5 ml-1">
   123→              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => {
   124→                const match = line.match(/^[\s]*(\d+)[.)]\s*(.*)/);
   125→                return (
   126→                  <li key={j} className="flex gap-2.5 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">
   127→                    <span className="text-blue-400/70 font-semibold tabular-nums shrink-0 w-5 text-right">{match ? match[1] : j + 1}.</span>
   128→                    <span>{match ? match[2] : line}</span>
   129→                  </li>
   130→                );
   131→              })}
   132→            </ol>
   133→          );
   134→        }
   135→        // Default paragraph
   136→        return (
   137→          <p key={i} className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line">
   138→            {trimmed}
   139→          </p>
   140→        );
   141→      })}
   142→    </div>
   143→  );
   144→}
   145→
   146→export default function FichesPage() {
   147→  const [fiches, setFiches] = useState<FicheListItem[]>([]);
   148→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
   149→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
   150→  const [selectedFiche, setSelectedFiche] = useState<FicheDetail | null>(null);
   151→  const [openSections, setOpenSections] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
   152→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   153→  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
   154→  const [showGenModal, setShowGenModal] = useState(false);
   155→  const [documents, setDocuments] = useState<Document[]>([]);
   156→  const [selectedDocId, setSelectedDocId] = useState<number | null>(null);
   157→  const [nextContent, setNextContent] = useState<{ flashcards: { id: number; question: string }[]; quizzes: { id: number; titre: string }[] } | null>(null);
   158→  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
   159→  const sectionRefs = useRef<Record<number, HTMLDivElement | null>>({});
   160→
   161→  // Read matiere_id from URL search params
   162→  useEffect(() => {
   163→    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
   164→    const mid = params.get("matiere_id");
   165→    if (mid) setSelectedMatiere(parseInt(mid));
   166→  }, []);
   167→
   168→  const fetchFiches = useCallback(async () => {
   169→    try {
   170→      const base = `${API_BASE}/fiches?limit=250`;
   171→      const url = selectedMatiere
   172→        ? `${base}&matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`
   173→        : base;
   174→      const res = await fetch(url);
   175→      if (res.ok) setFiches(await res.json());
   176→    } catch (e) {
   177→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiches:", e);
   178→    }
   179→  }, [selectedMatiere]);
   180→
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const init = async () => {
   183→      setLoading(true);
   184→      try {
   185→        const [matRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
   186→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`),
   187→        ]);
   188→        if (matRes.status === "fulfilled" && matRes.value.ok) {
   189→          setMatieres(await matRes.value.json());
   190→        }
   191→        await fetchFiches();
   192→      } finally {
   193→        setLoading(false);
   194→      }
   195→    };
   196→    init();
   197→  }, [fetchFiches]);
   198→
   199→  const openFiche = async (ficheId: number) => {
   200→    try {
   201→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}`);
   202→      if (res.ok) {
   203→        const data = await res.json();
   204→        setSelectedFiche(data);
   205→        setOpenSections(new Set());
   206→        // Load next content (flashcards/quiz)
   207→        const nextRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}/next`);
   208→        if (nextRes.ok) setNextContent(await nextRes.json());
   209→      }
   210→    } catch (e) {
   211→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiche:", e);
   212→    }
   213→  };
   214→
   215→  const toggleSection = (sectionId: number) => {
   216→    setOpenSections((prev) => {
   217→      const next = new Set(prev);
   218→      if (next.has(sectionId)) next.delete(sectionId);
   219→      else next.add(sectionId);
   220→      return next;
   221→    });
   222→  };
   223→
   224→  const toggleAllSections = () => {
   225→    if (!selectedFiche) return;
   226→    const allIds = selectedFiche.sections.map(s => s.id);
   227→    const allOpen = allIds.every(id => openSections.has(id));
   228→    if (allOpen) {
   229→      setOpenSections(new Set());
   230→    } else {
   231→      setOpenSections(new Set(allIds));
   232→    }
   233→  };
   234→
   235→  const scrollToSection = (sectionId: number) => {
   236→    // Open section first
   237→    setOpenSections(prev => {
   238→      const next = new Set(prev);
   239→      next.add(sectionId);
   240→      return next;
   241→    });
   242→    // Scroll after a tick
   243→    setTimeout(() => {
   244→      const el = sectionRefs.current[sectionId];
   245→      if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
   246→    }, 100);
   247→  };
   248→
   249→  const openGenModal = async () => {
   250→    try {
   251→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents`);
   252→      if (res.ok) {
   253→        const docs = await res.json();
   254→        setDocuments(docs);
   255→        setSelectedDocId(docs.length > 0 ? docs[0].id : null);
   256→      }
   257→    } catch (e) {
   258→      console.error(e);
   259→    }
   260→    setShowGenModal(true);
   261→  };
   262→
   263→  const generateFiche = async () => {
   264→    if (!selectedDocId) return;
   265→    setGenerating(true);
   266→    try {
   267→      const res = await fetch(
   268→        `${API_BASE}/recommandations/generer-fiche/${selectedDocId}`,
   269→        withAuthHeaders({ method: "POST" })
   270→      );
   271→      if (res.ok) {
   272→        const data = await res.json();
   273→        setShowGenModal(false);
   274→        await fetchFiches();
   275→        // Auto-open the generated fiche
   276→        if (data.fiche_id) openFiche(data.fiche_id);
   277→      } else {
   278→        const err = await res.text();
   279→        alert(`Erreur generation: ${err}`);
   280→      }
   281→    } catch (e) {
   282→      alert(`Erreur: ${e}`);
   283→    } finally {
   284→      setGenerating(false);
   285→    }
   286→  };
   287→
   288→  const getMatiereName = (matiereId: number | null) => {
   289→    if (!matiereId) return "";
   290→    return matieres.find((m) => m.id === matiereId)?.nom || "";
   291→  };
   292→
   293→  if (loading) {
   294→    return (
   295→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   296→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   297→          <div className="relative">
   298→            <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-blue-500/20 rounded-full" />
   299→            <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-transparent border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin absolute inset-0" />
   300→          </div>
   301→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des fiches...</p>
   302→        </div>
   303→      </div>
   304→    );
   305→  }
   306→
   307→  // Detail view
   308→  if (selectedFiche) {
   309→    const matiereName = getMatiereName(selectedFiche.matiere_id);
   310→    const style = getMatiereStyle(matiereName);
   311→    const sortedSections = [...selectedFiche.sections].sort((a, b) => a.ordre - b.ordre);
   312→    const allOpen = sortedSections.length > 0 && sortedSections.every(s => openSections.has(s.id));
   313→
   314→    return (
   315→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-6">
   316→        {/* Back button */}
   317→        <button
   318→          onClick={() => { setSelectedFiche(null); setNextContent(null); }}
   319→          aria-label="Retour aux fiches"
   320→          className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-all duration-200 -ml-3"
   321→        >
   322→          <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   323→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   324→          </svg>
   325→          Retour aux fiches
   326→        </button>
   327→
   328→        {/* Header with gradient */}
   329→        <div className={`rounded-2xl border ${style.border} bg-gradient-to-br ${style.gradient} p-6 relative overflow-hidden`}>
   330→          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-40 h-40 opacity-5">
   331→            <svg className="w-full h-full" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={0.5} stroke="currentColor">
   332→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   333→            </svg>
   334→          </div>
   335→          <div className="relative">
   336→            {matiereName && (
   337→              <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border} mb-3`}>
   338→                <svg className="w-3 h-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   339→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   340→                </svg>
   341→                {matiereName}
   342→              </span>
   343→            )}
   344→            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white leading-tight">{selectedFiche.titre}</h1>
   345→            {selectedFiche.chapitre && (
   346→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   347→                <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   348→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" />
   349→                </svg>
   350→                {selectedFiche.chapitre}
   351→              </p>
   352→            )}
   353→          </div>
   354→        </div>
   355→
   356→        {/* Resume */}
   357→        {selectedFiche.resume && (
   358→          <div className="card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/40">
   359→            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   360→              <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5">
   361→                <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   362→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M11.25 11.25l.041-.02a.75.75 0 0 1 1.063.852l-.708 2.836a.75.75 0 0 0 1.063.853l.041-.021M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9-3.75h.008v.008H12V8.25Z" />
   363→                </svg>
   364→              </div>
   365→              <div>
   366→                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5">Resume</p>
   367→                <p className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedFiche.resume}</p>
   368→              </div>
   369→            </div>
   370→          </div>
   371→        )}
   372→
   373→        {/* Sommaire cliquable + toggle all */}
   374→        {sortedSections.length > 1 && (
   375→          <div className="card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/30">
   376→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   377→              <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2">
   378→                <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   379→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8.25 6.75h12M8.25 12h12m-12 5.25h12M3.75 6.75h.007v.008H3.75V6.75Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM3.75 12h.007v.008H3.75V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm-.375 5.25h.007v.008H3.75v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z" />
   380→                </svg>
   381→                Sommaire ({sortedSections.length} sections)
   382→              </h2>
   383→              <button
   384→                onClick={toggleAllSections}
   385→                className="text-xs text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-1.5"
   386→              >
   387→                <svg className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${allOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   388→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.75 3.75v4.5m0-4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 9M3.75 20.25v-4.5m0 4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 15M20.25 3.75h-4.5m4.5 0v4.5m0-4.5L15 9m5.25 11.25h-4.5m4.5 0v-4.5m0 4.5L15 15" />
   389→                </svg>
   390→                {allOpen ? "Tout replier" : "Tout deplier"}
   391→              </button>
   392→            </div>
   393→            <nav className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-1">
   394→              {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => (
   395→                <button
   396→                  key={section.id}
   397→                  onClick={() => scrollToSection(section.id)}
   398→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left hover:bg-slate-700/40 transition-all duration-150 group"
   399→                >
   400→                  <span className={`w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`}>
   401→                    {idx + 1}
   402→                  </span>
   403→                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors truncate">
   404→                    {section.titre}
   405→                  </span>
   406→                  <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-600 group-hover:text-slate-400 ml-auto shrink-0 transition-colors" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   407→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
   408→                  </svg>
   409→                </button>
   410→              ))}
   411→            </nav>
   412→          </div>
   413→        )}
   414→
   415→        {/* Sections en accordeon */}
   416→        <div className="space-y-3">
   417→          {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => {
   418→            const isOpen = openSections.has(section.id);
   419→            return (
   420→              <div
   421→                key={section.id}
   422→                ref={(el) => { sectionRefs.current[section.id] = el; }}
   423→                className={`rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 ${
   424→                  isOpen
   425→                    ? `${style.border} bg-slate-800/60`
   426→                    : "border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-800/30 hover:border-slate-600/50"
   427→                }`}
   428→              >
   429→                <button
   430→                  onClick={() => toggleSection(section.id)}
   431→                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 text-left p-4"
   432→                >
   433→                  <span className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 transition-colors duration-200 ${
   434→                    isOpen
   435→                      ? `${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`
   436→                      : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/30"
   437→                  }`}>
   438→                    {idx + 1}
   439→                  </span>
   440→                  <h3 className={`font-medium flex-1 transition-colors duration-200 ${isOpen ? "text-white" : "text-slate-300"}`}>
   441→                    {section.titre}
   442→                  </h3>
   443→                  <svg
   444→                    className={`w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 transition-transform duration-300 shrink-0 ${isOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
   445→                    fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor"
   446→                  >
   447→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m19.5 8.25-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5" />
   448→                  </svg>
   449→                </button>
   450→                <div
   451→                  className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${
   452→                    isOpen ? "max-h-[5000px] opacity-100" : "max-h-0 opacity-0"
   453→                  }`}
   454→                >
   455→                  <div className="px-4 pb-4 pt-1 ml-10 border-t border-slate-700/30">
   456→                    <FormattedContent text={section.contenu} />
   457→                  </div>
   458→                </div>
   459→              </div>
   460→            );
   461→          })}
   462→        </div>
   463→
   464→        {/* Liens vers flashcards / quiz */}
   465→        {nextContent && (nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 || nextContent.quizzes.length > 0) && (
   466→          <div className="card border-violet-500/20 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-900/10 to-slate-800/40">
   467→            <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-white mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
   468→              <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   469→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3" />
   470→              </svg>
   471→              Continuer a reviser
   472→            </h3>
   473→            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   474→              {nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 && (
   475→                <a
   476→                  href="/flashcards"
   477→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/20 hover:bg-violet-600/20 hover:border-violet-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   478→                >
   479→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400">
   480→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   481→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   482→                    </svg>
   483→                  </div>
   484→                  <div>
   485→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-violet-300">Flashcards sur ce sujet</p>
   486→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.flashcards.length} disponibles</p>
   487→                  </div>
   488→                </a>
   489→              )}
   490→              {nextContent.quizzes.length > 0 && (
   491→                <a
   492→                  href="/quiz"
   493→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-amber-600/10 border border-amber-500/20 hover:bg-amber-600/20 hover:border-amber-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   494→                >
   495→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400">
   496→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   497→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   498→                    </svg>
   499→                  </div>
   500→                  <div>
   501→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-amber-300">Quiz sur ce sujet</p>
   502→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.quizzes.length} disponibles</p>
   503→                  </div>
   504→                </a>
   505→              )}
   506→            </div>
   507→          </div>
   508→        )}
   509→      </div>
   510→    );
   511→  }
   512→
   513→  const filteredFiches = fiches.filter(f =>
   514→    !search.trim() || f.titre.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || (f.resume || "").toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
   515→  );
   516→
   517→  // Group fiches by matiere
   518→  const groupedFiches: { matiereName: string; matiereId: number | null; fiches: FicheListItem[] }[] = [];
   519→  const grouped = new Map<number | null, FicheListItem[]>();
   520→  for (const f of filteredFiches) {
   521→    const key = f.matiere_id;
   522→    if (!grouped.has(key)) grouped.set(key, []);
   523→    grouped.get(key)!.push(f);
   524→  }
   525→  // Sort groups: named matieres first (alphabetically), then null
   526→  const sortedKeys = Array.from(grouped.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
   527→    if (a === null) return 1;
   528→    if (b === null) return -1;
   529→    return getMatiereName(a).localeCompare(getMatiereName(b));
   530→  });
   531→  for (const key of sortedKeys) {
   532→    groupedFiches.push({
   533→      matiereName: key !== null ? getMatiereName(key) : "Autres",
   534→      matiereId: key,
   535→      fiches: grouped.get(key)!,
   536→    });
   537→  }
   538→
   539→  // List view
   540→  return (
   541→    <div className="space-y-6">
   542→      {/* Header */}
   543→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-4">
   544→        <div>
   545→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-3">
   546→            <div className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20">
   547→              <svg className="w-7 h-7 text-blue-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   548→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   549→              </svg>
   550→            </div>
   551→            Fiches de revision
   552→          </h1>
   553→          <p className="mt-2 text-slate-400">
   554→            {fiches.length > 0 ? `${fiches.length} fiche${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} disponible${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : "Fiches structurees pour reviser efficacement"}
   555→          </p>
   556→        </div>
   557→        <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   558→          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   559→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904 9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09 3.09L15.75 12l-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09 3.09ZM18.259 8.715 18 9.75l-.259-1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455-2.456L14.25 6l1.036-.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455-2.456L18 2.25l.259 1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455 2.456L21.75 6l-1.036.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455 2.456Z" />
   560→          </svg>
   561→          Generer une fiche IA
   562→        </button>
   563→      </div>
   564→
   565→      {/* Filtres + recherche */}
   566→      {fiches.length > 0 && (
   567→        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
   568→          <div className="relative flex-1">
   569→            <svg className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   570→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m21 21-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 1 0 5.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0 0 10.607 10.607Z" />
   571→            </svg>
   572→            <input
   573→              type="text"
   574→              placeholder="Rechercher une fiche..."
   575→              value={search}
   576→              onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
   577→              className="input-field w-full pl-9 py-2.5"
   578→            />
   579→          </div>
   580→          {matieres.length > 0 && (
   581→            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   582→              <button
   583→                onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   584→                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   585→                  selectedMatiere === null
   586→                    ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30 shadow-sm shadow-blue-500/10"
   587→                    : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/40"
   588→                }`}
   589→              >
   590→                Toutes
   591→              </button>
   592→              {matieres.map((m) => {
   593→                const mStyle = getMatiereStyle(m.nom);
   594→                const isActive = selectedMatiere === m.id;
   595→                return (
   596→                  <button
   597→                    key={m.id}
   598→                    onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(m.id)}
   599→                    className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-1.5 ${
   600→                      isActive
   601→                        ? `${mStyle.bg} ${mStyle.text} border ${mStyle.border}`
   602→                        : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/40"
   603→                    }`}
   604→                  >
   605→                    <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   606→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={mStyle.icon} />
   607→                    </svg>
   608→                    {m.nom}
   609→                  </button>
   610→                );
   611→              })}
   612→            </div>
   613→          )}
   614→        </div>
   615→      )}
   616→
   617→      {/* Fiches */}
   618→      {fiches.length === 0 ? (
   619→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   620→          <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-5 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500/10 to-violet-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   621→            <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-blue-500/40" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   622→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   623→            </svg>
   624→          </div>
   625→          <p className="text-slate-300 text-lg font-medium mb-2">Aucune fiche de revision</p>
   626→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-6">Generez votre premiere fiche a partir d&apos;un document</p>
   627→          <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary">Generer une fiche IA</button>
   628→        </div>
   629→      ) : filteredFiches.length === 0 ? (
   630→        <div className="text-center py-12">
   631→          <svg className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 text-slate-600" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   632→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m21 21-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 1 0 5.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0 0 10.607 10.607Z" />
   633→          </svg>
   634→          <p className="text-slate-400">Aucune fiche ne correspond a votre recherche.</p>
   635→        </div>
   636→      ) : (
   637→        <div className="space-y-8">
   638→          {groupedFiches.map((group) => {
   639→            const style = getMatiereStyle(group.matiereName);
   640→            return (
   641→              <div key={group.matiereName}>
   642→                {/* Group header */}
   643→                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   644→                  <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${style.bg} border ${style.border}`}>
   645→                    <svg className={`w-4.5 h-4.5 ${style.text}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor" style={{ width: 18, height: 18 }}>
   646→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   647→                    </svg>
   648→                  </div>
   649→                  <div>
   650→                    <h2 className={`text-lg font-semibold ${style.text}`}>{group.matiereName}</h2>
   651→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{group.fiches.length} fiche{group.fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}</p>
   652→                  </div>
   653→                  <div className={`flex-1 h-px ${style.border} border-t ml-2`} />
   654→                </div>
   655→
   656→                {/* Cards grid */}
   657→                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   658→                  {group.fiches.map((fiche) => (
   659→                    <div
   660→                      key={fiche.id}
   661→                      onClick={() => openFiche(fiche.id)}
   662→                      className={`group cursor-pointer rounded-xl border border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-800/30 p-4
   663→                        hover:border-opacity-100 hover:${style.border} hover:bg-slate-800/60
   664→                        transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col`}
   665→                    >
   666→                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2 gap-2">
   667→                        <h3 className={`font-semibold text-sm text-slate-200 group-hover:${style.text} transition-colors line-clamp-2 flex-1`}>
   668→                          {fiche.titre}
   669→                        </h3>
   670→                        <svg className={`w-4 h-4 text-slate-600 group-hover:${style.text} flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 transition-all duration-200 group-hover:translate-x-0.5`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   671→                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
   672→                        </svg>
   673→                      </div>
   674→                      {fiche.resume && (
   675→                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-3 line-clamp-2 flex-1 leading-relaxed">{fiche.resume}</p>
   676→                      )}
   677→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/30 mt-auto">
   678→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`}>
   679→                          <svg className="w-2.5 h-2.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   680→                            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   681→                          </svg>
   682→                          {group.matiereName}
   683→                        </span>
   684→                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 ml-auto flex items-center gap-1">
   685→                          <svg className="w-3 h-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   686→                            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8.25 6.75h12M8.25 12h12m-12 5.25h12M3.75 6.75h.007v.008H3.75V6.75Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM3.75 12h.007v.008H3.75V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm-.375 5.25h.007v.008H3.75v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z" />
   687→                          </svg>
   688→                          {fiche.nb_sections} section{fiche.nb_sections !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
   689→                        </span>
   690→                      </div>
   691→                    </div>
   692→                  ))}
   693→                </div>
   694→              </div>
   695→            );
   696→          })}
   697→        </div>
   698→      )}
   699→
   700→      {/* Modal generation IA */}
   701→      {showGenModal && (
   702→        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => !generating && setShowGenModal(false)}>
   703→          <div
   704→            className="card w-full max-w-lg mx-4 border-slate-600/50 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 animate-in"
   705→            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   706→            style={{ animation: "modalIn 0.2s ease-out" }}
   707→          >
   708→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
   709→              <div className="p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500/20 to-violet-500/20 border border-blue-500/20">
   710→                <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   711→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904 9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09 3.09L15.75 12l-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09 3.09ZM18.259 8.715 18 9.75l-.259-1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455-2.456L14.25 6l1.036-.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455-2.456L18 2.25l.259 1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455 2.456L21.75 6l-1.036.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455 2.456Z" />
   712→                </svg>
   713→              </div>
   714→              <div>
   715→                <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Generer une fiche IA</h2>
   716→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Selectionnez un document source</p>
   717→              </div>
   718→            </div>
   719→            <div className="mb-5">
   720→              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-2">
   721→                Document source
   722→              </label>
   723→              <select
   724→                value={selectedDocId || ""}
   725→                onChange={(e) => setSelectedDocId(parseInt(e.target.value))}
   726→                className="input-field w-full"
   727→              >
   728→                {documents.map((doc) => (
   729→                  <option key={doc.id} value={doc.id}>
   730→                    {doc.titre}
   731→                  </option>
   732→                ))}
   733→              </select>
   734→            </div>
   735→            <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-slate-700/40">
   736→              <button
   737→                onClick={() => setShowGenModal(false)}
   738→                className="btn-ghost"
   739→                disabled={generating}
   740→              >
   741→                Annuler
   742→              </button>
   743→              <button
   744→                onClick={generateFiche}
   745→                className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2"
   746→                disabled={generating || !selectedDocId}
   747→              >
   748→                {generating ? (
   749→                  <>
   750→                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white/30 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
   751→                    Generation en cours...
   752→                  </>
   753→                ) : (
   754→                  <>
   755→                    <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   756→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904 9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09 3.09L15.75 12l-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09 3.09Z" />
   757→                    </svg>
   758→                    Generer
   759→                  </>
   760→                )}
   761→              </button>
   762→            </div>
   763→          </div>
   764→        </div>
   765→      )}
   766→
   767→      {/* Inline keyframe for modal animation */}
   768→      <style jsx>{`
   769→        @keyframes modalIn {
   770→          from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(10px); }
   771→          to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
   772→        }
   773→      `}</style>
   774→    </div>
   775→  );
   776→}
   777→
                ```

                    ## 👤 user (17:32:32)

                    ✅ **Result:**
                    ```
                         1→const getRawAuthToken = (): string => {
     2→  return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_AUTH_TOKEN?.trim() || "";
     3→};
     4→
     5→export const withAuthHeaders = (init: RequestInit = {}): RequestInit => {
     6→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return init;
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  const headers = new Headers(init.headers || {});
    12→  if (!headers.has("Authorization")) {
    13→    headers.set("Authorization", `Bearer ${token}`);
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  return { ...init, headers };
    17→};
    18→
    19→export const withAuthQuery = (url: string): string => {
    20→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
    21→  if (!token) {
    22→    return url;
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
    26→  return `${url}${separator}token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}`;
    27→};
    28→
                    ```

                          ```
    98→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    99→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
   100→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
   101→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   102→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   103→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
   104→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
   105→  const [quizMode, setQuizMode] = useState(false);
   106→  const [availableModels, setAvailableModels] = useState<OllamaModel[]>([]);

   108→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);

   113→  const maxRetries = 5;
   114→
   115→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   116→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   120→
   121→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   122→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   123→
   124→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   125→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   126→  }, []);
   127→
   128→  const connect = useCallback((modelOverride?: string) => {
   129→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   130→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   131→
   132→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   133→    const base = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   134→    const model = modelOverride || selectedModel;
   135→    const wsUrl = model ? `${base}&model=${encodeURIComponent(model)}` : base;
   136→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   137→
   138→    ws.onopen = () => {
   139→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   140→      setIsConnected(true);
   141→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   142→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   143→    };
   144→
   145→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   146→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   147→      setIsConnected(false);
   148→      setIsLoading(false);
   149→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   150→        retriesRef.current++;
   151→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   152→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   153→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   154→        }, 2000);
   155→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   156→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   157→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour réessayer.");
   158→      }
   159→    };
   160→
   161→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   162→
   163→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   164→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   165→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   166→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   167→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   168→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   169→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   170→        setIsLoading(false);
   171→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   172→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   173→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   174→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   175→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   176→        setIsLoading(false);
   177→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_question") {
   178→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   179→          role: "assistant",
   180→          content: data.question,
   181→          timestamp: new Date(),
   182→          quizType: "question",
   183→          flashcardId: data.flashcard_id,
   184→        }]);
   185→        setIsLoading(false);
   186→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_feedback") {
   187→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   188→          role: "assistant",
   189→          content: data.feedback,
   190→          timestamp: new Date(),
   191→          quizType: "feedback",
   192→          note: data.note,
   193→        }]);
   194→        setIsLoading(false);
   195→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   196→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   197→      }
   198→    };
   199→
   200→    wsRef.current = ws;
   201→  }, [addMessage]);
   202→
   203→  useEffect(() => {
   204→    fetch("/api/vocal/models")
   205→      .then((r) => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
   206→      .then((data) => {
   207→        if (data?.models?.length) {
   208→          setAvailableModels(data.models);
   209→          setSelectedModel(data.active || data.models[0].name);
   210→        }
   211→      })
   212→      .catch(() => {});
   213→  }, []);
   214→
   215→  useEffect(() => {
   216→    mountedRef.current = true;
   217→    connect();
   218→    return () => {
   219→      mountedRef.current = false;
   220→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   221→      if (wsRef.current) {
   222→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   223→        wsRef.current = null;
   224→      }
   225→    };
   226→  }, [connect]);
   227→
   228→  const toggleQuizMode = () => {
   229→    const newMode = !quizMode;
   230→    setQuizMode(newMode);
   231→    if (newMode && wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   232→      wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "start_quiz" }));
   233→      setIsLoading(true);
   234→    }
   235→  };
   236→
   237→  const switchModel = (newModel: string) => {
   238→    setSelectedModel(newModel);
   239→    setMessages([]);
   240→    if (wsRef.current) {
   241→      wsRef.current.close(1000);
   242→      wsRef.current = null;
   243→    }
   244→    retriesRef.current = 0;
   245→    setTimeout(() => connect(newModel), 300);
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const startRecording = async () => {
   249→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   250→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   251→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   252→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   253→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   254→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   255→      const reader = new FileReader();
   256→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   257→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   258→        wsRef.current?.send(
   259→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   260→        );
   261→        setIsLoading(true);
   262→      };
   263→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   264→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   265→    };
   266→    recorder.start();
   267→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   268→    setIsRecording(true);
   269→  };
   270→
   271→  const stopRecording = () => {
   272→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   273→    setIsRecording(false);
   274→  };
   275→
   276→  const sendText = () => {
   277→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   278→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   279→    wsRef.current.send(
   280→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   281→    );
   282→    setInputText("");
   283→    setIsLoading(true);
   284→  };
   285→
   286→  return (
   287→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/80 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
   288→      {/* Header */}
   289→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3.5 border-b border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   290→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   291→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   292→          <div>
   293→            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   294→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   295→              {isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
   296→            </span>
   297→          </div>
   298→        </div>
   299→
   300→        {/* Indicateur connexion + sélecteur modèle */}
   301→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   302→          <button
   303→            onClick={toggleQuizMode}
   304→            disabled={!isConnected}
   305→            title={quizMode ? "Désactiver le mode révision" : "Activer le mode révision"}
   306→            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   307→              quizMode
   308→                ? "bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   309→                : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/40 hover:text-violet-300 hover:border-violet-500/30"
   310→            }`}
   311→          >
   312→            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   313→              <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   314→              <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   315→              <path d="M8 7h8M8 17h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   316→            </svg>
   317→            Révision
   318→          </button>
   319→          {availableModels.length > 1 && (
   320→            <select
   321→              value={selectedModel}
   322→              onChange={(e) => switchModel(e.target.value)}
   323→              className="text-xs bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-600/60 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500/60 cursor-pointer"
   324→              title="Changer de modèle IA"
   325→            >
   326→              {availableModels.map((m) => (
   327→                <option key={m.name} value={m.name}>
   328→                  {m.name} ({m.size})
   329→                </option>
   330→              ))}
   331→            </select>
   332→          )}
   333→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   334→            <span
   335→              className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${
   336→                isConnected
   337→                  ? "bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_6px_rgba(16,185,129,0.6)]"
   338→                  : isReconnecting
   339→                  ? "bg-yellow-400 animate-pulse"
   340→                  : "bg-red-500"
   341→              }`}
   342→            />
   343→            <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${
   344→              isConnected ? "text-emerald-400" : isReconnecting ? "text-yellow-400" : "text-red-400"
   345→            }`}>
   346→              {isConnected ? "En ligne" : isReconnecting ? "..." : "Hors ligne"}
   347→            </span>
   348→          </div>
   349→          {onClose && (
   350→            <button
   351→              onClick={onClose}
   352→              className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700"
   353→            >
   354→              <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   355→                <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   356→              </svg>
   357→            </button>
   358→          )}
   359→        </div>
   360→      </div>
   361→
   362→      {/* Messages */}
   363→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-5">
   364→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   365→          <div className="text-center mt-16 space-y-3">
   366→            <div className="mx-auto w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-violet-500/15 border border-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   367→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   368→            </div>
   369→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Posez votre question au professeur…</p>
   370→            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Utilisez le micro ou le clavier ci-dessous</p>
   371→          </div>
   372→        )}
   373→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   374→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   375→            return (
   376→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   377→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   378→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   379→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   380→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   381→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   382→                  </svg>
   383→                  {msg.content}
   384→                </div>
   385→              </div>
   386→            );
   387→          }
   388→
   389→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   390→
   391→          if (msg.quizType === "question") {
   392→            return (
   393→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   394→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   395→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   396→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   397→                    <span className="badge-amber text-[10px]">RÉVISION</span>
   398→                  </div>
   399→                  <div className="rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-100 border-amber-500/20 rounded-bl-sm">
   400→                    <p className="font-semibold mb-1">{msg.content}</p>
   401→                    <p className="text-xs text-amber-300/60 italic">Répondez à voix haute ou par écrit</p>
   402→                  </div>
   403→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   404→                </div>
   405→              </div>
   406→            );
   407→          }
   408→
   409→          if (msg.quizType === "feedback") {
   410→            const note = msg.note ?? 0;
   411→            const isGood = note >= 3;
   412→            return (
   413→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   414→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   415→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   416→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   417→                    <span className={isGood ? "badge-green text-[10px]" : "badge-rose text-[10px]"}>
   418→                      {note}/5
   419→                    </span>
   420→                  </div>
   421→                  <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border rounded-bl-sm ${
   422→                    isGood
   423→                      ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-500/20"
   424→                      : "bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-100 border-rose-500/20"
   425→                  }`}>
   426→                    {msg.content}
   427→                  </div>
   428→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   429→                </div>
   430→              </div>
   431→            );
   432→          }
   433→
   434→          return (
   435→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2.5 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   436→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   437→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   438→                <div className="text-[10px] font-semibold px-1 text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
   439→                  {isUser ? "Vous" : "Prof"}
   440→                </div>
   441→                <div
   442→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border ${
   443→                    isUser
   444→                      ? "bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 border-blue-500/20 rounded-br-sm"
   445→                      : "bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-100 border-violet-500/20 rounded-bl-sm"
   446→                  }`}
   447→                >
   448→                  {msg.content}
   449→                </div>
   450→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">
   451→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   452→                </span>
   453→              </div>
   454→            </div>
   455→          );
   456→        })}
   457→        {isLoading && (
   458→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   459→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   460→            <div className="bg-violet-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3">
   461→              <ThinkingDots />
   462→            </div>
   463→          </div>
   464→        )}
   465→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   466→      </div>
   467→
   468→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   469→      {isRecording && (
   470→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-2.5 bg-red-900/25 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm font-medium">
   471→          <SoundWave />
   472→          <span>Enregistrement en cours…</span>
   473→          <SoundWave />
   474→        </div>
   475→      )}
   476→
   477→      {/* Input */}
   478→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/30">
   479→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800/80 rounded-2xl border border-slate-600/60 focus-within:border-violet-500/60 transition-colors px-4">
   480→          <input
   481→            type="text"
   482→            value={inputText}
   483→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   484→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   485→            placeholder="Posez votre question au professeur..."
   486→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-4 text-sm focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   487→          />
   488→          <button
   489→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   490→            disabled={!isConnected}
   491→            title={isRecording ? "Arrêter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   492→            className={`p-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   493→              isRecording
   494→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 shadow-lg shadow-red-900/40 animate-pulse"
   495→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-500/10"
   496→            }`}
   497→          >
   498→            <MicIcon />
   499→          </button>
   500→          <button
   501→            onClick={sendText}
   502→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   503→            title="Envoyer"
   504→            className="p-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   505→          >
   506→            <SendIcon />
   507→          </button>
   508→        </div>
   509→      </div>
   510→    </div>
   511→  );
   512→}
   513→
                          ```
