              ```
    97→
    98→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    99→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
   100→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
   101→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   102→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   103→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
   104→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
   105→  const [quizMode, setQuizMode] = useState(false);
   106→  const [availableModels, setAvailableModels] = useState<OllamaModel[]>([]);
   107→  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState<string>("");
   108→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
   109→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
   110→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
   111→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   112→  const retriesRef = useRef(0);
   113→  const maxRetries = 5;
   114→
   115→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   116→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   120→
   121→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   122→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   123→
   124→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   125→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   126→  }, []);
   127→
   128→  const connect = useCallback((modelOverride?: string) => {
   129→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   130→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   131→
   132→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   133→    const base = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   134→    const model = modelOverride || selectedModel;
   135→    const wsUrl = model ? `${base}&model=${encodeURIComponent(model)}` : base;
   136→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   137→
   138→    ws.onopen = () => {
   139→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   140→      setIsConnected(true);
   141→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   142→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   143→    };
   144→
   145→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   146→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   147→      setIsConnected(false);
   148→      setIsLoading(false);
   149→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   150→        retriesRef.current++;
   151→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   152→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   153→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   154→        }, 2000);
   155→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   156→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   157→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour réessayer.");
   158→      }
   159→    };
   160→
   161→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   162→
   163→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   164→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   165→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   166→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   167→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   168→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   169→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   170→        setIsLoading(false);
   171→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   172→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   173→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   174→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   175→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   176→        setIsLoading(false);
   177→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_question") {
   178→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   179→          role: "assistant",
   180→          content: data.question,
   181→          timestamp: new Date(),
   182→          quizType: "question",
   183→          flashcardId: data.flashcard_id,
   184→        }]);
   185→        setIsLoading(false);
   186→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_feedback") {
   187→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   188→          role: "assistant",
   189→          content: data.feedback,
   190→          timestamp: new Date(),
   191→          quizType: "feedback",
   192→          note: data.note,
   193→        }]);
   194→        setIsLoading(false);
   195→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   196→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   197→      }
   198→    };
   199→
   200→    wsRef.current = ws;
   201→  }, [addMessage]);
   202→
   203→  useEffect(() => {
   204→    fetch("/api/vocal/models")
   205→      .then((r) => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
   206→      .then((data) => {
   207→        if (data?.models?.length) {
   208→          setAvailableModels(data.models);
   209→          setSelectedModel(data.active || data.models[0].name);
   210→        }
   211→      })
   212→      .catch(() => {});
   213→  }, []);
   214→
   215→  useEffect(() => {
   216→    mountedRef.current = true;
   217→    connect();
   218→    return () => {
   219→      mountedRef.current = false;
   220→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   221→      if (wsRef.current) {
   222→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   223→        wsRef.current = null;
   224→      }
   225→    };
   226→  }, [connect]);
   227→
   228→  const toggleQuizMode = () => {
   229→    const newMode = !quizMode;
   230→    setQuizMode(newMode);
   231→    if (newMode && wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   232→      wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "start_quiz" }));
   233→      setIsLoading(true);
   234→    }
   235→  };
   236→
   237→  const switchModel = (newModel: string) => {
   238→    setSelectedModel(newModel);
   239→    setMessages([]);
   240→    if (wsRef.current) {
   241→      wsRef.current.close(1000);
   242→      wsRef.current = null;
   243→    }
   244→    retriesRef.current = 0;
   245→    setTimeout(() => connect(newModel), 300);
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const startRecording = async () => {
   249→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   250→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   251→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   252→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   253→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   254→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   255→      const reader = new FileReader();
   256→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   257→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   258→        wsRef.current?.send(
   259→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   260→        );
   261→        setIsLoading(true);
   262→      };
   263→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   264→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   265→    };
   266→    recorder.start();
   267→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   268→    setIsRecording(true);
   269→  };
   270→
   271→  const stopRecording = () => {
   272→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   273→    setIsRecording(false);
   274→  };
   275→
   276→  const sendText = () => {
   277→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   278→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   279→    wsRef.current.send(
   280→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   281→    );
   282→    setInputText("");
   283→    setIsLoading(true);
   284→  };
   285→
   286→  return (
   287→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/80 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
   288→      {/* Header */}
   289→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3.5 border-b border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   290→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   291→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   292→          <div>
   293→            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   294→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   295→              {isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
   296→            </span>
   297→          </div>
   298→        </div>
   299→
   300→        {/* Indicateur connexion + sélecteur modèle */}
   301→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   302→          <button
   303→            onClick={toggleQuizMode}
   304→            disabled={!isConnected}
   305→            title={quizMode ? "Désactiver le mode révision" : "Activer le mode révision"}
   306→            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   307→              quizMode
   308→                ? "bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   309→                : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/40 hover:text-violet-300 hover:border-violet-500/30"
   310→            }`}
   311→          >
   312→            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   313→              <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   314→              <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   315→              <path d="M8 7h8M8 17h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   316→            </svg>
   317→            Révision
   318→          </button>
   319→          {availableModels.length > 1 && (
   320→            <select
   321→              value={selectedModel}
   322→              onChange={(e) => switchModel(e.target.value)}
   323→              className="text-xs bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-600/60 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500/60 cursor-pointer"
   324→              title="Changer de modèle IA"
   325→            >
   326→              {availableModels.map((m) => (
   327→                <option key={m.name} value={m.name}>
   328→                  {m.name} ({m.size})
   329→                </option>
   330→              ))}
   331→            </select>
   332→          )}
   333→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   334→            <span
   335→              className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${
   336→                isConnected
   337→                  ? "bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_6px_rgba(16,185,129,0.6)]"
   338→                  : isReconnecting
   339→                  ? "bg-yellow-400 animate-pulse"
   340→                  : "bg-red-500"
   341→              }`}
   342→            />
   343→            <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${
   344→              isConnected ? "text-emerald-400" : isReconnecting ? "text-yellow-400" : "text-red-400"
   345→            }`}>
   346→              {isConnected ? "En ligne" : isReconnecting ? "..." : "Hors ligne"}
   347→            </span>
   348→          </div>
   349→          {onClose && (
   350→            <button
   351→              onClick={onClose}
   352→              className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700"
   353→            >
   354→              <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   355→                <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   356→              </svg>
   357→            </button>
   358→          )}
   359→        </div>
   360→      </div>
   361→
   362→      {/* Messages */}
   363→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-5">
   364→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   365→          <div className="text-center mt-16 space-y-3">
   366→            <div className="mx-auto w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-violet-500/15 border border-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   367→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   368→            </div>
   369→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Posez votre question au professeur…</p>
   370→            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Utilisez le micro ou le clavier ci-dessous</p>
   371→          </div>
   372→        )}
   373→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   374→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   375→            return (
   376→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   377→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   378→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   379→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   380→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   381→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   382→                  </svg>
   383→                  {msg.content}
   384→                </div>
   385→              </div>
   386→            );
   387→          }
   388→
   389→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   390→
   391→          if (msg.quizType === "question") {
   392→            return (
   393→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   394→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   395→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   396→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   397→                    <span className="badge-amber text-[10px]">RÉVISION</span>
   398→                  </div>
   399→                  <div className="rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-100 border-amber-500/20 rounded-bl-sm">
   400→                    <p className="font-semibold mb-1">{msg.content}</p>
   401→                    <p className="text-xs text-amber-300/60 italic">Répondez à voix haute ou par écrit</p>
   402→                  </div>
   403→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   404→                </div>
   405→              </div>
   406→            );
   407→          }
   408→
   409→          if (msg.quizType === "feedback") {
   410→            const note = msg.note ?? 0;
   411→            const isGood = note >= 3;
   412→            return (
   413→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   414→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   415→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   416→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   417→                    <span className={isGood ? "badge-green text-[10px]" : "badge-rose text-[10px]"}>
   418→                      {note}/5
   419→                    </span>
   420→                  </div>
   421→                  <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border rounded-bl-sm ${
   422→                    isGood
   423→                      ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-500/20"
   424→                      : "bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-100 border-rose-500/20"
   425→                  }`}>
   426→                    {msg.content}
   427→                  </div>
   428→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   429→                </div>
   430→              </div>
   431→            );
   432→          }
   433→
   434→          return (
   435→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2.5 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   436→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   437→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   438→                <div className="text-[10px] font-semibold px-1 text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
   439→                  {isUser ? "Vous" : "Prof"}
   440→                </div>
   441→                <div
   442→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border ${
   443→                    isUser
   444→                      ? "bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 border-blue-500/20 rounded-br-sm"
   445→                      : "bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-100 border-violet-500/20 rounded-bl-sm"
   446→                  }`}
   447→                >
   448→                  {msg.content}
   449→                </div>
   450→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">
   451→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   452→                </span>
   453→              </div>
   454→            </div>
   455→          );
   456→        })}
   457→        {isLoading && (
   458→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   459→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   460→            <div className="bg-violet-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3">
   461→              <ThinkingDots />
   462→            </div>
   463→          </div>
   464→        )}
   465→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   466→      </div>
   467→
   468→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   469→      {isRecording && (
   470→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-2.5 bg-red-900/25 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm font-medium">
   471→          <SoundWave />
   472→          <span>Enregistrement en cours…</span>
   473→          <SoundWave />
   474→        </div>
   475→      )}
   476→
   477→      {/* Input */}
   478→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/30">
   479→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800/80 rounded-2xl border border-slate-600/60 focus-within:border-violet-500/60 transition-colors px-4">
   480→          <input
   481→            type="text"
   482→            value={inputText}
   483→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   484→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   485→            placeholder="Posez votre question au professeur..."
   486→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-4 text-sm focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   487→          />
   488→          <button
   489→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   490→            disabled={!isConnected}
   491→            title={isRecording ? "Arrêter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   492→            className={`p-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   493→              isRecording
   494→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 shadow-lg shadow-red-900/40 animate-pulse"
   495→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-500/10"
   496→            }`}
   497→          >
   498→            <MicIcon />
   499→          </button>
   500→          <button
   501→            onClick={sendText}
   502→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   503→            title="Envoyer"
   504→            className="p-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   505→          >
   506→            <SendIcon />
   507→          </button>
   508→        </div>
   509→      </div>
   510→    </div>
   511→  );
   512→}
   513→
              ```

                                                    Clean up the timer on unmount:

                                                      ## 🤖 assistant (05:18:56)

                                                      🔧 **Tool:** Edit

---

## Changes made

### 1. `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`
- **System prompt rewritten** to instruct the LLM to act as a conversational tutor: concise (2-3 sentences), pedagogical, encouraging, and always ending with a follow-up question ("As-tu une autre question sur ce sujet ?", "Veux-tu que j'approfondisse un point ?", etc.)
- **Token limits adjusted** slightly upward for `qwen2:0.5b` (180 -> 200) to accommodate the follow-up question, while reducing `phi3:mini` (300 -> 250) and `mistral` (350 -> 300) for faster responses
- Word limit changed from 120 to 150 to fit the follow-up question naturally

### 2. `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx`
- **Auto-focus**: Input field gets focus automatically after each professor response (100ms delay for render)
- **Idle hint**: After 5 seconds of no user input following a professor response, a subtle pulsing banner appears: "Le prof attend votre réponse..."
- **Conversation indicator**: Header subtitle changes from "Connecte" to "Conversation en cours" with a pulsing green dot once the conversation has started
- **Dynamic placeholder**: Input placeholder changes to "Continuez la conversation..." when the waiting hint is active
- **Empty state updated**: Initial text now says "Commencez une conversation avec le professeur" to set the conversational tone
- All timers properly cleaned up on unmount and on new user input

### Verification
- `python -m compileall` on both backend files: passed
- `npx tsc --noEmit` on frontend: passed (0 errors)
- Quiz mode, audio recording, and all existing WebSocket message types remain untouched

## File 1: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`

### Change A — System prompt rewritten (line 33)

**Before:**
```
Tu es un professeur expert en droit public et sciences administratives qui prépare des candidats aux concours IRA et INSP. Règles absolues:
- Réponds UNIQUEMENT en français correct
- Maximum 3 phrases courtes et précises
- Donne une définition juridique exacte, puis un exemple concret français
- Cite une loi, un arrêt ou un article si pertinent
- Ne jamais dépasser 120 mots
- Si tu ne sais pas: dis-le clairement sans inventer
```

**After:**
```
Tu es un professeur particulier qui prépare un étudiant aux concours administratifs (INSP/IRA). Tu es expert en droit public et sciences administratives. Règles absolues:
- Réponds de manière concise (2-3 phrases maximum)
- Réponds UNIQUEMENT en français correct
- Donne une définition juridique exacte, puis un exemple concret français
- Cite une loi, un arrêt ou un article si pertinent
- Termine TOUJOURS ta réponse par une question de relance pour continuer la conversation (ex: "As-tu une autre question sur ce sujet ?", "Veux-tu que j'approfondisse un point ?", "Souhaites-tu un exemple concret ?")
- Sois pédagogique, encourageant et direct
- Si tu ne sais pas: dis-le clairement sans inventer
- Ne jamais dépasser 150 mots
```

Key differences:
- Tone changed from "expert professor" to "personal tutor" (`professeur particulier`)
- Added mandatory follow-up question rule with 3 examples
- Added `pédagogique, encourageant et direct` personality instruction
- Word limit raised from 120 to 150 to accommodate the follow-up question
- "Maximum 3 phrases courtes et précises" replaced with "2-3 phrases maximum"

### Change B — Token limits adjusted (line 46-50)

**Before:**
```python
MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS: dict[str, int] = {
    "qwen2:0.5b": 180,
    "tinyllama": 200,
    "phi3:mini": 300,
    "mistral:latest": 350,
}
```

**After:**
```python
MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS: dict[str, int] = {
    "qwen2:0.5b": 200,
    "tinyllama": 200,
    "phi3:mini": 250,
    "mistral:latest": 300,
}
```

Rationale: `qwen2:0.5b` bumped from 180 to 200 so the follow-up question fits; `phi3:mini` and `mistral` reduced for faster generation.

---

## File 2: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx`

### Change C — New state and refs added

Added after existing state declarations:
```typescript
const [waitingHint, setWaitingHint] = useState(false);
const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
const waitingTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
```

### Change D — Auto-focus + idle hint on professor response (in `ws.onmessage`)

The `data.type === "text"` handler gained 5 new lines:
```typescript
} else if (data.type === "text") {
  addMessage("assistant", data.message);
  setIsLoading(false);
  setWaitingHint(false);                                          // new
  if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current); // new
  waitingTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {                    // new
    if (mountedRef.current) setWaitingHint(true);                 // new — shows hint after 5s idle
  }, 5000);                                                       // new
  setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);               // new — auto-focus input
}
```

### Change E — Clear hint on `sendText()`

Added at the top of `sendText()`:
```typescript
setWaitingHint(false);
if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
```

### Change F — Clear hint on `startRecording()`

Added at the top of `startRecording()`:
```typescript
setWaitingHint(false);
if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
```

### Change G — Cleanup timer on unmount

Added in the cleanup return of the `useEffect` that manages the WebSocket:
```typescript
if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
```

### Change H — Header conversation indicator

**Before:**
```tsx
<span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
  {isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
</span>
```

**After:**
```tsx
<span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
  {isConnected && messages.length > 0 ? (
    <>
      <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-pulse" />
      Conversation en cours
    </>
  ) : isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
</span>
```

Shows a pulsing green dot with "Conversation en cours" once the user has started chatting.

### Change I — Waiting hint banner (new JSX block before input)

```tsx
{waitingHint && !isLoading && isConnected && (
  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 bg-violet-900/15 border-t border-violet-800/20 text-violet-300/70 text-xs animate-pulse">
    <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400/60" />
    Le prof attend votre réponse...
  </div>
)}
```

Appears between the messages area and the input bar after 5 seconds of user inactivity following a professor response.

### Change J — Input ref + dynamic placeholder

**Before:**
```tsx
<input
  type="text"
  ...
  placeholder="Posez votre question au professeur..."
```

**After:**
```tsx
<input
  ref={inputRef}
  type="text"
  ...
  placeholder={waitingHint ? "Continuez la conversation..." : "Posez votre question au professeur..."}
```

### Change K — Empty state wording

**Before:**
```
Posez votre question au professeur…
Utilisez le micro ou le clavier ci-dessous
```

**After:**
```
Commencez une conversation avec le professeur
Posez une question et le prof vous guidera naturellement
```

---

- `backend/app/routers/vocal.py` — no modifications needed; the conversational behavior comes from the system prompt in `ollama_service.py`
- Quiz mode (`start_quiz`, `quiz_answer`, `quiz_feedback`) — completely untouched
- Audio recording/transcription flow — untouched
- WebSocket protocol, heartbeat, auth, reconnection logic — untouched
- All other frontend pages and components — untouched

              ```
    57→function SoundWave() {

    60→      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((i) => (
    61→        <div
    62→          key={i}

    94→function formatTime(date: Date) {
    95→  return date.toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
    96→}
    97→
    98→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    99→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
   100→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
   101→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   102→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   103→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
   104→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
   105→  const [quizMode, setQuizMode] = useState(false);
   106→  const [availableModels, setAvailableModels] = useState<OllamaModel[]>([]);
   107→  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState<string>("");
   108→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
   109→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
   110→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
   111→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   112→  const retriesRef = useRef(0);
   113→  const maxRetries = 5;
   114→
   115→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   116→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   120→
   121→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   122→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   123→
   124→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   125→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   126→  }, []);
   127→
   128→  const connect = useCallback((modelOverride?: string) => {
   129→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   130→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   131→
   132→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   133→    const base = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   134→    const model = modelOverride || selectedModel;
   135→    const wsUrl = model ? `${base}&model=${encodeURIComponent(model)}` : base;
   136→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   137→
   138→    ws.onopen = () => {
   139→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   140→      setIsConnected(true);
   141→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   142→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   143→    };
   144→
   145→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   146→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   147→      setIsConnected(false);
   148→      setIsLoading(false);
   149→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   150→        retriesRef.current++;
   151→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   152→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   153→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   154→        }, 2000);
   155→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   156→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   157→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour réessayer.");
   158→      }
   159→    };
   160→
   161→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   162→
   163→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   164→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   165→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   166→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   167→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   168→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   169→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   170→        setIsLoading(false);
   171→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   172→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   173→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   174→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   175→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   176→        setIsLoading(false);
   177→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_question") {
   178→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   179→          role: "assistant",
   180→          content: data.question,
   181→          timestamp: new Date(),
   182→          quizType: "question",
   183→          flashcardId: data.flashcard_id,
   184→        }]);
   185→        setIsLoading(false);
   186→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_feedback") {
   187→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   188→          role: "assistant",
   189→          content: data.feedback,
   190→          timestamp: new Date(),
   191→          quizType: "feedback",
   192→          note: data.note,
   193→        }]);
   194→        setIsLoading(false);
   195→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   196→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   197→      }
   198→    };
   199→
   200→    wsRef.current = ws;
   201→  }, [addMessage]);
   202→
   203→  useEffect(() => {
   204→    fetch("/api/vocal/models")
   205→      .then((r) => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
   206→      .then((data) => {
   207→        if (data?.models?.length) {
   208→          setAvailableModels(data.models);
   209→          setSelectedModel(data.active || data.models[0].name);
   210→        }
   211→      })
   212→      .catch(() => {});
   213→  }, []);
   214→
   215→  useEffect(() => {
   216→    mountedRef.current = true;
   217→    connect();
   218→    return () => {
   219→      mountedRef.current = false;
   220→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   221→      if (wsRef.current) {
   222→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   223→        wsRef.current = null;
   224→      }
   225→    };
   226→  }, [connect]);
   227→
   228→  const toggleQuizMode = () => {
   229→    const newMode = !quizMode;
   230→    setQuizMode(newMode);
   231→    if (newMode && wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   232→      wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "start_quiz" }));
   233→      setIsLoading(true);
   234→    }
   235→  };
   236→
   237→  const switchModel = (newModel: string) => {
   238→    setSelectedModel(newModel);
   239→    setMessages([]);
   240→    if (wsRef.current) {
   241→      wsRef.current.close(1000);
   242→      wsRef.current = null;
   243→    }
   244→    retriesRef.current = 0;
   245→    setTimeout(() => connect(newModel), 300);
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const startRecording = async () => {
   249→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   250→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   251→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   252→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   253→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   254→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   255→      const reader = new FileReader();
   256→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   257→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   258→        wsRef.current?.send(
   259→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   260→        );
   261→        setIsLoading(true);
   262→      };
   263→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   264→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   265→    };
   266→    recorder.start();
   267→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   268→    setIsRecording(true);
   269→  };
   270→
   271→  const stopRecording = () => {
   272→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   273→    setIsRecording(false);
   274→  };
   275→
   276→  const sendText = () => {
   277→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   278→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   279→    wsRef.current.send(
   280→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   281→    );
   282→    setInputText("");
   283→    setIsLoading(true);
   284→  };
   285→
   286→  return (
   287→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/80 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
   288→      {/* Header */}
   289→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3.5 border-b border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   290→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   291→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   292→          <div>
   293→            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   294→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   295→              {isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
   296→            </span>
   297→          </div>
   298→        </div>
   299→
   300→        {/* Indicateur connexion + sélecteur modèle */}
   301→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   302→          <button
   303→            onClick={toggleQuizMode}
   304→            disabled={!isConnected}
   305→            title={quizMode ? "Désactiver le mode révision" : "Activer le mode révision"}
   306→            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   307→              quizMode
   308→                ? "bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   309→                : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/40 hover:text-violet-300 hover:border-violet-500/30"
   310→            }`}
   311→          >
   312→            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   313→              <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   314→              <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   315→              <path d="M8 7h8M8 17h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   316→            </svg>
   317→            Révision
   318→          </button>
   319→          {availableModels.length > 1 && (
   320→            <select
   321→              value={selectedModel}
   322→              onChange={(e) => switchModel(e.target.value)}
   323→              className="text-xs bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-600/60 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500/60 cursor-pointer"
   324→              title="Changer de modèle IA"
   325→            >
   326→              {availableModels.map((m) => (
   327→                <option key={m.name} value={m.name}>
   328→                  {m.name} ({m.size})
   329→                </option>
   330→              ))}
   331→            </select>
   332→          )}
   333→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   334→            <span
   335→              className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${
   336→                isConnected
   337→                  ? "bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_6px_rgba(16,185,129,0.6)]"
   338→                  : isReconnecting
   339→                  ? "bg-yellow-400 animate-pulse"
   340→                  : "bg-red-500"
   341→              }`}
   342→            />
   343→            <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${
   344→              isConnected ? "text-emerald-400" : isReconnecting ? "text-yellow-400" : "text-red-400"
   345→            }`}>
   346→              {isConnected ? "En ligne" : isReconnecting ? "..." : "Hors ligne"}
   347→            </span>
   348→          </div>
   349→          {onClose && (
   350→            <button
   351→              onClick={onClose}
   352→              className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700"
   353→            >
   354→              <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   355→                <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   356→              </svg>
   357→            </button>
   358→          )}
   359→        </div>
   360→      </div>
   361→
   362→      {/* Messages */}
   363→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-5">
   364→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   365→          <div className="text-center mt-16 space-y-3">
   366→            <div className="mx-auto w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-violet-500/15 border border-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   367→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   368→            </div>
   369→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Posez votre question au professeur…</p>
   370→            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Utilisez le micro ou le clavier ci-dessous</p>
   371→          </div>
   372→        )}
   373→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   374→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   375→            return (
   376→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   377→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   378→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   379→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   380→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   381→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   382→                  </svg>
   383→                  {msg.content}
   384→                </div>
   385→              </div>
   386→            );
   387→          }
   388→
   389→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   390→
   391→          if (msg.quizType === "question") {
   392→            return (
   393→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   394→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   395→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   396→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   397→                    <span className="badge-amber text-[10px]">RÉVISION</span>
   398→                  </div>
   399→                  <div className="rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-100 border-amber-500/20 rounded-bl-sm">
   400→                    <p className="font-semibold mb-1">{msg.content}</p>
   401→                    <p className="text-xs text-amber-300/60 italic">Répondez à voix haute ou par écrit</p>
   402→                  </div>
   403→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   404→                </div>
   405→              </div>
   406→            );
   407→          }
   408→
   409→          if (msg.quizType === "feedback") {
   410→            const note = msg.note ?? 0;
   411→            const isGood = note >= 3;
   412→            return (
   413→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   414→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   415→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   416→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   417→                    <span className={isGood ? "badge-green text-[10px]" : "badge-rose text-[10px]"}>
   418→                      {note}/5
   419→                    </span>
   420→                  </div>
   421→                  <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border rounded-bl-sm ${
   422→                    isGood
   423→                      ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-500/20"
   424→                      : "bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-100 border-rose-500/20"
   425→                  }`}>
   426→                    {msg.content}
   427→                  </div>
   428→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   429→                </div>
   430→              </div>
   431→            );
   432→          }
   433→
   434→          return (
   435→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2.5 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   436→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   437→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   438→                <div className="text-[10px] font-semibold px-1 text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
   439→                  {isUser ? "Vous" : "Prof"}
   440→                </div>
   441→                <div
   442→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border ${
   443→                    isUser
   444→                      ? "bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 border-blue-500/20 rounded-br-sm"
   445→                      : "bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-100 border-violet-500/20 rounded-bl-sm"
   446→                  }`}
   447→                >
   448→                  {msg.content}
   449→                </div>
   450→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">
   451→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   452→                </span>
   453→              </div>
   454→            </div>
   455→          );
   456→        })}
   457→        {isLoading && (
   458→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   459→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   460→            <div className="bg-violet-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3">
   461→              <ThinkingDots />
   462→            </div>
   463→          </div>
   464→        )}
   465→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   466→      </div>
   467→
   468→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   469→      {isRecording && (
   470→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-2.5 bg-red-900/25 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm font-medium">
   471→          <SoundWave />
   472→          <span>Enregistrement en cours…</span>
   473→          <SoundWave />
   474→        </div>
   475→      )}
   476→
   477→      {/* Input */}
   478→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/30">
   479→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800/80 rounded-2xl border border-slate-600/60 focus-within:border-violet-500/60 transition-colors px-4">
   480→          <input
   481→            type="text"
   482→            value={inputText}
   483→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   484→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   485→            placeholder="Posez votre question au professeur..."
   486→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-4 text-sm focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   487→          />
   488→          <button
   489→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   490→            disabled={!isConnected}
   491→            title={isRecording ? "Arrêter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   492→            className={`p-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   493→              isRecording
   494→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 shadow-lg shadow-red-900/40 animate-pulse"
   495→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-500/10"
   496→            }`}
   497→          >
   498→            <MicIcon />
   499→          </button>
   500→          <button
   501→            onClick={sendText}
   502→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   503→            title="Envoyer"
   504→            className="p-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   505→          >
   506→            <SendIcon />
   507→          </button>
   508→        </div>
   509→      </div>
   510→    </div>
   511→  );
   512→}
   513→
              ```

          ```
               1→import asyncio
     2→import sqlite3
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→import httpx
     6→
     7→from app.config import settings
     8→
     9→_DB_PATH = Path(settings.database_url.replace("sqlite:///", ""))
    10→
    11→
    12→def _rag_context(question: str, max_results: int = 3) -> str:
    13→    """Fetch the most relevant flashcard Q/A pairs from the local DB as context."""
    14→    try:
    15→        words = [w.lower() for w in question.split() if len(w) > 4]
    16→        if not words:
    17→            return ""
    18→        conn = sqlite3.connect(str(_DB_PATH))
    19→        placeholders = " OR ".join(["LOWER(question) LIKE ?" for _ in words[:5]])
    20→        params = [f"%{w}%" for w in words[:5]]
    21→        rows = conn.execute(
    22→            f"SELECT question, reponse FROM flashcards WHERE {placeholders} LIMIT ?",
    23→            params + [max_results],
    24→        ).fetchall()
    25→        conn.close()
    26→        if not rows:
    27→            return ""
    28→        snippets = [f"Q: {r[0]}\nR: {r[1][:200]}" for r in rows]
    29→        return "Fiches de cours pertinentes:\n" + "\n\n".join(snippets)
    30→    except Exception:
    31→        return ""
    32→
    33→SYSTEM_PROMPT = """Tu es un professeur expert en droit public et sciences administratives qui prépare des candidats aux concours IRA et INSP. Règles absolues:
    34→- Réponds UNIQUEMENT en français correct
    35→- Maximum 3 phrases courtes et précises
    36→- Donne une définition juridique exacte, puis un exemple concret français
    37→- Cite une loi, un arrêt ou un article si pertinent
    38→- Ne jamais dépasser 120 mots
    39→- Si tu ne sais pas: dis-le clairement sans inventer"""
    40→
    41→# Preferred models in order of priority (lightest first for low-RAM machines)
    42→PREFERRED_MODELS = ["qwen2:0.5b", "phi3:mini", "tinyllama", "mistral:latest"]
    43→
    44→# Token limits per model to control response length and TTS compatibility
    45→MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS: dict[str, int] = {
    46→    "qwen2:0.5b": 180,
    47→    "tinyllama": 200,
    48→    "phi3:mini": 300,
    49→    "mistral:latest": 350,
    50→}
    51→
    52→
    53→async def _get_best_model() -> str:
    54→    """Find the best available model from preferred list."""
    55→    try:
    56→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    57→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    58→            if tags_resp.status_code == 200:
    59→                available = [m["name"] for m in tags_resp.json().get("models", [])]
    60→                for model in PREFERRED_MODELS:
    61→                    if model in available:
    62→                        return model
    63→                # Fallback: use first available model
    64→                if available:
    65→                    return available[0]
    66→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    67→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    68→    raise RuntimeError(f"Aucun modele disponible. Lancez: ollama pull qwen2:0.5b")
    69→
    70→
    71→def _format_size(size_in_bytes: int | None) -> str:
    72→    """Format model size in GB with one decimal place."""
    73→    if not isinstance(size_in_bytes, int) or size_in_bytes <= 0:
    74→        return "N/A"
    75→    return f"{size_in_bytes / (1024 ** 3):.1f}GB"
    76→
    77→
    78→async def list_models() -> list[dict[str, str]]:
    79→    """List Ollama models with a human-readable size."""
    80→    try:
    81→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    82→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    83→            tags_resp.raise_for_status()
    84→            raw_models = tags_resp.json().get("models", [])
    85→            return [
    86→                {
    87→                    "name": model.get("name", ""),
    88→                    "size": _format_size(model.get("size")),
    89→                }
    90→                for model in raw_models
    91→                if model.get("name")
    92→            ]
    93→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    94→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    95→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
    96→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
    97→
    98→
    99→async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None, model: str | None = None) -> str:
   100→    """Send a message to Ollama and get a response, enriched with RAG context."""
   101→    if model is None:
   102→        model = await _get_best_model()
   103→
   104→    num_predict = MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS.get(model, 250)
   105→
   106→    rag = await asyncio.to_thread(_rag_context, message)
   107→    system = SYSTEM_PROMPT
   108→    if rag:
   109→        system = f"{SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\n{rag}"
   110→
   111→    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": system}]
   112→    if historique:
   113→        messages.extend(historique)
   114→    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
   115→
   116→    try:
   117→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=90.0) as client:
   118→            response = await client.post(
   119→                f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
   120→                json={
   121→                    "model": model,
   122→                    "messages": messages,
   123→                    "stream": False,
   124→                    "options": {
   125→                        "temperature": 0.5,
   126→                        "num_predict": num_predict,
   127→                        "repeat_penalty": 1.1,
   128→                    },
   129→                },
   130→            )
   131→            response.raise_for_status()
   132→            data = response.json()
   133→            return data["message"]["content"]
   134→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
   135→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
   136→    except httpx.TimeoutException:
   137→        raise RuntimeError(f"Ollama timeout (>90s) avec {model}. Memoire insuffisante ou modele trop lourd.")
   138→
   139→
   140→async def evaluer_reponse(question: str, reponse_attendue: str, reponse_etudiant: str, model: str | None = None) -> str:
   141→    """Evaluate a student's answer against the expected answer and provide pedagogical feedback."""
   142→    prompt = f"""Compare la réponse de l'étudiant à la réponse attendue.
   143→
   144→Question: {question}
   145→Réponse attendue: {reponse_attendue}
   146→Réponse de l'étudiant: {reponse_etudiant}
   147→
   148→Donne un feedback pédagogique: ce qui est correct, ce qui manque, et une note sur 5.
   149→Sois encourageant mais précis."""
   150→    return await chat(prompt, model=model)
   151→
   152→
   153→async def interroger_sur_document(contenu: str, question: str) -> str:
   154→    """Ask Ollama a question about a specific document content."""
   155→    prompt = f"""Voici un extrait de document de cours:
   156→
   157→{contenu[:3000]}
   158→
   159→Question de l'étudiant: {question}
   160→
   161→Réponds de manière pédagogique en te basant sur le document."""
   162→
   163→    return await chat(prompt)
   164→
   165→
   166→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
   167→    """Check if Ollama is running and accessible."""
   168→    try:
   169→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
   170→            response = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
   171→            return response.status_code == 200
   172→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
   173→        return False
   174→
          ```

      ```
           1→import asyncio
     2→import base64
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→import random
     6→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     7→
     8→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     9→from sqlalchemy import select
    10→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    11→
    12→from app.database import get_db
    13→from app.models.flashcard import Flashcard
    14→from app.security import verify_ws_token
    15→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
    16→
    17→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    18→router = APIRouter()
    19→
    20→SUMMARY_PREFIX = "[Résumé précédent:]"
    21→MAX_EXCHANGES_BEFORE_SUMMARY = 10
    22→SUMMARY_SOURCE_MESSAGES = 6
    23→SUMMARY_TRUNCATE_CHARS = 50
    24→RECENT_MESSAGES_TO_KEEP = 4
    25→
    26→
    27→def _build_history_summary(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    28→    """Create a compact text summary from the oldest messages."""
    29→    snippets: list[str] = []
    30→    for message in messages[:SUMMARY_SOURCE_MESSAGES]:
    31→        content = message.get("content", "")
    32→        compact = " ".join(str(content).split())
    33→        snippets.append(compact[:SUMMARY_TRUNCATE_CHARS])
    34→    return f"{SUMMARY_PREFIX} {' | '.join(snippets)}"
    35→
    36→
    37→def _compact_history(messages: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    38→    """Keep recent messages and summarize older ones when history grows too much."""
    39→    max_messages = MAX_EXCHANGES_BEFORE_SUMMARY * 2
    40→    if len(messages) <= max_messages:
    41→        return messages
    42→    summary_message = {"role": "system", "content": _build_history_summary(messages)}
    43→    return [summary_message] + messages[-RECENT_MESSAGES_TO_KEEP:]
    44→
    45→
    46→async def _pick_random_flashcard(db: AsyncSession, matiere_id: int | None = None) -> Flashcard:
    47→    """Pick a random flashcard, preferring due ones."""
    48→    query = select(Flashcard)
    49→    if matiere_id:
    50→        query = query.filter(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    51→    result = await db.execute(
    52→        query.filter(Flashcard.prochaine_revision <= datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    53→    )
    54→    due = result.scalars().all()
    55→    if not due:
    56→        result = await db.execute(query)
    57→        due = result.scalars().all()
    58→    if not due:
    59→        raise HTTPException(404, "Aucune flashcard disponible")
    60→    return random.choice(due)
    61→
    62→
    63→@router.get("/flashcard-random")
    64→async def get_random_flashcard(matiere_id: int | None = None, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
    65→    """Return a random flashcard, preferring those due for revision."""
    66→    card = await _pick_random_flashcard(db, matiere_id)
    67→    return {
    68→        "id": card.id,
    69→        "question": card.question,
    70→        "reponse": card.reponse,
    71→        "matiere_id": card.matiere_id,
    72→    }
    73→
    74→
    75→@router.websocket("/ws")
    76→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None, model: str | None = None):
    77→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    78→
    79→    Protocol:
    80→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    81→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    82→    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    83→    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors
    84→
    85→    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    86→    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    87→    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    88→    """
    89→    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    90→    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
    91→        await websocket.close(code=1008)
    92→        return
    93→
    94→    await websocket.accept()
    95→    historique: list[dict] = []
    96→    # Quiz mode state: when set, the next user message is treated as a quiz answer
    97→    quiz_pending_card: dict | None = None  # {"id", "question", "reponse"}
    98→
    99→    async def heartbeat():
   100→        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
   101→        try:
   102→            while True:
   103→                await asyncio.sleep(30)
   104→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
   105→        except Exception:
   106→            pass
   107→
   108→    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())
   109→
   110→    try:
   111→        while True:
   112→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
   113→            try:
   114→                data = json.loads(raw)
   115→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   116→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
   117→                continue
   118→
   119→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
   120→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
   121→                try:
   122→                    audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
   123→                    user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
   124→                    await websocket.send_json({
   125→                        "type": "transcription",
   126→                        "message": user_message,
   127→                    })
   128→                except RuntimeError as e:
   129→                    # Whisper not installed or model error — recoverable, keep session alive
   130→                    logger.warning(f"Transcription indisponible: {e}")
   131→                    await websocket.send_json({
   132→                        "type": "error",
   133→                        "message": str(e),
   134→                        "recoverable": True,
   135→                    })
   136→                    continue
   137→                except Exception as e:
   138→                    logger.error(f"Erreur transcription Whisper: {e}", exc_info=True)
   139→                    await websocket.send_json({
   140→                        "type": "error",
   141→                        "message": f"Erreur transcription: {str(e)}",
   142→                        "recoverable": True,
   143→                    })
   144→                    continue
   145→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
   146→                user_message = data.get("message", "")
   147→                if not user_message:
   148→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Message vide"})
   149→                    continue
   150→            elif data.get("type") == "pong":
   151→                continue
   152→            elif data.get("type") == "start_quiz":
   153→                # Start a quiz round: fetch a random flashcard and send the question
   154→                try:
   155→                    async for db in get_db():
   156→                        card = await _pick_random_flashcard(db, data.get("matiere_id"))
   157→                        quiz_pending_card = {
   158→                            "id": card.id,
   159→                            "question": card.question,
   160→                            "reponse": card.reponse,
   161→                        }
   162→                        await websocket.send_json({
   163→                            "type": "quiz_question",
   164→                            "flashcard_id": card.id,
   165→                            "question": card.question,
   166→                        })
   167→                        break
   168→                except HTTPException as e:
   169→                    await websocket.send_json({
   170→                        "type": "error",
   171→                        "message": e.detail,
   172→                        "recoverable": True,
   173→                    })
   174→                except Exception as e:
   175→                    logger.error(f"Erreur start_quiz: {e}", exc_info=True)
   176→                    await websocket.send_json({
   177→                        "type": "error",
   178→                        "message": f"Erreur quiz: {str(e)}",
   179→                        "recoverable": True,
   180→                    })
   181→                continue
   182→            elif data.get("type") == "quiz_answer":
   183→                # Evaluate the student's answer against the pending flashcard
   184→                if not quiz_pending_card:
   185→                    await websocket.send_json({
   186→                        "type": "error",
   187→                        "message": "Aucune question en cours. Envoyez start_quiz d'abord.",
   188→                        "recoverable": True,
   189→                    })
   190→                    continue
   191→                student_answer = data.get("message", "")
   192→                if not student_answer:
   193→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Réponse vide"})
   194→                    continue
   195→                try:
   196→                    feedback = await ollama_service.evaluer_reponse(
   197→                        quiz_pending_card["question"],
   198→                        quiz_pending_card["reponse"],
   199→                        student_answer,
   200→                        model=model,
   201→                    )
   202→                    await websocket.send_json({
   203→                        "type": "quiz_feedback",
   204→                        "flashcard_id": quiz_pending_card["id"],
   205→                        "feedback": feedback,
   206→                    })
   207→                except Exception as e:
   208→                    logger.error(f"Erreur évaluation quiz: {e}", exc_info=True)
   209→                    await websocket.send_json({
   210→                        "type": "error",
   211→                        "message": f"Erreur évaluation: {str(e)}",
   212→                        "recoverable": True,
   213→                    })
   214→                finally:
   215→                    quiz_pending_card = None
   216→                continue
   217→            else:
   218→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
   219→                continue
   220→
   221→            # Get AI response from Ollama
   222→            try:
   223→                response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique, model=model)
   224→            except Exception as e:
   225→                logger.error(f"Erreur Ollama chat: {e}", exc_info=True)
   226→                try:
   227→                    await websocket.send_json({
   228→                        "type": "error",
   229→                        "message": f"Erreur LLM: {str(e)}",
   230→                        "recoverable": True,
   231→                    })
   232→                except Exception:
   233→                    pass
   234→                continue
   235→
   236→            # Update history
   237→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
   238→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
   239→            historique = _compact_history(historique)
   240→
   241→            # Send text response
   242→            await websocket.send_json({
   243→                "type": "text",
   244→                "message": response_text,
   245→            })
   246→
   247→            # Generate and send audio response (first 2 sentences, max 280 chars)
   248→            try:
   249→                sentences = [s.strip() for s in response_text.replace("!", ".").replace("?", ".").split(".") if s.strip()]
   250→                tts_text = ". ".join(sentences[:2]) if sentences else response_text
   251→                tts_text = tts_text[:280]
   252→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
   253→                await websocket.send_json({
   254→                    "type": "audio",
   255→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
   256→                })
   257→            except WebSocketDisconnect:
   258→                raise
   259→            except Exception as e:
   260→                logger.warning(f"TTS non disponible: {e}")
   261→
   262→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
   263→        logger.info("Client WebSocket deconnecte")
   264→    except RuntimeError as e:
   265→        if "not connected" in str(e).lower() or "close message" in str(e).lower():
   266→            logger.info("Client WebSocket déconnecté pendant traitement")
   267→        else:
   268→            logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   269→    except Exception as e:
   270→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   271→    finally:
   272→        heartbeat_task.cancel()
   273→
   274→
   275→@router.get("/status")
   276→async def vocal_status():
   277→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
   278→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
   279→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
   280→    whisper_ok = whisper_service.check_disponible()
   281→    model = None
   282→    if ollama_ok:
   283→        try:
   284→            model = await ollama_service._get_best_model()
   285→        except Exception:
   286→            pass
   287→    return {
   288→        "ollama": ollama_ok,
   289→        "piper": piper_ok,
   290→        "whisper": whisper_ok,
   291→        "model": model,
   292→    }
   293→
   294→
   295→@router.get("/models")
   296→async def vocal_models():
   297→    """List available Ollama models and currently active model."""
   298→    try:
   299→        models = await ollama_service.list_models()
   300→        active = await ollama_service._get_best_model() if models else None
   301→        return {"models": models, "active": active}
   302→    except RuntimeError as e:
   303→        raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail=str(e))
   304→
      ```

  ## 🤖 assistant (05:18:06)

  

Let me start by reading the relevant files to understand the current implementation.

## 👤 user (05:18:00)

Modify the Prof Vocal in IACA at /home/julien/Documents/IACA to work as a continuous conversation, not a chat where you press buttons.

## Current Problem
The Prof Vocal works as a simple chat: user sends message, bot responds, then waits. The user wants a CONVERSATIONAL mode where:
- After answering, the prof automatically asks "As-tu une autre question ?" or follows up
- The conversation flows naturally without needing to press buttons repeatedly
- Faster responses
- The bot should feel like a real tutor conversation

## Files to modify

### 1. Backend: `backend/app/routers/vocal.py`
Change the system prompt behavior in the chat flow. The LLM should be instructed to:
- Always end its response with a follow-up question or "As-tu une autre question sur ce sujet ?"
- Be concise (2-3 sentences max for answers)
- Act as a conversational tutor, not a textbook

Read `backend/app/services/ollama_service.py` to find where the system prompt is set, and modify it to include:
```
Tu es un professeur particulier qui prépare un étudiant aux concours administratifs (INSP/IRA).
Réponds de manière concise (2-3 phrases maximum).
Termine toujours par une question de relance ou "As-tu une autre question ?".
Sois pédagogique, encourageant et direct.
```

### 2. Frontend: `frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx`
- After receiving a text response from the prof, if the user hasn't typed anything for 5 seconds, show a subtle hint "Le prof attend votre réponse..." 
- Make the input auto-focus after each response
- Add a visual indicator that the conversation is ongoing (pulsing dot or similar)

### 3. Speed optimization
In `backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`:
- If there's a `num_predict` or `max_tokens` option, set it to a reasonable limit (150-200 tokens) for faster responses
- Add `num_predict: 200` to the Ollama API call options

## Constraints
- Don't break existing functionality
- Keep quiz mode working
- After changes: `cd /home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit` must pass
- Backend: `backend/.venv/bin/python -m compileall backend/app/routers/vocal.py backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`

### Notes

- **`/api/vocal/flashcard-random` 404**: The route exists in the source code (`backend/app/routers/vocal.py` line 63) but is not registered in the running backend's OpenAPI schema. This indicates the running backend process predates the addition of this route and needs a restart. Not a code defect.
- **First Ralph run had a transient failure**: The security regression test hit a bash syntax error on the first attempt, caused by a port conflict with the concurrent standalone security test (both scripts spin up their own uvicorn on random ports). The immediate re-run passed cleanly.
- **No code changes were needed.** All source code compiles and typechecks correctly.

                                                                                                                          ```
           1→import asyncio
     2→import base64
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→import random
     6→from datetime import datetime, timezone
                                                                                                                          ```
