      ```
     8→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     9→from sqlalchemy import select
    10→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    11→
    12→from app.database import get_db
    13→from app.models.flashcard import Flashcard
    14→from app.security import verify_ws_token
    15→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
    16→
    17→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    18→router = APIRouter()
    19→
    20→SUMMARY_PREFIX = "[Résumé précédent:]"
    21→MAX_EXCHANGES_BEFORE_SUMMARY = 10
    22→SUMMARY_SOURCE_MESSAGES = 6
    23→SUMMARY_TRUNCATE_CHARS = 50
    24→RECENT_MESSAGES_TO_KEEP = 4
    25→
    26→
    27→def _build_history_summary(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    28→    """Create a compact text summary from the oldest messages."""
    29→    snippets: list[str] = []
    30→    for message in messages[:SUMMARY_SOURCE_MESSAGES]:
    31→        content = message.get("content", "")
    32→        compact = " ".join(str(content).split())
    33→        snippets.append(compact[:SUMMARY_TRUNCATE_CHARS])
    34→    return f"{SUMMARY_PREFIX} {' | '.join(snippets)}"
    35→
    36→
    37→def _compact_history(messages: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    38→    """Keep recent messages and summarize older ones when history grows too much."""
    39→    max_messages = MAX_EXCHANGES_BEFORE_SUMMARY * 2
    40→    if len(messages) <= max_messages:
    41→        return messages
    42→    summary_message = {"role": "system", "content": _build_history_summary(messages)}
    43→    return [summary_message] + messages[-RECENT_MESSAGES_TO_KEEP:]
    44→
    45→
    46→async def _pick_random_flashcard(db: AsyncSession, matiere_id: int | None = None) -> Flashcard:
    47→    """Pick a random flashcard, preferring due ones."""
    48→    query = select(Flashcard)
    49→    if matiere_id:
    50→        query = query.filter(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    51→    result = await db.execute(
    52→        query.filter(Flashcard.prochaine_revision <= datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    53→    )
    54→    due = result.scalars().all()
    55→    if not due:
    56→        result = await db.execute(query)
    57→        due = result.scalars().all()
    58→    if not due:
    59→        raise HTTPException(404, "Aucune flashcard disponible")
    60→    return random.choice(due)
    61→
    62→
    63→@router.get("/flashcard-random")
    64→async def get_random_flashcard(matiere_id: int | None = None, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
    65→    """Return a random flashcard, preferring those due for revision."""
    66→    card = await _pick_random_flashcard(db, matiere_id)
    67→    return {
    68→        "id": card.id,
    69→        "question": card.question,
    70→        "reponse": card.reponse,
    71→        "matiere_id": card.matiere_id,
    72→    }
    73→
    74→
    75→@router.websocket("/ws")
    76→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None, model: str | None = None):
    77→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    78→
    79→    Protocol:
    80→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    81→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    82→    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    83→    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors
    84→
    85→    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    86→    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    87→    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    88→    """
    89→    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    90→    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
    91→        await websocket.close(code=1008)
    92→        return
    93→
    94→    await websocket.accept()
    95→    historique: list[dict] = []
    96→    # Quiz mode state: when set, the next user message is treated as a quiz answer
    97→    quiz_pending_card: dict | None = None  # {"id", "question", "reponse"}
    98→
    99→    async def heartbeat():
   100→        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
   101→        try:
   102→            while True:
   103→                await asyncio.sleep(30)
   104→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
   105→        except Exception:
   106→            pass
   107→
   108→    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())
   109→
   110→    try:
   111→        while True:
   112→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
   113→            try:
   114→                data = json.loads(raw)
   115→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
   116→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
   117→                continue
   118→
   119→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
   120→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
   121→                try:
   122→                    audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
   123→                    user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
   124→                    await websocket.send_json({
   125→                        "type": "transcription",
   126→                        "message": user_message,
   127→                    })
   128→                except RuntimeError as e:
   129→                    # Whisper not installed or model error — recoverable, keep session alive
   130→                    logger.warning(f"Transcription indisponible: {e}")
   131→                    await websocket.send_json({
   132→                        "type": "error",
   133→                        "message": str(e),
   134→                        "recoverable": True,
   135→                    })
   136→                    continue
   137→                except Exception as e:
   138→                    logger.error(f"Erreur transcription Whisper: {e}", exc_info=True)
   139→                    await websocket.send_json({
   140→                        "type": "error",
   141→                        "message": f"Erreur transcription: {str(e)}",
   142→                        "recoverable": True,
   143→                    })
   144→                    continue
   145→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
   146→                user_message = data.get("message", "")
   147→                if not user_message:
   148→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Message vide"})
   149→                    continue
   150→            elif data.get("type") == "pong":
   151→                continue
   152→            elif data.get("type") == "start_quiz":
   153→                # Start a quiz round: fetch a random flashcard and send the question
   154→                try:
   155→                    async for db in get_db():
   156→                        card = await _pick_random_flashcard(db, data.get("matiere_id"))
   157→                        quiz_pending_card = {
   158→                            "id": card.id,
   159→                            "question": card.question,
   160→                            "reponse": card.reponse,
   161→                        }
   162→                        await websocket.send_json({
   163→                            "type": "quiz_question",
   164→                            "flashcard_id": card.id,
   165→                            "question": card.question,
   166→                        })
   167→                        break
   168→                except HTTPException as e:
   169→                    await websocket.send_json({
   170→                        "type": "error",
   171→                        "message": e.detail,
   172→                        "recoverable": True,
   173→                    })
   174→                except Exception as e:
   175→                    logger.error(f"Erreur start_quiz: {e}", exc_info=True)
   176→                    await websocket.send_json({
   177→                        "type": "error",
   178→                        "message": f"Erreur quiz: {str(e)}",
   179→                        "recoverable": True,
   180→                    })
   181→                continue
   182→            elif data.get("type") == "quiz_answer":
   183→                # Evaluate the student's answer against the pending flashcard
   184→                if not quiz_pending_card:
   185→                    await websocket.send_json({
   186→                        "type": "error",
   187→                        "message": "Aucune question en cours. Envoyez start_quiz d'abord.",
   188→                        "recoverable": True,
   189→                    })
   190→                    continue
   191→                student_answer = data.get("message", "")
   192→                if not student_answer:
   193→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Réponse vide"})
   194→                    continue
   195→                try:
   196→                    feedback = await ollama_service.evaluer_reponse(
   197→                        quiz_pending_card["question"],
   198→                        quiz_pending_card["reponse"],
   199→                        student_answer,
   200→                        model=model,
   201→                    )
   202→                    await websocket.send_json({
   203→                        "type": "quiz_feedback",
   204→                        "flashcard_id": quiz_pending_card["id"],
   205→                        "feedback": feedback,
   206→                    })
   207→                except Exception as e:
   208→                    logger.error(f"Erreur évaluation quiz: {e}", exc_info=True)
   209→                    await websocket.send_json({
   210→                        "type": "error",
   211→                        "message": f"Erreur évaluation: {str(e)}",
   212→                        "recoverable": True,
   213→                    })
   214→                finally:
   215→                    quiz_pending_card = None
   216→                continue
   217→            else:
   218→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
   219→                continue
   220→
   221→            # Get AI response from Ollama
   222→            try:
   223→                response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique, model=model)
   224→            except Exception as e:
   225→                logger.error(f"Erreur Ollama chat: {e}", exc_info=True)
   226→                try:
   227→                    await websocket.send_json({
   228→                        "type": "error",
   229→                        "message": f"Erreur LLM: {str(e)}",
   230→                        "recoverable": True,
   231→                    })
   232→                except Exception:
   233→                    pass
   234→                continue
   235→
   236→            # Update history
   237→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
   238→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
   239→            historique = _compact_history(historique)
   240→
   241→            # Send text response
   242→            await websocket.send_json({
   243→                "type": "text",
   244→                "message": response_text,
   245→            })
   246→
   247→            # Generate and send audio response (first 2 sentences, max 280 chars)
   248→            try:
   249→                sentences = [s.strip() for s in response_text.replace("!", ".").replace("?", ".").split(".") if s.strip()]
   250→                tts_text = ". ".join(sentences[:2]) if sentences else response_text
   251→                tts_text = tts_text[:280]
   252→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
   253→                await websocket.send_json({
   254→                    "type": "audio",
   255→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
   256→                })
   257→            except WebSocketDisconnect:
   258→                raise
   259→            except Exception as e:
   260→                logger.warning(f"TTS non disponible: {e}")
   261→
   262→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
   263→        logger.info("Client WebSocket deconnecte")
   264→    except RuntimeError as e:
   265→        if "not connected" in str(e).lower() or "close message" in str(e).lower():
   266→            logger.info("Client WebSocket déconnecté pendant traitement")
   267→        else:
   268→            logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   269→    except Exception as e:
   270→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   271→    finally:
   272→        heartbeat_task.cancel()
   273→
   274→
   275→@router.get("/status")
   276→async def vocal_status():
   277→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
   278→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
   279→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
   280→    whisper_ok = whisper_service.check_disponible()
      ```

          ```
               1→import asyncio
     2→import sqlite3
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→import httpx
     6→
     7→from app.config import settings
     8→
     9→_DB_PATH = Path(settings.database_url.replace("sqlite:///", ""))
    10→
    11→
    12→def _rag_context(question: str, max_results: int = 3) -> str:
    13→    """Fetch the most relevant flashcard Q/A pairs from the local DB as context."""
    14→    try:
    15→        words = [w.lower() for w in question.split() if len(w) > 4]
    16→        if not words:
    17→            return ""
    18→        conn = sqlite3.connect(str(_DB_PATH))
    19→        placeholders = " OR ".join(["LOWER(question) LIKE ?" for _ in words[:5]])
    20→        params = [f"%{w}%" for w in words[:5]]
    21→        rows = conn.execute(
    22→            f"SELECT question, reponse FROM flashcards WHERE {placeholders} LIMIT ?",
    23→            params + [max_results],
    24→        ).fetchall()
    25→        conn.close()
    26→        if not rows:
    27→            return ""
    28→        snippets = [f"Q: {r[0]}\nR: {r[1][:200]}" for r in rows]
    29→        return "Fiches de cours pertinentes:\n" + "\n\n".join(snippets)
    30→    except Exception:
    31→        return ""
    32→
    33→SYSTEM_PROMPT = """Tu es un professeur de droit public pour concours administratifs (INSP/IRA). Réponds en 2-3 phrases courtes en français. Sois factuel et précis. Termine par une courte question de relance."""
    34→
    35→# Preferred models in order of priority (lightest first for low-RAM machines)
    36→PREFERRED_MODELS = ["qwen2:0.5b", "phi3:mini", "tinyllama", "mistral:latest"]
    37→
    38→# Token limits per model to control response length and TTS compatibility
    39→MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS: dict[str, int] = {
    40→    "qwen2:0.5b": 200,
    41→    "tinyllama": 200,
    42→    "phi3:mini": 250,
    43→    "mistral:latest": 300,
    44→}
    45→
    46→
    47→async def _get_best_model() -> str:
    48→    """Find the best available model from preferred list."""
    49→    try:
    50→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    51→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    52→            if tags_resp.status_code == 200:
    53→                available = [m["name"] for m in tags_resp.json().get("models", [])]
    54→                for model in PREFERRED_MODELS:
    55→                    if model in available:
    56→                        return model
    57→                # Fallback: use first available model
    58→                if available:
    59→                    return available[0]
    60→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    61→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    62→    raise RuntimeError(f"Aucun modele disponible. Lancez: ollama pull qwen2:0.5b")
    63→
    64→
    65→def _format_size(size_in_bytes: int | None) -> str:
    66→    """Format model size in GB with one decimal place."""
    67→    if not isinstance(size_in_bytes, int) or size_in_bytes <= 0:
    68→        return "N/A"
    69→    return f"{size_in_bytes / (1024 ** 3):.1f}GB"
    70→
    71→
    72→async def list_models() -> list[dict[str, str]]:
    73→    """List Ollama models with a human-readable size."""
    74→    try:
    75→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    76→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    77→            tags_resp.raise_for_status()
    78→            raw_models = tags_resp.json().get("models", [])
    79→            return [
    80→                {
    81→                    "name": model.get("name", ""),
    82→                    "size": _format_size(model.get("size")),
    83→                }
    84→                for model in raw_models
    85→                if model.get("name")
    86→            ]
    87→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    88→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    89→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
    90→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
    91→
    92→
    93→async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None, model: str | None = None) -> str:
    94→    """Send a message to Ollama and get a response, enriched with RAG context."""
    95→    if model is None:
    96→        model = await _get_best_model()
    97→
    98→    num_predict = MODEL_TOKEN_LIMITS.get(model, 250)
    99→
   100→    # RAG only on first turn (no history yet) or when history is short
   101→    rag = ""
   102→    if not historique or len(historique) <= 2:
   103→        rag = await asyncio.to_thread(_rag_context, message)
   104→    system = SYSTEM_PROMPT if not rag else f"{SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\nContexte cours:\n{rag}"
   105→
   106→    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": system}]
   107→    if historique:
   108→        messages.extend(historique)
   109→    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
   110→
   111→    try:
   112→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=90.0) as client:
   113→            response = await client.post(
   114→                f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
   115→                json={
   116→                    "model": model,
   117→                    "messages": messages,
   118→                    "stream": False,
   119→                    "options": {
   120→                        "temperature": 0.4,
   121→                        "num_predict": num_predict,
   122→                        "repeat_penalty": 1.3,
   123→                        "top_p": 0.9,
   124→                    },
   125→                },
   126→            )
   127→            response.raise_for_status()
   128→            data = response.json()
   129→            return data["message"]["content"]
   130→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
   131→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
   132→    except httpx.TimeoutException:
   133→        raise RuntimeError(f"Ollama timeout (>90s) avec {model}. Memoire insuffisante ou modele trop lourd.")
   134→
   135→
   136→async def evaluer_reponse(question: str, reponse_attendue: str, reponse_etudiant: str, model: str | None = None) -> str:
   137→    """Evaluate a student's answer against the expected answer and provide pedagogical feedback."""
   138→    prompt = f"""Compare la réponse de l'étudiant à la réponse attendue.
   139→
   140→Question: {question}
   141→Réponse attendue: {reponse_attendue}
   142→Réponse de l'étudiant: {reponse_etudiant}
   143→
   144→Donne un feedback pédagogique: ce qui est correct, ce qui manque, et une note sur 5.
   145→Sois encourageant mais précis."""
   146→    return await chat(prompt, model=model)
   147→
   148→
   149→async def interroger_sur_document(contenu: str, question: str) -> str:
   150→    """Ask Ollama a question about a specific document content."""
   151→    prompt = f"""Voici un extrait de document de cours:
   152→
   153→{contenu[:3000]}
   154→
   155→Question de l'étudiant: {question}
   156→
   157→Réponds de manière pédagogique en te basant sur le document."""
   158→
   159→    return await chat(prompt)
   160→
   161→
   162→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
   163→    """Check if Ollama is running and accessible."""
   164→    try:
   165→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
   166→            response = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
   167→            return response.status_code == 200
   168→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
   169→        return False
   170→
          ```

              ✅ **Result:**
              ```
                   1→import asyncio
     2→import logging
     3→import os
     4→import shutil
     5→import tempfile
     6→from pathlib import Path
     7→
     8→from app.config import settings
     9→
    10→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    11→
    12→# Lazy-loaded model; None until first successful load.
    13→_model = None
    14→
    15→# Cached availability flag (set on first check, avoids repeated import attempts).
    16→_whisper_available: bool | None = None
    17→
    18→
    19→def _ensure_ffmpeg_binary() -> None:
    20→    """Ensure an ffmpeg binary is discoverable for whisper."""
    21→    if shutil.which("ffmpeg"):
    22→        return
    23→
    24→    try:
    25→        import imageio_ffmpeg
    26→
    27→        ffmpeg_path = Path(imageio_ffmpeg.get_ffmpeg_exe())
    28→        shim_dir = Path(tempfile.gettempdir()) / "iaca-ffmpeg-bin"
    29→        shim_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    30→        shim_path = shim_dir / "ffmpeg"
    31→
    32→        if not shim_path.exists():
    33→            try:
    34→                shim_path.symlink_to(ffmpeg_path)
    35→            except OSError:
    36→                shutil.copy2(ffmpeg_path, shim_path)
    37→            shim_path.chmod(0o755)
    38→
    39→        current_path = os.environ.get("PATH", "")
    40→        shim_dir_str = str(shim_dir)
    41→        if shim_dir_str not in current_path.split(os.pathsep):
    42→            os.environ["PATH"] = (
    43→                f"{shim_dir_str}{os.pathsep}{current_path}" if current_path else shim_dir_str
    44→            )
    45→    except Exception as exc:
    46→        logger.warning(f"FFmpeg indisponible pour Whisper: {exc}")
    47→
    48→
    49→def check_disponible() -> bool:
    50→    """Return True if the whisper module and model can be loaded."""
    51→    global _whisper_available
    52→    if _whisper_available is not None:
    53→        return _whisper_available
    54→    _ensure_ffmpeg_binary()
    55→    try:
    56→        import whisper  # noqa: F401
    57→        _whisper_available = True
    58→    except ModuleNotFoundError:
    59→        logger.warning(
    60→            "Module 'whisper' introuvable. "
    61→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper  "
    62→            "(torch sera installé automatiquement)."
    63→        )
    64→        _whisper_available = False
    65→    return _whisper_available
    66→
    67→
    68→def _get_model():
    69→    global _model
    70→    if _model is None:
    71→        if not check_disponible():
    72→            raise RuntimeError(
    73→                "Whisper non disponible — installez openai-whisper: "
    74→                "pip install openai-whisper"
    75→            )
    76→        import whisper
    77→        logger.info(f"Chargement modèle Whisper '{settings.whisper_model}'…")
    78→        _model = whisper.load_model(settings.whisper_model)
    79→        logger.info("Modèle Whisper chargé.")
    80→    return _model
    81→
    82→
    83→async def transcrire(audio_bytes: bytes, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    84→    """Transcribe audio bytes to text using Whisper.
    85→
    86→    Raises RuntimeError with a clear message if whisper is not installed,
    87→    so the WS handler can forward a JSON error without dropping the session.
    88→    """
    89→    if not check_disponible():
    90→        raise RuntimeError(
    91→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
    92→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
    93→        )
    94→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    95→        tmp.write(audio_bytes)
    96→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    97→    try:
    98→        result = await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, tmp_path, language)
    99→    finally:
   100→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
   101→    return result
   102→
   103→
   104→def _transcrire_sync(file_path: str, language: str) -> str:
   105→    model = _get_model()
   106→    result = model.transcribe(file_path, language=language)
   107→    return result["text"].strip()
   108→
   109→
   110→async def transcrire_fichier(file_path: str, language: str = "fr") -> str:
   111→    """Transcribe an audio file to text."""
   112→    if not Path(file_path).exists():
   113→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Audio file not found: {file_path}")
   114→    if not check_disponible():
   115→        raise RuntimeError(
   116→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
   117→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
   118→        )
   119→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, file_path, language)
   120→
              ```

                  ## 👤 user (11:47:41)

                  ✅ **Result:**
                  ```
                       1→import asyncio
     2→import tempfile
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→
     8→async def synthetiser(texte: str) -> bytes:
     9→    """Synthesize text to speech using Piper TTS. Returns WAV audio bytes."""
    10→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    11→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    12→    try:
    13→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    14→            "piper",
    15→            "--model", settings.piper_voice,
    16→            "--output_file", tmp_path,
    17→            stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    18→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    19→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    20→        )
    21→        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=texte.encode())
    22→        if process.returncode != 0:
    23→            raise RuntimeError(f"Piper TTS error: {stderr.decode()}")
    24→        return Path(tmp_path).read_bytes()
    25→    finally:
    26→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def synthetiser_fichier(texte: str, output_path: str) -> str:
    30→    """Synthesize text to speech and save to file."""
    31→    audio_bytes = await synthetiser(texte)
    32→    Path(output_path).write_bytes(audio_bytes)
    33→    return output_path
    34→
    35→
    36→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    37→    """Check if Piper TTS is installed and accessible."""
    38→    try:
    39→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    40→            "piper", "--help",
    41→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    42→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    43→        )
    44→        await process.communicate()
    45→        return process.returncode == 0
    46→    except FileNotFoundError:
    47→        return False
    48→
                  ```

                        ```
    73→const serviceConfig = [

    75→    key: "ollama" as const,
    76→    label: "Ollama",

    96→    label: "Piper",

    98→    icon: <SpeakerIcon />,

   100→    colorInactive: "from-red-500/10 to-red-600/5 border-red-500/20",

   103→  },

   106→const howItWorks = [
   107→  { icon: <MicIcon />, label: "Parlez ou écrivez", desc: "Utilisez votre micro ou le clavier" },
   108→  { icon: <GearIcon />, label: "L'IA analyse", desc: "Traitement local, instantané" },

   114→  "Explications claires",
   115→  "Feedback personnalisé",
   116→];
   117→
   118→export default function VocalPage() {
   119→  const [status, setStatus] = useState<ServiceStatus | null>(null);
   120→  const [showChat, setShowChat] = useState(false);
   121→
   122→  useEffect(() => {
   123→    fetch("/api/vocal/status")
   124→      .then((r) => r.json())
   125→      .then(setStatus)
   126→      .catch(() => setStatus(null));
   127→  }, []);
   128→
   129→  return (
   130→    <div className="p-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
   131→      {/* Titre gradient */}
   132→      <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-400 to-blue-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
   133→        Prof Vocal
   134→      </h1>
   135→      <p className="text-slate-400 mb-8 text-sm">Assistant IA pour les concours administratifs</p>
   136→
   137→      {/* Service status cards */}
   138→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
   139→        {serviceConfig.map((svc) => {
   140→          const active = status ? status[svc.key] : null;
   141→          const loading = status === null;
   142→          return (
   143→            <div
   144→              key={svc.key}
   145→              className={`rounded-xl border bg-gradient-to-br p-4 flex items-center gap-4 transition-all ${
   146→                loading
   147→                  ? "from-slate-800/60 to-slate-700/30 border-slate-700/40"
   148→                  : active
   149→                  ? svc.colorActive
   150→                  : svc.colorInactive
   151→              }`}
   152→            >
   153→              <div className={`p-2.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/50 ${active ? svc.iconActive : svc.iconInactive}`}>
   154→                {svc.icon}
   155→              </div>
   156→              <div className="min-w-0">
   157→                <div className="font-semibold text-white text-sm">{svc.label}</div>
   158→                <div className="text-xs text-slate-400 truncate">{svc.sub}</div>
   159→              </div>
   160→              <div className="ml-auto shrink-0">
   161→                {loading ? (
   162→                  <span className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-slate-600 block animate-pulse" />
   163→                ) : active ? (
   164→                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 text-[10px] font-semibold border border-emerald-500/30">
   165→                    <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-pulse" />
   166→                    ON
   167→                  </span>
   168→                ) : (
   169→                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 text-[10px] font-semibold border border-red-500/20">
   170→                    <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500" />
   171→                    OFF
   172→                  </span>
   173→                )}
   174→              </div>
   175→            </div>
   176→          );
   177→        })}
   178→      </div>
   179→
   180→      {!showChat ? (
   181→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center py-12">
   182→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   183→
   184→          <h2 className="mt-6 text-3xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-400 via-purple-400 to-blue-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
   185→            Prof Vocal IA
   186→          </h2>
   187→          <p className="mt-2 text-slate-400 text-base text-center max-w-sm">
   188→            Votre assistant pour les concours administratifs
   189→          </p>
   190→
   191→          <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2 mt-5">
   192→            {capabilities.map((cap) => (
   193→              <span
   194→                key={cap}
   195→                className="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/20"
   196→              >
   197→                {cap}
   198→              </span>
   199→            ))}
   200→          </div>
   201→
   202→          {/* Comment ça marche */}
   203→          <div className="mt-10 w-full max-w-xl">
   204→            <h3 className="text-center text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 mb-5">
   205→              Comment ça marche
   206→            </h3>
   207→            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   208→              {howItWorks.map((step, idx) => (
   209→                <div key={idx} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-center">
   210→                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/20 to-blue-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center text-violet-400">
   211→                    {step.icon}
   212→                  </div>
   213→                  <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-200">{step.label}</div>
   214→                  <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-500">{step.desc}</div>
   215→                  {idx < howItWorks.length - 1 && (
   216→                    <div className="hidden" />
   217→                  )}
   218→                </div>
   219→              ))}
   220→            </div>
   221→          </div>
   222→
   223→          <button
                        ```

## COMPREHENSIVE VOCAL/VOICE CHAT ANALYSIS - IACA PROJECT

### EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The IACA vocal system implements a **classic turn-based (batch) conversation model**, not real-time streaming. Each user input (audio or text) waits for full LLM inference completion before sending the response back. This creates 15-30 second latency per turn. The system is robust with error handling and recovery but fundamentally different from ChatGPT Voice's streaming architecture.

---

## 1. BACKEND VOCAL WEBSOCKET HANDLER

**File**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/routers/vocal.py`

### Flow Overview

```
Client → WS /api/vocal/ws
  ↓
Auth token check (verify_ws_token)
  ↓
Accept connection + start heartbeat (every 30s)
  ↓
LOOP:
  - Receive user input (audio/text/quiz/ping)
  - Process (transcribe audio OR use text)
  - Call Ollama LLM (blocking wait for full response)
  - Compact conversation history
  - Send text response
  - Generate TTS audio (first 2 sentences max 280 chars)
  - Send audio response
  ↓
Client disconnect or error
```

### Key Characteristics

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Protocol** | WebSocket (persistent connection) |
| **Message Format** | JSON: `{"type": "...", "data": "..."}` |
| **Streaming Used** | NO - all responses are batch |
| **History Management** | In-memory list per session; auto-compacts at 20 messages |
| **Heartbeat** | 30-second ping to keep connection alive |
| **Auth** | Optional Bearer token via query param or header |
| **Model Selection** | Via query param `?model=qwen2:0.5b` |

### Message Types Supported

1. **`{"type": "audio", "data": "<base64>"}`** → STT transcription → LLM → TTS
2. **`{"type": "text", "message": "..."}`** → Direct text → LLM → TTS
3. **`{"type": "start_quiz"}`** → Fetch random flashcard, send question
4. **`{"type": "quiz_answer", "message": "..."}`** → Evaluate answer, provide feedback
5. **`{"type": "pong"}`** → Response to heartbeat ping
6. **`{"type": "ping"}`** → Server heartbeat (sent every 30s)

### Response Messages Sent

| Type | Content | When |
|------|---------|------|
| `text` | LLM response text | After ollama_service.chat() completes |
| `audio` | Base64-encoded WAV (22050Hz) | After piper_service.synthetiser() completes |
| `transcription` | User's transcribed speech | After whisper_service.transcrire() completes |
| `quiz_question` | Flashcard question text | After start_quiz request |
| `quiz_feedback` | Evaluation of student answer | After quiz_answer request |
| `error` | Error message | On any exception |
| `ping` | Empty heartbeat | Every 30s |

### Critical Code Sections

**Lines 222-245: Core response loop**
```python
response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique, model=model)
# BLOCKING WAIT for full LLM inference

historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})

await websocket.send_json({"type": "text", "message": response_text})

# TTS: truncate to 2 sentences, max 280 chars
sentences = [...split on . ! ?...]
tts_text = ". ".join(sentences[:2])[:280]
audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)  # BLOCKING WAIT
await websocket.send_json({"type": "audio", "data": base64_encode(audio_bytes)})
```

**Latency Bottlenecks**:
1. Line 123: `await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)` - Whisper transcription (variable, ~5-30s depending on audio length)
2. Line 223: `await ollama_service.chat(...)` - LLM inference (15-30s for phi3:mini or qwen2)
3. Line 252: `await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)` - TTS synthesis (1-2s)

---

## 2. OLLAMA SERVICE (LLM LAYER)

**File**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`

### Chat Function Signature

```python
async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None, model: str | None = None) -> str
```

### Flow

```
Input: message, history, model
  ↓
Auto-select best available model if not specified
  ↓
Determine num_predict (token limit) per model:
  - qwen2:0.5b: 200 tokens
  - phi3:mini: 250 tokens
  - tinyllama: 200 tokens
  - mistral:latest: 300 tokens
  ↓
Enrich with RAG context (on first turn or short history)
  ↓
Build messages list:
  - System prompt (professeur de droit public)
  - Historical messages
  - Current user message
  ↓
POST to http://localhost:11434/api/chat (BLOCKING)
  ↓
Parse response, return message.content
```

### Batch vs Streaming

**Current**: `"stream": False` (line 118)

```python
response = await client.post(
    f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
    json={
        "model": model,
        "messages": messages,
        "stream": False,  # ← BATCH: entire response returned at once
        "options": {
            "temperature": 0.4,
            "num_predict": num_predict,  # Token limit
            "repeat_penalty": 1.3,
            "top_p": 0.9,
        },
    },
)
```

**Wait Time**: For qwen2:0.5b on mid-tier hardware, ~15-20 seconds (as noted in frontend /vocal page line 233: "Réponse ~15-20s").

### RAG Context Retrieval

**Lines 12-31: `_rag_context()` function**

- Extracts 5+ word keywords from user question
- Queries SQLite flashcards table with LIKE matching
- Returns top 3 matching Q/A pairs as context
- Only active on first turn or short history (≤2 messages)
- Fallback-safe: returns empty string on any error

```python
"SELECT question, reponse FROM flashcards WHERE LOWER(question) LIKE ? ... LIMIT 3"
```

### System Prompt

```
"Tu es un professeur de droit public pour concours administratifs (INSP/IRA).
Réponds en 2-3 phrases courtes en français. Sois factuel et précis.
Termine par une courte question de relance."
```

### Latency Analysis

| Operation | Time |
|-----------|------|
| Model selection + availability check | <100ms |
| RAG context query (SQLite) | ~5-50ms (if queried) |
| Ollama inference (qwen2:0.5b) | 15-20s |
| Ollama inference (phi3:mini) | 20-30s |
| Response parsing | <50ms |
| **Total per message** | **15-30s** |

---

## 3. WHISPER SERVICE (STT/SPEECH-TO-TEXT)

**File**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/whisper_service.py`

### Transcription Flow

```
Audio bytes (WAV)
  ↓
Write to temp file (delete=False to avoid race condition)
  ↓
Run async to_thread(whisper.load_model(...).transcribe(...))
  ↓
Delete temp file (in finally block)
  ↓
Return transcribed text
```

### Key Code

```python
async def transcrire(audio_bytes: bytes, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
        tmp.write(audio_bytes)
        tmp_path = tmp.name
    try:
        result = await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, tmp_path, language)
    finally:
        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)  # ← Fixed race condition
    return result
```

### Model Caching

- Global `_model = None` at module level
- Lazy-loaded on first call: `whisper.load_model('base')`
- Whisper 'base' model: ~140MB, supports 99 languages

### Latency Characteristics

| Audio Length | Est. Time |
|--------------|-----------|
| 5 seconds | 3-5s |
| 10 seconds | 5-10s |
| 30 seconds | 10-20s |
| **Dependency** | Audio quality, hardware (CPU-bound) |

**Blocking Behavior**: Uses `asyncio.to_thread()` to avoid blocking event loop, but function itself is synchronous/blocking.

### Error Handling

- Returns RuntimeError with user-friendly message if whisper not installed
- WS handler catches and forwards as recoverable error (doesn't drop connection)

---

## 4. PIPER SERVICE (TTS/TEXT-TO-SPEECH)

**File**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/piper_service.py`

### Synthesis Flow

```
Text input (French)
  ↓
Create temp WAV file (delete=False)
  ↓
Spawn subprocess: piper --model fr_FR-siwis-medium.onnx --output_file <temp>
  ↓
Pipe text to stdin, wait for completion
  ↓
Read WAV bytes, delete temp file
  ↓
Return audio bytes
```

### Key Code

```python
async def synthetiser(texte: str) -> bytes:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
        tmp_path = tmp.name
    try:
        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
            "piper",
            "--model", settings.piper_voice,  # fr_FR-siwis-medium.onnx (61MB)
            "--output_file", tmp_path,
            stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
        )
        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=texte.encode())
        return Path(tmp_path).read_bytes()
    finally:
        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
```

### Voice Configuration

- Model: `fr_FR-siwis-medium.onnx` (61MB, pre-downloaded at ~/.local/share/piper-voices/)
- Language: French (female voice, "Siwis")
- Sample Rate: 22050Hz

### TTS Truncation (Lines 249-251 in vocal.py)

Text is truncated **before** synthesis to control output size:

```python
sentences = [s.strip() for s in response_text.replace("!", ".").replace("?", ".").split(".")]
tts_text = ". ".join(sentences[:2]) if sentences else response_text  # First 2 sentences
tts_text = tts_text[:280]  # Max 280 chars
audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
```

**Rationale**: Full LLM response (~200-300 tokens) would generate 2-4MB WAV file, exceeding WebSocket frame limits (~1MB). Truncating to 2 sentences (~280 chars) produces ~200-500KB WAV.

### Latency

| Text Length | Time |
|-------------|------|
| 50 chars | 0.3-0.5s |
| 100 chars | 0.5-0.8s |
| 280 chars (current max) | 0.8-1.2s |

---

## 5. FRONTEND VOCALCHAT COMPONENT

**File**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx`

### Component State Management

```typescript
const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState<string>("");
const [availableModels, setAvailableModels] = useState<OllamaModel[]>([]);
```

### WebSocket Connection Lifecycle

**Lines 131-210: `connect()` function**

```
1. Build WS URL with auth token + model param
2. Create WebSocket
3. On open: setIsConnected(true), reset retries
4. On close:
   - If code !== 1000 and retries < 5: reconnect in 2s
   - If retries >= 5: show "lost connection" message
5. On message: dispatch based on type (text/audio/error/ping)
6. On error: silently ignore (connection loss handled in onclose)
```

**URL Construction** (lines 135-138):
```typescript
const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
const base = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
const model = modelOverride || selectedModel;
const wsUrl = model ? `${base}&model=${encodeURIComponent(model)}` : base;
```

### Audio Recording Flow

**Lines 258-281: `startRecording()` / `stopRecording()`**

```javascript
1. Request user permission: navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({audio: true})
2. Create MediaRecorder with Blob type "audio/wav"
3. Collect data chunks in audioChunksRef
4. On stop:
   - Combine chunks into single Blob
   - Read as Data URL (base64)
   - Extract base64 part: split(',')[1]
   - Send via WS: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64>"}
   - Stop all audio tracks
5. setIsRecording(true) during capture
```

**Browser Constraint**: MediaRecorder encodes audio automatically (usually Opus in Chrome, PCM in Firefox). The WAV MIME type is a hint but not guaranteed.

### Text Input Flow

**Lines 288-298: `sendText()`**

```javascript
1. Validate input not empty
2. Add message to UI: setMessages(..., {role: "user", ...})
3. Send WS: {"type": "text", "message": inputText}
4. Clear input field
5. setIsLoading(true)
```

### Response Message Handling

**Lines 166-207: `ws.onmessage`**

| Type | Handler |
|------|---------|
| `transcription` | Add to message list as user message |
| `text` | Add to message list as assistant, setIsLoading(false) |
| `audio` | Create Audio element with base64 data URL, auto-play |
| `error` | Add as system message, setIsLoading(false) |
| `quiz_question` | Add as special message type with flashcard_id |
| `quiz_feedback` | Add as special message type with note/5 |
| `ping` | Reply with pong |

**Critical**: Audio auto-play (line 182):
```typescript
const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
audio.play().catch(() => {});  // Silent fail on permission denied
```

### Model Switching

**Lines 212-222: Load available models on mount**

```typescript
useEffect(() => {
    fetch("/api/vocal/models")
        .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
        .then(data => {
            if (data?.models?.length) {
                setAvailableModels(data.models);
                setSelectedModel(data.active || data.models[0].name);
            }
        })
        .catch(() => {});
}, []);
```

**Lines 247-256: Switch model**

```typescript
const switchModel = (newModel: string) => {
    setSelectedModel(newModel);
    setMessages([]);  // Clear history
    if (wsRef.current) wsRef.current.close(1000);
    retriesRef.current = 0;
    setTimeout(() => connect(newModel), 300);
};
```

### Latency from User Perspective

1. **User speaks** → Stop recording
2. **STT (Whisper)** → 5-20s (showing "Enregistrement en cours…")
3. **Show transcription** → Immediate
4. **LLM inference** → 15-30s (showing ThinkingDots animation)
5. **Show text response + play audio** → Immediate when both ready
6. **User ready for next input** → ~30-50s total from speaking

## 7. LATENCY BOTTLENECK SUMMARY

### Current Complete Conversation Turn Latency

**User speaks 10 seconds → Gets audio response back**

| Phase | Time | Blocking? | Improvable? |
|-------|------|-----------|------------|
| Audio recording | Variable | No (browser) | N/A |
| Whisper STT | 5-20s | Yes, sync in thread | Stream STT tokens |
| Show transcription | ~50ms | Yes, WS send | No |
| Ollama inference | 15-30s | **Yes, batch API** | Stream tokens |
| Show text response | ~50ms | Yes, WS send | Streaming text |
| Piper TTS synthesis | 0.8-1.2s | Yes, subprocess | Stream audio frames |
| Audio playback | ~3-5s | No (browser) | Real-time audio gen |
| **TOTAL** | **~25-60 seconds** | - | **Major improvements possible** |

### What Causes Long Latency vs ChatGPT Voice

1. **Batch Inference**: Ollama waits for full generation before returning (15-30s). ChatGPT streams tokens immediately (appears 1-2s).
2. **TTS After LLM**: TTS synthesis happens after LLM finishes. ChatGPT Voice starts TTS on first tokens.
3. **No Streaming**: Frontend receives "text" message only after inference complete. Real-time requires streaming JSON newlines or SSE.
4. **STT Latency**: Whisper on CPU is slow. OpenAI Whisper API has similar constraints, but Chrome Web Speech API would be faster locally.

---

## 8. WHAT WOULD NEED TO CHANGE FOR REAL-TIME (CHATGPT VOICE STYLE)

### Architecture Changes Required

**1. LLM Streaming (Highest Impact)**

```python
# Current (vocal.py line 223):
response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique, model=model)
await websocket.send_json({"type": "text", "message": response_text})

# Streaming:
async for token in ollama_service.chat_stream(user_message, historique):
    await websocket.send_json({"type": "text_chunk", "token": token})
    # Accumulate tokens for TTS trigger
```

**Backend change**: Ollama supports streaming via `"stream": True` in chat API. Response becomes newline-delimited JSON:
```json
{"message":{"content":"Bonjour"},"done":false}
{"message":{"content":" "},"done":false}
{"message":{"content":"l"},"done":false}
...
{"message":{"content":"!"},"done":true}
```

**2. Parallel TTS Synthesis**

```python
# Current (vocal.py line 252):
audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
await websocket.send_json({"type": "audio", "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode()})

# Streaming TTS:
async for audio_chunk in piper_service.synthetiser_stream(accumulated_text):
    await websocket.send_json({"type": "audio_chunk", "data": base64.b64encode(audio_chunk).decode()})
```

Problem: Piper TTS is subprocess-based, doesn't support streaming. Options:
- Use gTTS (Google) or Azure TTS APIs (do support streaming)
- Port to streaming library like espeak-ng
- Accept 0.5-1s delay before first audio (start TTS when ~50 tokens accumulated)

**3. Frontend Token Buffering & Real-Time Display**

```typescript
// Current (VocalChat.tsx line 172):
} else if (data.type === "text") {
    addMessage("assistant", data.message);
    setIsLoading(false);
}

// Streaming:
} else if (data.type === "text_chunk") {
    setAssistantMessage(prev => prev + data.token);  // Append token
    setIsLoading(false);  // Show response immediately
}

// Start audio playback as chunks arrive
} else if (data.type === "audio_chunk") {
    audioBufferRef.current.push(data.data);
    if (!isPlayingRef.current) startAudioPlayback();
}
```

**4. Audio Queue Management**

```typescript
// Buffer incoming audio chunks and play continuously
const audioContext = new AudioContext();
const audioBuffer = new Float32Array(44100 * 60);  // 60s buffer
let bufferIndex = 0;

ws.onmessage = (event) => {
    const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    if (data.type === "audio_chunk") {
        const audioData = decodeBase64ToFloat32(data.data);
        audioBuffer.set(audioData, bufferIndex);
        bufferIndex += audioData.length;
    }
};
```

**5. STT Optimization**

Current: Browser→Server→Whisper→Browser (round trip + processing)

Options:
- Use WebRTC Audio Processing API for local PCM streaming
- Send audio chunks to Whisper server as they arrive (not full audio at end)
- Use browser-based Whisper.js or Web Speech API (lower quality but instant)

```python
# Instead of:
audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)

# Do streaming transcription:
audio_chunk = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
partial_text = await whisper_service.transcrire_chunk(audio_chunk, context=previous_text)
await websocket.send_json({"type": "transcription_partial", "message": partial_text})
# When audio ends, send final:
final_text = await whisper_service.transcrire_finalize()
await websocket.send_json({"type": "transcription_final", "message": final_text})
```

---

## 9. CURRENT ARCHITECTURE DIAGRAM

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        FRONTEND (Next.js)                       │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ vocal/page.tsx + VocalChat.tsx                             │ │
│  │                                                            │ │
│  │  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐   │ │
│  │  │   Recording  │  │   Messages   │  │   Model      │   │ │
│  │  │   (Web APIs) │  │   Display    │  │   Selector   │   │ │
│  │  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘   │ │
│  │         │                  ↑                              │ │
│  │         │                  │                              │ │
│  │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐         │ │
│  │  │         WebSocket /api/vocal/ws             │         │ │
│  │  │   JSON messages (batch mode, not stream)    │         │ │
│  │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘         │ │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
│                             ↓                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                  ┌───────────┴───────────┐
                  │                       │
         ┌────────▼──────────┐   ┌────────▼──────────┐
         │   BACKEND API     │   │  REST /api/vocal  │
         │                   │   │   /status         │
         │  vocal.py router  │   │   /models         │
         │                   │   │   /flashcard-rand │
         │  BATCH PROCESSING │   └───────────────────┘
         │  (no streaming)   │
         └────────┬──────────┘
                  │
        ┌─────────┼─────────┐
        │         │         │
   ┌────▼──┐ ┌───▼───┐ ┌──▼─────┐
   │Ollama │ │Whisper│ │ Piper  │
   │ chat  │ │  STT  │ │  TTS   │
   │ API   │ │(CPU)  │ │(subprocess)
   │       │ │       │ │        │
   │15-30s │ │5-20s  │ │ 0.8-1.2s
   └───────┘ └───────┘ └────────┘
        │         │         │
   ┌────▼─────────▼────────▼────┐
   │    SQLite DB (flashcards)   │
   │    RAG context retrieval    │
   └─────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 10. SUMMARY TABLE: BATCH VS REAL-TIME

| Aspect | Current (Batch) | Real-Time (ChatGPT Voice) | Change Effort |
|--------|-----------------|--------------------------|---------------|
| **LLM Output** | Wait for all tokens | Stream tokens 1-by-1 | Backend: Medium (Ollama supports it) |
| **Text Display** | Show at end (15-30s) | Show immediately (1-2s) | Frontend: Easy (text_chunk handler) |
| **TTS Timing** | Start after LLM done | Start after 50+ tokens | Backend: Hard (subprocess limitation) |
| **TTS Output** | Wait for all audio | Stream audio frames | Backend+Frontend: Hard (audio buffering) |
| **STT** | Full audio upload at end | Stream audio as speaking | Browser+Backend: Medium |
| **Total Latency** | 25-60s per turn | 3-8s per turn | **Major refactor required** |
| **User Experience** | "Thinking..." then response | Live real-time conversation | **Fundamental difference** |

---

## 11. KEY IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS TO REMEMBER

### Authentication
- Optional token validation via `verify_ws_token(token, auth_header)` (security.py)
- Token passed as query param `?token=<token>` or header `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- If configured, missing token → `WebSocket.close(code=1008)` (policy violation)

### Error Recovery
- All service errors (Whisper, Ollama, Piper) caught and sent as JSON error messages
- `recoverable: true` flag indicates connection should stay open
- WS client automatically reconnects up to 5 times with 2-second backoff

### History Compaction
- Keeps last 4 recent messages
- Summarizes oldest 6 messages into single "system" message when >20 total
- Prevents infinite context growth in long conversations

### Model Availability
- Models queried from Ollama `/api/tags` endpoint
- Priority order: `["qwen2:0.5b", "phi3:mini", "tinyllama", "mistral:latest"]`
- Falls back to first available if priority not found

### Database Integration
- RAG queries flashcard table for Q/A context
- Quiz mode: fetches random flashcard, evaluates student answer with LLM feedback
- All async queries via SQLAlchemy with AsyncSession

---

## CONCLUSION

The IACA vocal system is a **robust, well-architected batch-processing voice chat** that trades real-time responsiveness for simplicity and reliability. It handles error recovery, authentication, model switching, and multi-modal I/O (audio + text) elegantly. However, converting it to ChatGPT Voice-style real-time streaming would require significant architectural changes, primarily in:

1. **Ollama → streaming token generation** (backend)
2. **TTS subsystem → streaming audio frames** (major refactor)
3. **WebSocket message protocol → newline-delimited JSON or binary frames** (frontend + backend)
4. **Frontend audio buffering + playback** (browser APIs)

The current design is optimal for educational use cases where 30-50 second response times are acceptable, and where simplicity in deployment is preferred over ultra-low latency.

                      ```
    75→function MicIcon({ className }: { className?: string }) {

    85→function SendIcon() {
    86→  return (
    87→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    88→      <path d="M22 2L11 13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    89→      <path d="M22 2L15 22L11 13L2 9L22 2Z" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinejoin="round" />
    90→    </svg>

    92→}
    93→
    94→function formatTime(date: Date) {
    95→  return date.toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
    96→}
    97→
    98→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    99→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
   100→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
   101→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
   102→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
   103→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
   104→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
   105→  const [quizMode, setQuizMode] = useState(false);
   106→  const [availableModels, setAvailableModels] = useState<OllamaModel[]>([]);
   107→  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState<string>("");
   108→  const [waitingHint, setWaitingHint] = useState(false);
   109→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
   110→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
   111→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
   112→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   113→  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
   114→  const retriesRef = useRef(0);
   115→  const waitingTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   116→  const maxRetries = 5;
   117→
   118→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   119→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   120→  };
   121→
   122→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   123→
   124→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   125→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   126→
   127→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   128→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   129→  }, []);
   130→
   131→  const connect = useCallback((modelOverride?: string) => {
   132→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   133→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   134→
   135→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   136→    const base = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   137→    const model = modelOverride || selectedModel;
   138→    const wsUrl = model ? `${base}&model=${encodeURIComponent(model)}` : base;
   139→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   140→
   141→    ws.onopen = () => {
   142→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   143→      setIsConnected(true);
   144→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   145→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   146→    };
   147→
   148→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   149→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   150→      setIsConnected(false);
   151→      setIsLoading(false);
   152→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   153→        retriesRef.current++;
   154→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   155→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   156→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   157→        }, 2000);
   158→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   159→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   160→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour réessayer.");
   161→      }
   162→    };
   163→
   164→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   165→
   166→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   167→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   168→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   169→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   170→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   171→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   172→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   173→        setIsLoading(false);
   174→        setWaitingHint(false);
   175→        if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
   176→        waitingTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   177→          if (mountedRef.current) setWaitingHint(true);
   178→        }, 5000);
   179→        setTimeout(() => inputRef.current?.focus(), 100);
   180→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   181→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   182→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   183→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   184→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   185→        setIsLoading(false);
   186→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_question") {
   187→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   188→          role: "assistant",
   189→          content: data.question,
   190→          timestamp: new Date(),
   191→          quizType: "question",
   192→          flashcardId: data.flashcard_id,
   193→        }]);
   194→        setIsLoading(false);
   195→      } else if (data.type === "quiz_feedback") {
   196→        setMessages((prev) => [...prev, {
   197→          role: "assistant",
   198→          content: data.feedback,
   199→          timestamp: new Date(),
   200→          quizType: "feedback",
   201→          note: data.note,
   202→        }]);
   203→        setIsLoading(false);
   204→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   205→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   206→      }
   207→    };
   208→
   209→    wsRef.current = ws;
   210→  }, [addMessage]);
   211→
   212→  useEffect(() => {
   213→    fetch("/api/vocal/models")
   214→      .then((r) => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
   215→      .then((data) => {
   216→        if (data?.models?.length) {
   217→          setAvailableModels(data.models);
   218→          setSelectedModel(data.active || data.models[0].name);
   219→        }
   220→      })
   221→      .catch(() => {});
   222→  }, []);
   223→
   224→  useEffect(() => {
   225→    mountedRef.current = true;
   226→    connect();
   227→    return () => {
   228→      mountedRef.current = false;
   229→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   230→      if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
   231→      if (wsRef.current) {
   232→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   233→        wsRef.current = null;
   234→      }
   235→    };
   236→  }, [connect]);
   237→
   238→  const toggleQuizMode = () => {
   239→    const newMode = !quizMode;
   240→    setQuizMode(newMode);
   241→    if (newMode && wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   242→      wsRef.current.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "start_quiz" }));
   243→      setIsLoading(true);
   244→    }
   245→  };
   246→
   247→  const switchModel = (newModel: string) => {
   248→    setSelectedModel(newModel);
   249→    setMessages([]);
   250→    if (wsRef.current) {
   251→      wsRef.current.close(1000);
   252→      wsRef.current = null;
   253→    }
   254→    retriesRef.current = 0;
   255→    setTimeout(() => connect(newModel), 300);
   256→  };
   257→
   258→  const startRecording = async () => {
   259→    setWaitingHint(false);
   260→    if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
   261→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   262→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   263→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   264→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   265→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   266→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   267→      const reader = new FileReader();
   268→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   269→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   270→        wsRef.current?.send(
   271→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   272→        );
   273→        setIsLoading(true);
   274→      };
   275→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   276→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   277→    };
   278→    recorder.start();
   279→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   280→    setIsRecording(true);
   281→  };
   282→
   283→  const stopRecording = () => {
   284→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   285→    setIsRecording(false);
   286→  };
   287→
   288→  const sendText = () => {
   289→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   290→    setWaitingHint(false);
   291→    if (waitingTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(waitingTimerRef.current);
   292→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   293→    wsRef.current.send(
   294→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   295→    );
   296→    setInputText("");
   297→    setIsLoading(true);
   298→  };
   299→
   300→  return (
   301→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/80 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
   302→      {/* Header */}
   303→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3.5 border-b border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   304→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   305→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   306→          <div>
   307→            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   308→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   309→              {isConnected && messages.length > 0 ? (
   310→                <>
   311→                  <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 animate-pulse" />
   312→                  Conversation en cours
   313→                </>
   314→              ) : isConnected ? "Connecté" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Déconnecté"}
   315→            </span>
   316→          </div>
   317→        </div>
   318→
   319→        {/* Indicateur connexion + sélecteur modèle */}
   320→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   321→          <button
   322→            onClick={toggleQuizMode}
   323→            disabled={!isConnected}
   324→            title={quizMode ? "Désactiver le mode révision" : "Activer le mode révision"}
   325→            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   326→              quizMode
   327→                ? "bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   328→                : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/40 hover:text-violet-300 hover:border-violet-500/30"
   329→            }`}
   330→          >
   331→            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   332→              <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   333→              <line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   334→              <path d="M8 7h8M8 17h8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   335→            </svg>
   336→            Révision
   337→          </button>
   338→          {availableModels.length > 1 && (
   339→            <select
   340→              value={selectedModel}
   341→              onChange={(e) => switchModel(e.target.value)}
   342→              className="text-xs bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-300 border border-slate-600/60 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500/60 cursor-pointer"
   343→              title="Changer de modèle IA"
   344→            >
   345→              {availableModels.map((m) => (
   346→                <option key={m.name} value={m.name}>
   347→                  {m.name} ({m.size})
   348→                </option>
   349→              ))}
   350→            </select>
   351→          )}
   352→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   353→            <span
   354→              className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${
   355→                isConnected
   356→                  ? "bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_6px_rgba(16,185,129,0.6)]"
   357→                  : isReconnecting
   358→                  ? "bg-yellow-400 animate-pulse"
   359→                  : "bg-red-500"
   360→              }`}
   361→            />
   362→            <span className={`text-xs font-medium ${
   363→              isConnected ? "text-emerald-400" : isReconnecting ? "text-yellow-400" : "text-red-400"
   364→            }`}>
   365→              {isConnected ? "En ligne" : isReconnecting ? "..." : "Hors ligne"}
   366→            </span>
   367→          </div>
   368→          {onClose && (
   369→            <button
   370→              onClick={onClose}
   371→              className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700"
   372→            >
   373→              <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   374→                <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   375→              </svg>
   376→            </button>
   377→          )}
   378→        </div>
   379→      </div>
   380→
   381→      {/* Messages */}
   382→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-5">
   383→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   384→          <div className="text-center mt-16 space-y-3">
   385→            <div className="mx-auto w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-violet-500/15 border border-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   386→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   387→            </div>
   388→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Commencez une conversation avec le professeur</p>
   389→            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Posez une question et le prof vous guidera naturellement</p>
   390→          </div>
   391→        )}
   392→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   393→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   394→            return (
   395→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   396→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   397→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   398→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   399→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   400→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   401→                  </svg>
   402→                  {msg.content}
   403→                </div>
   404→              </div>
   405→            );
   406→          }
   407→
   408→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   409→
   410→          if (msg.quizType === "question") {
   411→            return (
   412→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   413→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   414→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   415→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   416→                    <span className="badge-amber text-[10px]">RÉVISION</span>
   417→                  </div>
   418→                  <div className="rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-100 border-amber-500/20 rounded-bl-sm">
   419→                    <p className="font-semibold mb-1">{msg.content}</p>
   420→                    <p className="text-xs text-amber-300/60 italic">Répondez à voix haute ou par écrit</p>
   421→                  </div>
   422→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   423→                </div>
   424→              </div>
   425→            );
   426→          }
   427→
   428→          if (msg.quizType === "feedback") {
   429→            const note = msg.note ?? 0;
   430→            const isGood = note >= 3;
   431→            return (
   432→              <div key={i} className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   433→                <ProfessorAvatar />
   434→                <div className="max-w-[75%] space-y-1 items-start flex flex-col">
   435→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1">
   436→                    <span className={isGood ? "badge-green text-[10px]" : "badge-rose text-[10px]"}>
   437→                      {note}/5
   438→                    </span>
   439→                  </div>
   440→                  <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border rounded-bl-sm ${
   441→                    isGood
   442→                      ? "bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-500/20"
   443→                      : "bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-100 border-rose-500/20"
   444→                  }`}>
   445→                    {msg.content}
   446→                  </div>
   447→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">{formatTime(msg.timestamp)}</span>
   448→                </div>
   449→              </div>
   450→            );
   451→          }
   452→
   453→          return (
   454→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2.5 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   455→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   456→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   457→                <div className="text-[10px] font-semibold px-1 text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
   458→                  {isUser ? "Vous" : "Prof"}
   459→                </div>
   460→                <div
   461→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed border ${
   462→                    isUser
   463→                      ? "bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 border-blue-500/20 rounded-br-sm"
   464→                      : "bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-100 border-violet-500/20 rounded-bl-sm"
   465→                  }`}
   466→                >
   467→                  {msg.content}
   468→                </div>
   469→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 px-1">
   470→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   471→                </span>
   472→              </div>
   473→            </div>
   474→          );
   475→        })}
   476→        {isLoading && (
   477→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2.5">
   478→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   479→            <div className="bg-violet-500/10 border border-violet-500/20 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3">
   480→              <ThinkingDots />
   481→            </div>
   482→          </div>
   483→        )}
   484→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   485→      </div>
   486→
   487→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   488→      {isRecording && (
   489→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-2.5 bg-red-900/25 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm font-medium">
   490→          <SoundWave />
   491→          <span>Enregistrement en cours…</span>
   492→          <SoundWave />
   493→        </div>
   494→      )}
   495→
   496→      {/* Waiting hint */}
   497→      {waitingHint && !isLoading && isConnected && (
   498→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 bg-violet-900/15 border-t border-violet-800/20 text-violet-300/70 text-xs animate-pulse">
   499→          <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400/60" />
   500→          Le prof attend votre réponse...
   501→        </div>
   502→      )}
   503→
   504→      {/* Input */}
   505→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/30">
   506→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800/80 rounded-2xl border border-slate-600/60 focus-within:border-violet-500/60 transition-colors px-4">
   507→          <input
   508→            ref={inputRef}
   509→            type="text"
   510→            value={inputText}
   511→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   512→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   513→            placeholder={waitingHint ? "Continuez la conversation..." : "Posez votre question au professeur..."}
   514→            autoFocus
   515→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-4 text-sm focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   516→          />
   517→          <button
   518→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   519→            disabled={!isConnected}
   520→            title={isRecording ? "Arrêter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   521→            className={`p-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${
   522→              isRecording
   523→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 shadow-lg shadow-red-900/40 animate-pulse"
   524→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-violet-500/10"
   525→            }`}
   526→          >
   527→            <MicIcon />
   528→          </button>
   529→          <button
   530→            onClick={sendText}
   531→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   532→            title="Envoyer"
   533→            className="p-2.5 rounded-xl text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 transition-all disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   534→          >
   535→            <SendIcon />
   536→          </button>
   537→        </div>
   538→      </div>
   539→    </div>
   540→  );
   541→}
   542→
                      ```
