    32→  "Questions contemporaines": { bg: "bg-amber-500/20", text: "text-amber-400", border: "border-amber-500/30" },
    33→  "Questions sociales": { bg: "bg-rose-500/20", text: "text-rose-400", border: "border-rose-500/30" },
    34→  "Relations internationales": { bg: "bg-violet-500/20", text: "text-violet-400", border: "border-violet-500/30" },
    35→};
    36→
    37→export default function FlashcardsPage() {
    38→  const [flashcards, setFlashcards] = useState<FlashcardData[]>([]);
    39→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    40→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
    41→  const [contentMode, setContentMode] = useState<"revision" | "all">("all");
    42→  const [invertedSides, setInvertedSides] = useState(false);
    43→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
    44→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    45→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<"list" | "review">("list");
    46→  const [reviewedCount, setReviewedCount] = useState(0);
    47→  const [sessionResults, setSessionResults] = useState<{ quality: number }[]>([]);
    48→  const [revisionFilter, setRevisionFilter] = useState<"all" | "review" | "mastered">("all");
    49→  const [flippedCards, setFlippedCards] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
    50→
    51→  const toggleFlip = (id: number) => {
    52→    setFlippedCards((prev) => {
    53→      const next = new Set(prev);
    54→      if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id);
    55→      else next.add(id);
    56→      return next;
    57→    });
    58→  };
    59→
    60→  const fetchFlashcards = useCallback(async () => {
    61→    setLoading(true);
    62→    try {
    63→      const params = new URLSearchParams();
    64→      params.set("limit", String(FETCH_LIMIT));
    65→      if (selectedMatiere) {
    66→        params.set("matiere_id", String(selectedMatiere));
    67→      }
    68→      const endpoint = contentMode === "revision" ? "flashcards/revision" : "flashcards";
    69→      const url = `${API_BASE}/${endpoint}?${params.toString()}`;
    70→      const res = await fetch(url);
    71→      if (res.ok) {
    72→        const data = await res.json();
    73→        setFlashcards(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
    74→        setCurrentIndex(0);
    75→      }
    76→    } catch (error) {
    77→      console.error("Erreur chargement flashcards:", error);
    78→    } finally {
    79→      setLoading(false);
    80→    }
    81→  }, [selectedMatiere, contentMode]);
    82→
    83→  const fetchMatieres = useCallback(async () => {
    84→    try {
    85→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    86→      if (res.ok) {
    87→        setMatieres(await res.json());
    88→      }
    89→    } catch (error) {
    90→      console.error("Erreur chargement matieres:", error);
    91→    }
    92→  }, []);
    93→
    94→  useEffect(() => {
    95→    fetchMatieres();
    96→  }, [fetchMatieres]);
    97→
    98→  useEffect(() => {
    99→    fetchFlashcards();
   100→  }, [fetchFlashcards]);
   101→
   102→  const handleReview = async (quality: number) => {
   103→    const card = flashcards[currentIndex];
   104→    if (!card) return;
   105→
   106→    // Envoi de la notation au backend (SM-2)
   107→    try {
   108→      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/${card.id}/review`, withAuthHeaders({
   109→        method: "POST",
   110→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   111→        body: JSON.stringify({ qualite: quality }),
   112→      }));
   113→    } catch (error) {
   114→      console.error("Erreur envoi review:", error);
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    setSessionResults((prev) => [...prev, { quality }]);
   118→    setReviewedCount((prev) => prev + 1);
   119→
   120→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
   121→      setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
   122→    } else {
   123→      // Session terminee
   124→      setMode("list");
   125→    }
   126→  };
   127→
   128→  const skipToNextCard = () => {
   129→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
   130→      setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
   131→      return;
   132→    }
   133→    setMode("list");
   134→  };
   135→
   136→  const startReview = () => {
   137→    setCurrentIndex(0);
   138→    setReviewedCount(0);
   139→    setSessionResults([]);
   140→    setMode("review");
   141→  };
   142→
   143→  const totalCards = flashcards.length;
   144→  const progress = totalCards > 0 ? Math.round((currentIndex / totalCards) * 100) : 0;
   145→  const avgQuality =
   146→    sessionResults.length > 0
   147→      ? (sessionResults.reduce((s, r) => s + r.quality, 0) / sessionResults.length).toFixed(1)
   148→      : "0";
   149→  const matiereBreakdown = useMemo(() => {
   150→    const counts = new Map<string, number>();
   151→    for (const card of flashcards) {
   152→      const matiereName =
   153→        card.matiere_nom ||
   154→        matieres.find((m) => m.id === card.matiere_id)?.nom ||
   155→        "Sans matiere";
   156→      counts.set(matiereName, (counts.get(matiereName) || 0) + 1);
   157→    }
   158→    return Array.from(counts.entries())
   159→      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
   160→      .slice(0, 6);
   161→  }, [flashcards, matieres]);
   162→
   163→  // Utilitaires pour les stats et filtres
   164→  const getColorForMatiere = (matiereName?: string): { bg: string; text: string; border: string } => {
   165→    if (!matiereName) return { bg: "bg-slate-500/20", text: "text-slate-400", border: "border-slate-500/30" };
   166→    return matiereColors[matiereName] || { bg: "bg-slate-500/20", text: "text-slate-400", border: "border-slate-500/30" };
   167→  };
   168→
   169→  const getDifficultyStars = (easeFactor?: number) => {
   170→    const factor = easeFactor || 2.5;
   171→    const stars = Math.round((factor - 1.3) / 0.43); // Map 1.3-2.5 -> 1-5 stars
   172→    return Math.max(1, Math.min(5, stars));
   173→  };
   174→
   175→  const getReviewIndicator = (nextReview?: string): { color: string; label: string } => {
   176→    if (!nextReview) return { color: "text-slate-500", label: "Nouvelle" };
   177→    const daysUntil = Math.floor((new Date(nextReview).getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   178→    if (daysUntil < 0) return { color: "text-red-400", label: `Urgent (${daysUntil} j)` };
   179→    if (daysUntil < 7) return { color: "text-amber-400", label: `Bientôt (${daysUntil} j)` };
   180→    return { color: "text-emerald-400", label: "OK" };
   181→  };
   182→
   183→  const today = new Date();
   184→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   185→
   186→  const filteredFlashcards = useMemo(() => {
   187→    return flashcards.filter((card) => {
   188→      if (revisionFilter === "review") {
   189→        if (!card.next_review) return true;
   190→        const reviewDate = new Date(card.next_review);
   191→        reviewDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   192→        return reviewDate <= today;
   193→      }
   194→      if (revisionFilter === "mastered") {
   195→        return (card.ease_factor || 2.5) > 3.0;
   196→      }
   197→      return true;
   198→    });
   199→  }, [flashcards, revisionFilter]);
   200→
   201→  const dueToday = useMemo(() => {
   202→    return flashcards.filter((card) => {
   203→      if (!card.next_review) return false;
   204→      const reviewDate = new Date(card.next_review);
   205→      reviewDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   206→      return reviewDate <= today;
   207→    }).length;
   208→  }, [flashcards]);
   209→
   210→  const masteryRate = useMemo(() => {
   211→    if (flashcards.length === 0) return 0;
   212→    const mastered = flashcards.filter((c) => (c.ease_factor || 2.5) > 3.0).length;
   213→    return Math.round((mastered / flashcards.length) * 100);
   214→  }, [flashcards]);
   215→
   216→  if (loading) {
   217→    return (
   218→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   219→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   220→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-violet-500/30 border-t-violet-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   221→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des flashcards...</p>
   222→        </div>
   223→      </div>
   224→    );
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  // Mode revision
   228→  if (mode === "review") {
   229→    const currentCard = flashcards[currentIndex];
   230→    const prompt = invertedSides ? currentCard?.reponse : currentCard?.question;
   231→    const answer = invertedSides ? currentCard?.question : currentCard?.reponse;
   232→
   233→    // Session terminee
   234→    if (!currentCard || reviewedCount >= totalCards) {
   235→      return (
   236→        <div className="space-y-8">
   237→          <div className="text-center py-12">
   238→            <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   239→              <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   240→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   241→              </svg>
   242→            </div>
   243→            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Session terminee !</h2>
   244→            <p className="text-slate-400 mb-6">
   245→              Vous avez revise {reviewedCount} carte{reviewedCount > 1 ? "s" : ""}
   246→            </p>
   247→
   248→            {/* Stats session — 3 cols */}
   249→            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 max-w-sm mx-auto mb-8">
   250→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   251→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{reviewedCount}</p>
   252→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">révisées</p>
   253→              </div>
   254→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   255→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-400">{sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality >= 4).length}</p>
   256→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">maîtrisées</p>
   257→              </div>
   258→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   259→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-400">{avgQuality}</p>
   260→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">qualité /5</p>
   261→              </div>
   262→            </div>
   263→
   264→            <div className="flex justify-center gap-3">
   265→              <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-secondary">
   266→                Retour
   267→              </button>
   268→              <button
   269→                onClick={() => {
   270→                  fetchFlashcards();
   271→                  startReview();
   272→                }}
   273→                className="btn-primary"
   274→              >
   275→                Nouvelle session
   276→              </button>
   277→            </div>
   278→          </div>
   279→        </div>
   280→      );
   281→    }
   282→
   283→    return (
   284→      <div className="space-y-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
   285→        {/* Header révision */}
   286→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   287→          <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-ghost flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm px-3">
   288→            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   289→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   290→            </svg>
   291→            Quitter
   292→          </button>
   293→          <div className="flex-1 text-center">
   294→            {currentCard.matiere_nom && (
   295→              <span className="badge-violet text-xs">{currentCard.matiere_nom}</span>
   296→            )}
   297→          </div>
   298→          <div className="text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums px-3 py-1 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 shrink-0">
   299→            {currentIndex + 1}/{totalCards}
   300→          </div>
   301→        </div>
   302→
   303→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   304→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-1.5 overflow-hidden">
   305→          <div
   306→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-violet-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   307→            style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
   308→          />
   309→        </div>
   310→
   311→        {/* Flashcard */}
   312→        <div className="py-6">
   313→          <FlashCard
   314→            question={prompt || ""}
   315→            reponse={answer || ""}
   316→            explication={currentCard.explication}
   317→            matiere={currentCard.matiere_nom}
   318→            onReview={handleReview}
   319→          />
   320→        </div>
   321→        <div className="flex justify-center">
   322→          <button onClick={skipToNextCard} className="btn-ghost text-sm">
   323→            Passer a la suivante
   324→          </button>
   325→        </div>
   326→      </div>
   327→    );
   328→  }
   329→
   330→  const goodCards = sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality >= 4).length;
   331→  const hardCards = sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality <= 2).length;
   332→
   333→  // Mode liste
   334→  return (
   335→    <div className="space-y-6">
   336→      {/* Header */}
   337→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-4">
   338→        <div>
   339→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-violet-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">Flashcards</h1>
   340→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">Révisez avec la répétition espacée (algorithme SM-2)</p>
   341→        </div>
   342→        {totalCards > 0 && (
   343→          <button onClick={startReview} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   344→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   345→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z" />
   346→            </svg>
   347→            Réviser maintenant ({totalCards})
   348→          </button>
   349→        )}
   350→      </div>
   351→
   352→      {/* Bandeau stats session précédente */}
   353→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   354→        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   355→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-violet-500/20 bg-violet-500/5">
   356→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-violet-300">{sessionResults.length}</p>
   357→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">cartes révisées</p>
   358→          </div>
   359→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-emerald-500/20 bg-emerald-500/5">
   360→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-300">{goodCards}</p>
   361→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">bien maîtrisées</p>
   362→          </div>
   363→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/5">
   364→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-300">{hardCards}</p>
   365→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">à retravailler</p>
   366→          </div>
   367→        </div>
   368→      )}
   369→
   370→      {/* Barre de stats en haut */}
   371→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   372→        <div className="card py-4 px-4 bg-blue-500/5 border-blue-500/20">
   373→          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400">{totalCards}</p>
   374→          <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">Total flashcards</p>
   375→        </div>
   376→        <div className={`card py-4 px-4 border ${dueToday > 0 ? "bg-red-500/5 border-red-500/20" : "bg-slate-700/50 border-slate-600/50"}`}>
   377→          <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${dueToday > 0 ? "text-red-400" : "text-slate-400"}`}>{dueToday}</p>
   378→          <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">À réviser aujourd'hui</p>
   379→        </div>
   380→        <div className="card py-4 px-4 bg-emerald-500/5 border-emerald-500/20">
   381→          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-400">{masteryRate}%</p>
   382→          <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">Taux de maîtrise</p>
   383→        </div>
   384→      </div>
   385→
   386→      {/* Filtres par état de révision */}
   387→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   388→        <button
   389→          onClick={() => setRevisionFilter("all")}
   390→          className={`
   391→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   392→            ${revisionFilter === "all"
   393→              ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/40"
   394→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   395→            }
   396→          `}
   397→        >
   398→          Toutes
   399→        </button>
   400→        <button
   401→          onClick={() => setRevisionFilter("review")}
   402→          className={`
   403→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   404→            ${revisionFilter === "review"
   405→              ? "bg-red-600/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/40"
   406→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   407→            }
   408→          `}
   409→        >
   410→          À réviser ({dueToday})
   411→        </button>
   412→        <button
   413→          onClick={() => setRevisionFilter("mastered")}
   414→          className={`
   415→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   416→            ${revisionFilter === "mastered"
   417→              ? "bg-emerald-600/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/40"
   418→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   419→            }
   420→          `}
   421→        >
   422→          Maîtrisées
   423→        </button>
   424→      </div>
   425→
   426→      {/* Ancien filtre mode contenu */}
   427→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   428→        <button
   429→          onClick={() => setContentMode("all")}
   430→          className={`
   431→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   432→            ${contentMode === "all"
   433→              ? "bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   434→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   435→            }
   436→          `}
   437→        >
   438→          Toutes les cartes (max {FETCH_LIMIT})
   439→        </button>
   440→        <button
   441→          onClick={() => setContentMode("revision")}
   442→          className={`
   443→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   444→            ${contentMode === "revision"
   445→              ? "bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   446→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   447→            }
   448→          `}
   449→        >
   450→          Cartes a reviser
   451→        </button>
   452→        <button
   453→          onClick={() => setInvertedSides((prev) => !prev)}
   454→          className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   455→        >
   456→          Inverser Q/R: {invertedSides ? "ON" : "OFF"}
   457→        </button>
   458→      </div>
   459→      {matiereBreakdown.length > 0 && (
   460→        <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   461→          Repartition chargee: {matiereBreakdown.map(([name, count]) => `${name} (${count})`).join(" · ")}
   462→        </p>
   463→      )}
   464→
   465→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   466→        <button
   467→          onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   468→          className={`
   469→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   470→            ${!selectedMatiere
   471→              ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   472→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   473→            }
   474→          `}
   475→        >
   476→          Toutes
   477→        </button>
   478→        {matieres.map((matiere) => (
   479→          <button
   480→            key={matiere.id}
   481→            onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(matiere.id)}
   482→            className={`
   483→              px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   484→              ${selectedMatiere === matiere.id
   485→                ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   486→                : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   487→              }
   488→            `}
   489→          >
   490→            {matiere.nom}
   491→          </button>
   492→        ))}
   493→      </div>
   494→
   495→      {/* Stats session precedente */}
   496→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   497→        <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500/5 to-blue-500/5 border-violet-500/20">
   498→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
   499→            <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">

   540→              groups.get(key)!.push(card);
   541→            }

   552→                    const indicator = getReviewIndicator(card.next_review);

   555→                      <div
   556→                        key={card.id}

   558→                        className="cursor-pointer select-none"
   559→                        style={{ perspective: "1000px", height: "180px" }}
   560→                      >
   561→                        <div
   562→                          style={{
   563→                            position: "relative",
   564→                            width: "100%",
   565→                            height: "100%",

   570→                        >

   575→                          >
   576→                            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-2">
   577→                              <div className={`inline-block px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold border ${colors.bg} ${colors.text} ${colors.border}`}>
   578→                                {matiereName}

   581→                                {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (

   584→                                  </svg>
   585→                                ))}

## 👤 user (05:17:33)

Fix the flashcards page in IACA at /home/julien/Documents/IACA.

## Problem
The frontend flashcards page (`frontend/app/flashcards/page.tsx`) expects fields `ease_factor`, `next_review`, and `matiere_nom`, but the backend API returns `facteur_facilite`, `prochaine_revision`, and does NOT include `matiere_nom`.

## Solution
Fix the frontend to map the correct field names. Read the file first, then:

1. In the `FlashcardData` interface and everywhere in the code, replace:
   - `ease_factor` → `facteur_facilite` (or map it in the fetch)
   - `next_review` → `prochaine_revision`
   - `interval` → `intervalle_jours`
   - `repetitions` stays as-is

2. For `matiere_nom`: the page already has a fallback `matieres.find(m => m.id === card.matiere_id)?.nom` which is correct. Make sure the FlashcardData interface uses `facteur_facilite` and `prochaine_revision`.

3. The cleanest approach: map fields after fetch. After the fetch response, map each flashcard:
```typescript
const mapped = data.map((fc: any) => ({
  ...fc,
  ease_factor: fc.facteur_facilite ?? fc.ease_factor ?? 2.5,
  next_review: fc.prochaine_revision ?? fc.next_review,
}));
```

4. Also check `frontend/components/FlashCard.tsx` for field name mismatches.

5. After fixing, run: `cd /home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`

DO NOT modify the backend API. Only fix the frontend mapping.

           1→import asyncio
     2→import base64
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→
     6→from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     7→
     8→from app.security import verify_ws_token
     9→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
    10→
    11→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    12→router = APIRouter()
    13→
    14→
    15→@router.websocket("/ws")
    16→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None):
    17→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    18→
    19→    Protocol:
    20→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    21→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    22→    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    23→    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors
    24→
    25→    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    26→    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    27→    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    28→    """
    29→    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    30→    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
    31→        await websocket.close(code=1008)
    32→        return
    33→
    34→    await websocket.accept()
    35→    historique: list[dict] = []
    36→
    37→    async def heartbeat():
    38→        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
    39→        try:
    40→            while True:
    41→                await asyncio.sleep(30)
    42→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
    43→        except Exception:
    44→            pass
    45→
    46→    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())
    47→
    48→    try:
    49→        while True:
    50→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
    51→            try:
    52→                data = json.loads(raw)
    53→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
    54→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
    55→                continue
    56→
    57→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
    58→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
    59→                try:
    60→                    audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
    61→                    user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
    62→                    await websocket.send_json({
    63→                        "type": "transcription",
    64→                        "message": user_message,
    65→                    })
    66→                except RuntimeError as e:
    67→                    # Whisper not installed or model error — recoverable, keep session alive
    68→                    logger.warning(f"Transcription indisponible: {e}")
    69→                    await websocket.send_json({
    70→                        "type": "error",
    71→                        "message": str(e),
    72→                        "recoverable": True,
    73→                    })
    74→                    continue
    75→                except Exception as e:
    76→                    logger.error(f"Erreur transcription Whisper: {e}", exc_info=True)
    77→                    await websocket.send_json({
    78→                        "type": "error",
    79→                        "message": f"Erreur transcription: {str(e)}",
    80→                        "recoverable": True,
    81→                    })
    82→                    continue
    83→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
    84→                user_message = data.get("message", "")
    85→                if not user_message:
    86→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Message vide"})
    87→                    continue
    88→            elif data.get("type") == "pong":
    89→                continue
    90→            else:
    91→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
    92→                continue
    93→
    94→            # Get AI response from Ollama
    95→            try:
    96→                response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique)
    97→            except Exception as e:
    98→                logger.error(f"Erreur Ollama chat: {e}", exc_info=True)
    99→                try:
   100→                    await websocket.send_json({
   101→                        "type": "error",
   102→                        "message": f"Erreur LLM: {str(e)}",
   103→                        "recoverable": True,
   104→                    })
   105→                except Exception:
   106→                    pass
   107→                continue
   108→
   109→            # Update history
   110→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
   111→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
   112→            if len(historique) > 20:
   113→                historique = historique[-20:]
   114→
   115→            # Send text response
   116→            await websocket.send_json({
   117→                "type": "text",
   118→                "message": response_text,
   119→            })
   120→
   121→            # Generate and send audio response
   122→            try:
   123→                tts_text = response_text[:200]
   124→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
   125→                await websocket.send_json({
   126→                    "type": "audio",
   127→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
   128→                })
   129→            except Exception as e:
   130→                logger.warning(f"TTS non disponible: {e}")
   131→
   132→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
   133→        logger.info("Client WebSocket deconnecte")
   134→    except Exception as e:
   135→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   136→    finally:
   137→        heartbeat_task.cancel()
   138→
   139→
   140→@router.get("/status")
   141→async def vocal_status():
   142→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
   143→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
   144→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
   145→    whisper_ok = whisper_service.check_disponible()
   146→    model = None
   147→    if ollama_ok:
   148→        try:
   149→            model = await ollama_service._get_best_model()
   150→        except Exception:
   151→            pass
   152→    return {
   153→        "ollama": ollama_ok,
   154→        "piper": piper_ok,
   155→        "whisper": whisper_ok,
   156→        "model": model,
   157→    }
   158→
      ```

               1→import httpx
     2→from app.config import settings
     3→
     4→SYSTEM_PROMPT = """Tu es un professeur de droit public et de préparation aux concours administratifs français.
     5→Tu parles en français de manière claire et pédagogique.
     6→Tu réponds de manière concise mais complète.
     7→Tu utilises des exemples concrets quand c'est pertinent.
     8→Tu corriges les erreurs de l'étudiant avec bienveillance."""
     9→
    10→# Preferred models in order of priority (lightest first for low-RAM machines)
    11→PREFERRED_MODELS = ["qwen2:0.5b", "phi3:mini", "tinyllama", "mistral:latest"]
    12→
    13→
    14→async def _get_best_model() -> str:
    15→    """Find the best available model from preferred list."""
    16→    try:
    17→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    18→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    19→            if tags_resp.status_code == 200:
    20→                available = [m["name"] for m in tags_resp.json().get("models", [])]
    21→                for model in PREFERRED_MODELS:
    22→                    if model in available:
    23→                        return model
    24→                # Fallback: use first available model
    25→                if available:
    26→                    return available[0]
    27→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    28→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    29→    raise RuntimeError(f"Aucun modele disponible. Lancez: ollama pull qwen2:0.5b")
    30→
    31→
    32→async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None) -> str:
    33→    """Send a message to Ollama and get a response."""
    34→    model = await _get_best_model()
    35→
    36→    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
    37→    if historique:
    38→        messages.extend(historique)
    39→    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
    40→
    41→    try:
    42→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=90.0) as client:
    43→            response = await client.post(
    44→                f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
    45→                json={
    46→                    "model": model,
    47→                    "messages": messages,
    48→                    "stream": False,
    49→                },
    50→            )
    51→            response.raise_for_status()
    52→            data = response.json()
    53→            return data["message"]["content"]
    54→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
    55→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
    56→    except httpx.TimeoutException:
    57→        raise RuntimeError(f"Ollama timeout (>90s) avec {model}. Memoire insuffisante ou modele trop lourd.")
    58→
    59→
    60→async def interroger_sur_document(contenu: str, question: str) -> str:
    61→    """Ask Ollama a question about a specific document content."""
    62→    prompt = f"""Voici un extrait de document de cours:
    63→
    64→{contenu[:3000]}
    65→
    66→Question de l'étudiant: {question}
    67→
    68→Réponds de manière pédagogique en te basant sur le document."""
    69→
    70→    return await chat(prompt)
    71→
    72→
    73→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    74→    """Check if Ollama is running and accessible."""
    75→    try:
    76→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    77→            response = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    78→            return response.status_code == 200
    79→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    80→        return False
    81→
          ```

                   1→import asyncio
     2→import logging
     3→import os
     4→import shutil
     5→import tempfile
     6→from pathlib import Path
     7→
     8→from app.config import settings
     9→
    10→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    11→
    12→# Lazy-loaded model; None until first successful load.
    13→_model = None
    14→
    15→# Cached availability flag (set on first check, avoids repeated import attempts).
    16→_whisper_available: bool | None = None
    17→
    18→
    19→def _ensure_ffmpeg_binary() -> None:
    20→    """Ensure an ffmpeg binary is discoverable for whisper."""
    21→    if shutil.which("ffmpeg"):
    22→        return
    23→
    24→    try:
    25→        import imageio_ffmpeg
    26→
    27→        ffmpeg_path = Path(imageio_ffmpeg.get_ffmpeg_exe())
    28→        shim_dir = Path(tempfile.gettempdir()) / "iaca-ffmpeg-bin"
    29→        shim_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    30→        shim_path = shim_dir / "ffmpeg"
    31→
    32→        if not shim_path.exists():
    33→            try:
    34→                shim_path.symlink_to(ffmpeg_path)
    35→            except OSError:
    36→                shutil.copy2(ffmpeg_path, shim_path)
    37→            shim_path.chmod(0o755)
    38→
    39→        current_path = os.environ.get("PATH", "")
    40→        shim_dir_str = str(shim_dir)
    41→        if shim_dir_str not in current_path.split(os.pathsep):
    42→            os.environ["PATH"] = (
    43→                f"{shim_dir_str}{os.pathsep}{current_path}" if current_path else shim_dir_str
    44→            )
    45→    except Exception as exc:
    46→        logger.warning(f"FFmpeg indisponible pour Whisper: {exc}")
    47→
    48→
    49→def check_disponible() -> bool:
    50→    """Return True if the whisper module and model can be loaded."""
    51→    global _whisper_available
    52→    if _whisper_available is not None:
    53→        return _whisper_available
    54→    _ensure_ffmpeg_binary()
    55→    try:
    56→        import whisper  # noqa: F401
    57→        _whisper_available = True
    58→    except ModuleNotFoundError:
    59→        logger.warning(
    60→            "Module 'whisper' introuvable. "
    61→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper  "
    62→            "(torch sera installé automatiquement)."
    63→        )
    64→        _whisper_available = False
    65→    return _whisper_available
    66→
    67→
    68→def _get_model():
    69→    global _model
    70→    if _model is None:
    71→        if not check_disponible():
    72→            raise RuntimeError(
    73→                "Whisper non disponible — installez openai-whisper: "
    74→                "pip install openai-whisper"
    75→            )
    76→        import whisper
    77→        logger.info(f"Chargement modèle Whisper '{settings.whisper_model}'…")
    78→        _model = whisper.load_model(settings.whisper_model)
    79→        logger.info("Modèle Whisper chargé.")
    80→    return _model
    81→
    82→
    83→async def transcrire(audio_bytes: bytes, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    84→    """Transcribe audio bytes to text using Whisper.
    85→
    86→    Raises RuntimeError with a clear message if whisper is not installed,
    87→    so the WS handler can forward a JSON error without dropping the session.
    88→    """
    89→    if not check_disponible():
    90→        raise RuntimeError(
    91→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
    92→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
    93→        )
    94→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    95→        tmp.write(audio_bytes)
    96→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    97→    try:
    98→        result = await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, tmp_path, language)
    99→    finally:
   100→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
   101→    return result
   102→
   103→
   104→def _transcrire_sync(file_path: str, language: str) -> str:
   105→    model = _get_model()
   106→    result = model.transcribe(file_path, language=language)
   107→    return result["text"].strip()
   108→
   109→
   110→async def transcrire_fichier(file_path: str, language: str = "fr") -> str:
   111→    """Transcribe an audio file to text."""
   112→    if not Path(file_path).exists():
   113→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Audio file not found: {file_path}")
   114→    if not check_disponible():
   115→        raise RuntimeError(
   116→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
   117→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
   118→        )
   119→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, file_path, language)
   120→
              ```

                  ## 👤 user (06:13:05)

                  ✅ **Result:**
                  ```
                       1→import asyncio
     2→import tempfile
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→
     8→async def synthetiser(texte: str) -> bytes:
     9→    """Synthesize text to speech using Piper TTS. Returns WAV audio bytes."""
    10→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    11→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    12→    try:
    13→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    14→            "piper",
    15→            "--model", settings.piper_voice,
    16→            "--output_file", tmp_path,
    17→            stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    18→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    19→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    20→        )
    21→        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=texte.encode())
    22→        if process.returncode != 0:
    23→            raise RuntimeError(f"Piper TTS error: {stderr.decode()}")
    24→        return Path(tmp_path).read_bytes()
    25→    finally:
    26→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def synthetiser_fichier(texte: str, output_path: str) -> str:
    30→    """Synthesize text to speech and save to file."""
    31→    audio_bytes = await synthetiser(texte)
    32→    Path(output_path).write_bytes(audio_bytes)
    33→    return output_path
    34→
    35→
    36→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    37→    """Check if Piper TTS is installed and accessible."""
    38→    try:
    39→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    40→            "piper", "--help",
    41→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    42→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    43→        )
    44→        await process.communicate()
    45→        return process.returncode == 0
    46→    except FileNotFoundError:
    47→        return False
    48→
                  ```

                           1→"use client";

    15→
    16→function ProfessorAvatar() {

    32→        <circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.5" />

    41→    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1">
    42→      <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-slate-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "0ms" }} />
    43→      <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-slate-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "150ms" }} />
    44→      <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-slate-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "300ms" }} />
    45→    </div>
    46→  );
    47→}
    48→
    49→function SoundWave() {
    50→  return (
    51→    <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 h-5">
    52→      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((i) => (
    53→        <div
    54→          key={i}
    55→          className="w-1 bg-red-400 rounded-full animate-pulse"
    56→          style={{
    57→            height: `${8 + Math.sin(i * 1.2) * 8}px`,
    58→            animationDelay: `${i * 100}ms`,
    59→            animationDuration: "0.6s",
    60→          }}
    61→        />
    62→      ))}
    63→    </div>
    64→  );
    65→}
    66→
    67→function MicIcon({ className }: { className?: string }) {
    68→  return (
    69→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className={className}>
    70→      <rect x="9" y="2" width="6" height="11" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
    71→      <path d="M5 11a7 7 0 0 0 14 0" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    72→      <line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    73→    </svg>
    74→  );
    75→}
    76→
    77→function SendIcon() {
    78→  return (
    79→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">

    81→      <path d="M22 2L15 22L11 13L2 9L22 2Z" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinejoin="round" />
    82→    </svg>
    83→  );
    84→}
    85→
    86→function formatTime(date: Date) {
    87→  return date.toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
    88→}
    89→
    90→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    91→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
    92→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
    93→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    94→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
    95→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
    96→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    97→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
    98→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
    99→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
   100→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   101→  const retriesRef = useRef(0);
   102→  const maxRetries = 5;
   103→
   104→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   105→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   106→  };
   107→
   108→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   109→
   110→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   111→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   112→
   113→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   114→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   115→  }, []);
   116→
   117→  const connect = useCallback(() => {
   118→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   119→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   120→
   121→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   122→    const wsUrl = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   123→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   124→
   125→    ws.onopen = () => {
   126→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   127→      setIsConnected(true);
   128→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   129→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   130→    };
   131→
   132→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   133→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   134→      setIsConnected(false);
   135→      setIsLoading(false);
   136→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   137→        retriesRef.current++;
   138→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   139→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   140→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   141→        }, 2000);
   142→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   143→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   144→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour reessayer.");
   145→      }
   146→    };
   147→
   148→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   149→
   150→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   151→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   152→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   153→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   154→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   155→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   156→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   157→        setIsLoading(false);
   158→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   159→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   160→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   161→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   162→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   163→        setIsLoading(false);
   164→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   165→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   166→      }
   167→    };
   168→
   169→    wsRef.current = ws;
   170→  }, [addMessage]);
   171→
   172→  useEffect(() => {
   173→    mountedRef.current = true;
   174→    connect();
   175→    return () => {
   176→      mountedRef.current = false;
   177→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   178→      if (wsRef.current) {
   179→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   180→        wsRef.current = null;
   181→      }
   182→    };
   183→  }, [connect]);
   184→
   185→  const startRecording = async () => {
   186→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   187→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   188→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   189→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   190→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   191→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   192→      const reader = new FileReader();
   193→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   194→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   195→        wsRef.current?.send(
   196→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   197→        );
   198→        setIsLoading(true);
   199→      };
   200→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   201→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   202→    };
   203→    recorder.start();
   204→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   205→    setIsRecording(true);
   206→  };
   207→
   208→  const stopRecording = () => {
   209→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   210→    setIsRecording(false);
   211→  };
   212→
   213→  const sendText = () => {
   214→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   215→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   216→    wsRef.current.send(
   217→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   218→    );
   219→    setInputText("");
   220→    setIsLoading(true);
   221→  };
   222→
   223→  return (
   224→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 shadow-xl">
   225→      {/* Header */}
   226→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-t-xl">
   227→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   228→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   229→          <div>
   230→            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   231→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   232→              <span
   233→                className={`inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${
   234→                  isConnected ? "bg-green-500" : isReconnecting ? "bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse" : "bg-red-500"
   235→                }`}
   236→              />
   237→              {isConnected ? "Connecte" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Deconnecte"}
   238→            </span>
   239→          </div>
   240→        </div>
   241→        {onClose && (
   242→          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1 rounded hover:bg-slate-700">
   243→            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   244→              <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   245→            </svg>
   246→          </button>
   247→        )}
   248→      </div>
   249→
   250→      {/* Messages */}
   251→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
   252→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   253→          <div className="text-center mt-12 space-y-3">
   254→            <div className="mx-auto w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-violet-600/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   255→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   256→            </div>
   257→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
   258→              Posez une question au professeur...
   259→            </p>
   260→          </div>
   261→        )}
   262→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   263→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   264→            return (
   265→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   266→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   267→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   268→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   269→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   270→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   271→                  </svg>
   272→                  {msg.content}
   273→                </div>
   274→              </div>
   275→            );
   276→          }
   277→
   278→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   279→          return (
   280→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   281→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   282→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   283→                <div
   284→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-2.5 ${
   285→                    isUser
   286→                      ? "bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-br-md"
   287→                      : "bg-slate-700 text-slate-100 rounded-bl-md"
   288→                  }`}
   289→                >
   290→                  {msg.content}
   291→                </div>
   292→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 px-1">
   293→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   294→                </span>
   295→              </div>
   296→            </div>
   297→          );
   298→        })}
   299→        {isLoading && (
   300→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2">
   301→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   302→            <div className="bg-slate-700 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-md px-4 py-2.5">
   303→              <ThinkingDots />
   304→            </div>
   305→          </div>
   306→        )}
   307→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   308→      </div>
   309→
   310→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   311→      {isRecording && (
   312→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 bg-red-900/20 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm">
   313→          <SoundWave />
   314→          <span>Enregistrement en cours...</span>
   315→          <SoundWave />
   316→        </div>
   317→      )}
   318→
   319→      {/* Input */}
   320→      <div className="p-3 border-t border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/30">
   321→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-600 focus-within:border-violet-500 transition-colors px-3">
   322→          <input
   323→            type="text"
   324→            value={inputText}
   325→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   326→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   327→            placeholder="Tapez votre question..."
   328→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-3 focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   329→          />
   330→          <button
   331→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   332→            disabled={!isConnected}
   333→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors disabled:opacity-40 ${
   334→              isRecording
   335→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 animate-pulse"
   336→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-slate-700"
   337→            }`}
   338→            title={isRecording ? "Arreter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   339→          >
   340→            <MicIcon />
   341→          </button>
   342→          <button
   343→            onClick={sendText}
   344→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   345→            className="p-2 rounded-lg text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   346→            title="Envoyer"
   347→          >
   348→            <SendIcon />
   349→          </button>
   350→        </div>
   351→      </div>
   352→    </div>
   353→  );
   354→}
   355→
                      ```

                               1→"use client";

     3→import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
     4→import VocalChat from "../../components/VocalChat";
     5→
     6→interface ServiceStatus {
     7→  ollama: boolean;
     8→  piper: boolean;
     9→  whisper: boolean;
    10→  model?: string;
    11→}
    12→
    13→function ChipIcon() {
    14→  return (
    15→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
    16→      <rect x="5" y="5" width="14" height="14" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
    17→      <rect x="9" y="9" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.5" />
    18→      <line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="5" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    19→      <line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="5" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    20→      <line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="5" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    21→      <line x1="8" y1="19" x2="8" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    22→      <line x1="12" y1="19" x2="12" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    23→      <line x1="16" y1="19" x2="16" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    24→      <line x1="2" y1="8" x2="5" y2="8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    25→      <line x1="2" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    26→      <line x1="2" y1="16" x2="5" y2="16" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    27→      <line x1="19" y1="8" x2="22" y2="8" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    28→      <line x1="19" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    29→      <line x1="19" y1="16" x2="22" y2="16" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    30→    </svg>
    31→  );
    32→}
    33→
    34→function MicIcon() {
    35→  return (
    36→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
    37→      <rect x="9" y="2" width="6" height="11" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
    38→      <path d="M5 11a7 7 0 0 0 14 0" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    39→      <line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    40→      <line x1="9" y1="22" x2="15" y2="22" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    41→    </svg>
    42→  );
    43→}
    44→
    45→function SpeakerIcon() {
    46→  return (
    47→    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
    48→      <path d="M11 5L6 9H2v6h4l5 4V5z" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinejoin="round" />
    49→      <path d="M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    50→      <path d="M18.07 5.93a9 9 0 0 1 0 12.14" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    51→    </svg>
    52→  );
    53→}
    54→
    55→function ProfessorAvatar() {
    56→  return (
    57→    <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-blue-500 flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl shadow-violet-900/30">
    58→      <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    59→        <circle cx="12" cy="9" r="4" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.5" />
    60→        <path d="M4 21c0-4 3.6-7 8-7s8 3 8 7" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    61→        <path d="M7 3h10l-2 3H9L7 3z" fill="white" opacity="0.6" />
    62→        <line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
    63→      </svg>
    64→    </div>
    65→  );
    66→}
    67→
    68→function PlayIcon() {
    69→  return (
    70→    <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
    71→      <path d="M8 5.14v13.72a1 1 0 0 0 1.5.86l11.04-6.86a1 1 0 0 0 0-1.72L9.5 4.28a1 1 0 0 0-1.5.86z" fill="currentColor" />
    72→    </svg>
    73→  );
    74→}
    75→
    76→export default function VocalPage() {
    77→  const [status, setStatus] = useState<ServiceStatus | null>(null);
    78→  const [showChat, setShowChat] = useState(false);
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    fetch("/api/vocal/status")
    82→      .then((r) => r.json())
    83→      .then(setStatus)
    84→      .catch(() => setStatus(null));
    85→  }, []);
    86→
    87→  const services = [
    88→    {
    89→      key: "ollama" as const,
    90→      label: "Ollama",
    91→      sub: "LLM",
    92→      icon: <ChipIcon />,
    93→    },
    94→    {
    95→      key: "whisper" as const,
    96→      label: "Whisper",
    97→      sub: "STT",
    98→      icon: <MicIcon />,
    99→    },
   100→    {
   101→      key: "piper" as const,
   102→      label: "Piper",
   103→      sub: "TTS",
   104→      icon: <SpeakerIcon />,
   105→    },
   106→  ];
   107→
   108→  const capabilities = [
   109→    "Interrogation orale",
   110→    "Explications claires",
   111→    "Feedback personnalise",
   112→  ];
   113→
   114→  return (
   115→    <div className="p-6">
   116→      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Prof Vocal</h1>
   117→
   118→      {/* Service status bar */}
   119→      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 mb-8">
   120→        {services.map((svc) => {
   121→          const active = status ? status[svc.key] : false;
   122→          return (
   123→            <div
   124→              key={svc.key}
   125→              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/70 border border-slate-700/50"
   126→            >
   127→              <div className={active ? "text-green-400" : "text-slate-500"}>
   128→                {svc.icon}
   129→              </div>
   130→              <span className="text-sm text-slate-300 font-medium">{svc.label}</span>
   131→              <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">{svc.sub}</span>
   132→              <div
   133→                className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${
   134→                  active ? "bg-green-500 animate-pulse" : "bg-red-500"
   135→                }`}
   136→              />
   137→            </div>
   138→          );
   139→        })}
   140→        {status?.model && (
   141→          <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 ml-1">
   142→            Modele: {status.model}
   143→          </span>
   144→        )}
   145→      </div>
   146→
   147→      {!showChat ? (
   148→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center py-16">
   149→          {/* Avatar */}
   150→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   151→
   152→          {/* Title */}
   153→          <h2 className="mt-6 text-3xl font-bold text-gradient">
   154→            Prof Vocal IA
   155→          </h2>
   156→          <p className="mt-2 text-slate-400 text-base">
   157→            Votre assistant pour les concours administratifs
   158→          </p>
   159→
   160→          {/* Capability pills */}
   161→          <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-2 mt-6">
   162→            {capabilities.map((cap) => (
   163→              <span
   164→                key={cap}
   165→                className="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/20"
   166→              >
   167→                {cap}
   168→              </span>
   169→            ))}
   170→          </div>
   171→
   172→          {/* CTA button */}
   173→          <button
   174→            onClick={() => setShowChat(true)}
   175→            disabled={!status?.ollama}
   176→            className="mt-10 inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-10 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl text-lg font-semibold hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-blue-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed shadow-lg shadow-violet-900/30 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
   177→          >
   178→            <PlayIcon />
   179→            Demarrer la session
   180→          </button>
   181→
   182→          {/* Model hint */}
   183→          <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-slate-500">
   184→            {status?.model || "qwen2:0.5b"} &middot; Reponse ~15-20s
   185→          </p>
   186→
   187→          {!status?.ollama && (
   188→            <p className="text-red-400 mt-4 text-sm">
   189→              Ollama doit etre lance (ollama serve) pour utiliser le prof vocal.
   190→            </p>
   191→          )}
   192→        </div>
   193→      ) : (
   194→        <div className="h-[600px]">
   195→          <VocalChat onClose={() => setShowChat(false)} />
   196→        </div>
   197→      )}
   198→    </div>
   199→  );
   200→}
   201→
                          ```

     6→

     9→- Service transcription: `backend/app/services/whisper_service.py` importe `whisper` au runtime.

                                                                                         1→# Journal d'Implémentation: Fiches + Vocal Fiabilité
     2→
     3→## Informations
     4→- Date début: 2026-03-06
     5→- Basé sur: 02_plan.md
     6→- Statut: Termine
     7→
     8→## Progression
     9→- [x] Délégation Codex-fast: amélioration génération fiche (`claude_service.py`).
    10→- [x] Délégation AMP: robustesse vocal (`whisper_service.py`, `vocal.py`).
    11→- [x] Intégration orchestrateur: fallback ffmpeg via `imageio-ffmpeg` + sections fiche renforcées.
    12→- [x] Installation dépendances runtime STT dans venv backend.
    13→- [x] Relance backend/frontend et validation de non-régression.
    14→
    15→## Modifications principales
    16→- `backend/app/services/claude_service.py`
    17→  - prompt fiche renforcé
    18→  - parsing JSON robuste
    19→  - sanitation de sections (anti-générique, anti-vide, fallback)
    20→  - seuils relevés (`FICHE_MIN_SECTIONS=6`, `FICHE_MAX_SECTIONS=10`)
    21→- `backend/app/services/whisper_service.py`
    22→  - check disponibilité whisper réel
    23→  - fallback ffmpeg (shim `ffmpeg` via `imageio-ffmpeg`)
    24→  - erreurs explicites et récupérables
    25→- `backend/app/routers/vocal.py`
    26→  - erreurs audio/LLM renvoyées en JSON sans crash session
    27→  - `/api/vocal/status` retourne `whisper` réel
    28→- `backend/requirements.txt`
    29→  - ajout `setuptools<81`
    30→  - ajout `imageio-ffmpeg==0.5.1`
    31→
    32→## Validation exécutée
    33→- `backend/.venv/bin/python -m compileall backend/app` -> OK
    34→- `cd frontend && npm run build` -> OK
    35→- Endpoints frontend/pages `/ /quiz /flashcards /fiches /mindmap /vocal` -> 200
    36→- API proxy `/api/vocal/status /api/fiches /api/quiz /api/flashcards/revision` -> 200
    37→- WS vocal audio test -> message `type=transcription` reçu (pas d'erreur ffmpeg/whisper)
    38→- Génération fiche réelle -> `sections_generated: 9`, fiche créée en DB
    39→
    40→## Dépendances installées (venv backend)
    41→- `torch==2.3.1+cpu`
    42→- `openai-whisper==20231117`
    43→- `imageio-ffmpeg==0.5.1`
    44→- `numpy==2.2.2`
    45→- `numba==0.61.2`
    46→- `llvmlite==0.44.0`
    47→- `tiktoken==0.9.0`
    48→- `more-itertools==10.6.0`
    49→- `regex==2024.11.6`
    50→
    51→## Résultat final
    52→- Fiches plus détaillées et plus intuitives à la génération.
    53→- Prof vocal fonctionnel côté transcription audio (whisper actif).
    54→- Session WebSocket vocal reste opérationnelle en cas d’erreur récupérable.
    55→
    56→## Exécution autonome continue (2026-03-07)
    57→- Batch en cours: `backend/.venv/bin/python3 scripts/upgrade_manuals_quality.py --provider auto`
    58→- Cibles runtime: `fc>=40`, `qq>=16`, `fi>=4`.
    59→- Progression intermédiaire observée: 25 documents manuels complétés, delta DB courant `+257 flashcards`, `+100 quiz_questions`, `+25 fiches`.

                                                                                                ```
                                                                                                     1→from fastapi import Request
     2→from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
     3→from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→MUTATION_METHODS = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
     8→
     9→
    10→class BearerAuthMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    11→    """Optional Bearer token middleware.
    12→
    13→    If api_auth_token is empty, all requests pass through.
    14→    If api_auth_token is set, all mutation (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) requests
    15→    under /api/ require a valid Authorization: Bearer <token> header.
    16→    """
    17→
    18→    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
    19→        token = settings.api_auth_token
    20→        if not token:
    21→            return await call_next(request)
    22→
    23→        # WebSocket upgrades are GET requests with Upgrade: websocket header.
    24→        # Auth is handled inside the WS handler itself (close code 1008).
    25→        if request.headers.get("upgrade", "").lower() == "websocket":
    26→            return await call_next(request)
    27→
    28→        if request.method in MUTATION_METHODS and request.url.path.startswith("/api/"):
    29→            auth_header = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
    30→            if not auth_header.startswith("Bearer ") or auth_header[7:] != token:
    31→                return JSONResponse(
    32→                    status_code=401,
    33→                    content={"detail": "Unauthorized: invalid or missing Bearer token"},
    34→                )
    35→
    36→        return await call_next(request)
    37→
    38→
    39→async def verify_ws_token(token_param: str | None, auth_header: str | None) -> bool:
    40→    """Verify WebSocket token from query param or Authorization header.
    41→
    42→    Returns True if auth is valid (or not required), False otherwise.
    43→    """
    44→    required_token = settings.api_auth_token
    45→    if not required_token:
    46→        return True
    47→
    48→    # Check query param first, then header
    49→    if token_param and token_param == required_token:
    50→        return True
    51→    if auth_header and auth_header.startswith("Bearer ") and auth_header[7:] == required_token:
    52→        return True
    53→
    54→    return False
    55→
                                                                                                ```

                                                                                                      ```
                                                                                                           1→const getRawAuthToken = (): string => {
     2→  return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_AUTH_TOKEN?.trim() || "";
     3→};
     4→
     5→export const withAuthHeaders = (init: RequestInit = {}): RequestInit => {
     6→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return init;
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  const headers = new Headers(init.headers || {});
    12→  if (!headers.has("Authorization")) {
    13→    headers.set("Authorization", `Bearer ${token}`);
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  return { ...init, headers };
    17→};
    18→
    19→export const withAuthQuery = (url: string): string => {
    20→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
    21→  if (!token) {
    22→    return url;
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
    26→  return `${url}${separator}token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}`;
    27→};
    28→
                                                                                                      ```
