              ```
                   1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface FlashCardProps {
     6→  question: string;
     7→  reponse: string;
     8→  explication?: string;
     9→  matiere?: string;
    10→  onReview: (quality: number) => void;
    11→}
    12→
    13→const ratingLabels: Record<number, { label: string; color: string; description: string }> = {
    14→  1: { label: "1", color: "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 border-red-500", description: "Aucune idee" },
    15→  2: { label: "2", color: "bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 border-orange-500", description: "Tres difficile" },
    16→  3: { label: "3", color: "bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 border-amber-500", description: "Difficile" },
    17→  4: { label: "4", color: "bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 border-emerald-500", description: "Correct" },
    18→  5: { label: "5", color: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 border-green-500", description: "Facile" },
    19→};
    20→
    21→export default function FlashCard({
    22→  question,
    23→  reponse,
    24→  explication,
    25→  matiere,
    26→  onReview,
    27→}: FlashCardProps) {
    28→  const [isFlipped, setIsFlipped] = useState(false);
    29→  const [showExplication, setShowExplication] = useState(false);
    30→
    31→  const handleFlip = () => {
    32→    setIsFlipped(!isFlipped);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleReview = (quality: number) => {
    36→    setIsFlipped(false);
    37→    setShowExplication(false);
    38→    onReview(quality);
    39→  };
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
    43→      {/* Badge matiere */}
    44→      {matiere && (
    45→        <div className="mb-4 flex justify-center">
    46→          <span className="badge-blue">{matiere}</span>
    47→        </div>
    48→      )}
    49→
    50→      {/* Card avec flip */}
    51→      <div
    52→        className="flip-card cursor-pointer"
    53→        style={{ minHeight: "320px" }}
    54→        onClick={handleFlip}
    55→      >
    56→        <div className={`flip-card-inner ${isFlipped ? "flipped" : ""}`}>
    57→          {/* Face avant - Question */}
    58→          <div className="flip-card-front">
    59→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-blue-500/20 glow-blue">
    60→              <div className="mb-4">
    61→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    62→                  Question
    63→                </span>
    64→              </div>
    65→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    66→                {question}
    67→              </p>
    68→              <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-500">
    69→                Cliquer pour retourner
    70→              </div>
    71→            </div>
    72→          </div>
    73→
    74→          {/* Face arriere - Reponse */}
    75→          <div className="flip-card-back">
    76→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-violet-500/20 glow-violet">
    77→              <div className="mb-4">
    78→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-violet-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    79→                  Reponse
    80→                </span>
    81→              </div>
    82→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    83→                {reponse}
    84→              </p>
    85→
    86→              {/* Explication */}
    87→              {explication && (
    88→                <div className="mt-4 w-full px-4">
    89→                  {!showExplication ? (
    90→                    <button
    91→                      onClick={(e) => {
    92→                        e.stopPropagation();
    93→                        setShowExplication(true);
    94→                      }}
    95→                      className="text-sm text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors"
    96→                    >
    97→                      Voir l&apos;explication
    98→                    </button>
    99→                  ) : (
   100→                    <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-slate-900/50 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/50">
   101→                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">
   102→                        {explication}
   103→                      </p>
   104→                    </div>
   105→                  )}
   106→                </div>
   107→              )}
   108→            </div>
   109→          </div>
   110→        </div>
   111→      </div>
   112→
   113→      {/* Boutons de notation - visibles apres flip */}
   114→      {isFlipped && (
   115→        <div className="mt-6 space-y-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-300">
   116→          <p className="text-center text-sm text-slate-400 font-medium">
   117→            Evaluez votre connaissance
   118→          </p>
   119→          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2">
   120→            {Object.entries(ratingLabels).map(([quality, { label, color, description }]) => (
   121→              <button
   122→                key={quality}
   123→                onClick={(e) => {
   124→                  e.stopPropagation();
   125→                  handleReview(Number(quality));
   126→                }}
   127→                className={`
   128→                  flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-white font-semibold
   129→                  transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95
   130→                  border border-opacity-30 ${color}
   131→                `}
   132→                title={description}
   133→              >
   134→                <span className="text-lg">{label}</span>
   135→                <span className="text-[10px] opacity-80 font-normal">{description}</span>
   136→              </button>
   137→            ))}
   138→          </div>
   139→        </div>
   140→      )}
   141→    </div>
   142→  );
   143→}
   144→
              ```

                  ```
                       1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
     4→import FlashCard from "@/components/FlashCard";
     5→import { withAuthHeaders } from "@/lib/auth";
     6→
     7→const API_BASE = "/api";
     8→const FETCH_LIMIT = 200;
     9→
    10→interface FlashcardData {
    11→  id: number;
    12→  question: string;
    13→  reponse: string;
    14→  explication?: string;
    15→  matiere_id?: number;
    16→  matiere_nom?: string;
    17→  next_review?: string;
    18→  ease_factor?: number;
    19→  interval?: number;
    20→  repetitions?: number;
    21→}
    22→
    23→interface Matiere {
    24→  id: number;
    25→  nom: string;
    26→}
    27→
    28→export default function FlashcardsPage() {
    29→  const [flashcards, setFlashcards] = useState<FlashcardData[]>([]);
    30→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    31→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
    32→  const [contentMode, setContentMode] = useState<"revision" | "all">("all");
    33→  const [invertedSides, setInvertedSides] = useState(false);
    34→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
    35→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    36→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<"list" | "review">("list");
    37→  const [reviewedCount, setReviewedCount] = useState(0);
    38→  const [sessionResults, setSessionResults] = useState<{ quality: number }[]>([]);
    39→
    40→  const fetchFlashcards = useCallback(async () => {
    41→    setLoading(true);
    42→    try {
    43→      const params = new URLSearchParams();
    44→      params.set("limit", String(FETCH_LIMIT));
    45→      if (selectedMatiere) {
    46→        params.set("matiere_id", String(selectedMatiere));
    47→      }
    48→      const endpoint = contentMode === "revision" ? "flashcards/revision" : "flashcards";
    49→      const url = `${API_BASE}/${endpoint}?${params.toString()}`;
    50→      const res = await fetch(url);
    51→      if (res.ok) {
    52→        const data = await res.json();
    53→        setFlashcards(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
    54→        setCurrentIndex(0);
    55→      }
    56→    } catch (error) {
    57→      console.error("Erreur chargement flashcards:", error);
    58→    } finally {
    59→      setLoading(false);
    60→    }
    61→  }, [selectedMatiere, contentMode]);
    62→
    63→  const fetchMatieres = useCallback(async () => {
    64→    try {
    65→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    66→      if (res.ok) {
    67→        setMatieres(await res.json());
    68→      }
    69→    } catch (error) {
    70→      console.error("Erreur chargement matieres:", error);
    71→    }
    72→  }, []);
    73→
    74→  useEffect(() => {
    75→    fetchMatieres();
    76→  }, [fetchMatieres]);
    77→
    78→  useEffect(() => {
    79→    fetchFlashcards();
    80→  }, [fetchFlashcards]);
    81→
    82→  const handleReview = async (quality: number) => {
    83→    const card = flashcards[currentIndex];
    84→    if (!card) return;
    85→
    86→    // Envoi de la notation au backend (SM-2)
    87→    try {
    88→      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/${card.id}/review`, withAuthHeaders({
    89→        method: "POST",
    90→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    91→        body: JSON.stringify({ qualite: quality }),
    92→      }));
    93→    } catch (error) {
    94→      console.error("Erreur envoi review:", error);
    95→    }
    96→
    97→    setSessionResults((prev) => [...prev, { quality }]);
    98→    setReviewedCount((prev) => prev + 1);
    99→
   100→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
   101→      setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
   102→    } else {
   103→      // Session terminee
   104→      setMode("list");
   105→    }
   106→  };
   107→
   108→  const skipToNextCard = () => {
   109→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
   110→      setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
   111→      return;
   112→    }
   113→    setMode("list");
   114→  };
   115→
   116→  const startReview = () => {
   117→    setCurrentIndex(0);
   118→    setReviewedCount(0);
   119→    setSessionResults([]);
   120→    setMode("review");
   121→  };
   122→
   123→  const totalCards = flashcards.length;
   124→  const progress = totalCards > 0 ? Math.round((currentIndex / totalCards) * 100) : 0;
   125→  const avgQuality =
   126→    sessionResults.length > 0
   127→      ? (sessionResults.reduce((s, r) => s + r.quality, 0) / sessionResults.length).toFixed(1)
   128→      : "0";
   129→  const matiereBreakdown = useMemo(() => {
   130→    const counts = new Map<string, number>();
   131→    for (const card of flashcards) {
   132→      const matiereName =
   133→        card.matiere_nom ||
   134→        matieres.find((m) => m.id === card.matiere_id)?.nom ||
   135→        "Sans matiere";
   136→      counts.set(matiereName, (counts.get(matiereName) || 0) + 1);
   137→    }
   138→    return Array.from(counts.entries())
   139→      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
   140→      .slice(0, 6);
   141→  }, [flashcards, matieres]);
   142→
   143→  if (loading) {
   144→    return (
   145→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   146→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   147→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-violet-500/30 border-t-violet-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   148→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des flashcards...</p>
   149→        </div>
   150→      </div>
   151→    );
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  // Mode revision
   155→  if (mode === "review") {
   156→    const currentCard = flashcards[currentIndex];
   157→    const prompt = invertedSides ? currentCard?.reponse : currentCard?.question;
   158→    const answer = invertedSides ? currentCard?.question : currentCard?.reponse;
   159→
   160→    // Session terminee
   161→    if (!currentCard || reviewedCount >= totalCards) {
   162→      return (
   163→        <div className="space-y-8">
   164→          <div className="text-center py-12">
   165→            <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   166→              <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   167→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   168→              </svg>
   169→            </div>
   170→            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Session terminee !</h2>
   171→            <p className="text-slate-400 mb-6">
   172→              Vous avez revise {reviewedCount} carte{reviewedCount > 1 ? "s" : ""}
   173→            </p>
   174→
   175→            {/* Stats session — 3 cols */}
   176→            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 max-w-sm mx-auto mb-8">
   177→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   178→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{reviewedCount}</p>
   179→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">révisées</p>
   180→              </div>
   181→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   182→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-400">{sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality >= 4).length}</p>
   183→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">maîtrisées</p>
   184→              </div>
   185→              <div className="card text-center py-3 px-2">
   186→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-400">{avgQuality}</p>
   187→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">qualité /5</p>
   188→              </div>
   189→            </div>
   190→
   191→            <div className="flex justify-center gap-3">
   192→              <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-secondary">
   193→                Retour
   194→              </button>
   195→              <button
   196→                onClick={() => {
   197→                  fetchFlashcards();
   198→                  startReview();
   199→                }}
   200→                className="btn-primary"
   201→              >
   202→                Nouvelle session
   203→              </button>
   204→            </div>
   205→          </div>
   206→        </div>
   207→      );
   208→    }
   209→
   210→    return (
   211→      <div className="space-y-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
   212→        {/* Header révision */}
   213→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
   214→          <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-ghost flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm px-3">
   215→            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   216→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   217→            </svg>
   218→            Quitter
   219→          </button>
   220→          <div className="flex-1 text-center">
   221→            {currentCard.matiere_nom && (
   222→              <span className="badge-violet text-xs">{currentCard.matiere_nom}</span>
   223→            )}
   224→          </div>
   225→          <div className="text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums px-3 py-1 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 shrink-0">
   226→            {currentIndex + 1}/{totalCards}
   227→          </div>
   228→        </div>
   229→
   230→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   231→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-1.5 overflow-hidden">
   232→          <div
   233→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-violet-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   234→            style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
   235→          />
   236→        </div>
   237→
   238→        {/* Flashcard */}
   239→        <div className="py-6">
   240→          <FlashCard
   241→            question={prompt || ""}
   242→            reponse={answer || ""}
   243→            explication={currentCard.explication}
   244→            matiere={currentCard.matiere_nom}
   245→            onReview={handleReview}
   246→          />
   247→        </div>
   248→        <div className="flex justify-center">
   249→          <button onClick={skipToNextCard} className="btn-ghost text-sm">
   250→            Passer a la suivante
   251→          </button>
   252→        </div>
   253→      </div>
   254→    );
   255→  }
   256→
   257→  const goodCards = sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality >= 4).length;
   258→  const hardCards = sessionResults.filter(r => r.quality <= 2).length;
   259→
   260→  // Mode liste
   261→  return (
   262→    <div className="space-y-6">
   263→      {/* Header */}
   264→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-4">
   265→        <div>
   266→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Flashcards</h1>
   267→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">Révisez avec la répétition espacée (algorithme SM-2)</p>
   268→        </div>
   269→        {totalCards > 0 && (
   270→          <button onClick={startReview} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   271→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   272→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z" />
   273→            </svg>
   274→            Réviser maintenant ({totalCards})
   275→          </button>
   276→        )}
   277→      </div>
   278→
   279→      {/* Bandeau stats session précédente */}
   280→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   281→        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   282→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-violet-500/20 bg-violet-500/5">
   283→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-violet-300">{sessionResults.length}</p>
   284→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">cartes révisées</p>
   285→          </div>
   286→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-emerald-500/20 bg-emerald-500/5">
   287→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-emerald-300">{goodCards}</p>
   288→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">bien maîtrisées</p>
   289→          </div>
   290→          <div className="card py-3 text-center border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/5">
   291→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-300">{hardCards}</p>
   292→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">à retravailler</p>
   293→          </div>
   294→        </div>
   295→      )}
   296→
   297→      {/* Filtre par matiere */}
   298→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   299→        <button
   300→          onClick={() => setContentMode("all")}
   301→          className={`
   302→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   303→            ${contentMode === "all"
   304→              ? "bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   305→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   306→            }
   307→          `}
   308→        >
   309→          Toutes les cartes (max {FETCH_LIMIT})
   310→        </button>
   311→        <button
   312→          onClick={() => setContentMode("revision")}
   313→          className={`
   314→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   315→            ${contentMode === "revision"
   316→              ? "bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/40"
   317→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   318→            }
   319→          `}
   320→        >
   321→          Cartes a reviser
   322→        </button>
   323→        <button
   324→          onClick={() => setInvertedSides((prev) => !prev)}
   325→          className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   326→        >
   327→          Inverser Q/R: {invertedSides ? "ON" : "OFF"}
   328→        </button>
   329→      </div>
   330→      {matiereBreakdown.length > 0 && (
   331→        <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   332→          Repartition chargee: {matiereBreakdown.map(([name, count]) => `${name} (${count})`).join(" · ")}
   333→        </p>
   334→      )}
   335→
   336→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   337→        <button
   338→          onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   339→          className={`
   340→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   341→            ${!selectedMatiere
   342→              ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   343→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   344→            }
   345→          `}
   346→        >
   347→          Toutes
   348→        </button>
   349→        {matieres.map((matiere) => (
   350→          <button
   351→            key={matiere.id}
   352→            onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(matiere.id)}
   353→            className={`
   354→              px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   355→              ${selectedMatiere === matiere.id
   356→                ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   357→                : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   358→              }
   359→            `}
   360→          >
   361→            {matiere.nom}
   362→          </button>
   363→        ))}
   364→      </div>
   365→
   366→      {/* Stats session precedente */}
   367→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   368→        <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500/5 to-blue-500/5 border-violet-500/20">
   369→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
   370→            <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   371→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z" />
   372→            </svg>
   373→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-violet-300">Derniere session</h3>
   374→          </div>
   375→          <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   376→            {sessionResults.length} cartes revisees - Qualite moyenne : {avgQuality}/5
   377→          </p>
   378→        </div>
   379→      )}
   380→
   381→      {/* Liste ou etat vide */}
   382→      {totalCards === 0 ? (
   383→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   384→          <svg className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   385→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   386→          </svg>
   387→          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-300 mb-2">
   388→            {contentMode === "revision" ? "Aucune flashcard a reviser" : "Aucune flashcard disponible"}
   389→          </h3>
   390→          <p className="text-slate-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
   391→            {contentMode === "revision"
   392→              ? "Passez en mode 'Toutes les cartes' pour travailler au-dela des revisions urgentes."
   393→              : "Importez des documents dans vos matieres pour generer automatiquement des flashcards."}
   394→          </p>
   395→        </div>
   396→      ) : (
   397→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   398→          {flashcards.map((card) => (
   399→            <div key={card.id} className="card-hover">
   400→              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
   401→                {card.matiere_nom && (
   402→                  <span className="badge-blue">{card.matiere_nom}</span>
   403→                )}
   404→                {card.next_review && (
   405→                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   406→                    {new Date(card.next_review).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   407→                      day: "numeric",
   408→                      month: "short",
   409→                    })}
   410→                  </span>
   411→                )}
   412→              </div>
   413→              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-200 mb-2 line-clamp-3">
   414→                {card.question}
   415→              </p>
   416→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 line-clamp-2">{card.reponse}</p>
   417→            </div>
   418→          ))}
   419→        </div>

   421→    </div>
   422→  );
   423→}
                  ```

## 👤 user (17:54:04)

Tu es un agent frontend-developer spécialisé UX. Tu dois améliorer considérablement la page Fiches de l'application IACA.

## Contexte
Les fiches sont des fiches de révision structurées avec des sections en accordéon. Le design actuel est fonctionnel mais "horrible" selon l'utilisateur. Il faut améliorer:

1. **La liste des fiches**: Actuellement une grille basique. Améliorer avec:
   - Groupement par matière (comme les flashcards)
   - Badges colorés par matière avec des couleurs distinctes
   - Meilleur aperçu: montrer le nombre de sections et un extrait du résumé
   - Icônes pour les matières

2. **La vue détail d'une fiche**: L'accordéon actuel est trop simple. Améliorer avec:
   - Un en-tête plus visuel avec dégradé
   - Des sections numérotées avec icônes
   - Le contenu des sections en markdown-like (bien formater les paragraphes)
   - Un sommaire cliquable en haut listant toutes les sections
   - Un bouton "Tout déplier / Tout replier"

3. **Design général**:
   - Utiliser les classes CSS existantes: `card`, `card-hover`, `badge-blue`, `badge-violet`, `badge-amber`, `badge-green`, `btn-primary`, `btn-secondary`, `btn-ghost`, `input-field`, `glow-blue`, `glow-violet`
   - Palette sombre cohérente (slate-800/900/950, blue-500/600, violet-500/600)
   - Transitions fluides
   - Icônes SVG inline (pas de bibliothèque externe)

## Couleurs par matière
Utiliser cette association:
```typescript
const matiereColors: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string; border: string }> = {
  "Droit public": { bg: "bg-blue-500/20", text: "text-blue-400", border: "border-blue-500/30" },
  "Économie et finances publiques": { bg: "bg-emerald-500/20", text: "text-emerald-400", border: "border-emerald-500/30" },
  "Questions contemporaines": { bg: "bg-amber-500/20", text: "text-amber-400", border: "border-amber-500/30" },
  "Questions sociales": { bg: "bg-rose-500/20", text: "text-rose-400", border: "border-rose-500/30" },
  "Relations internationales": { bg: "bg-violet-500/20", text: "text-violet-400", border: "border-violet-500/30" },
};
```

## Contraintes
- Garder TOUTE la logique existante (fetch, filtres, modal generation, etc.)
- Garder les mêmes interfaces TypeScript
- Pas de dépendances externes - SVG inline uniquement
- Le code doit compiler: `cd /home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`
- Améliorer UNIQUEMENT le rendu visuel et l'UX

## Ce qui doit être amélioré dans le détail
1. Vue liste: grouper par matière, meilleurs cards avec icônes, compteur sections visible
2. Vue détail: 
   - Sommaire cliquable en haut
   - Bouton tout déplier/replier
   - Sections numérotées
   - Meilleur formatage du contenu (whitespace-pre-line est trop basique, ajouter des paragraphes visuels)
3. Modal de génération: plus joli avec animation

Lis le fichier actuel, modifie-le, et vérifie que tsc passe.

          ```
    43→
    44→interface Document {
    45→  id: number;
    46→  titre: string;
    47→  matiere_id: number | null;
    48→}
    49→
    50→export default function FichesPage() {
    51→  const [fiches, setFiches] = useState<FicheListItem[]>([]);
    52→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    53→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
    54→  const [selectedFiche, setSelectedFiche] = useState<FicheDetail | null>(null);
    55→  const [openSections, setOpenSections] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    57→  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
    58→  const [showGenModal, setShowGenModal] = useState(false);
    59→  const [documents, setDocuments] = useState<Document[]>([]);
    60→  const [selectedDocId, setSelectedDocId] = useState<number | null>(null);
    61→  const [nextContent, setNextContent] = useState<{ flashcards: { id: number; question: string }[]; quizzes: { id: number; titre: string }[] } | null>(null);
    62→  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
    63→
    64→  // Read matiere_id from URL search params
    65→  useEffect(() => {
    66→    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    67→    const mid = params.get("matiere_id");
    68→    if (mid) setSelectedMatiere(parseInt(mid));
    69→  }, []);
    70→
    71→  const fetchFiches = useCallback(async () => {
    72→    try {
    73→      const base = `${API_BASE}/fiches?limit=250`;
    74→      const url = selectedMatiere
    75→        ? `${base}&matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`
    76→        : base;
    77→      const res = await fetch(url);
    78→      if (res.ok) setFiches(await res.json());
    79→    } catch (e) {
    80→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiches:", e);
    81→    }
    82→  }, [selectedMatiere]);
    83→
    84→  useEffect(() => {
    85→    const init = async () => {
    86→      setLoading(true);
    87→      try {
    88→        const [matRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
    89→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`),
    90→        ]);
    91→        if (matRes.status === "fulfilled" && matRes.value.ok) {
    92→          setMatieres(await matRes.value.json());
    93→        }
    94→        await fetchFiches();
    95→      } finally {
    96→        setLoading(false);
    97→      }
    98→    };
    99→    init();
   100→  }, [fetchFiches]);
   101→
   102→  const openFiche = async (ficheId: number) => {
   103→    try {
   104→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}`);
   105→      if (res.ok) {
   106→        const data = await res.json();
   107→        setSelectedFiche(data);
   108→        setOpenSections(new Set());
   109→        // Load next content (flashcards/quiz)
   110→        const nextRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}/next`);
   111→        if (nextRes.ok) setNextContent(await nextRes.json());
   112→      }
   113→    } catch (e) {
   114→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiche:", e);
   115→    }
   116→  };
   117→
   118→  const toggleSection = (sectionId: number) => {
   119→    setOpenSections((prev) => {
   120→      const next = new Set(prev);
   121→      if (next.has(sectionId)) next.delete(sectionId);
   122→      else next.add(sectionId);
   123→      return next;
   124→    });
   125→  };
   126→
   127→  const openGenModal = async () => {
   128→    try {
   129→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents`);
   130→      if (res.ok) {
   131→        const docs = await res.json();
   132→        setDocuments(docs);
   133→        setSelectedDocId(docs.length > 0 ? docs[0].id : null);
   134→      }
   135→    } catch (e) {
   136→      console.error(e);
   137→    }
   138→    setShowGenModal(true);
   139→  };
   140→
   141→  const generateFiche = async () => {
   142→    if (!selectedDocId) return;
   143→    setGenerating(true);
   144→    try {
   145→      const res = await fetch(
   146→        `${API_BASE}/recommandations/generer-fiche/${selectedDocId}`,
   147→        withAuthHeaders({ method: "POST" })
   148→      );
   149→      if (res.ok) {
   150→        const data = await res.json();
   151→        setShowGenModal(false);
   152→        await fetchFiches();
   153→        // Auto-open the generated fiche
   154→        if (data.fiche_id) openFiche(data.fiche_id);
   155→      } else {
   156→        const err = await res.text();
   157→        alert(`Erreur generation: ${err}`);
   158→      }
   159→    } catch (e) {
   160→      alert(`Erreur: ${e}`);
   161→    } finally {
   162→      setGenerating(false);
   163→    }
   164→  };
   165→
   166→  const getMatiereName = (matiereId: number | null) => {
   167→    if (!matiereId) return "";
   168→    return matieres.find((m) => m.id === matiereId)?.nom || "";
   169→  };
   170→
   171→  if (loading) {
   172→    return (
   173→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   174→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   175→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   176→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des fiches...</p>
   177→        </div>
   178→      </div>
   179→    );
   180→  }
   181→
   182→  // Detail view
   183→  if (selectedFiche) {
   184→    return (
   185→      <div className="space-y-5 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
   186→        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   187→          <button
   188→            onClick={() => { setSelectedFiche(null); setNextContent(null); }}
   189→            aria-label="Retour aux fiches"
   190→            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors shrink-0"
   191→          >
   192→            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   193→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   194→            </svg>
   195→            Fiches
   196→          </button>
   197→          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   198→            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-white leading-tight line-clamp-2">{selectedFiche.titre}</h1>
   199→            {selectedFiche.matiere_id && (
   200→              <span className="badge-blue text-xs mt-1 inline-block">{getMatiereName(selectedFiche.matiere_id)}</span>
   201→            )}
   202→          </div>
   203→        </div>
   204→
   205→        {selectedFiche.resume && (
   206→          <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-900/20 to-violet-900/20 border-blue-500/20">
   207→            <p className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedFiche.resume}</p>
   208→          </div>
   209→        )}
   210→
   211→        {/* Sections en accordeon */}
   212→        <div className="space-y-3">
   213→          {selectedFiche.sections
   214→            .sort((a, b) => a.ordre - b.ordre)
   215→            .map((section) => {
   216→              const isOpen = openSections.has(section.id);
   217→              return (
   218→                <div key={section.id} className="card-hover">
   219→                  <button
   220→                    onClick={() => toggleSection(section.id)}
   221→                    className="w-full flex items-center justify-between text-left"
   222→                  >
   223→                    <h3 className="text-white font-medium">{section.titre}</h3>
   224→                    <svg
   225→                      className={`w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 transition-transform ${isOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
   226→                      fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor"
   227→                    >
   228→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m19.5 8.25-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5" />
   229→                    </svg>
   230→                  </button>
   231→                  {isOpen && (
   232→                    <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/50">
   233→                      <p className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line">
   234→                        {section.contenu}
   235→                      </p>
   236→                    </div>
   237→                  )}
   238→                </div>
   239→              );
   240→            })}
   241→        </div>
   242→
   243→        {/* Liens vers flashcards / quiz */}
   244→        {nextContent && (nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 || nextContent.quizzes.length > 0) && (
   245→          <div className="card border-violet-500/20 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-900/10 to-slate-800/40">
   246→            <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-white mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
   247→              <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   248→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3" />
   249→              </svg>
   250→              Continuer à réviser
   251→            </h3>
   252→            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   253→              {nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 && (
   254→                <a
   255→                  href="/flashcards"
   256→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/20 hover:bg-violet-600/20 hover:border-violet-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   257→                >
   258→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400">
   259→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   260→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   261→                    </svg>
   262→                  </div>
   263→                  <div>
   264→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-violet-300">Flashcards sur ce sujet</p>
   265→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.flashcards.length} disponibles</p>
   266→                  </div>
   267→                </a>
   268→              )}
   269→              {nextContent.quizzes.length > 0 && (
   270→                <a
   271→                  href="/quiz"
   272→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-amber-600/10 border border-amber-500/20 hover:bg-amber-600/20 hover:border-amber-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   273→                >
   274→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400">
   275→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   276→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   277→                    </svg>
   278→                  </div>
   279→                  <div>
   280→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-amber-300">Quiz sur ce sujet</p>
   281→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.quizzes.length} disponibles</p>
   282→                  </div>
   283→                </a>
   284→              )}
   285→            </div>
   286→          </div>
   287→        )}
   288→      </div>
   289→    );
   290→  }
   291→
   292→  const filteredFiches = fiches.filter(f =>
   293→    !search.trim() || f.titre.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || (f.resume || "").toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
   294→  );
   295→
   296→  // List view
   297→  return (
   298→    <div className="space-y-6">
   299→      {/* Header */}
   300→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-4">
   301→        <div>
   302→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Fiches de révision</h1>
   303→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   304→            {fiches.length > 0 ? `${fiches.length} fiche${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} disponible${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : "Fiches structurées pour réviser efficacement"}
   305→          </p>
   306→        </div>
   307→        <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   308→          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   309→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904 9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09 3.09L15.75 12l-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09 3.09ZM18.259 8.715 18 9.75l-.259-1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455-2.456L14.25 6l1.036-.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455-2.456L18 2.25l.259 1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455 2.456L21.75 6l-1.036.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455 2.456Z" />
   310→          </svg>
   311→          Générer une fiche IA
   312→        </button>
   313→      </div>
   314→
   315→      {/* Filtres + recherche */}
   316→      {fiches.length > 0 && (
   317→        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
   318→          <div className="relative flex-1">
   319→            <svg className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   320→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m21 21-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 1 0 5.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0 0 10.607 10.607Z" />
   321→            </svg>
   322→            <input
   323→              type="text"
   324→              placeholder="Rechercher une fiche..."
   325→              value={search}
   326→              onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
   327→              className="input-field w-full pl-9 py-2"
   328→            />
   329→          </div>
   330→          {matieres.length > 0 && (
   331→            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   332→              <button
   333→                onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   334→                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${selectedMatiere === null ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30" : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30"}`}
   335→              >
   336→                Toutes
   337→              </button>
   338→              {matieres.map((m) => (
   339→                <button
   340→                  key={m.id}
   341→                  onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(m.id)}
   342→                  className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${selectedMatiere === m.id ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30" : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30"}`}
   343→                >
   344→                  {m.nom}
   345→                </button>
   346→              ))}
   347→            </div>
   348→          )}
   349→        </div>
   350→      )}
   351→
   352→      {/* Grille de fiches */}
   353→      {fiches.length === 0 ? (
   354→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   355→          <div className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 rounded-2xl bg-blue-500/10 flex items-center justify-center">
   356→            <svg className="w-8 h-8 text-blue-500/50" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   357→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   358→            </svg>
   359→          </div>
   360→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-lg mb-2">Aucune fiche de révision</p>
   361→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-6">Générez votre première fiche à partir d&apos;un document</p>
   362→          <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary">Générer une fiche IA</button>
   363→        </div>
   364→      ) : filteredFiches.length === 0 ? (
   365→        <div className="text-center py-12 text-slate-500">Aucune fiche ne correspond à votre recherche.</div>
   366→      ) : (
   367→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   368→          {filteredFiches.map((fiche) => (
   369→            <div
   370→              key={fiche.id}
   371→              onClick={() => openFiche(fiche.id)}
   372→              className="card-hover cursor-pointer group flex flex-col"
   373→            >
   374→              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2 gap-2">
   375→                <h3 className="text-white font-semibold group-hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors line-clamp-2 flex-1 text-sm">
   376→                  {fiche.titre}
   377→                </h3>
   378→                <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600 group-hover:text-blue-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 transition-colors" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   379→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
   380→                </svg>
   381→              </div>
   382→              {fiche.resume && (
   383→                <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mb-3 line-clamp-2 flex-1">{fiche.resume}</p>
   384→              )}
   385→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/40 mt-auto flex-wrap">
   386→                {fiche.matiere_id && (
   387→                  <span className="badge-blue text-xs">{getMatiereName(fiche.matiere_id)}</span>
   388→                )}
   389→                <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 ml-auto">
   390→                  {fiche.nb_sections} section{fiche.nb_sections !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
   391→                </span>
   392→              </div>
   393→            </div>
   394→          ))}
   395→        </div>
   396→      )}
   397→
   398→      {/* Modal generation IA */}
   399→      {showGenModal && (
   400→        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   401→          <div className="card w-full max-w-lg mx-4 border-slate-600/50">
   402→            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   403→              Generer une fiche IA
   404→            </h2>
   405→            <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4">
   406→              Selectionnez un document source pour generer une fiche de revision structuree.
   407→            </p>
   408→            <div className="mb-4">
   409→              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5">
   410→                Document source
   411→              </label>
   412→              <select
   413→                value={selectedDocId || ""}
   414→                onChange={(e) => setSelectedDocId(parseInt(e.target.value))}
   415→                className="input-field w-full"
   416→              >
   417→                {documents.map((doc) => (
   418→                  <option key={doc.id} value={doc.id}>
   419→                    {doc.titre}
   420→                  </option>
   421→                ))}
   422→              </select>
   423→            </div>
   424→            <div className="flex justify-end gap-3">
   425→              <button
   426→                onClick={() => setShowGenModal(false)}
   427→                className="btn-ghost"
   428→                disabled={generating}
   429→              >
   430→                Annuler
   431→              </button>
   432→              <button
   433→                onClick={generateFiche}
   434→                className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2"
   435→                disabled={generating || !selectedDocId}
   436→              >
   437→                {generating ? (
   438→                  <>
   439→                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white/30 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
   440→                    Generation en cours...
   441→                  </>
   442→                ) : (
   443→                  "Generer"
   444→                )}
   445→              </button>
   446→            </div>
   447→          </div>
   448→        </div>
   449→      )}
   450→    </div>
   451→  );
   452→}
   453→
          ```

              ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { withAuthHeaders } from \"@/lib/auth\";\n\nconst API_BASE = \"/api\";\n\ninterface FicheSection {\n  id: number;\n  titre: string;\n  contenu: string;\n  ordre: number;\n}\n\ninterface FicheListItem {\n  id: number;\n  titre: string;\n  resume: string;\n  matiere_id: number | null;\n  document_id: number | null;\n  chapitre: string;\n  tags: string;\n  nb_sections: number;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface FicheDetail {\n  id: number;\n  titre: string;\n  resume: string;\n  matiere_id: number | null;\n  document_id: number | null;\n  chapitre: string;\n  tags: string;\n  sections: FicheSection[];\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Matiere {\n  id: number;\n  nom: string;\n}\n\ninterface Document {\n  id: number;\n  titre: string;\n  matiere_id: number | null;\n}\n\nconst matiereColors: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string; border: string; gradient: string; icon: string }> = {\n  \"Droit public\": {\n    bg: \"bg-blue-500/20\", text: \"text-blue-400\", border: \"border-blue-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-blue-600/20 to-blue-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M12 21v-8.25M15.75 21v-8.25M8.25 21v-8.25M3 9l9-6 9 6m-1.5 12V10.332A48.36 48.36 0 0 0 12 9.75c-2.551 0-5.056.2-7.5.582V21\",\n  },\n  \"Economie et finances publiques\": {\n    bg: \"bg-emerald-500/20\", text: \"text-emerald-400\", border: \"border-emerald-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-emerald-600/20 to-emerald-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M2.25 18.75a60.07 60.07 0 0 1 15.797 2.101c.727.198 1.453-.342 1.453-1.096V18.75M3.75 4.5v.75A.75.75 0 0 1 3 6h-.75m0 0v-.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125H20.25M2.25 6v9m18-10.5v.75c0 .414.336.75.75.75h.75m-1.5-1.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v9.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-.375m1.5-1.5H21a.75.75 0 0 0-.75.75v.75m0 0H3.75m0 0h-.375a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V15m1.5 1.5v-.75A.75.75 0 0 0 3 15h-.75M15 10.5a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Zm3 0h.008v.008H18V10.5Zm-12 0h.008v.008H6V10.5Z\",\n  },\n  \"\\u00c9conomie et finances publiques\": {\n    bg: \"bg-emerald-500/20\", text: \"text-emerald-400\", border: \"border-emerald-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-emerald-600/20 to-emerald-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M2.25 18.75a60.07 60.07 0 0 1 15.797 2.101c.727.198 1.453-.342 1.453-1.096V18.75M3.75 4.5v.75A.75.75 0 0 1 3 6h-.75m0 0v-.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125H20.25M2.25 6v9m18-10.5v.75c0 .414.336.75.75.75h.75m-1.5-1.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v9.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-.375m1.5-1.5H21a.75.75 0 0 0-.75.75v.75m0 0H3.75m0 0h-.375a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V15m1.5 1.5v-.75A.75.75 0 0 0 3 15h-.75M15 10.5a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Zm3 0h.008v.008H18V10.5Zm-12 0h.008v.008H6V10.5Z\",\n  },\n  \"Questions contemporaines\": {\n    bg: \"bg-amber-500/20\", text: \"text-amber-400\", border: \"border-amber-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-amber-600/20 to-amber-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M12 21a9.004 9.004 0 0 0 8.716-6.747M12 21a9.004 9.004 0 0 1-8.716-6.747M12 21c2.485 0 4.5-4.03 4.5-9S14.485 3 12 3m0 18c-2.485 0-4.5-4.03-4.5-9S9.515 3 12 3m0 0a8.997 8.997 0 0 1 7.843 4.582M12 3a8.997 8.997 0 0 0-7.843 4.582m15.686 0A11.953 11.953 0 0 1 12 10.5c-2.998 0-5.74-1.1-7.843-2.918m15.686 0A8.959 8.959 0 0 1 21 12c0 .778-.099 1.533-.284 2.253m0 0A17.919 17.919 0 0 1 12 16.5c-3.162 0-6.133-.815-8.716-2.247m0 0A9.015 9.015 0 0 1 3 12c0-1.605.42-3.113 1.157-4.418\",\n  },\n  \"Questions sociales\": {\n    bg: \"bg-rose-500/20\", text: \"text-rose-400\", border: \"border-rose-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-rose-600/20 to-rose-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M18 18.72a9.094 9.094 0 0 0 3.741-.479 3 3 0 0 0-4.682-2.72m.94 3.198.001.031c0 .225-.012.447-.037.666A11.944 11.944 0 0 1 12 21c-2.17 0-4.207-.576-5.963-1.584A6.062 6.062 0 0 1 6 18.719m12 0a5.971 5.971 0 0 0-.941-3.197m0 0A5.995 5.995 0 0 0 12 12.75a5.995 5.995 0 0 0-5.058 2.772m0 0a3 3 0 0 0-4.681 2.72 8.986 8.986 0 0 0 3.74.477m.94-3.197a5.971 5.971 0 0 0-.94 3.197M15 6.75a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Zm6 3a2.25 2.25 0 1 1-4.5 0 2.25 2.25 0 0 1 4.5 0Zm-13.5 0a2.25 2.25 0 1 1-4.5 0 2.25 2.25 0 0 1 4.5 0Z\",\n  },\n  \"Relations internationales\": {\n    bg: \"bg-violet-500/20\", text: \"text-violet-400\", border: \"border-violet-500/30\",\n    gradient: \"from-violet-600/20 to-violet-900/10\",\n    icon: \"M10.5 21l5.25-11.25L21 21m-9-3h7.5M3 5.621a48.474 48.474 0 0 1 6-.371m0 0c1.12 0 2.233.038 3.334.114M9 5.25V3m3.334 2.364C11.176 10.658 7.69 15.08 3 17.502m9.334-12.138c.896.061 1.785.147 2.666.257m-4.589 8.495a18.023 18.023 0 0 1-3.827-5.802\",\n  },\n};\n\nconst defaultColor = {\n  bg: \"bg-slate-500/20\", text: \"text-slate-400\", border: \"border-slate-500/30\",\n  gradient: \"from-slate-600/20 to-slate-900/10\",\n  icon: \"M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z\",\n};\n\nfunction getMatiereStyle(matiereName: string) {\n  return matiereColors[matiereName] || defaultColor;\n}\n\n/** Render fiche section content with better formatting than plain whitespace-pre-line */\nfunction FormattedContent({ text }: { text: string }) {\n  const paragraphs = text.split(/\\n{2,}/);\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n      {paragraphs.map((para, i) => {\n        const trimmed = para.trim();\n        if (!trimmed) return null;\n        // Detect bullet lists\n        const lines = trimmed.split(\"\\n\");\n        const isList = lines.every(l => /^[\\s]*[-\\u2022\\u2013*]\\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());\n        if (isList) {\n          return (\n            <ul key={i} className=\"space-y-1.5 ml-1\">\n              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => (\n                <li key={j} className=\"flex gap-2 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed\">\n                  <span className=\"text-blue-400/60 mt-1 shrink-0\">\n                    <svg className=\"w-3 h-3\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"currentColor\"><circle cx=\"6\" cy=\"6\" r=\"3\" /></svg>\n                  </span>\n                  <span>{line.replace(/^[\\s]*[-\\u2022\\u2013*]\\s*/, \"\")}</span>\n                </li>\n              ))}\n            </ul>\n          );\n        }\n        // Detect numbered items\n        const isNumbered = lines.every(l => /^[\\s]*\\d+[.)]\\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());\n        if (isNumbered) {\n          return (\n            <ol key={i} className=\"space-y-1.5 ml-1\">\n              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => {\n                const match = line.match(/^[\\s]*(\\d+)[.)]\\s*(.*)/);\n                return (\n                  <li key={j} className=\"flex gap-2.5 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed\">\n                    <span className=\"text-blue-400/70 font-semibold tabular-nums shrink-0 w-5 text-right\">{match ? match[1] : j + 1}.</span>\n                    <span>{match ? match[2] : line}</span>\n                  </li>\n                );\n              })}\n            </ol>\n          );\n        }\n        // Default paragraph\n        return (\n          <p key={i} className=\"text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line\">\n            {trimmed}\n          </p>\n        );\n      })}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport default function FichesPage() {\n  const [fiches, setFiches] = useState<FicheListItem[]>([]);\n  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);\n  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [selectedFiche, setSelectedFiche] = useState<FicheDetail | null>(null);\n  const [openSections, setOpenSections] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);\n  const [showGenModal, setShowGenModal] = useState(false);\n  const [documents, setDocuments] = useState<Document[]>([]);\n  const [selectedDocId, setSelectedDocId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [nextContent, setNextContent] = useState<{ flashcards: { id: number; question: string }[]; quizzes: { id: number; titre: string }[] } | null>(null);\n  const [search, setSearch] = useState(\"\");\n  const sectionRefs = useRef<Record<number, HTMLDivElement | null>>({});\n\n  // Read matiere_id from URL search params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const mid = params.get(\"matiere_id\");\n    if (mid) setSelectedMatiere(parseInt(mid));\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchFiches = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      const base = `${API_BASE}/fiches?limit=250`;\n      const url = selectedMatiere\n        ? `${base}&matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`\n        : base;\n      const res = await fetch(url);\n      if (res.ok) setFiches(await res.json());\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement fiches:\", e);\n    }\n  }, [selectedMatiere]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const init = async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const [matRes] = await Promise.allSettled([\n          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`),\n        ]);\n        if (matRes.status === \"fulfilled\" && matRes.value.ok) {\n          setMatieres(await matRes.value.json());\n        }\n        await fetchFiches();\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n    init();\n  }, [fetchFiches]);\n\n  const openFiche = async (ficheId: number) => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}`);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setSelectedFiche(data);\n        setOpenSections(new Set());\n        // Load next content (flashcards/quiz)\n        const nextRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}/next`);\n        if (nextRes.ok) setNextContent(await nextRes.json());\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement fiche:\", e);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleSection = (sectionId: number) => {\n    setOpenSections((prev) => {\n      const next = new Set(prev);\n      if (next.has(sectionId)) next.delete(sectionId);\n      else next.add(sectionId);\n      return next;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const toggleAllSections = () => {\n    if (!selectedFiche) return;\n    const allIds = selectedFiche.sections.map(s => s.id);\n    const allOpen = allIds.every(id => openSections.has(id));\n    if (allOpen) {\n      setOpenSections(new Set());\n    } else {\n      setOpenSections(new Set(allIds));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const scrollToSection = (sectionId: number) => {\n    // Open section first\n    setOpenSections(prev => {\n      const next = new Set(prev);\n      next.add(sectionId);\n      return next;\n    });\n    // Scroll after a tick\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      const el = sectionRefs.current[sectionId];\n      if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"start\" });\n    }, 100);\n  };\n\n  const openGenModal = async () => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents`);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const docs = await res.json();\n        setDocuments(docs);\n        setSelectedDocId(docs.length > 0 ? docs[0].id : null);\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error(e);\n    }\n    setShowGenModal(true);\n  };\n\n  const generateFiche = async () => {\n    if (!selectedDocId) return;\n    setGenerating(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\n        `${API_BASE}/recommandations/generer-fiche/${selectedDocId}`,\n        withAuthHeaders({ method: \"POST\" })\n      );\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setShowGenModal(false);\n        await fetchFiches();\n        // Auto-open the generated fiche\n        if (data.fiche_id) openFiche(data.fiche_id);\n      } else {\n        const err = await res.text();\n        alert(`Erreur generation: ${err}`);\n      }\n    } catch (e) {\n      alert(`Erreur: ${e}`);\n    } finally {\n      setGenerating(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getMatiereName = (matiereId: number | null) => {\n    if (!matiereId) return \"\";\n    return matieres.find((m) => m.id === matiereId)?.nom || \"\";\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <div className=\"w-12 h-12 border-4 border-blue-500/20 rounded-full\" />\n            <div className=\"w-12 h-12 border-4 border-transparent border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin absolute inset-0\" />\n          </div>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Chargement des fiches...</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Detail view\n  if (selectedFiche) {\n    const matiereName = getMatiereName(selectedFiche.matiere_id);\n    const style = getMatiereStyle(matiereName);\n    const sortedSections = [...selectedFiche.sections].sort((a, b) => a.ordre - b.ordre);\n    const allOpen = sortedSections.length > 0 && sortedSections.every(s => openSections.has(s.id));\n\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-6\">\n        {/* Back button */}\n        <button\n          onClick={() => { setSelectedFiche(null); setNextContent(null); }}\n          aria-label=\"Retour aux fiches\"\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-all duration-200 -ml-3\"\n        >\n          <svg className=\"w-4 h-4\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n            <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18\" />\n          </svg>\n          Retour aux fiches\n        </button>\n\n        {/* Header with gradient */}\n        <div className={`rounded-2xl border ${style.border} bg-gradient-to-br ${style.gradient} p-6 relative overflow-hidden`}>\n          <div className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 w-40 h-40 opacity-5\">\n            <svg className=\"w-full h-full\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={0.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n              <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d={style.icon} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            {matiereName && (\n              <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border} mb-3`}>\n                <svg className=\"w-3 h-3\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d={style.icon} />\n                </svg>\n                {matiereName}\n              </span>\n            )}\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white leading-tight\">{selectedFiche.titre}</h1>\n            {selectedFiche.chapitre && (\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n                <svg className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25\" />\n                </svg>\n                {selectedFiche.chapitre}\n              </p>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Resume */}\n        {selectedFiche.resume && (\n          <div className=\"card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/40\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-start gap-3\">\n              <div className=\"p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5\">\n                <svg className=\"w-4 h-4\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M11.25 11.25l.041-.02a.75.75 0 0 1 1.063.852l-.708 2.836a.75.75 0 0 0 1.063.853l.041-.021M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9-3.75h.008v.008H12V8.25Z\" />\n                </svg>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <p className=\"text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5\">Resume</p>\n                <p className=\"text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed\">{selectedFiche.resume}</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* Sommaire cliquable + toggle all */}\n        {sortedSections.length > 1 && (\n          <div className=\"card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/30\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\n              <h2 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <svg className=\"w-4 h-4 text-slate-500\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M8.25 6.75h12M8.25 12h12m-12 5.25h12M3.75 6.75h.007v.008H3.75V6.75Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM3.75 12h.007v.008H3.75V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm-.375 5.25h.007v.008H3.75v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z\" />\n                </svg>\n                Sommaire ({sortedSections.length} sections)\n              </h2>\n              <button\n                onClick={toggleAllSections}\n                className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-1.5\"\n              >\n                <svg className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${allOpen ? \"rotate-180\" : \"\"}`} fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M3.75 3.75v4.5m0-4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 9M3.75 20.25v-4.5m0 4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 15M20.25 3.75h-4.5m4.5 0v4.5m0-4.5L15 9m5.25 11.25h-4.5m4.5 0v-4.5m0 4.5L15 15\" />\n                </svg>\n                {allOpen ? \"Tout replier\" : \"Tout deplier\"}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n            <nav className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-1\">\n              {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => (\n                <button\n                  key={section.id}\n                  onClick={() => scrollToSection(section.id)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left hover:bg-slate-700/40 transition-all duration-150 group\"\n                >\n                  <span className={`w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`}>\n                    {idx + 1}\n                  </span>\n                  <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors truncate\">\n                    {section.titre}\n                  </span>\n                  <svg className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-600 group-hover:text-slate-400 ml-auto shrink-0 transition-colors\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                    <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5\" />\n                  </svg>\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </nav>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* Sections en accordeon */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => {\n            const isOpen = openSections.has(section.id);\n            return (\n              <div\n                key={section.id}\n                ref={(el) => { sectionRefs.current[section.id] = el; }}\n                className={`rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 ${\n                  isOpen\n                    ? `${style.border} bg-slate-800/60`\n                    : \"border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-800/30 hover:border-slate-600/50\"\n                }`}\n              >\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => toggleSection(section.id)}\n                  className=\"w-full flex items-center gap-3 text-left p-4\"\n                >\n                  <span className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 transition-colors duration-200 ${\n                    isOpen\n                      ? `${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`\n                      : \"bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/30\"\n                  }`}>\n                    {idx + 1}\n                  </span>\n                  <h3 className={`font-medium flex-1 transition-colors duration-200 ${isOpen ? \"text-white\" : \"text-slate-300\"}`}>\n                    {section.titre}\n                  </h3>\n                  <svg\n                    className={`w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 transition-transform duration-300 shrink-0 ${isOpen ? \"rotate-180\" : \"\"}`}\n                    fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                  >\n                    <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"m19.5 8.25-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5\" />\n                  </svg>\n                </button>\n                <div\n                  className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${\n                    isOpen ? \"max-h-[5000px] opacity-100\" : \"max-h-0 opacity-0\"\n                  }`}\n                >\n                  <div className=\"px-4 pb-4 pt-1 ml-10 border-t border-slate-700/30\">\n                    <FormattedContent text={section.contenu} />\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            );\n          })}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Liens vers flashcards / quiz */}\n        {nextContent && (nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 || nextContent.quizzes.length > 0) && (\n          <div className=\"card border-violet-500/20 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-900/10 to-slate-800/40\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-base font-semibold text-white mb-3 flex items-center gap-2\">\n              <svg className=\"w-4 h-4 text-violet-400\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" ---
              ```

**File modified**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/fiches/page.tsx`

**Changes applied:**

1. **List view - Groupement par matiere**: Fiches are now grouped by matiere with a visual group header showing the matiere icon, name, count, and a separator line. Each group displays its cards in a grid underneath.

2. **Badges colores par matiere**: A `matiereColors` map associates each of the 5 matieres with distinct colors (blue, emerald, amber, rose, violet) and a unique SVG icon path. Badges on cards and filter buttons now use these per-matiere colors instead of a generic `badge-blue`.

3. **Meilleur apercu des cards**: Each card now shows the matiere badge with icon, the section count with a list icon, and the resume excerpt. Hover effects use the matiere-specific color for the title and chevron.

4. **Vue detail - En-tete avec degrade**: The fiche detail header is now a gradient card using the matiere's color scheme, with a large background watermark icon and the matiere badge.

5. **Sommaire cliquable**: A new "Sommaire" section appears above the accordion with numbered entries for each section. Clicking an entry opens that section and smooth-scrolls to it.

6. **Bouton Tout deplier / Tout replier**: Added next to the sommaire header, toggles all sections open/closed.

7. **Sections numerotees**: Each accordion section now has a numbered circle badge on the left, colored according to the matiere when open.

8. **FormattedContent component**: Replaces the basic `whitespace-pre-line` rendering. It parses content into paragraphs, detects bullet lists (renders with dot icons), detects numbered lists (renders with styled numbers), and renders normal paragraphs with proper spacing.

9. **Accordion animation**: Sections use `max-h` / `opacity` transitions for smooth expand/collapse instead of abrupt show/hide.

10. **Modal de generation amelioree**: The modal now has a gradient icon header, click-outside-to-close, a separator before the action buttons, and a CSS keyframe `modalIn` animation for the entrance.

11. **Loading spinner**: Improved with a double-ring design (static outer ring + spinning inner ring).

   - Score final avec détails

Design: Tailwind, couleurs sombres (slate-900 bg), accents bleu/violet. Interface professionnelle.

IMPORTANT: Tous les composants page doivent avoir "use client" en haut si ils utilisent useState/useEffect. Utilise fetch() pour les appels API.

                   1→# PLAN INFRASTRUCTURE - IACA
