     5→---
     6→
     7→## ARCHITECTURE CIBLE
     8→
     9→```
    10→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    11→│                      FRONTEND (Next.js)                      │
    12→│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌────────┐ │
    13→│  │Dashboard│ │Flashcard│ │  Quiz   │ │  Vocal  │ │Matières│ │
    14→│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └────────┘ │
    15→└─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘
    16→                          │ REST API
    17→┌─────────────────────────▼───────────────────────────────────┐
    18→│                      BACKEND (FastAPI)                       │
    19→│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌────────┐ │
    20→│  │Documents│ │Flashcard│ │  Quiz   │ │  Vocal  │ │Reco    │ │
    21→│  │ Service │ │ Service │ │ Service │ │ Service │ │Service │ │
    22→│  └────┬────┘ └────┬────┘ └────┬────┘ └────┬────┘ └───┬────┘ │
    23→│       │          │          │          │          │        │
    24→│  ┌────▼──────────▼──────────▼──────────▼──────────▼────┐   │
    25→│  │                    DATABASE (SQLite)                 │   │
    26→│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
    27→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
    28→                          │
    29→        ┌─────────────────┼─────────────────┐
    30→        ▼                 ▼                 ▼
    31→┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────────┐
    32→│    Claude     │ │    Gemini     │ │    Ollama     │
    33→│ (via CLI abo) │ │    (API)      │ │   (local)     │
    34→│               │ │               │ │               │
    35→│ - Analyse doc │ │ - Reco web    │ │ - Prof vocal  │
    36→│ - Flashcards  │ │ - Mind maps   │ │ - Chat        │
    37→│ - QCM         │ │ - YouTube     │ │               │
    38→└───────────────┘ └───────────────┘ └───────────────┘
    39→                                           │
    40→                                    ┌──────┴──────┐
    41→                                    ▼             ▼
    42→                              ┌─────────┐   ┌─────────┐
    43→                              │ Whisper │   │  Piper  │
    44→                              │  (STT)  │   │  (TTS)  │
    45→                              └─────────┘   └─────────┘
    46→```
    47→
    48→---
    49→
    50→## STRUCTURE DOSSIERS
    51→
    52→```
    53→IACA/
    54→├── backend/
    55→│   ├── app/
    56→│   │   ├── __init__.py
    57→│   │   ├── main.py              # FastAPI app
    58→│   │   ├── config.py            # Settings
    59→│   │   ├── database.py          # SQLite connection
    60→│   │   ├── models/              # SQLAlchemy models
    61→│   │   │   ├── document.py
    62→│   │   │   ├── flashcard.py
    63→│   │   │   ├── quiz.py
    64→│   │   │   └── matiere.py
    65→│   │   ├── routers/             # API endpoints
    66→│   │   │   ├── documents.py
    67→│   │   │   ├── flashcards.py
    68→│   │   │   ├── quiz.py
    69→│   │   │   ├── vocal.py
    70→│   │   │   └── recommandations.py
    71→│   │   ├── services/            # Business logic
    72→│   │   │   ├── document_parser.py   # PDF/PPTX extraction
    73→│   │   │   ├── claude_service.py    # Claude via CLI
    74→│   │   │   ├── gemini_service.py    # Gemini API
    75→│   │   │   ├── ollama_service.py    # Ollama local
    76→│   │   │   ├── whisper_service.py   # STT
    77→│   │   │   └── piper_service.py     # TTS
    78→│   │   └── schemas/             # Pydantic schemas
    79→│   ├── requirements.txt
    80→│   └── Dockerfile
    81→│
    82→├── frontend/
    83→│   ├── app/                     # Next.js App Router
    84→│   │   ├── page.tsx             # Dashboard
    85→│   │   ├── matieres/
    86→│   │   ├── flashcards/
    87→│   │   ├── quiz/
    88→│   │   └── vocal/
    89→│   ├── components/
    90→│   │   ├── FlashCard.tsx
    91→│   │   ├── QuizQuestion.tsx
    92→│   │   ├── VocalChat.tsx
    93→│   │   └── MindMap.tsx
    94→│   ├── package.json
    95→│   └── tailwind.config.js
    96→│
    97→├── docs/                        # Documents source
    98→│   └── (lien vers Drive)
    99→│
   100→├── data/
   101→│   └── iaca.db                  # SQLite database
   102→│
   103→└── docker-compose.yml
   104→```
   105→
   106→---
   107→
   108→## TACHES PAR DIFFICULTE
   109→
   110→### HAIKU (Simple) - Recherche, setup, configs
   111→
   112→| ID | Tâche | Fichiers |
   113→|----|-------|----------|
   114→| H1 | Créer structure dossiers backend/ | mkdir |
   115→| H2 | Créer structure dossiers frontend/ | mkdir |
   116→| H3 | Créer requirements.txt | backend/requirements.txt |
   117→| H4 | Créer package.json Next.js | frontend/package.json |
   118→| H5 | Créer tailwind.config.js | frontend/tailwind.config.js |
   119→| H6 | Créer .env.example | .env.example |
   120→| H7 | Créer Dockerfile backend | backend/Dockerfile |
   121→| H8 | Créer docker-compose.yml | docker-compose.yml |
   122→
   123→### SONNET (Moyen) - Implémentation standard
   124→
   125→| ID | Tâche | Fichiers |
   126→|----|-------|----------|
   127→| S1 | Implémenter FastAPI main.py + config | app/main.py, config.py |
   128→| S2 | Implémenter database.py SQLite | app/database.py |
   129→| S3 | Créer models SQLAlchemy | app/models/*.py |
   130→| S4 | Créer schemas Pydantic | app/schemas/*.py |
   131→| S5 | Implémenter router documents | app/routers/documents.py |
   132→| S6 | Implémenter router flashcards | app/routers/flashcards.py |
   133→| S7 | Implémenter router quiz | app/routers/quiz.py |
   134→| S8 | Implémenter document_parser (PDF/PPTX) | app/services/document_parser.py |
   135→| S9 | Créer page Dashboard Next.js | frontend/app/page.tsx |
   136→| S10 | Créer composant FlashCard | frontend/components/FlashCard.tsx |
   137→| S11 | Créer composant QuizQuestion | frontend/components/QuizQuestion.tsx |
   138→| S12 | Créer page Matières | frontend/app/matieres/page.tsx |
   139→| S13 | Créer page Flashcards | frontend/app/flashcards/page.tsx |
   140→| S14 | Créer page Quiz | frontend/app/quiz/page.tsx |
   141→
   142→### OPUS (Complexe) - Architecture, intégrations LLM
   143→
   144→| ID | Tâche | Fichiers |
   145→|----|-------|----------|
   146→| O1 | Implémenter claude_service (CLI wrapper) | app/services/claude_service.py |
   147→| O2 | Implémenter gemini_service (API + reco) | app/services/gemini_service.py |
   148→| O3 | Implémenter ollama_service | app/services/ollama_service.py |
   149→| O4 | Implémenter whisper_service (STT) | app/services/whisper_service.py |
   150→| O5 | Implémenter piper_service (TTS) | app/services/piper_service.py |
   151→| O6 | Implémenter router vocal (WebSocket) | app/routers/vocal.py |
   152→| O7 | Créer composant VocalChat | frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx |
   153→| O8 | Créer page Vocal | frontend/app/vocal/page.tsx |
   154→| O9 | Intégration complète Prof Vocal | E2E vocal flow |
   155→| O10 | Pipeline génération flashcards | Analyse → Claude → DB |
   156→| O11 | Pipeline recommandations externes | Gemini → Web → DB |
   157→
   158→---
   159→
   160→## ORDRE D'EXECUTION
   161→
   162→```
   163→Phase 1: Setup (HAIKU)
   164→├── H1-H8 en parallèle
   165→│
   166→Phase 2: Backend Core (SONNET)
   167→├── S1 → S2 → S3 → S4 (séquentiel - dépendances)
   168→├── S5, S6, S7 en parallèle (routers)
   169→├── S8 (parser docs)
   170→│
   171→Phase 3: Frontend Core (SONNET)
   172→├── S9 → S12, S13, S14 (pages)
   173→├── S10, S11 en parallèle (composants)
   174→│
   175→Phase 4: Intégrations LLM (OPUS)
   176→├── O1, O2, O3 en parallèle (services LLM)
   177→├── O4 → O5 → O6 → O7 → O8 → O9 (vocal - séquentiel)
   178→├── O10, O11 (pipelines)
   179→```
   180→
   181→---
   182→
   183→## DEPENDANCES
   184→
   185→### Backend (requirements.txt)
   186→```
   187→fastapi==0.109.0
   188→uvicorn==0.27.0
   189→sqlalchemy==2.0.25
   190→pydantic==2.5.3
   191→python-multipart==0.0.6
   192→pymupdf==1.23.8
   193→python-pptx==0.6.23
   194→google-generativeai==0.3.2
   195→openai-whisper==20231117
   196→httpx==0.26.0
   197→```
   198→
   199→### Frontend (package.json)
   200→```json
   201→{
   202→  "dependencies": {
   203→    "next": "14.1.0",
   204→    "react": "18.2.0",
   205→    "tailwindcss": "3.4.1",
   206→    "@radix-ui/react-*": "latest"
   207→  }
   208→}
   209→```
   210→
   211→---
   212→
   213→## COMMANDE ORCHESTRATEUR
   214→
   215→```bash
   216→# Charger l'orchestrateur
   217→@agents_library/agent-orchestrator-universal/universal-orchestrator.md
   218→
   219→# Lancer avec le plan
   220→/start "Exécuter PLAN_INFRA.md - Phase 1 (Setup HAIKU)"

{children}\n              </div>\n            </main>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </body>\n    </html>\n  );\n}\n",

                                                                  ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\n\ninterface FlashCardProps {\n  question: string;\n  reponse: string;\n  explication?: string;\n  matiere?: string;\n  onReview: (quality: number) => void;\n}\n\nconst ratingLabels: Record<number, { label: string; color: string; description: string }> = {\n  1: { label: \"1\", color: \"bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 border-red-500\", description: \"Aucune idee\" },\n  2: { label: \"2\", color: \"bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 border-orange-500\", description: \"Tres difficile\" },\n  3: { label: \"3\", color: \"bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 border-amber-500\", description: \"Difficile\" },\n  4: { label: \"4\", color: \"bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 border-emerald-500\", description: \"Correct\" },\n  5: { label: \"5\", color: \"bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 border-green-500\", description: \"Facile\" },\n};\n\nexport default function FlashCard({\n  question,\n  reponse,\n  explication,\n  matiere,\n  onReview,\n}: FlashCardProps) {\n  const [isFlipped, setIsFlipped] = useState(false);\n  const [showExplication, setShowExplication] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleFlip = () => {\n    setIsFlipped(!isFlipped);\n  };\n\n  const handleReview = (quality: number) => {\n    setIsFlipped(false);\n    setShowExplication(false);\n    onReview(quality);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {/* Badge matiere */}\n      {matiere && (\n        <div className=\"mb-4 flex justify-center\">\n          <span className=\"badge-blue\">{matiere}</span>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Card avec flip */}\n      <div\n        className=\"flip-card cursor-pointer\"\n        style={{ minHeight: \"320px\" }}\n        onClick={handleFlip}\n      >\n        <div className={`flip-card-inner ${isFlipped ? \"flipped\" : \"\"}`}>\n          {/* Face avant - Question */}\n          <div className=\"flip-card-front\">\n            <div className=\"card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-blue-500/20 glow-blue\">\n              <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                <span className=\"text-xs font-semibold text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                  Question\n                </span>\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4\">\n                {question}\n              </p>\n              <div className=\"mt-6 text-sm text-slate-500\">\n                Cliquer pour retourner\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Face arriere - Reponse */}\n          <div className=\"flip-card-back\">\n            <div className=\"card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-violet-500/20 glow-violet\">\n              <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                <span className=\"text-xs font-semibold text-violet-400 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                  Reponse\n                </span>\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4\">\n                {reponse}\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Explication */}\n              {explication && (\n                <div className=\"mt-4 w-full px-4\">\n                  {!showExplication ? (\n                    <button\n                      onClick={(e) => {\n                        e.stopPropagation();\n                        setShowExplication(true);\n                      }}\n                      className=\"text-sm text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors\"\n                    >\n                      Voir l&apos;explication\n                    </button>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div className=\"mt-2 p-3 bg-slate-900/50 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/50\">\n                      <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed\">\n                        {explication}\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Boutons de notation - visibles apres flip */}\n      {isFlipped && (\n        <div className=\"mt-6 space-y-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-300\">\n          <p className=\"text-center text-sm text-slate-400 font-medium\">\n            Evaluez votre connaissance\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-2\">\n            {Object.entries(ratingLabels).map(([quality, { label, color, description }]) => (\n              <button\n                key={quality}\n                onClick={(e) => {\n                  e.stopPropagation();\n                  handleReview(Number(quality));\n                }}\n                className={`\n                  flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-white font-semibold\n                  transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95\n                  border border-opacity-30 ${color}\n                `}\n                title={description}\n              >\n                <span className=\"text-lg\">{label}</span>\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] opacity-80 font-normal\">{description}</span>\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/FlashCard.tsx"
}
                                                                  ```

                                                                      ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\n\ninterface QuizQuestionProps {\n  question: string;\n  choix: string[];\n  reponse_correcte: number;\n  explication?: string;\n  onAnswer: (selectedIndex: number, isCorrect: boolean) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function QuizQuestion({\n  question,\n  choix,\n  reponse_correcte,\n  explication,\n  onAnswer,\n}: QuizQuestionProps) {\n  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [hasAnswered, setHasAnswered] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleSelect = (index: number) => {\n    if (hasAnswered) return;\n    setSelectedIndex(index);\n  };\n\n  const handleValidate = () => {\n    if (selectedIndex === null || hasAnswered) return;\n    setHasAnswered(true);\n    const isCorrect = selectedIndex === reponse_correcte;\n    onAnswer(selectedIndex, isCorrect);\n  };\n\n  const getChoiceStyle = (index: number) => {\n    const base =\n      \"flex items-center gap-4 w-full p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-200 text-left\";\n\n    if (!hasAnswered) {\n      if (selectedIndex === index) {\n        return `${base} border-blue-500 bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 shadow-md shadow-blue-500/10`;\n      }\n      return `${base} border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/40 text-slate-300 hover:border-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-800/60 cursor-pointer`;\n    }\n\n    // Apres validation\n    if (index === reponse_correcte) {\n      return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 shadow-md shadow-emerald-500/10`;\n    }\n    if (index === selectedIndex && index !== reponse_correcte) {\n      return `${base} border-red-500 bg-red-500/10 text-red-100 shadow-md shadow-red-500/10`;\n    }\n    return `${base} border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/20 text-slate-500`;\n  };\n\n  const getRadioStyle = (index: number) => {\n    const base =\n      \"w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-200\";\n\n    if (!hasAnswered) {\n      if (selectedIndex === index) {\n        return `${base} border-blue-500 bg-blue-500`;\n      }\n      return `${base} border-slate-600`;\n    }\n\n    if (index === reponse_correcte) {\n      return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500`;\n    }\n    if (index === selectedIndex && index !== reponse_correcte) {\n      return `${base} border-red-500 bg-red-500`;\n    }\n    return `${base} border-slate-700`;\n  };\n\n  const letters = [\"A\", \"B\", \"C\", \"D\", \"E\", \"F\"];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6\">\n      {/* Question */}\n      <div className=\"card border-slate-600/50\">\n        <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-slate-100 leading-relaxed\">\n          {question}\n        </h3>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Choix */}\n      <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n        {choix.map((choice, index) => (\n          <button\n            key={index}\n            onClick={() => handleSelect(index)}\n            disabled={hasAnswered}\n            className={getChoiceStyle(index)}\n          >\n            <div className={getRadioStyle(index)}>\n              {((!hasAnswered && selectedIndex === index) ||\n                (hasAnswered && index === reponse_correcte)) && (\n                <svg\n                  className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white\"\n                  fill=\"none\"\n                  viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                  strokeWidth={3}\n                  stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                >\n                  <path\n                    strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n                    strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n                    d=\"M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5\"\n                  />\n                </svg>\n              )}\n              {hasAnswered &&\n                index === selectedIndex &&\n                index !== reponse_correcte && (\n                  <svg\n                    className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white\"\n                    fill=\"none\"\n                    viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                    strokeWidth={3}\n                    stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                  >\n                    <path\n                      strokeLinecap=\"round\"\n                      strokeLinejoin=\"round\"\n                      d=\"M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12\"\n                    />\n                  </svg>\n                )}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex items-baseline gap-2\">\n              <span className=\"text-sm font-bold opacity-50\">{letters[index]}.</span>\n              <span className=\"text-sm font-medium\">{choice}</span>\n            </div>\n          </button>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Bouton valider */}\n      {!hasAnswered && (\n        <div className=\"flex justify-center\">\n          <button\n            onClick={handleValidate}\n            disabled={selectedIndex === null}\n            className={`\n              btn-primary px-8 py-3 text-base\n              ${selectedIndex === null ? \"opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed\" : \"\"}\n            `}\n          >\n            Valider la reponse\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Resultat + Explication */}\n      {hasAnswered && (\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {/* Message resultat */}\n          <div\n            className={`\n              p-4 rounded-xl border flex items-center gap-3\n              ${\n                selectedIndex === reponse_correcte\n                  ? \"bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-300\"\n                  : \"bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/30 text-red-300\"\n              }\n            `}\n          >\n            {selectedIndex === reponse_correcte ? (\n              <>\n                <svg className=\"w-6 h-6 flex-shrink-0\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9 12.75L11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z\" />\n                </svg>\n                <span className=\"font-medium\">Bonne reponse !</span>\n              </>\n            ) : (\n              <>\n                <svg className=\"w-6 h-6 flex-shrink-0\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9.75 9.75l4.5 4.5m0-4.5l-4.5 4.5M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z\" />\n                </svg>\n                <span className=\"font-medium\">\n                  Mauvaise reponse. La bonne reponse etait : {letters[reponse_correcte]}. {choix[reponse_correcte]}\n                </span>\n              </>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Explication */}\n          {explication && (\n            <div className=\"p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/60 border border-slate-700/50\">\n              <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-violet-400 mb-1\">Explication</p>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed\">{explication}</p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/QuizQuestion.tsx"
}
                                                                      ```

                                                                                    ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\nconst API_BASE = \"http://localhost:8000\";\n\ninterface Stats {\n  documents: number;\n  flashcards: number;\n  quiz: number;\n  flashcards_a_reviser: number;\n}\n\ninterface Revision {\n  id: number;\n  question: string;\n  matiere: string;\n  next_review: string;\n}\n\ninterface Activite {\n  id: number;\n  type: string;\n  description: string;\n  date: string;\n  matiere?: string;\n}\n\nexport default function Dashboard() {\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({\n    documents: 0,\n    flashcards: 0,\n    quiz: 0,\n    flashcards_a_reviser: 0,\n  });\n  const [revisions, setRevisions] = useState<Revision[]>([]);\n  const [activites, setActivites] = useState<Activite[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      try {\n        const [statsRes, revisionsRes, activitesRes] = await Promise.allSettled([\n          fetch(`${API_BASE}/stats`),\n          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revisions?limit=5`),\n          fetch(`${API_BASE}/activites?limit=5`),\n        ]);\n\n        if (statsRes.status === \"fulfilled\" && statsRes.value.ok) {\n          setStats(await statsRes.value.json());\n        }\n        if (revisionsRes.status === \"fulfilled\" && revisionsRes.value.ok) {\n          setRevisions(await revisionsRes.value.json());\n        }\n        if (activitesRes.status === \"fulfilled\" && activitesRes.value.ok) {\n          setActivites(await activitesRes.value.json());\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Erreur chargement dashboard:\", error);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchData();\n  }, []);\n\n  const statCards = [\n    {\n      label: \"Documents\",\n      value: stats.documents,\n      icon: (\n        <svg className=\"w-7 h-7\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n          <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 rounded-full animate-spin\" />\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Chargement du dashboard...</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-white\">Dashboard</h1>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-slate-400\">\n          Vue d&apos;ensemble de votre preparation aux concours administratifs\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Stats Cards */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4\">\n        {statCards.map((card) => (\n          <div key={card.label} className=\"card-hover group\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\n              <div>\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-400\">{card.label}</p>\n                <p className=\"mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-white\">{card.value}</p>\n              </div>\n              <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl ${card.bgGlow}`}>\n                <span className={card.textColor}>{card.icon}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Sections grid */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n        {/* Prochaines revisions */}\n        <div className=\"card\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-5\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-white\">Prochaines revisions</h2>\n            <a\n              href=\"/flashcards\"\n              className=\"text-sm text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 transition-colors\"\n            >\n              Voir tout\n            </a>\n          </div>\n\n          {revisions.length === 0 ? (\n            <div className=\"text-center py-8\">\n              <svg className=\"w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-3\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z\" />\n              </svg>\n              <p className=\"text-slate-500 text-sm\">Aucune revision en attente</p>\n              <p className=\"text-slate-600 text-xs mt-1\">\n                Ajoutez des flashcards pour commencer\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              {revisions.map((revision) => (\n                <div\n                  key={revision.id}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/50 transition-colors\"\n                >\n                  <div className=\"flex-shrink-0 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-400\" />\n                  <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                    <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-200 truncate\">\n                      {revision.question}\n                    </p>\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\n                      {revision.matiere}\n                    </p>\n                  </div>\n                  <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0\">\n                    {new Date(revision.next_review).toLocaleDateString(\"fr-FR\", {\n                      day: \"numeric\",\n                      month: \"short\",\n                    })}\n                  </span>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Activite recente */}\n        <div className=\"card\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-5\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-white\">Activite recente</h2>\n          </div>\n\n          {activites.length === 0 ? (\n            <div className=\"text-center py-8\">\n              <svg className=\"w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-3\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z\" />\n              </svg>\n              <p className=\"text-slate-500 text-sm\">Aucune activite recente</p>\n              <p className=\"text-slate-600 text-xs mt-1\">\n                Commencez a reviser pour voir votre historique\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              {activites.map((activite) => {\n                const typeStyles: Record<string, string> = {\n                  flashcard: \"badge-violet\",\n                  quiz: \"badge-amber\",\n                  document: \"badge-blue\",\n                };\n                return (\n                  <div\n                    key={activite.id}\n                    className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30\"\n                  >\n                    <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-1\">\n                        <span className={typeStyles[activite.type] || \"badge-blue\"}>\n                          {activite.type}\n                        </span>\n                        {activite.matiere && (\n                          <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">\n                            {activite.matiere}\n                          </span>\n                        )}\n                      </div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">{activite.description}</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-1\">\n                      {new Date(activite.date).toLocaleDateString(\"fr-FR\", {\n                        day: \"numeric\",\n                        month: \"short\",\n                        hour: \"2-digit\",\n                        minute: \"2-digit\",\n                      })}\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                );\n              })}\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Raccourcis rapides */}\n      <div className=\"card bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800/80 to-slate-800/40\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4\">Actions rapides</h2>\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3\">\n          <a\n            href=\"/flashcards\"\n            className=\"flex items-center gap-3 p-4 string;\n  couleur?: string;\n  nb_documents: number;\n  nb_flashcards: number;\n}\n\nconst defaultMatieres: Matiere[] = [\n  { id: 0, nom: \"Droit public\", description: \"Droit constitutionnel, administratif, collectivites\", couleur: \"blue\", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },\n  { id: 0, nom: \"Finances publiques\", description: \"Budget, comptabilite publique, fiscalite\", couleur: },\n  { id: 0, nom: \"Questions europeennes\", description: \"Institutions UE, politiques europeennes\", couleur: \"violet\", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },\n  { id: 0, nom: \"Questions dans la fonction publique\", couleur: \"cyan\", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },\n];\n\nconst colorMap: Record<string, { bg: string; border: string; text: string; glow: string; icon: string }> = {\n  blue: {\n    bg: \"bg-blue-500/10\",\n    border: \"border-blue-500/30 hover:border-blue-500/50\",\n    text: \"text-blue-400\",\n    glow: \"hover:shadow-blue-500/10\",\n    icon: \"text-amber-400\",\n    glow: \"hover:shadow-amber-500/10\",\n    icon: \"bg-amber-500/20\",\n  },\n  violet: {\n    bg: \"bg-violet-500/10\",\n    border: \"border-violet-500/30 hover:border-violet-500/50\",\n    text: \"text-violet-400\",\n    glow: \"hover:shadow-violet-500/10\",\n    icon: \"bg-violet-500/20\",\n  },\n  rose: {\n    bg: \"bg-rose-500/10\",\n    border:  border: \"border-cyan-500/30 hover:border-cyan-500/50\",\n    text: \"text-cyan-400\",\n    glow: \"hover:shadow-cyan-500/10\",\n    icon: \"bg-cyan-500/20\",\n  },\n};\n\nexport default function MatieresPage() {\n  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);\n  const [newMatiere, setNewMatiere] = useState({ nom: \"\", description: \"\" });\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchMatieres = async () => {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);\n        if (res.ok) {\n          const data = await res.json();\n          setMatieres(data.length > 0 ? data : defaultMatieres);\n        } else {\n          setMatieres(defaultMatieres);\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setMatieres(defaultMatieres);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchMatieres();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleAddMatiere = async () => {\n    if (!newMatiere.nom.trim()) return;\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify(newMatiere),\n      });\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const created = await res.json();\n        setMatieres([...matieres, created]);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur ajout matiere:\", error);\n    }\n\n    setNewMatiere({ nom: \"\", description: \"\" });\n    setShowAddModal(false);\n  };\n\n  const colors = Object.keys(colorMap);\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin\" />\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Chargement des matieres...</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-white\">Matieres</h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-slate-400\">\n            Explorez les matieres du concours et vos ressources\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => setShowAddModal(true)}\n          className=\"btn-primary flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n            <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15\" />\n          </svg>\n          Ajouter\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Grid matieres */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5\">\n        {matieres.map((matiere, index) => {\n          const colorKey = matiere.couleur || colors[index % colors.length];\n          const style = colorMap[colorKey] || colorMap.blue;\n\n          return (\n            <div\n              key={matiere.id || index}\n              className={`\n                relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border p-6\n                bg-slate-800/40 backdrop-blur-sm\n                transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 cursor-pointer\n                ${style.border} ${style.glow}\n              `}\n            >\n              {/* Decorative gradient */}\n              <div className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 rounded-full ${style.bg} blur-2xl -translate-y-8 translate-x-8 opacity-50`} />\n\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                {/* viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                    <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3            </svg>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* Titre + description */}\n                <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1\">{matiere.nom}</h3>\n                {matiere.description && (\n                  <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4 line-clamp-2\">\n                    {matiere.description}\n                  </p>\n                )}\n\n className=\"font-semibold text-slate-200\">{matiere.nb_flashcards}</span> flashcards\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          );\n        })}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Modal ajout matiere */}\n      {showAddModal && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n          <div className=\"card w-full max-w-md mx-4 border-slate-600/50\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4\">\n              Ajouter une de la matiere\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"text\"\n                  value={newMatiere.nom}\n                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({         <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5\">\n                  Description\n                </label>\n                <textarea\n                  value={newMatiere.description}\n                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({ ...newMatiere, description: e.target.value })}\n                  className=\"input-field w-full h-24 resize-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Description de la matiere...\"\n                />\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6\">\n              <button\n                onClick={() => {\n                  setShowAddModal(false);\n                  setNewMatiere({ nom: \"\", description: \"\" });\n                }}\n                className=\"btn-ghost\"\n              >\n                Annuler\n              </button>\n              <button\n                onClick={handleAddMatiere}\n                className=\"btn-primary\"\n                disabled={!newMatiere.nom.trim()}\n              >\n                Ajouter\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/matieres/page.tsx"
}
                                                                                    ```

                                                                                        ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport FlashCard from \"@/components/FlashCard\";\n\nconst API_BASE = \"http://localhost:8000\";\n\ninterface FlashcardData {\n  id: number;\n  question: string;\n  reponse: string;\n  explication?: string;\n  matiere_id?: number;\n  matiere_nom?: string;\n  next_review?: string;\n  ease_factor?: number;\n  interval?: number;\n  repetitions?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Matiere {\n  id: number;\n  nom: string;\n}\n\nexport default function FlashcardsPage() {\n  const [flashcards, setFlashcards] = useState<FlashcardData[]>([]);\n  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);\n  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [mode, setMode] = useState<\"list\" | \"review\">(\"list\");\n  const [reviewedCount, setReviewedCount] = useState(0);\n  const [sessionResults, setSessionResults] = useState<{ quality: number }[]>([]);\n\n  const fetchFlashcards = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      let url = `${API_BASE}/flashcards/revisions`;\n      if (selectedMatiere) {\n        url += `?matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`;\n      }\n      const res = await fetch(url);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setFlashcards(data);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement flashcards:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [selectedMatiere]);\n\n  const fetchMatieres = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setMatieres(await res.json());\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement matieres:\", error);\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchMatieres();\n  }, [fetchMatieres]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchFlashcards();\n  }, [fetchFlashcards]);\n\n  const handleReview = async (quality: number) => {\n    const card = flashcards[currentIndex];\n    if (!card) return;\n\n    // Envoi de la notation au backend (SM-2)\n    try {\n      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/${card.id}/review`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ quality }),\n      });\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur envoi review:\", error);\n    }\n\n    setSessionResults([...sessionResults, { quality }]);\n    setReviewedCount(reviewedCount + 1);\n\n    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {\n      setCurrentIndex(currentIndex + 1);\n    } else {\n      // Session terminee\n      setMode(\"list\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const startReview = () => {\n    setCurrentIndex(0);\n    setReviewedCount(0);\n    setSessionResults([]);\n    setMode(\"review\");\n  };\n\n  const totalCards = flashcards.length;\n  const progress = totalCards > 0 ? Math.round((reviewedCount / totalCards) * 100) : 0;\n  const avgQuality =\n    sessionResults.length > 0\n      ? (sessionResults.reduce((s, r) => s + r.quality, 0) / sessionResults.length).toFixed(1)\n      : \"0\";\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"w-10 h-10 border-4 border-violet-500/30 border-t-violet-500 rounded-full animate-spin\" />\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Chargement des flashcards...</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Mode revision\n  if (mode === \"review\") {\n    const currentCard = flashcards[currentIndex];\n\n    // Session terminee\n    if (!currentCard || reviewedCount >= totalCards) {\n      return (\n        <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n          <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n            <div className=\"w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center\">\n              <svg className=\"w-10 h-10 text-emerald-400\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z\" />\n              </svg>\n            </div>\n            <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2\">Session terminee !</h2>\n            <p className=\"text-slate-400 mb-6\">\n              Vous avez revise {reviewedCount} carte{reviewedCount > 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            </p>\n\n            {/* Stats session */}\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-sm mx-auto mb-8\">\n              <div className=\"card text-center\">\n                <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">{reviewedCount}</p>\n                <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">Cartes revisees</p>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"card text-center\">\n                <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">{avgQuality}</p>\n                <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">Qualite moyenne</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-3\">\n              <button onClick={() => setMode(\"list\")} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Retour\n              </button>\n              <button\n                onClick={() => {\n                  fetchFlashcards();\n                  startReview();\n                }}\n                className=\"btn-primary\"\n              >\n                Nouvelle session\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      );\n    }\n\n    return (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n        {/* Header revision */}\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setMode(\"list\")}\n            className=\"btn-ghost flex items-center gap-2\"\n          >\n            <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n              <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18\" />\n            </svg>\n            Quitter\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">\n            {currentIndex + 1} / {totalCards}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Barre de progression */}\n        <div className=\"w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden\">\n          <div\n            className=\"h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-violet-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out\"\n            style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Flashcard */}\n        <div className=\"py-8\">\n          <FlashCard\n            question={currentCard.question}\n            reponse={currentCard.reponse}\n            explication={currentCard.explication}\n            matiere={currentCard.matiere_nom}\n            onReview={handleReview}\n          />\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Mode liste\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-white\">Flashcards</h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-slate-400\">\n            Revisez vos connaissances avec la repetition espacee\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        {totalCards > 0 && (\n          <button onClick={startReview} className=\"btn-primary flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n              <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z\" />\n            </svg>\n            Lancer la revision ({totalCards})\n          </button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Filtre par matiere */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\">\n        <button\n          onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}\n          className={`\n            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200\n            ${!selectedMatiere\n              ? \"bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30\"\n              : \"bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600\"\n            }\n          `}\n        >\n          Toutes\n        </button>\n        {matieres.map((matiere) => (\n          <button\n            key={matiere.id}\n            onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(matiere.id)}\n            className={`\n              px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200\n              ${selectedMatiere === matiere.id\n                ? \"bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30\"\n                : \"bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600\"\n              }\n            `}\n          >\n            {matiere.nom}\n          </button>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Stats session precedente */}\n      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500/5 to-blue-500/5 border-violet-500/20\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\n            <svg className=\"w-5 h-5 text-violet-400\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n              <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z\" />\n            </svg>\n            <h3 className=\"font-semibold text-violet-300\">Derniere session</h3>\n          </div>\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">\n            {sessionResults.length} cartes revisees - Qualite moyenne : {avgQuality}/5\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Liste ou etat vide */}\n      {totalCards === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg className=\"w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-4\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n            <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3\" />\n          </svg>\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-slate-300 mb-2\">\n            Aucune flashcard a reviser\n          </h3>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-500 max-w-md mx-auto\">\n            Importez des documents dans vos matieres pour generer automatiquement des flashcards,\n            ou attendez la prochaine date de revision.\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4\">\n          {flashcards.map((card) => (\n            <div key={card.id} className=\"card-hover\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between mb-3\">\n                {card.matiere_nom && (\n                  <span className=\"badge-blue\">{card.matiere_nom}</span>\n                )}\n                {card.next_review && (\n                  <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">\n                    {new Date(card.next_review).toLocaleDateString(\"fr-FR\", {\n                      day: \"numeric\",\n                      month: \"short\",\n                    })}\n                  </span>\n                )}\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-200 mb-2 line-clamp-3\">\n                {card.question}\n              </p>\n              <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 line-clamp-2\">{card.reponse}</p>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}
                                                                                        ```

                                                                                            ```json
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport QuizQuestion from \"@/components/QuizQuestion\";\n\nconst API_BASE = \"http://localhost:8000\";\n\ninterface Quiz {\n  id: number;\n  titre: string;\n  matiere_nom?: string;\n  nb_questions: number;\n  created_at?: string;\n}\n\ninterface Question {\n  id: number;\n  question: string;\n  choix: string[];\n  reponse_correcte: number;\n  explication?: string;\n}\n\ninterface QuizResult {\n  questionIndex: number;\n  selectedIndex: number;\n  isCorrect: boolean;\n  question: string;\n  correctAnswer: string;\n}\n\nexport default function QuizPage() {\n  const [quizList, setQuizList] = useState<Quiz[]>([]);\n  const [currentQuiz, setCurrentQuiz] = useState<Quiz | null>(null);\n  const [questions, setQuestions] = useState<Question[]>([]);\n  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<QuizResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [mode, setMode] = useState<\"list\" | \"quiz\" | \"results\">(\"list\");\n\n  const fetchQuizList = useCallback(async () => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz`);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setQuizList(await res.json());\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement quiz:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchQuizList();\n  }, [fetchQuizList]);\n\n  const startQuiz = async (quiz: Quiz) => {\n    setCurrentQuiz(quiz);\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/${quiz.id}/questions`);\n      if (res.ok) {\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setQuestions(data);\n        setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);\n        setResults([]);\n        setMode(\"quiz\");\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur chargement questions:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAnswer = (selectedIndex: number, isCorrect: boolean) => {\n    const question = questions[currentQuestionIndex];\n    const result: QuizResult = {\n      questionIndex: currentQuestionIndex,\n      selectedIndex,\n      isCorrect,\n      question: question.question,\n      correctAnswer: question.choix[question.reponse_correcte],\n    };\n\n    setResults([...results, result]);\n  };\n\n  const nextQuestion = () => {\n    if (currentQuestionIndex < questions.length - 1) {\n      setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);\n    } else {\n      // Quiz termine, envoyer les resultats au backend\n      submitResults();\n      setMode(\"results\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const submitResults = async () => {\n    if (!currentQuiz) return;\n\n    const score = results.filter((r) => r.isCorrect).length;\n    try {\n      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/${currentQuiz.id}/resultats`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          score,\n          total: questions.length,\n          details: results,\n        }),\n      });\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur envoi resultats:\", error);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const resetQuiz = () => {\n    setCurrentQuiz(null);\n    setQuestions([]);\n    setResults([]);\n    setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);\n    setMode(\"list\");\n  };\n\n  const hasAnsweredCurrent = results.length > currentQuestionIndex;\n  const score = results.filter((r) => r.isCorrect).length;\n  const totalQuestions = questions.length;\n  const scorePercent = totalQuestions > 0 ? Math.round((score / totalQuestions) * 100) : 0;\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"w-10 h-10 border-4 border-amber-500/30 border-t-amber-500 rounded-full animate-spin\" />\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Chargement...</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Mode resultats\n  if (mode === \"results\") {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n        {/* Header resultat */}\n        <div className=\"text-center py-8\">\n          <div\n            className={`w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${\n              scorePercent >= 70\n                ? \"bg-emerald-500/20\"\n                : scorePercent >= 40\n                ? \"bg-amber-500/20\"\n                : \"bg-red-500/20\"\n            }`}\n          >\n            <span\n              className={`text-3xl font-bold ${\n                scorePercent >= 70\n                  ? \"text-emerald-400\"\n                  : scorePercent >= 40\n                  ? \"text-amber-400\"\n                  : \"text-red-400\"\n              }`}\n            >\n              {scorePercent}%\n            </span>\n          </div>\n\n          <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2\">\n            {currentQuiz?.titre || \"Quiz termine\"}\n          </h2>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400\">\n            Score : {score} / {totalQuestions} bonnes reponses\n          </p>\n\n          {/* Barre score */}\n          <div className=\"max-w-sm mx-auto mt-6\">\n            <div className=\"w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-3 overflow-hidden\">\n              <div\n                className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-out ${\n                  scorePercent >= 70\n                    ? \"bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-400\"\n                    : scorePercent >= 40\n                    ? \"bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-400\"\n                    : \"bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-red-400\"\n                }`}\n                style={{ width: `${scorePercent}%` }}\n              />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Detail par question */}\n        <div className=\"card\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4\">\n            Detail des reponses\n          </h3>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {results.map((result, index) => (\n              <div\n                key={index}\n                className={`\n                  flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border\n                  ${\n                    result.isCorrect\n                      ? \"bg-emerald-500/5 border-emerald-500/20\"\n                      : \"bg-red-500/5 border-red-500/20\"\n                  }\n                `}\n              >\n                <div className=\"flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5\">\n                  {result.isCorrect ? (\n                    <svg className=\"w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                      <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z\" />\n                    </svg>\n                  ) : (\n                    <svg className=\"w-5 h-5 text-red-400\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                      <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"m9.75 9.75 4.5 4.5m0-4.5-4.5 4.5M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z\" />\n                    </svg>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-200\">\n                    Q{index + 1}. {result.question}\n                  </p>\n                  {!result.isCorrect && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1\">\n                      Reponse correcte : {result.correctAnswer}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Actions */}\n        <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-3\">\n          <button onClick={resetQuiz} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n            Retour aux quiz\n          </button>\n          {currentQuiz && (\n            <button\n              onClick={() => startQuiz(currentQuiz)}\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n            >\n              Refaire ce quiz\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Mode quiz (question par question)\n  if (mode === \"quiz\" && questions.length > 0) {\n    const currentQuestion = questions[currentQuestionIndex];\n\n    return (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n        {/* Header quiz */}\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <button onClick={resetQuiz} className=\"btn-ghost flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n              <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18\" />\n            </svg>\n            Quitter\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"text-center\">\n            <p className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-300\">\n              {currentQuiz?.titre}\n            </p>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">\n              Question {currentQuestionIndex + 1} / {totalQuestions}\n            </p>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">\n            Score : {score}/{results.length}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Barre de progression */}\n        <div className=\"w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden\">\n          <div\n            className=\"h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-400 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out\"\n            style={{\n              width: `${((currentQuestionIndex + 1) / totalQuestions) * 100}%`,\n            }}\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Question */}\n        <div className=\"py-4\">\n          <QuizQuestion\n            key={currentQuestionIndex}\n            question={currentQuestion.question}\n            choix={currentQuestion.choix}\n            reponse_correcte={currentQuestion.reponse_correcte}\n            explication={currentQuestion.explication}\n            onAnswer={handleAnswer}\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Bouton suivant (apres reponse) */}\n        {hasAnsweredCurrent && (\n          <div className=\"flex justify-center\">\n            <button onClick={nextQuestion} className=\"btn-primary flex items-center gap-2\">\n              {currentQuestionIndex < totalQuestions - 1 ? (\n                <>\n                  Question suivante\n                  <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                    <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3\" />\n                  </svg>\n                </>\n              ) : (\n                <>\n                  Voir les resultats\n                  <svg className=\"w-5 h-5\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={2} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n                    <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z\" />\n                  </svg>\n                </>\n              )}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Mode liste des quiz\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-8\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-white\">Quiz</h1>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-slate-400\">\n          Testez vos connaissances avec des QCM generes par IA\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Liste des quiz */}\n      {quizList.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg className=\"w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-4\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" strokeWidth={1} stroke=\"currentColor\">\n            <path strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d=\"M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 ---
                                                                                            ```

## Fichiers crees (10 fichiers demandes + 2 bonus de configuration)

### Fichiers de configuration

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/tsconfig.json`**
- Configuration TypeScript standard pour Next.js 14 avec App Router
- Module resolution `bundler`, path alias `@/*`, plugin Next.js

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/postcss.config.js`** (bonus)
- Necessaire pour que Tailwind fonctionne avec Next.js

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/next.config.js`** (bonus)
- Configure un rewrite `/api/*` vers `http://localhost:8000/*` pour proxifier les appels API backend

### Styles

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/globals.css`**
- Directives Tailwind (`@tailwind base/components/utilities`)
- Layer `base` : fond `slate-950`, texte `slate-100`, scrollbar stylisee
- Layer `components` : classes utilitaires `.card`, `.card-hover`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-secondary`, `.btn-ghost`, `.input-field`, `.badge-*` (blue, violet, amber, green)
- Layer `utilities` : `.text-gradient` bleu-violet, `.glow-blue`, `.glow-violet`
- Animation CSS flip pour les flashcards (perspective 3D, `backface-visibility`, rotation Y)

### Layout

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/layout.tsx`**
- `"use client"` avec `useState` pour le toggle sidebar mobile
- `<html lang="fr">`
- Sidebar fixe a gauche (64px = `w-64`) avec :
  - Logo IACA avec gradient bleu-violet
  - 5 liens de navigation : Dashboard, Matieres, Flashcards, Quiz, Vocal
  - Chaque lien a une icone SVG Heroicons et un etat actif (detecte via `usePathname()`)
  - Avatar utilisateur en bas
- Responsive : overlay + hamburger menu sur mobile (`lg:hidden`)
- Zone principale avec `max-w-7xl`, padding responsive

### Pages

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/page.tsx`** (S9 - Dashboard)
- `"use client"` avec `useEffect`/`useState`
- Fetch parallel de 3 endpoints : `/stats`, `/flashcards/revisions?limit=5`, `/activites?limit=5`
- Gestion gracieuse des erreurs (`Promise.allSettled`)
- 4 stat cards en grid : Documents, Flashcards, Quiz, A reviser (chacun avec couleur et icone distinctes)
- Section "Prochaines revisions" : liste des flashcards a reviser avec date
- Section "Activite recente" : historique avec badges par type
- Section "Actions rapides" : 3 liens raccourcis vers flashcards, quiz, matieres
- Spinner de chargement

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/matieres/page.tsx`** (S12)
- `"use client"` avec `useEffect`/`useState`
- Fetch depuis `/matieres`, fallback sur 6 matieres par defaut (Droit public, Finances publiques, Economie, Questions europeennes, Questions sociales, GRH)
- Grid de cards avec 6 couleurs differentes (blue, emerald, amber, violet, rose, cyan)
- Chaque card : icone, nom, description, compteurs documents et flashcards
- Gradient decoratif en arriere-plan de chaque card
- Modal d'ajout de matiere (nom + description) avec POST vers `/matieres`

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/flashcards/page.tsx`** (S13)
- `"use client"` avec `useEffect`/`useState`/`useCallback`
- Deux modes : **liste** et **revision**
- Mode liste : filtre par matiere, grid de preview des cards, bouton "Lancer la revision"
- Mode revision : 
  - Barre de progression animee
  - Composant `FlashCard` affiche
  - Navigation auto a la card suivante apres notation
  - Ecran de fin avec stats (cartes revisees, qualite moyenne)
- Fetch depuis `/flashcards/revisions` et `/matieres`
- POST de chaque review vers `/flashcards/{id}/review` (SM-2)

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/quiz/page.tsx`** (S14)
- `"use client"` avec `useEffect`/`useState`/`useCallback`
- Trois modes : **liste**, **quiz**, **resultats**
- Mode liste : grid de quiz disponibles (fetch `/quiz`), chaque card cliquable
- Mode quiz :
  - Barre de progression
  - Questions affichees une par une via `QuizQuestion`
  - Bouton "Question suivante" / "Voir les resultats"
  - Score en direct
- Mode resultats :
  - Score en pourcentage avec cercle colore (vert >= 70%, ambre >= 40%, rouge sinon)
  - Barre de score animee
  - Detail question par question (correct/incorrect + reponse attendue)
  - POST resultats vers `/quiz/{id}/resultats`
  - Boutons "Retour" et "Refaire"

### Composants

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/FlashCard.tsx`** (S10)
- Props : `question`, `reponse`, `explication`, `matiere`, `onReview(quality: number)`
- Animation flip 3D CSS (click pour retourner)
- Face avant : question sur fond avec glow bleu
- Face arriere : reponse avec glow violet + bouton "Voir l'explication" optionnel
- 5 boutons de notation SM-2 (1=Aucune idee a 5=Facile) avec couleurs graduees (rouge -> vert)
- Les boutons apparaissent uniquement apres le flip

**`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/QuizQuestion.tsx`** (S11)
- Props : `question`, `choix`, `reponse_correcte`, `explication`, `onAnswer(selectedIndex, isCorrect)`
- Radio buttons stylises avec lettres (A, B, C, D...)
- 3 etats visuels : non selectionne, selectionne (bleu), correct (vert), incorrect (rouge)
- Bouton "Valider" desactive tant qu'aucun choix n'est fait
- Apres validation : message de resultat + explication optionnelle
- Icones check/cross dans les radios

### Design

- Theme sombre : `slate-950` en fond, `slate-900`/`slate-800` pour les surfaces
- Accents : bleu (`blue-500/600`) et violet (`violet-500/600`), ambre et emeraude pour les variations
- Backdrop blur, shadows, glow effects
- Transitions fluides (300ms) et hover states
- Fully responsive (mobile-first avec breakpoints `sm`, `md`, `lg`)

### Endpoints API attendus

Le frontend appelle les endpoints suivants sur `http://localhost:8000` :

| Methode | Endpoint | Page |
|---------|----------|------|
| GET | `/stats` | Dashboard |
| GET | `/flashcards/revisions` | Dashboard, Flashcards |
| GET | `/activites` | Dashboard |
| GET | `/matieres` | Matieres, Flashcards |
| POST | `/matieres` | Matieres |
| POST | `/flashcards/{id}/review` | Flashcards |
| GET | `/quiz` | Quiz |
| GET | `/quiz/{id}/questions` | Quiz |
| POST | `/quiz/{id}/resultats` | Quiz |

                                                          ```json
                                                          {
  "content": "\"\"\"\nService d'extraction de texte depuis des documents PDF, PPTX et DOCX.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport os\n\n\nasync def parse_document(file_path: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    Extrait le texte brut d'un fichier PDF, PPTX ou DOCX.\n\n    Args:\n        file_path: Chemin absolu vers le fichier a parser.\n\n    Returns:\n        Le texte brut extrait du document.\n\n    Raises:\n        ValueError: Si le type de fichier n'est pas supporte.\n        FileNotFoundError: Si le fichier n'existe pas.\n    \"\"\"\n    if not os.path.exists(file_path):\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Fichier non trouve: {file_path}\")\n\n    extension = os.path.splitext(file_path)[1].lower()\n\n    if extension == \".pdf\":\n        return _extract_pdf(file_path)\n    elif extension == \".pptx\":\n        return _extract_pptx(file_path)\n    elif extension == \".docx\":\n        return _extract_docx(file_path)\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Type de fichier non supporte: {extension}\")\n\n\ndef _extract_pdf(file_path: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Extrait le texte d'un fichier PDF via pymupdf (fitz).\"\"\"\n    import fitz  # pymupdf\n\n    text_parts: list[str] = []\n    with fitz.open(file_path) as doc:\n        for page in doc:\n            page_text = page.get_text()\n            if page_text.strip():\n                text_parts.append(page_text)\n    return \"\\n\\n\".join(text_parts)\n\n\ndef _extract_pptx(file_path: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Extrait le texte d'un fichier PowerPoint PPTX.\"\"\"\n    from pptx import Presentation\n\n    text_parts: list[str] = []\n    prs = Presentation(file_path)\n    for slide_num, slide in enumerate(prs.slides, start=1):\n        slide_texts: list[str] = []\n        for shape in slide.shapes:\n            if shape.has_text_frame:\n                for paragraph in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:\n                    para_text = paragraph.text.strip()\n                    if para_text:\n                        slide_texts.append(para_text)\n        if slide_texts:\n            text_parts.append(f\"--- Slide {slide_num} ---\\n\" + \"\\n\".join(slide_texts))\n    return \"\\n\\n\".join(text_parts)\n\n\ndef _extract_docx(file_path: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Extrait le texte d'un fichier Word DOCX.\"\"\"\n    from docx import Document\n\n    text_parts: list[str] = []\n    doc = Document(file_path)\n    for paragraph in doc.paragraphs:\n        para_text = paragraph.text.strip()\n        if para_text:\n            text_parts.append(para_text)\n    return \"\\n\\n\".join(text_parts)\n",
  "file_path": "/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/services/document_parser.py"
}
                                                          ```

                                                              ```json
                                                              {
  "content": "\"\"\"\nRouter pour la gestion des documents (upload, liste, detail, suppression).\n\"\"\"\n\nimport os\nimport shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\n\nfrom fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, UploadFile, File, Form\nfrom sqlalchemy import select\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom app.database import get_db\nfrom app.models.document import Document\nfrom app.schemas.document import DocumentResponse\nfrom app.config import settings\nfrom app.services.document_parser import parse_document\n\nrouter = APIRouter()\n\nALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = {\".pdf\", \".pptx\", \".docx\"}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/upload\", response_model=DocumentResponse)\nasync def upload_document(\n    file: UploadFile = File(...),\n    titre: Optional[str] = Form(None),\n    matiere_id: Optional[int] = Form(None),\n    chapitre: str = Form(\"\"),\n    tags: str = Form(\"\"),\n    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),\n):\n    \"\"\"Upload un fichier PDF, PPTX ou DOCX, extrait le texte et sauvegarde.\"\"\"\n    # Verifier l'extension\n    filename = file.filename or \"document\"\n    extension = os.path.splitext(filename)[1].lower()\n    if extension not in ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=400,\n            detail=f\"Type de fichier non supporte: {extension}. \"\n            f\"Formats acceptes: {', '.join(ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS)}\",\n        )\n\n    # Creer le dossier d'upload si necessaire\n    upload_dir = settings.upload_path\n    os.makedirs(upload_dir, exist_ok=True)\n\n    # Generer un nom de fichier unique\n    timestamp = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\")\n    safe_filename = f\"{timestamp}_{filename}\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(upload_dir, safe_filename)\n\n    # Sauvegarder le fichier\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, \"wb\") as buffer:\n            shutil.copyfileobj(file.file, buffer)\n    except Exception as e:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f\"Erreur lors de la sauvegarde: {str(e)}\")\n    finally:\n        await file.close()\n\n    # Extraire le texte\n    try:\n        contenu_extrait = await parse_document(file_path)\n    except Exception as e:\n        # En cas d'erreur d'extraction, on garde le document mais sans contenu\n        contenu_extrait = f\"[Erreur d'extraction: {str(e)}]\"\n\n    # Creer l'enregistrement en base\n    document = Document(\n        titre=titre or os.path.splitext(filename)[0],\n        fichier_path=file_path,\n        type_fichier=extension.lstrip(\".\"),\n        contenu_extrait=contenu_extrait,\n        matiere_id=matiere_id,\n        chapitre=chapitre,\n        tags=tags,\n    )\n\n    db.add(document)\n    await db.commit()\n    await db.refresh(document)\n\n    return document\n\n\n@router.get(\"/\", response_model=list[DocumentResponse])\nasync def list_documents(\n    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,\n    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),\n):\n    \"\"\"Liste tous les documents, avec filtre optionnel par matiere.\"\"\"\n    query = select(Document).order_by(Document.created_at.desc())\n    if matiere_id is not None:\n        query = query.where(Document.matiere_id == matiere_id)\n\n    result = await db.execute(query)\n    documents = result.scalars().all()\n    return documents\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{document_id}\", response_model=DocumentResponse)\nasync def get_document(\n    document_id: int,\n    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),\n):\n    \"\"\"Recupere un document par son ID.\"\"\"\n    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))\n    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    if document is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Document non trouve\")\n\n    return document\n\n\n@router.delete(\"/{document_id}\")\nasync def delete_document(\n    document_id: int,\n    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),\n):\n    \"\"\"Supprime un document et son fichier associe.\"\"\"\n    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))\n    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    if document is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Document non trouve\")\n\n    # Supprimer le fichier physique\n    if os.path.exists(document.fichier_path):\n        try:\n            os.remove(document.fichier_path)\n        except OSError:\n            pass  # Le fichier n'existe plus, on continue\n\n    await db.delete(document)\n    await db.commit()\n\n    return {\"message\": \"Document supprime\", \"id\": document_id}\n",
  "file_path": "/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/routers/documents.py"
}
                                                              ```
