    56→}
    57→
    58→function AnimatedNumber({ duration = 850, value }: { duration?: number; value: number }) {
    59→  const [display, setDisplay] = useState(0);
    60→
    61→  useEffect(() => {
    62→    const start = Date.now();
    63→    const interval = window.setInterval(() => {
    64→      const progress = Math.min((Date.now() - start) / duration, 1);
    65→      setDisplay(Math.floor(progress * value));
    66→    }, 16);
    67→
    68→    return () => window.clearInterval(interval);
    69→  }, [duration, value]);
    70→
    71→  return <>{display}</>;
    72→}
    73→
    74→function formatRevisionDate(value: string) {
    75→  if (!value) {
    76→    return "A traiter aujourd'hui";
    77→  }
    78→
    79→  const parsedDate = new Date(value);
    80→  if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
    81→    return "A traiter aujourd'hui";
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat("fr-FR", {
    85→    day: "numeric",
    86→    month: "short",
    87→    hour: "2-digit",
    88→    minute: "2-digit",
    89→  }).format(parsedDate);
    90→}
    91→
    92→export function DashboardLoadingState() {
    93→  return (
    94→    <div className="space-y-8 lg:space-y-10">
    95→      <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-6 shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(2,12,27,0.35)] backdrop-blur-xl lg:p-8">
    96→        <div className="grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1.35fr_0.85fr]">
    97→          <div className="space-y-4">
    98→            <div className="h-3 w-28 rounded-full bg-white/10" />
    99→            <div className="h-16 w-full max-w-2xl rounded-[1.5rem] bg-white/10" />
   100→            <div className="h-5 w-full max-w-xl rounded-full bg-white/10" />
   101→            <div className="h-5 w-40 rounded-full bg-white/10" />
   102→            <div className="flex gap-3">
   103→              <div className="h-12 w-40 rounded-full bg-white/10" />
   104→              <div className="h-12 w-36 rounded-full bg-white/10" />
   105→            </div>
   106→          </div>
   107→          <div className="rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-6">
   108→            <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
   109→              <div className="h-24 rounded-[1.25rem] bg-white/10" />
   110→              <div className="h-24 rounded-[1.25rem] bg-white/10" />
   111→            </div>
   112→            <div className="mt-4 h-40 rounded-[1.5rem] bg-white/10" />
   113→          </div>
   114→        </div>
   115→      </div>
   116→
   117→      <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3">
   118→        {Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, index) => (
   119→          <div key={index} className="h-44 rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/60" />
   120→        ))}
   121→      </div>
   122→
   123→      <div className="grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1.15fr_0.85fr]">
   124→        <div className="h-[25rem] rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/60" />
   125→        <div className="h-[25rem] rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/60" />
   126→      </div>
   127→    </div>
   128→  );
   129→}
   130→
   131→export function DashboardHome({ currentDate, error, revisions, stats }: DashboardHomeProps) {
   132→  const totalResources = stats.documents + stats.flashcards + stats.fiches + stats.quiz;
   133→  const activeModes = [stats.flashcards, stats.quiz, stats.fiches, stats.revisions].filter((value) => value > 0).length;
   134→
   135→  const priorityTitle = stats.revisions > 0
   136→    ? "Consolider les cartes qui arrivent a echeance"
   137→    : totalResources > 0
   138→      ? "Continuer le rythme sans perdre le fil"
   139→      : "Poser les bases de la preparation";
   140→
   141→  const priorityDescription = stats.revisions > 0
   142→    ? `${stats.revisions} revision${stats.revisions > 1 ? "s" : ""} prioritaire${stats.revisions > 1 ? "s" : ""} aujourd'hui.`
   143→    : totalResources > 0
   144→      ? "Le socle existe deja. L'objectif est maintenant de garder un cycle regulier."
   145→      : "Ajoute d'abord des matieres et du contenu pour transformer le tableau en outil de travail.";
   146→
   147→  const metricCards: MetricCardDefinition[] = [
   148→    {
   149→      label: "Documents",
   150→      value: stats.documents,
   151→      description: "Base documentaire chargee dans la plateforme.",
   152→      accent: "from-teal-300/90 via-teal-400/30 to-transparent",
   153→      icon: <DocumentIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   154→    },
   155→    {
   156→      label: "Matieres",
   157→      value: stats.matieres,
   158→      description: "Disciplines actuellement organisees.",
   159→      accent: "from-orange-300/90 via-orange-400/30 to-transparent",
   160→      icon: <SubjectIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   161→    },
   162→    {
   163→      label: "Flashcards",
   164→      value: stats.flashcards,
   165→      description: "Cartes mobilisables pour la memoire active.",
   166→      accent: "from-cyan-300/90 via-cyan-400/30 to-transparent",
   167→      icon: <FlashcardIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   168→    },
   169→    {
   170→      label: "Fiches",
   171→      value: stats.fiches,
   172→      description: "Syntheses prêtes a etre relues rapidement.",
   173→      accent: "from-amber-300/90 via-amber-400/30 to-transparent",
   174→      icon: <DocumentIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   175→    },
   176→    {
   177→      label: "Quiz",
   178→      value: stats.quiz,
   179→      description: "Series de verification pour tester le rappel.",
   180→      accent: "from-sky-300/90 via-sky-400/30 to-transparent",
   181→      icon: <QuizIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   182→    },
   183→    {
   184→      label: "A reviser",
   185→      value: stats.revisions,
   186→      description: "Elements a traiter avant de passer a la suite.",
   187→      accent: "from-rose-300/90 via-rose-400/30 to-transparent",
   188→      icon: <ClockIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   189→    },
   190→  ];
   191→
   192→  const quickActions: QuickActionDefinition[] = [
   193→    {
   194→      label: "Relancer la memoire",
   195→      href: "/flashcards",
   196→      description: "Passe en revue les cartes dues et garde un rappel actif.",
   197→      meta: `${stats.flashcards} cartes prêtes`,
   198→      accent: "from-teal-500/20 via-teal-400/5 to-transparent",
   199→      icon: <FlashcardIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   200→    },
   201→    {
   202→      label: "Tester sous pression",
   203→      href: "/quiz",
   204→      description: "Valide la rapidite de rappel avec une session courte.",
   205→      meta: `${stats.quiz} quiz disponibles`,
   206→      accent: "from-orange-500/20 via-orange-400/5 to-transparent",
   207→      icon: <QuizIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   208→    },
   209→    {
   210→      label: "Revenir au fond",
   211→      href: "/fiches",
   212→      description: "Relis les points durs et consolide les raisonnements.",
   213→      meta: `${stats.fiches} fiches a parcourir`,
   214→      accent: "from-sky-500/20 via-sky-400/5 to-transparent",
   215→      icon: <DocumentIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   216→    },
   217→    {
   218→      label: "Nettoyer la structure",
   219→      href: "/matieres",
   220→      description: "Reclasse les ressources avant le prochain sprint de revision.",
   221→      meta: `${stats.matieres} matieres actives`,
   222→      accent: "from-stone-200/10 via-stone-200/5 to-transparent",
   223→      icon: <SubjectIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   224→    },
   225→    {
   226→      label: "Parler les notions",
   227→      href: "/vocal",
   228→      description: "Passe en mode oral pour verifier la clarte du discours.",
   229→      meta: "Mode oral guide",
   230→      accent: "from-rose-500/20 via-rose-400/5 to-transparent",
   231→      icon: <MicrophoneIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   232→    },
   233→    {
   234→      label: "Relier les idees",
   235→      href: "/mindmap",
   236→      description: "Fais remonter les liens entre notions et exceptions.",
   237→      meta: "Vision systemique",
   238→      accent: "from-cyan-500/20 via-cyan-400/5 to-transparent",
   239→      icon: <MindMapIcon className="h-6 w-6" />,
   240→    },
   241→  ];
   242→
   243→  return (
   244→    <div className="space-y-8 lg:space-y-10">
   245→      <section className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-6 shadow-[0_30px_80px_rgba(2,12,27,0.35)] backdrop-blur-xl lg:p-8">
   246→        <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_left,rgba(45,212,191,0.16),transparent_32%),radial-gradient(circle_at_85%_15%,rgba(234,88,12,0.14),transparent_24%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.03),transparent_45%)]" />
   247→        <div className="relative grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1.35fr_0.85fr] xl:gap-8">
   248→          <div className="space-y-6">
   249→            <div className="space-y-3">
   250→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-teal-200/80">
   251→                Cockpit de revision
   252→              </p>
   253→              <div className="space-y-4">
   254→                <h1 className="max-w-3xl font-heading text-5xl leading-none text-white sm:text-6xl">
   255→                  Une interface plus nette pour piloter la preparation concours.
   256→                </h1>
   257→                <p className="max-w-2xl text-base leading-7 text-slate-300 sm:text-lg">
   258→                  IACA devient un poste de travail plus lisible: priorites du jour, volumes disponibles et points d&apos;entree rapides sur les modes de revision.
   259→                </p>
   260→              </div>
   261→            </div>
   262→
   263→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-300">
   264→              <span className="rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 capitalize">
   265→                {currentDate || "Aujourd'hui"}
   266→              </span>
   267→              <span className="rounded-full border border-teal-400/20 bg-teal-400/10 px-4 py-2 text-teal-100">
   268→                {stats.revisions > 0 ? `${stats.revisions} revision${stats.revisions > 1 ? "s" : ""} a traiter` : "Aucune revision urgente"}
   269→              </span>
   270→            </div>
   271→
   272→            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
   273→              <Link
   274→                href="/flashcards"
   275→                className="inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-orange-500 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-orange-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-orange-200/80 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-slate-950"
   276→              >
   277→                Lancer la revision
   278→                <ArrowUpRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
   279→              </Link>
   280→              <Link
   281→                href="/quiz"
   282→                className="inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-100 transition-all duration-200 hover:border-teal-300/40 hover:bg-teal-300/10 hover:text-white focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-200/80 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-slate-950"
   283→              >
   284→                Ouvrir un quiz
   285→                <ArrowUpRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
   286→              </Link>
   287→            </div>
   288→          </div>
   289→
   290→          <div className="rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-950/45 p-5 shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.04)]">
   291→            <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
   292→              <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4">
   293→                <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400">
   294→                  Ressources totales
   295→                </p>
   296→                <p className="mt-4 text-4xl font-semibold text-white">
   297→                  <AnimatedNumber value={totalResources} />
   298→                </p>
   299→                <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Corpus pret a etre travaille.</p>
   300→              </div>
   301→              <div className="rounded-[1.25rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4">
   302→                <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400">
   303→                  Modes actifs
   304→                </p>
   305→                <p className="mt-4 text-4xl font-semibold text-white">
   306→                  <AnimatedNumber value={activeModes} />
   307→                </p>
   308→                <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Flashcards, quiz, fiches et revisions.</p>
   309→              </div>
   310→            </div>
   311→
   312→            <div className="mt-4 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-orange-300/15 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(234,88,12,0.12),rgba(15,23,42,0.22))] p-5">
   313→              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
   314→                <div>
   315→                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-orange-100/80">
   316→                    Priorite du jour
   317→                  </p>
   318→                  <h2 className="mt-3 max-w-md text-2xl font-semibold text-white">
   319→                    {priorityTitle}
   320→                  </h2>
   321→                </div>
   322→                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/10 p-3 text-orange-50">
   323→                  <DashboardIcon className="h-6 w-6" />
   324→                </div>
   325→              </div>
   326→              <p className="mt-4 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-200/90">
   327→                {priorityDescription}
   328→              </p>
   329→            </div>
   330→          </div>
   331→        </div>
   332→      </section>
   333→
   334→      {error ? (
   335→        <div
   336→          role="alert"
   337→          className="rounded-[1.5rem] border border-orange-300/20 bg-orange-300/10 px-5 py-4 text-sm text-orange-50"
   338→        >
   339→          {error}
   340→        </div>
   341→      ) : null}
   342→
   343→      <section className="space-y-4">
   344→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-end lg:justify-between">
   345→          <div>
   346→            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-500">
   347→              Volumes
   348→            </p>
   349→            <h2 className="mt-2 font-heading text-3xl text-white">
   350→              Vue d&apos;ensemble des briques de travail
   351→            </h2>
   352→          </div>
   353→          <p className="max-w-2xl text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">
   354→            Le tableau concentre les volumes utiles pour decider quoi relancer en premier, sans faire defiler plusieurs ecrans.
   355→          </p>
   356→        </div>
   357→
   358→        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3">
   359→          {metricCards.map((card) => (
   360→            <article
   361→              key={card.label}
   362→              className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-5 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(2,12,27,0.24)] transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1"
   363→            >
   364→              <div className={`absolute inset-x-5 top-0 h-px bg-gradient-to-r ${card.accent}`} />
   365→              <div className="relative flex h-full flex-col justify-between gap-8">
   366→                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
   367→                  <div>
   368→                    <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   369→                      {card.label}
   370→                    </p>
   371→                    <p className="mt-4 text-4xl font-semibold text-white">
   372→                      <AnimatedNumber value={card.value} />
   373→                    </p>
   374→                  </div>
   375→                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-3 text-slate-100">
   376→                    {card.icon}
   377→                  </div>
   378→                </div>
   379→                <p className="text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">{card.description}</p>
   380→              </div>
   381→            </article>
   382→          ))}
   383→        </div>
   384→      </section>
   385→
   386→      <section className="grid gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1.15fr_0.85fr]">
   387→        <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-6 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(2,12,27,0.24)]">
   388→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end sm:justify-between">
   389→            <div>
   390→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-500">
   391→                File prioritaire
   392→              </p>
   393→              <h2 className="mt-2 font-heading text-3xl text-white">
   394→                Ce qui merite d&apos;etre traite maintenant
   395→              </h2>
   396→            </div>
   397→            <Link
   398→              href="/flashcards"
   399→              className="inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 self-start rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-100 transition-colors duration-200 hover:border-teal-300/40 hover:bg-teal-300/10 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-200/80 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-slate-950"
   400→            >
   401→              Ouvrir les cartes
   402→              <ArrowUpRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
   403→            </Link>
   404→          </div>
   405→
   406→          {revisions.length === 0 ? (
   407→            <div className="mt-8 rounded-[1.75rem] border border-emerald-300/15 bg-emerald-300/10 px-6 py-12 text-center">
   408→              <div className="mx-auto flex h-14 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200/20 bg-emerald-200/10 text-emerald-100">
   409→                <CheckCircleIcon className="h-7 w-7" />
   410→              </div>
   411→              <h3 className="mt-5 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">Aucune revision en retard.</h3>
   412→              <p className="mx-auto mt-3 max-w-xl text-sm leading-6 text-slate-300">
   413→                Tu peux basculer sur un quiz, enrichir une matiere ou reprendre une fiche de synthese sans pression immediate.
   414→              </p>
   415→            </div>
   416→          ) : (
   417→            <div className="mt-8 space-y-3">
   418→              {revisions.map((revision, index) => (
   419→                <div
   420→                  key={revision.id}
   421→                  className="flex flex-col gap-4 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between"
   422→                >
   423→                  <div className="flex min-w-0 items-start gap-4">
   424→                    <div className="flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-slate-950/70 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-100">
   425→                      {String(index + 1).padStart(2, "0")}
   426→                    </div>
   427→                    <div className="min-w-0">
   428→                      <p className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   429→                        {formatRevisionDate(revision.prochaine_revision)}
   430→                      </p>
   431→                      <p className="mt-2 line-clamp-2 text-base leading-7 text-slate-100">
   432→                        {revision.question}
   433→                      </p>
   434→                    </div>
   435→                  </div>
   436→                  <Link
   437→                    href="/flashcards"
   438→                    className="inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 self-start rounded-full bg-teal-400 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-950 transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-teal-300 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-100/80 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-slate-950 md:self-center"
   439→                  >
   440→                    Reviser
   441→                    <ArrowUpRightIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
   442→                  </Link>
   443→                </div>
   444→              ))}
   445→            </div>
   446→          )}
   447→        </div>
   448→
   449→        <div className="rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-6 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(2,12,27,0.24)]">
   450→          <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-500">
   451→            Cadence
   452→          </p>
   453→          <h2 className="mt-2 font-heading text-3xl text-white">
   454→            Une journee de travail plus facile a lire
   455→          </h2>
   456→
   457→          <div className="mt-8 space-y-4">
   458→            <div className="rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4">
   459→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   460→                01. Consolider
   461→              </p>
   462→              <p className="mt-3 text-lg font-semibold text-white">
   463→                {stats.revisions > 0 ? `${stats.revisions} carte${stats.revisions > 1 ? "s" : ""} prioritaire${stats.revisions > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : "Aucune revision urgente"}
   464→              </p>
   465→              <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">
   466→                Le meilleur levier pour garder le recall stable avant d&apos;ajouter du volume.
   467→              </p>
   468→            </div>
   469→
   470→            <div className="rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4">
   471→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   472→                02. Tester
   473→              </p>
   474→              <p className="mt-3 text-lg font-semibold text-white">
   475→                {stats.quiz > 0 ? `${stats.quiz} quiz pour valider le rappel` : "Aucun quiz charge pour le moment"}
   476→              </p>
   477→              <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">
   478→                Enchaine un questionnaire court pour verifier ce qui tient sans support.
   479→              </p>
   480→            </div>
   481→
   482→            <div className="rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-4">
   483→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   484→                03. Reformuler
   485→              </p>
   486→              <p className="mt-3 text-lg font-semibold text-white">
   487→                {stats.fiches > 0 ? `${stats.fiches} fiche${stats.fiches > 1 ? "s" : ""} pour fixer les notions` : "Ajoute des fiches de synthese"}
   488→              </p>
   489→              <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">
   490→                Termine par une reformulation propre, a l&apos;ecrit ou a l&apos;oral, pour ancrer les nuances.
   491→              </p>
   492→            </div>
   493→          </div>
   494→        </div>
   495→      </section>
   496→
   497→      <section className="space-y-4">
   498→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-end lg:justify-between">
   499→          <div>
   500→            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-500">
   501→              Entrees rapides
   502→            </p>
   503→            <h2 className="mt-2 font-heading text-3xl text-white">
   504→              Choisir la bonne porte selon l&apos;effort voulu
   505→            </h2>
   506→          </div>
   507→          <p className="max-w-2xl text-sm leading-6 text-slate-400">
   508→            Les actions sont pensees comme des sessions courtes: memoriser, tester, reformuler, reclasser ou faire emerger des liens.
   509→          </p>
   510→        </div>
   511→
   512→        <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3">
   513→          {quickActions.map((action) => (
   514→            <Link
   515→              key={action.href}
   516→              href={action.href}
   517→              className="group relative cursor-pointer overflow-hidden rounded-[1.75rem] border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/70 p-5 shadow-[0_24px_60px_rgba(2,12,27,0.24)] transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-200/80 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-slate-950"
   518→            >
   519→              <div className={`absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br ${action.accent}`} />
   520→              <div className="relative flex h-full flex-col justify-between gap-8">
   521→                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
   522→                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-3 text-slate-100">
   523→                    {action.icon}
   524→                  </div>
   525→                  <span className="rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-slate-950/70 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400">
   526→                    {action.meta}
   527→                  </span>
   528→                </div>
   529→
   530→                <div>
   531→                  <h3 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{action.label}</h3>
   532→                  <p className="mt-3 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-300">
   533→                    {action.description}
   534→                  </p>
   535→                </div>
   536→              </div>
   537→            </Link>
   538→          ))}
   539→        </div>
   540→      </section>
   541→    </div>
   542→  );
   543→}
   544→
                            ```

                                ```
                                     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  DashboardHome,
     7→  DashboardLoadingState,
     8→  type DashboardRevision,
     9→  type DashboardStats,
    10→} from "@/components/DashboardHome";
    11→import { withAuthHeaders } from "@/lib/auth";
    12→
    13→const API_BASE = "/api";
    14→
    15→const EMPTY_STATS: DashboardStats = {
    16→  documents: 0,
    17→  flashcards: 0,
    18→  fiches: 0,
    19→  matieres: 0,
    20→  quiz: 0,
    21→  revisions: 0,
    22→};
    23→
    24→interface MatiereResponse {
    25→  id: number;
    26→  nb_documents?: number;
    27→}
    28→
    29→function isSuccessfulResponse(
    30→  result: PromiseSettledResult<Response>,
    31→): result is PromiseFulfilledResult<Response> {
    32→  return result.status === "fulfilled" && result.value.ok;
    33→}
    34→
    35→export default function DashboardPage() {
    36→  const [currentDate, setCurrentDate] = useState("");
    37→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    38→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    39→  const [revisions, setRevisions] = useState<DashboardRevision[]>([]);
    40→  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats>(EMPTY_STATS);
    41→
    42→  useEffect(() => {
    43→    const formatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("fr-FR", {
    44→      weekday: "long",
    45→      day: "numeric",
    46→      month: "long",
    47→      year: "numeric",
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    setCurrentDate(formatter.format(new Date()));
    51→  }, []);
    52→
    53→  useEffect(() => {
    54→    let ignore = false;
    55→
    56→    const fetchDashboardData = async () => {
    57→      setLoading(true);
    58→
    59→      try {
    60→        const results = await Promise.allSettled([
    61→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards`, withAuthHeaders()),
    62→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz`, withAuthHeaders()),
    63→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`, withAuthHeaders()),
    64→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches`, withAuthHeaders()),
    65→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`, withAuthHeaders()),
    66→        ]);
    67→
    68→        if (ignore) {
    69→          return;
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        const [flashcardsResult, quizResult, revisionsResult, fichesResult, matieresResult] = results;
    73→
    74→        let failedRequests = 0;
    75→        let documents = 0;
    76→        let flashcards = 0;
    77→        let fiches = 0;
    78→        let matieres = 0;
    79→        let quiz = 0;
    80→        let revisionItems: DashboardRevision[] = [];
    81→
    82→        if (isSuccessfulResponse(flashcardsResult)) {
    83→          const data = await flashcardsResult.value.json();
    84→          flashcards = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
    85→        } else {
    86→          failedRequests += 1;
    87→        }
    88→
    89→        if (isSuccessfulResponse(quizResult)) {
    90→          const data = await quizResult.value.json();
    91→          quiz = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
    92→        } else {
    93→          failedRequests += 1;
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        if (isSuccessfulResponse(revisionsResult)) {
    97→          const data = await revisionsResult.value.json();
    98→          revisionItems = Array.isArray(data) ? data.slice(0, 5) : [];
    99→        } else {
   100→          failedRequests += 1;
   101→        }
   102→
   103→        if (isSuccessfulResponse(fichesResult)) {
   104→          const data = await fichesResult.value.json();
   105→          fiches = Array.isArray(data) ? data.length : 0;
   106→        } else {
   107→          failedRequests += 1;
   108→        }
   109→
   110→        if (isSuccessfulResponse(matieresResult)) {
   111→          const data = await matieresResult.value.json();
   112→          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
   113→            const matieresData = data as MatiereResponse[];
   114→            matieres = matieresData.length;
   115→            documents = matieresData.reduce((sum, matiere) => sum + (matiere.nb_documents ?? 0), 0);
   116→          }
   117→        } else {
   118→          failedRequests += 1;
   119→        }
   120→
   121→        setRevisions(revisionItems);
   122→        setStats({
   123→          documents,
   124→          flashcards,
   125→          fiches,
   126→          matieres,
   127→          quiz,
   128→          revisions: revisionItems.length,
   129→        });
   130→
   131→        if (failedRequests === results.length) {
   132→          setError("Impossible de charger le cockpit de revision pour le moment.");
   133→        } else if (failedRequests > 0) {
   134→          setError("Certaines statistiques sont temporairement indisponibles.");
   135→        } else {
   136→          setError(null);
   137→        }
   138→      } catch (fetchError) {
   139→        console.error("Erreur chargement dashboard:", fetchError);
   140→
   141→        if (!ignore) {
   142→          setError("Impossible de charger le cockpit de revision pour le moment.");
   143→          setRevisions([]);
   144→          setStats(EMPTY_STATS);
   145→        }
   146→      } finally {
   147→        if (!ignore) {
   148→          setLoading(false);
   149→        }
   150→      }
   151→    };
   152→
   153→    fetchDashboardData();
   154→
   155→    return () => {
   156→      ignore = true;
   157→    };
   158→  }, []);
   159→
   160→  if (loading) {
   161→    return <DashboardLoadingState />;
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  return (
   165→    <DashboardHome
   166→      currentDate={currentDate}
   167→      error={error}
   168→      revisions={revisions}
   169→      stats={stats}
   170→    />
   171→  );
   172→}
   173→
                                ```

    82→
    83→const DAYS_FR = ["Dimanche", "Lundi", "Mardi", "Mercredi", "Jeudi", "Vendredi", "Samedi"];
    84→
    85→export default function Sidebar() {
    86→  const pathname = usePathname();
    87→  const [currentDay, setCurrentDay] = useState("");
    88→  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState("");

    90→  const [revisionCount, setRevisionCount] = useState(0);

    93→
    94→  useEffect(() => {
    95→    const updateClock = () => {
    96→      const now = new Date();
    97→      const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
    98→      const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
    99→
   100→      setCurrentDay(DAYS_FR[now.getDay()]);
   101→      setCurrentTime(`${hours}:${minutes}`);
   102→    };
   103→
   104→    updateClock();
   105→    const interval = window.setInterval(updateClock, 30000);
   106→
   107→    return () => window.clearInterval(interval);

   269→                      >

   324→                  Cadence du jour
   325→                </p>
   326→                <h2 className="mt-3 text-xl font-semibold text-white">{rhythmLabel}</h2>
   327→                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-slate-200/90">{rhythmDescription}</p>
   328→
   329→                <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-950/40 px-4 py-3">
   330→                  <div>
   331→                    <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-500">
   332→                      Status
   333→                    </p>
   334→                    <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-white">
   335→                      {revisionCount > 0 ? "Memoire a consolider" : "Session ouverte"}
   336→                    </p>
   337→                  </div>
   338→                  <span className="rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-200">
   339→                    {currentTime || "IACA"}
   340→                  </span>
   341→                </div>
   342→              </section>
   343→            </div>
   344→          </div>
   345→        </div>
   346→      </aside>
   347→
   348→      <header className="fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-40 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/10 bg-[#07131b]/85 px-4 py-3 backdrop-blur-2xl lg:hidden">
   349→        <button
   350→          type="button"
   351→          aria-label={sidebarOpen ? "Fermer la navigation" : "Ouvrir la navigation"}
   352→          className="rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 p-2 text-slate-200 transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-white/10"
   353→          onClick={() => setSidebarOpen((open) => !open)}
   354→        >
   355→          <svg className="h-6 w-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.6} stroke="currentColor">
   356→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.75 6.75h16.5M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 5.25h16.5" />
   357→          </svg>
   358→        </button>
   359→
   360→        <div className="text-center">
   361→          <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-teal-200/80">
   362→            IACA
   363→          </p>
   364→          <p className="font-heading text-xl text-white">Cockpit</p>
   365→        </div>
   366→
   367→        <span className="rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-200">
   368→          {currentTime || "--:--"}
   369→        </span>
   370→      </header>
   371→    </>
   372→  );
   373→}
   374→
                                    ```

    88→
    89→function getMatiereStyle(matiereName: string) {
    90→  return matiereColors[matiereName] || defaultColor;
    91→}
    92→
    93→/** Render fiche section content with better formatting than plain whitespace-pre-line */
    94→function FormattedContent({ text }: { text: string }) {
    95→  const paragraphs = text.split(/\n{2,}/);
    96→  return (
    97→    <div className="space-y-3">
    98→      {paragraphs.map((para, i) => {
    99→        const trimmed = para.trim();
   100→        if (!trimmed) return null;
   101→        // Detect bullet lists
   102→        const lines = trimmed.split("\n");
   103→        const isList = lines.every(l => /^[\s]*[-\u2022\u2013*]\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());
   104→        if (isList) {
   105→          return (
   106→            <ul key={i} className="space-y-1.5 ml-1">
   107→              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => (
   108→                <li key={j} className="flex gap-2 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">
   109→                  <span className="text-blue-400/60 mt-1 shrink-0">
   110→                    <svg className="w-3 h-3" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="6" cy="6" r="3" /></svg>
   111→                  </span>
   112→                  <span>{line.replace(/^[\s]*[-\u2022\u2013*]\s*/, "")}</span>
   113→                </li>
   114→              ))}
   115→            </ul>
   116→          );
   117→        }
   118→        // Detect numbered items
   119→        const isNumbered = lines.every(l => /^[\s]*\d+[.)]\s/.test(l) || !l.trim());
   120→        if (isNumbered) {
   121→          return (
   122→            <ol key={i} className="space-y-1.5 ml-1">
   123→              {lines.filter(l => l.trim()).map((line, j) => {
   124→                const match = line.match(/^[\s]*(\d+)[.)]\s*(.*)/);
   125→                return (
   126→                  <li key={j} className="flex gap-2.5 text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">
   127→                    <span className="text-blue-400/70 font-semibold tabular-nums shrink-0 w-5 text-right">{match ? match[1] : j + 1}.</span>
   128→                    <span>{match ? match[2] : line}</span>
   129→                  </li>
   130→                );
   131→              })}
   132→            </ol>
   133→          );
   134→        }
   135→        // Default paragraph
   136→        return (
   137→          <p key={i} className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line">
   138→            {trimmed}
   139→          </p>
   140→        );
   141→      })}
   142→    </div>
   143→  );
   144→}
   145→
   146→export default function FichesPage() {
   147→  const [fiches, setFiches] = useState<FicheListItem[]>([]);
   148→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
   149→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
   150→  const [selectedFiche, setSelectedFiche] = useState<FicheDetail | null>(null);
   151→  const [openSections, setOpenSections] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
   152→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   153→  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
   154→  const [showGenModal, setShowGenModal] = useState(false);
   155→  const [documents, setDocuments] = useState<Document[]>([]);
   156→  const [selectedDocId, setSelectedDocId] = useState<number | null>(null);
   157→  const [nextContent, setNextContent] = useState<{ flashcards: { id: number; question: string }[]; quizzes: { id: number; titre: string }[] } | null>(null);
   158→  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
   159→  const sectionRefs = useRef<Record<number, HTMLDivElement | null>>({});
   160→
   161→  // Read matiere_id from URL search params
   162→  useEffect(() => {
   163→    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
   164→    const mid = params.get("matiere_id");
   165→    if (mid) setSelectedMatiere(parseInt(mid));
   166→  }, []);
   167→
   168→  const fetchFiches = useCallback(async () => {
   169→    try {
   170→      const base = `${API_BASE}/fiches?limit=250`;
   171→      const url = selectedMatiere
   172→        ? `${base}&matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`
   173→        : base;
   174→      const res = await fetch(url);
   175→      if (res.ok) setFiches(await res.json());
   176→    } catch (e) {
   177→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiches:", e);
   178→    }
   179→  }, [selectedMatiere]);
   180→
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const init = async () => {
   183→      setLoading(true);
   184→      try {
   185→        const [matRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
   186→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`),
   187→        ]);
   188→        if (matRes.status === "fulfilled" && matRes.value.ok) {
   189→          setMatieres(await matRes.value.json());
   190→        }
   191→        await fetchFiches();
   192→      } finally {
   193→        setLoading(false);
   194→      }
   195→    };
   196→    init();
   197→  }, [fetchFiches]);
   198→
   199→  const openFiche = async (ficheId: number) => {
   200→    try {
   201→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}`);
   202→      if (res.ok) {
   203→        const data = await res.json();
   204→        setSelectedFiche(data);
   205→        setOpenSections(new Set());
   206→        // Load next content (flashcards/quiz)
   207→        const nextRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/fiches/${ficheId}/next`);
   208→        if (nextRes.ok) setNextContent(await nextRes.json());
   209→      }
   210→    } catch (e) {
   211→      console.error("Erreur chargement fiche:", e);
   212→    }
   213→  };
   214→
   215→  const toggleSection = (sectionId: number) => {
   216→    setOpenSections((prev) => {
   217→      const next = new Set(prev);
   218→      if (next.has(sectionId)) next.delete(sectionId);
   219→      else next.add(sectionId);
   220→      return next;
   221→    });
   222→  };
   223→
   224→  const toggleAllSections = () => {
   225→    if (!selectedFiche) return;
   226→    const allIds = selectedFiche.sections.map(s => s.id);
   227→    const allOpen = allIds.every(id => openSections.has(id));
   228→    if (allOpen) {
   229→      setOpenSections(new Set());
   230→    } else {
   231→      setOpenSections(new Set(allIds));
   232→    }
   233→  };
   234→
   235→  const scrollToSection = (sectionId: number) => {
   236→    // Open section first
   237→    setOpenSections(prev => {
   238→      const next = new Set(prev);
   239→      next.add(sectionId);
   240→      return next;
   241→    });
   242→    // Scroll after a tick
   243→    setTimeout(() => {
   244→      const el = sectionRefs.current[sectionId];
   245→      if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
   246→    }, 100);
   247→  };
   248→
   249→  const openGenModal = async () => {
   250→    try {
   251→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents`);
   252→      if (res.ok) {
   253→        const docs = await res.json();
   254→        setDocuments(docs);
   255→        setSelectedDocId(docs.length > 0 ? docs[0].id : null);
   256→      }
   257→    } catch (e) {
   258→      console.error(e);
   259→    }
   260→    setShowGenModal(true);
   261→  };
   262→
   263→  const generateFiche = async () => {
   264→    if (!selectedDocId) return;
   265→    setGenerating(true);
   266→    try {
   267→      const res = await fetch(
   268→        `${API_BASE}/recommandations/generer-fiche/${selectedDocId}`,
   269→        withAuthHeaders({ method: "POST" })
   270→      );
   271→      if (res.ok) {
   272→        const data = await res.json();
   273→        setShowGenModal(false);
   274→        await fetchFiches();
   275→        // Auto-open the generated fiche
   276→        if (data.fiche_id) openFiche(data.fiche_id);
   277→      } else {
   278→        const err = await res.text();
   279→        alert(`Erreur generation: ${err}`);
   280→      }
   281→    } catch (e) {
   282→      alert(`Erreur: ${e}`);
   283→    } finally {
   284→      setGenerating(false);
   285→    }
   286→  };
   287→
   288→  const getMatiereName = (matiereId: number | null) => {
   289→    if (!matiereId) return "";
   290→    return matieres.find((m) => m.id === matiereId)?.nom || "";
   291→  };
   292→
   293→  if (loading) {
   294→    return (
   295→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   296→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   297→          <div className="relative">
   298→            <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-blue-500/20 rounded-full" />
   299→            <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-transparent border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin absolute inset-0" />
   300→          </div>
   301→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des fiches...</p>
   302→        </div>
   303→      </div>
   304→    );
   305→  }
   306→
   307→  // Detail view
   308→  if (selectedFiche) {
   309→    const matiereName = getMatiereName(selectedFiche.matiere_id);
   310→    const style = getMatiereStyle(matiereName);
   311→    const sortedSections = [...selectedFiche.sections].sort((a, b) => a.ordre - b.ordre);
   312→    const allOpen = sortedSections.length > 0 && sortedSections.every(s => openSections.has(s.id));
   313→
   314→    return (
   315→      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-6">
   316→        {/* Back button */}
   317→        <button
   318→          onClick={() => { setSelectedFiche(null); setNextContent(null); }}
   319→          aria-label="Retour aux fiches"
   320→          className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-all duration-200 -ml-3"
   321→        >
   322→          <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   323→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   324→          </svg>
   325→          Retour aux fiches
   326→        </button>
   327→
   328→        {/* Header with gradient */}
   329→        <div className={`rounded-2xl border ${style.border} bg-gradient-to-br ${style.gradient} p-6 relative overflow-hidden`}>
   330→          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-40 h-40 opacity-5">
   331→            <svg className="w-full h-full" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={0.5} stroke="currentColor">
   332→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   333→            </svg>
   334→          </div>
   335→          <div className="relative">
   336→            {matiereName && (
   337→              <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border} mb-3`}>
   338→                <svg className="w-3 h-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   339→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   340→                </svg>
   341→                {matiereName}
   342→              </span>
   343→            )}
   344→            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white leading-tight">{selectedFiche.titre}</h1>
   345→            {selectedFiche.chapitre && (
   346→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mt-2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   347→                <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   348→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" />
   349→                </svg>
   350→                {selectedFiche.chapitre}
   351→              </p>
   352→            )}
   353→          </div>
   354→        </div>
   355→
   356→        {/* Resume */}
   357→        {selectedFiche.resume && (
   358→          <div className="card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/40">
   359→            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   360→              <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5">
   361→                <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   362→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M11.25 11.25l.041-.02a.75.75 0 0 1 1.063.852l-.708 2.836a.75.75 0 0 0 1.063.853l.041-.021M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9-3.75h.008v.008H12V8.25Z" />
   363→                </svg>
   364→              </div>
   365→              <div>
   366→                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5">Resume</p>
   367→                <p className="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedFiche.resume}</p>
   368→              </div>
   369→            </div>
   370→          </div>
   371→        )}
   372→
   373→        {/* Sommaire cliquable + toggle all */}
   374→        {sortedSections.length > 1 && (
   375→          <div className="card border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/30">
   376→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
   377→              <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2">
   378→                <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   379→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8.25 6.75h12M8.25 12h12m-12 5.25h12M3.75 6.75h.007v.008H3.75V6.75Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0ZM3.75 12h.007v.008H3.75V12Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm-.375 5.25h.007v.008H3.75v-.008Zm.375 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Z" />
   380→                </svg>
   381→                Sommaire ({sortedSections.length} sections)
   382→              </h2>
   383→              <button
   384→                onClick={toggleAllSections}
   385→                className="text-xs text-slate-400 hover:text-white px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-1.5"
   386→              >
   387→                <svg className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${allOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   388→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.75 3.75v4.5m0-4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 9M3.75 20.25v-4.5m0 4.5h4.5m-4.5 0L9 15M20.25 3.75h-4.5m4.5 0v4.5m0-4.5L15 9m5.25 11.25h-4.5m4.5 0v-4.5m0 4.5L15 15" />
   389→                </svg>
   390→                {allOpen ? "Tout replier" : "Tout deplier"}
   391→              </button>
   392→            </div>
   393→            <nav className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-1">
   394→              {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => (
   395→                <button
   396→                  key={section.id}
   397→                  onClick={() => scrollToSection(section.id)}
   398→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left hover:bg-slate-700/40 transition-all duration-150 group"
   399→                >
   400→                  <span className={`w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`}>
   401→                    {idx + 1}
   402→                  </span>
   403→                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-400 group-hover:text-white transition-colors truncate">
   404→                    {section.titre}
   405→                  </span>
   406→                  <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-600 group-hover:text-slate-400 ml-auto shrink-0 transition-colors" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   407→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
   408→                  </svg>
   409→                </button>
   410→              ))}
   411→            </nav>
   412→          </div>
   413→        )}
   414→
   415→        {/* Sections en accordeon */}
   416→        <div className="space-y-3">
   417→          {sortedSections.map((section, idx) => {
   418→            const isOpen = openSections.has(section.id);
   419→            return (
   420→              <div
   421→                key={section.id}
   422→                ref={(el) => { sectionRefs.current[section.id] = el; }}
   423→                className={`rounded-xl border transition-all duration-200 ${
   424→                  isOpen
   425→                    ? `${style.border} bg-slate-800/60`
   426→                    : "border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-800/30 hover:border-slate-600/50"
   427→                }`}
   428→              >
   429→                <button
   430→                  onClick={() => toggleSection(section.id)}
   431→                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 text-left p-4"
   432→                >
   433→                  <span className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold shrink-0 transition-colors duration-200 ${
   434→                    isOpen
   435→                      ? `${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`
   436→                      : "bg-slate-700/50 text-slate-400 border border-slate-600/30"
   437→                  }`}>
   438→                    {idx + 1}
   439→                  </span>
   440→                  <h3 className={`font-medium flex-1 transition-colors duration-200 ${isOpen ? "text-white" : "text-slate-300"}`}>
   441→                    {section.titre}
   442→                  </h3>
   443→                  <svg
   444→                    className={`w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 transition-transform duration-300 shrink-0 ${isOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
   445→                    fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor"
   446→                  >
   447→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m19.5 8.25-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5" />
   448→                  </svg>
   449→                </button>
   450→                <div
   451→                  className={`overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${
   452→                    isOpen ? "max-h-[5000px] opacity-100" : "max-h-0 opacity-0"
   453→                  }`}
   454→                >
   455→                  <div className="px-4 pb-4 pt-1 ml-10 border-t border-slate-700/30">
   456→                    <FormattedContent text={section.contenu} />
   457→                  </div>
   458→                </div>
   459→              </div>
   460→            );
   461→          })}
   462→        </div>
   463→
   464→        {/* Liens vers flashcards / quiz */}
   465→        {nextContent && (nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 || nextContent.quizzes.length > 0) && (
   466→          <div className="card border-violet-500/20 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-900/10 to-slate-800/40">
   467→            <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-white mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
   468→              <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   469→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3" />
   470→              </svg>
   471→              Continuer a reviser
   472→            </h3>
   473→            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   474→              {nextContent.flashcards.length > 0 && (
   475→                <a
   476→                  href="/flashcards"
   477→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/20 hover:bg-violet-600/20 hover:border-violet-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   478→                >
   479→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400">
   480→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   481→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   482→                    </svg>
   483→                  </div>
   484→                  <div>
   485→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-violet-300">Flashcards sur ce sujet</p>
   486→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.flashcards.length} disponibles</p>
   487→                  </div>
   488→                </a>
   489→              )}
   490→              {nextContent.quizzes.length > 0 && (
   491→                <a
   492→                  href="/quiz"
   493→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-amber-600/10 border border-amber-500/20 hover:bg-amber-600/20 hover:border-amber-500/40 transition-all duration-200"
   494→                >
   495→                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400">
   496→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   497→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   498→                    </svg>
   499→                  </div>
   500→                  <div>
   501→                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-amber-300">Quiz sur ce sujet</p>
   502→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{nextContent.quizzes.length} disponibles</p>
   503→                  </div>
   504→                </a>
   505→              )}
   506→            </div>
   507→          </div>
   508→        )}
   509→      </div>
   510→    );
   511→  }
   512→
   513→  const filteredFiches = fiches.filter(f =>
   514→    !search.trim() || f.titre.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || (f.resume || "").toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
   515→  );
   516→
   517→  // Group fiches by matiere
   518→  const groupedFiches: { matiereName: string; matiereId: number | null; fiches: FicheListItem[] }[] = [];
   519→  const grouped = new Map<number | null, FicheListItem[]>();
   520→  for (const f of filteredFiches) {
   521→    const key = f.matiere_id;
   522→    if (!grouped.has(key)) grouped.set(key, []);
   523→    grouped.get(key)!.push(f);
   524→  }
   525→  // Sort groups: named matieres first (alphabetically), then null
   526→  const sortedKeys = Array.from(grouped.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
   527→    if (a === null) return 1;
   528→    if (b === null) return -1;
   529→    return getMatiereName(a).localeCompare(getMatiereName(b));
   530→  });
   531→  for (const key of sortedKeys) {
   532→    groupedFiches.push({
   533→      matiereName: key !== null ? getMatiereName(key) : "Autres",
   534→      matiereId: key,
   535→      fiches: grouped.get(key)!,
   536→    });
   537→  }
   538→
   539→  // List view
   540→  return (
   541→    <div className="space-y-6">
   542→      {/* Header */}
   543→      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-end justify-between gap-4">
   544→        <div>
   545→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-3">
   546→            <div className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/20">
   547→              <svg className="w-7 h-7 text-blue-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   548→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   549→              </svg>
   550→            </div>
   551→            Fiches de revision
   552→          </h1>
   553→          <p className="mt-2 text-slate-400">
   554→            {fiches.length > 0 ? `${fiches.length} fiche${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} disponible${fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : "Fiches structurees pour reviser efficacement"}
   555→          </p>
   556→        </div>
   557→        <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
   558→          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   559→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.813 15.904 9 18.75l-.813-2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09-3.09L2.25 12l2.846-.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09-3.09L9 5.25l.813 2.846a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 3.09 3.09L15.75 12l-2.846.813a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-3.09 3.09ZM18.259 8.715 18 9.75l-.259-1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455-2.456L14.25 6l1.036-.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455-2.456L18 2.25l.259 1.035a3.375 3.375 0 0 0 2.455 2.456L21.75 6l-1.036.259a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-2.455 2.456Z" />
   560→          </svg>
   561→          Generer une fiche IA
   562→        </button>
   563→      </div>
   564→
   565→      {/* Filtres + recherche */}
   566→      {fiches.length > 0 && (
   567→        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
   568→          <div className="relative flex-1">
   569→            <svg className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-slate-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   570→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m21 21-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 1 0 5.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0 0 10.607 10.607Z" />
   571→            </svg>
   572→            <input
   573→              type="text"
   574→              placeholder="Rechercher une fiche..."
   575→              value={search}
   576→              onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
   577→              className="input-field w-full pl-9 py-2.5"
   578→            />
   579→          </div>
   580→          {matieres.length > 0 && (
   581→            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   582→              <button
   583→                onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   584→                className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 ${
   585→                  selectedMatiere === null
   586→                    ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30 shadow-sm shadow-blue-500/10"
   587→                    : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/40"
   588→                }`}
   589→              >
   590→                Toutes
   591→              </button>
   592→              {matieres.map((m) => {
   593→                const mStyle = getMatiereStyle(m.nom);
   594→                const isActive = selectedMatiere === m.id;
   595→                return (
   596→                  <button
   597→                    key={m.id}
   598→                    onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(m.id)}
   599→                    className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 flex items-center gap-1.5 ${
   600→                      isActive
   601→                        ? `${mStyle.bg} ${mStyle.text} border ${mStyle.border}`
   602→                        : "text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 bg-slate-800/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/40"
   603→                    }`}
   604→                  >
   605→                    <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   606→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={mStyle.icon} />
   607→                    </svg>
   608→                    {m.nom}
   609→                  </button>
   610→                );
   611→              })}
   612→            </div>
   613→          )}
   614→        </div>
   615→      )}
   616→
   617→      {/* Fiches */}
   618→      {fiches.length === 0 ? (
   619→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   620→          <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-5 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500/10 to-violet-500/10 border border-blue-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   621→            <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-blue-500/40" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   622→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   623→            </svg>
   624→          </div>
   625→          <p className="text-slate-300 text-lg font-medium mb-2">Aucune fiche de revision</p>
   626→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-6">Generez votre premiere fiche a partir d&apos;un document</p>
   627→          <button onClick={openGenModal} className="btn-primary">Generer une fiche IA</button>
   628→        </div>
   629→      ) : filteredFiches.length === 0 ? (
   630→        <div className="text-center py-12">
   631→          <svg className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 text-slate-600" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   632→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m21 21-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 1 0 5.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0 0 10.607 10.607Z" />
   633→          </svg>
   634→          <p className="text-slate-400">Aucune fiche ne correspond a votre recherche.</p>
   635→        </div>
   636→      ) : (
   637→        <div className="space-y-8">
   638→          {groupedFiches.map((group) => {
   639→            const style = getMatiereStyle(group.matiereName);
   640→            return (
   641→              <div key={group.matiereName}>
   642→                {/* Group header */}
   643→                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   644→                  <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${style.bg} border ${style.border}`}>
   645→                    <svg className={`w-4.5 h-4.5 ${style.text}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor" style={{ width: 18, height: 18 }}>
   646→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d={style.icon} />
   647→                    </svg>
   648→                  </div>
   649→                  <div>
   650→                    <h2 className={`text-lg font-semibold ${style.text}`}>{group.matiereName}</h2>
   651→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{group.fiches.length} fiche{group.fiches.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}</p>
   652→                  </div>
   653→                  <div className={`flex-1 h-px ${style.border} border-t ml-2`} />
   654→                </div>
   655→
   656→                {/* Cards grid */}
   657→                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   658→                  {group.fiches.map((fiche) => (
   659→                    <div
   660→                      key={fiche.id}
   661→                      onClick={() => openFiche(fiche.id)}
   662→                      className={`group cursor-pointer rounded-xl border border-slate-700/40 bg-slate-800/30 p-4
   663→                        hover:border-opacity-100 hover:${style.border} hover:bg-slate-800/60
   664→                        transition-all duration-200 flex flex-col`}
   665→                    >
   666→                      <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2 gap-2">
   667→                        <h3 className={`font-semibold text-sm text-slate-200 group-hover:${style.text} transition-colors line-clamp-2 flex-1`}>
   668→                          {fiche.titre}
   669→                        </h3>
   670→                        <svg className={`w-4 h-4 text-slate-600 group-hover:${style.text} flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 transition-all duration-200 group-hover:translate-x-0.5`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   671→                          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m8.25 4.5 7.5 7.5-7.5 7.5" />
   672→                        </svg>
   673→                      </div>
   674→                      {fiche.resume && (
   675→                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-3 line-clamp-2 flex-1 leading-relaxed">{fiche.resume}</p>
   676→                      )}
   677→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/30 mt-auto">
   678→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-medium ${style.bg} ${style.text} border ${style.border}`}>

                                                            ## 🤖 assistant (15:34:20)

                                                            Voici mon analyse complète :

## Ce qui a été fait (commit `75a6d39` - "Refine the study dashboard experience")

**Refonte complète du dashboard et du shell UI :**

1. **`layout.tsx`** - Nouveau shell global : fond radial gradient teal/orange, grille subtile, sidebar sticky + main scrollable, fonts Cormorant Garamond (headings) + Public Sans (body)

2. **`sidebar.tsx`** (453 lignes, réécriture) - Sidebar glassmorphism avec :
   - Navigation groupée (Tableau de bord / Apprentissage / Outils)
   - Horloge live, badge revision count sur Flashcards
   - Barres de progression flashcards/quiz/fiches
   - Cadence du jour dynamique

3. **`DashboardHome.tsx`** (543 lignes, nouveau) - Dashboard extrait en composant propre :
   - Hero "Cockpit de révision" avec priorité du jour
   - 6 metric cards animées (AnimatedNumber)
   - File prioritaire avec révisions
   - Cadence journalière (Consolider/Tester/Reformuler)
   - 6 quick actions cards

4. **`page.tsx`** (dashboard) - Simplifié : fetch data + passe les props à `DashboardHome`

5. **`AppIcons.tsx`** (105 lignes, nouveau) - Icônes SVG centralisées

6. **`globals.css`** - Design system refondu : `.card`, `.btn-primary/secondary/ghost`, `.input-field`, badges, `.card-glass`, `.flip-card`, `.glow-*`, scrollbar custom

## Ce qui N'a PAS été touché (ancien style)

Les pages métier **flashcards**, **fiches**, **quiz**, **vocal**, **mindmap**, **matieres** gardent l'ancien style :
- Classes inline (`bg-slate-800`, `rounded-xl`, `border-slate-700`) au lieu du design system (`.card`, `.btn-primary`, `.badge-*`, `rounded-[1.75rem]`)
- Pas de `font-heading` sur les titres
- Palette violet/blue au lieu du teal/orange du nouveau dashboard
- Cards avec `rounded-xl` au lieu de `rounded-[1.75rem]`
- Filtres avec style ad-hoc au lieu des composants réutilisables

### Incohérences visuelles flagrantes

| Élément | Dashboard (nouveau) | Flashcards/Fiches (ancien) |
|---|---|---|
| Border radius | `rounded-[1.75rem]` / `rounded-[2rem]` | `rounded-xl` (0.75rem) |
| Accent | teal/orange | violet/blue |
| Titres | `font-heading` (Cormorant) | `font-bold` (Public Sans) |
| Boutons | `.btn-primary` (orange rounded-full) | Inline `bg-violet-600/20` |
| Cards | `.card` class | Inline `border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-800/70` |

### Ce qu'il manque pour une refonte cohérente

1. **Flashcards page** (~615 lignes) - Migrer vers le design system (`.card`, `.btn-*`, badges, font-heading, palette teal/orange)
2. **Fiches page** (~777 lignes) - Idem
3. **FlashCard component** - Utilise déjà `.card` et `.badge-blue` mais les ratings buttons sont inline
4. **Quiz, Vocal, MindMap, Matieres pages** - Non inspectées ici mais probablement ancien style aussi
5. **Extraction de composants réutilisables** - FilterBar, MetricCard, EmptyState (pattern dupliqué partout)

Souhaites-tu que je lance la refonte des pages flashcards et fiches pour les aligner sur le nouveau design system ?
