                                                                                                                           1→import weaviate, { WeaviateClient } from "weaviate-client"
     2→
     3→export async function getWeaviateClient(): Promise<WeaviateClient> {
     4→    const url = process.env.WEAVIATE_URL || ""
     5→    const apiKey = process.env.WEAVIATE_API_KEY || ""
     6→    const localUrl = process.env.WEAVIATE_LOCAL_URL || ""
     7→
     8→    if (localUrl) {
     9→        return await weaviate.connectToLocal({
    10→            host: localUrl.split(":")[0],
    11→            port: parseInt(localUrl.split(":")[1])
    12→        })
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    return await weaviate.connectToWeaviateCloud(url, {
    16→        authCredentials: new weaviate.ApiKey(apiKey)
    17→    })
    18→}
    19→
                                                                                                                      ```

                                                                                                                                 1→"use server"
     2→
     3→import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"
     4→import { getAuthToken } from "@/lib/auth"
     5→import { SheetType } from "./types"
     6→
     7→export const fetchSheet = async (id: string): Promise<SheetType> => {
     8→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
     9→    const sheet = await prisma.sheet.findFirstOrThrow({
    10→        where: {
    11→            id,
    12→            organizationId,
    13→            createdById: userId
    14→        },
    15→        include: {
    16→            columns: true
    17→        }
    18→    })
    19→
    20→    return {
    21→        id: sheet.id,
    22→        name: sheet.name,
    23→        columns: sheet.columns,
    24→        cells: sheet.cells as { [key: string]: string }
    25→    }
    26→
    27→}
    28→
    29→export const updateSheetName = async (id: string, name: string) => {
    30→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    31→    await prisma.sheet.update({
    32→        where: {
    33→            id,
    34→            organizationId,
    35→            createdById: userId
    36→        },
    37→        data: { name }
    38→    })
    39→    return
    40→}
    41→
    42→export const upsertColumn = async (id: string, name: string, columnId?: string) => {
    43→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    44→
    45→    if (columnId) {
    46→        // Update existing column
    47→        const column = await prisma.column.update({
    48→            where: {
    49→                id: columnId,
    50→                sheetId: id,
    51→                organizationId
    52→            },
    53→            data: { name }
    54→        })
    55→        return column
    56→    } else {
    57→        // Create new column
    58→        const column = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    59→            // Find the last column's position
    60→            const lastColumn = await tx.column.findFirst({
    61→                where: { sheetId: id },
    62→                orderBy: { position: "desc" }
    63→            })
    64→
    65→            // Create the new column
    66→            const column = await tx.column.create({
    67→                data: {
    68→                    sheetId: id,
    69→                    organizationId,
    70→                    name,
    71→                    position: lastColumn ? lastColumn.position + 1 : 0
    72→                }
    73→            })
    74→            
    75→            return column
    76→        })
    77→        
    78→        return column
    79→    }
    80→}
    81→
    82→export const updateColumnPosition = async (id: string, columnId: string, newPosition: number) => {
    83→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    84→
    85→    await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    86→        // Get the current column
    87→        const currentColumn = await tx.column.findFirstOrThrow({
    88→            where: { 
    89→                id: columnId,
    90→                sheetId: id,
    91→                organizationId
    92→            }
    93→        })
    94→
    95→        // Get all other columns to reposition
    96→        const columns = await tx.column.findMany({
    97→            where: { 
    98→                sheetId: id,
    99→                organizationId,
   100→                NOT: { id: columnId }
   101→            },
   102→            orderBy: { position: 'asc' }
   103→        })
   104→
   105→        // Update positions
   106→        let pos = 0
   107→        for (const col of columns) {
   108→            if (pos === newPosition) pos++
   109→            if (col.position !== pos) {
   110→                await tx.column.update({
   111→                    where: { id: col.id },
   112→                    data: { position: pos }
   113→                })
   114→            }
   115→            pos++
   116→        }
   117→
   118→        // Update the moved column's position
   119→        await tx.column.update({
   120→            where: { id: columnId },
   121→            data: { position: newPosition }
   122→        })
   123→    })
   124→
   125→    return true
   126→}
   127→
   128→export const updateCell = async (id: string, columnId: string, rowIndex: number, value: string | null) => {
   129→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
   130→
   131→    const sheet = await prisma.sheet.findFirstOrThrow({
   132→        where: {
   133→            id,
   134→            organizationId,
   135→            createdById: userId
   136→        },
   137→        include: {
   138→            columns: true
   139→        }
   140→    })
   141→
   142→    const cellKey = `${columnId}-${rowIndex}`
   143→    const currentCells = sheet.cells as { [key: string]: string }
   144→    const updatedCells = { ...currentCells }
   145→
   146→    if (value === null || value === "") {
   147→        // Remove the cell if value is empty
   148→        delete updatedCells[cellKey]
   149→    } else {
   150→        // Update the cell with new value
   151→        updatedCells[cellKey] = value
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    await prisma.sheet.update({
   155→        where: { 
   156→            id,
   157→            organizationId,
   158→            createdById: userId
   159→        },
   160→        data: { 
   161→            cells: updatedCells
   162→        }
   163→    })
   164→
   165→    return {
   166→        id: sheet.id,
   167→        name: sheet.name,
   168→        columns: sheet.columns,
   169→        cells: updatedCells
   170→    }
   171→}
   172→
                                                                                                                            ```

                                                                                                                                     1→"use server"
     2→
     3→import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma"
     4→import { getAuthToken } from "@/lib/auth"
     5→import { cookies } from "next/headers"

     8→import { queryVectorDB } from "@/core/memory"
     9→import { generateAnswer } from "@/core/answer"
    10→import { v4 as uuidv4 } from "uuid"
    11→import { readYamlFile } from "@/core/yaml"
    12→import axios from "axios"
    13→
    14→export async function fetchSheets() {
    15→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    16→    return await prisma.sheet.findMany({
    17→        where: { organizationId, createdById: userId },
    18→        orderBy: {
    19→            createdAt: "desc"
    20→        }
    21→    })
    22→}
    23→
    24→export async function addSheet({ name }: { name: string; }) {
    25→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    26→    return await prisma.sheet.create({
    27→        data: {
    28→            name,
    29→            organizationId,
    30→            createdById: userId,
    31→        }
    32→    })
    33→}
    34→
    35→export async function checkAuth() {
    36→    const { organizationId, userId } = await getAuthToken()
    37→    if (organizationId && userId) {
    38→        return true
    39→    }
    40→    return false
    41→}
    42→
    43→
    44→export async function getCurrentOrganization() {
    45→    const { userId, organizationId } = await getAuthToken()
    46→
    47→    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
    48→        where: { id: userId },
    49→        include: {
    50→            members: {
    51→                include: {
    52→                    organization: true,
    53→                },
    54→            },
    55→        },
    56→    })
    57→
    58→    if (!user) {
    59→        throw new Error("User not found")
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    const currentOrganization = user.members.find(
    63→        (member) => member.organizationId === organizationId
    64→    )?.organization
    65→
    66→    if (!currentOrganization) {
    67→        throw new Error("Current organization not found")
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    const organizations = user.members.map((member) => member.organization)
    71→
    72→    return { user, currentOrganization, organizations }
    73→}
    74→
    75→
    76→export async function updateUserName(name: string) {
    77→    const { userId } = await getAuthToken()
    78→    await prisma.user.update({
    79→        where: { id: userId },
    80→        data: { name },
    81→    })
    82→}
    83→
    84→export async function updateOrganizationName(name: string) {
    85→    const { organizationId } = await getAuthToken()
    86→    await prisma.organization.update({
    87→        where: { id: organizationId },
    88→        data: { name },
    89→    })
    90→}
    91→
    92→export async function resetOrganizationApiKey() {
    93→    const { organizationId } = await getAuthToken()
    94→    const apiKey = uuidv4()
    95→    await prisma.organization.update({
    96→        where: { id: organizationId },
    97→        data: { apiKey: apiKey }
    98→    })
    99→    return apiKey
   100→}
   101→
   102→export async function addOrganization(name: string) {
   103→    const { userId } = await getAuthToken()
   104→    const newOrganization = await prisma.organization.create({
   105→        data: { name },
   106→    })
   107→    await prisma.member.create({
   108→        data: {
   109→            userId,
   110→            organizationId: newOrganization.id,
   111→            role: "ADMIN",
   112→        },
   113→    })
   114→    return newOrganization
   115→}
   116→
   117→export async function switchOrganization(organizationId: string) {
   118→    const { userId } = await getAuthToken()
   119→
   120→    // Check if the user is a member of the organization
   121→    const member = await prisma.member.findFirst({
   122→        where: {
   123→            userId,
   124→            organizationId,
   125→        },
   126→    })
   127→
   128→    if (!member) {
   129→        throw new Error("User is not a member of this organization")
   130→    }
   131→
   132→    // Generate new JWT token with the new organizationId
   133→    const token = sign({ userId, organizationId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET || "", { expiresIn: "1d" })
   134→
   135→    // Set new cookie
   136→    let store = await cookies()
   137→
   138→    store.set("auth_token", token, {
   139→        httpOnly: true,
   140→        secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === "production",
   141→        sameSite: "strict",
   142→        maxAge: 86400, // 1 day
   143→        path: "/",
   144→    })
   145→}
   146→
                                                                                                                                ```

                                                                                                                                                 1→import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
     2→import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"
     3→
     4→export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
     5→  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
     6→}
     7→
     8→
     9→export function stripCodeBlockBackTicks(text: string) {
    10→  // Regular expression to match Markdown code blocks
    11→  const codeBlockRegex = /```[a-zA-Z]*\n([\s\S]*?)\n```/g;
    12→  // Replace the matched code blocks with their content
    13→  return text.replace(codeBlockRegex, (_, code) => code.trim());
    14→}
    15→
                                                                                                                                            ```

                                                                                                                                                     1→import { format } from "date-fns";
     2→
     3→
     4→export function getUniqueFileName(name: string) {
     5→    const pid = process.pid.toString();
     6→    const timestamp = format(new Date(), 'yyMMdd_HHmmss');
     7→    let filename = [pid, timestamp, name].join('_');
     8→    filename = filename.split(' ').join('_').toLowerCase();
     9→    return filename;
    10→}
                                                                                                                                                ```

                                                                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                                                                         1→import winston from "winston"
     2→import { Logtail } from "@logtail/node"
     3→import { LogtailTransport } from "@logtail/winston"
     4→
     5→
     6→export class Logger {
     7→    private static _instance: Logger | null = null
     8→    private _logger: winston.Logger
     9→
    10→    constructor() {
    11→
    12→        const transports = process.env.LOGTAIL_TOKEN && process.env.LOGTAIL_TOKEN !== "" ?
    13→            new LogtailTransport(new Logtail(process.env.LOGTAIL_TOKEN || "")) :
    14→            new winston.transports.Console({
    15→                format: winston.format.combine(
    16→                    winston.format.colorize(),
    17→                    winston.format.simple()
    18→                ),
    19→            })
    20→
    21→        // process .env is LOGTAIL_TOKEN then logtail else commandline
    22→        this._logger = winston.createLogger({
    23→            transports: [transports],
    24→        })
    25→    }
    26→
    27→    public static getInstance(): winston.Logger {
    28→        if (!Logger._instance) {
    29→            Logger._instance = new Logger()
    30→        }
    31→        return Logger._instance._logger
    32→    }
    33→}
    34→
    35→export const logger = Logger.getInstance()
    36→
                                                                                                                                                    ```

                                                                                                                                                                      100 /home/julien/Documents/IACA/rowfill/prisma/schema.prisma

model Member {
  organizationId String
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  userId         String
  user           User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  role           Role

  @@id([userId, organizationId])
}

// ONLY for EE Usage
model Billing {
  organizationId String       @id @unique
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  credits        Int          @default(1000) // 1 credit = 1 Column Task or 10 Credits for 1 row extraction
  thirdPartyId   String?
  subscriptionId String?
  plan           Plan         @default(FREE)
  expiresAt      DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model Sheet {
  id                String       @id @default(uuid())
  name              String
  createdById       String?
  createdBy         User?        @relation(fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  organizationId    String
  organization      Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  singleSource      Boolean      @default(false)
  extractInProgress Boolean      @default(false)
  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt
  columns           Column[]
  cells             Json         @default("{}")  // row_column: value
}

model Column {
  id             String       @id @default(uuid())
  sheetId        String
  sheet          Sheet        @relation(fields: [sheetId], references: [id])
  name           String
  organizationId String
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  position       Int
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
}
                                                                                                                                                                      ```

                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ## 🤖 assistant (10:29:17)

Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create my final analysis report:

## Rowfill Codebase Exploration Report

I've completed a very thorough exploration of the rowfill document extraction codebase. Here are my findings:

---

## 1. DOCUMENT EXTRACTION ARCHITECTURE

### **Main Extraction Pipeline** (`src/core/indexer.ts`)
Rowfill uses a multi-format document ingestion system with the following flow:

```
Document Upload → Format Detection → Extraction → Vectorization → Metadata Storage
```

**Supported Document Types:**
- **PDF files** - Converted to images, then OCR'd to markdown
- **Images** (JPEG, PNG) - Direct conversion to markdown
- **Audio (MP3)** - Transcribed to text
- **Video (MP4)** - Placeholder (TODO)
- **DOCX** - Placeholder (TODO)

---

## 2. EXTRACTION TOOLS & LIBRARIES

| Tool/Library | Purpose | Implementation |
|-------------|---------|-----------------|
| **node-poppler** | PDF to image conversion | `src/lib/pdf.ts` - `convertPdfToImages()` uses `pdfToCairo` and `pdfInfo` |
| **OpenAI Vision (gpt-4o-mini)** | Image to markdown conversion | `src/core/imageToMarkdown.ts` - Converts images, charts, and diagrams to structured markdown |
| **OpenAI Whisper** | Audio transcription | `src/core/transcribe.ts` - Transcribes MP3 to text |
| **AWS S3** | File storage | `src/lib/file.ts` - Presigned URLs for upload/download, unique filename generation |
| **Weaviate** | Vector database | `src/lib/weaviate.ts` - Multi-tenant vector DB with OpenAI embeddings |
| **OpenAI Embeddings** | Text vectorization | `text-embedding-3-small` for semantic search |
| **Prisma ORM** | Database abstraction | PostgreSQL with structured schema |
| **BullMQ** | Job queue | Redis-backed async task processing |

---

## 3. CONTENT EXTRACTION & STRUCTURING

### **PDF Extraction Pipeline** (lines 22-42 in indexer.ts):
```typescript
1. convertPdfToImages() → page-by-page PNG conversion via Poppler
2. For each page image:
   - imageToMarkdown() → GPT-4o-mini vision API extracts:
     - Text content
     - Tables (converted to markdown tables)
     - Charts (converted to ASCII descriptions)
     - Diagrams (visual descriptions)
3. Result: Structured markdown with metadata
```

### **Content Storage Structure**:
- **referenceText** - Extracted markdown content
- **referenceImageFileName** - Original/processed image path
- **source metadata** - Document ID, organization ID
- **Vector embeddings** - Multi-dimensional semantic representation

### **Chunk Strategy**:
- **Page-level granularity** for PDFs (one chunk per page)
- **Full document** for images, audio
- Stored as `IndexedSource` records linking back to `Source`

---

## 4. MAIN ENTRY POINTS FOR DOCUMENT PROCESSING

### **Primary Entry Point: `indexSource(sourceId: string)`** 
Located in `src/core/indexer.ts:10`

**Call Chain:**
```
1. getPresignedUrlForGet() → Retrieve document from S3
2. Format detection (fileType MIME type)
3. Format-specific extraction:
   - PDF: convertPdfToImages() → page loop → imageToMarkdown()
   - Image: imageToMarkdown() directly
   - Audio: transcribeAudio()
4. indexTextToVectorDB() → Create embeddings
5. prisma.indexedSource.create() → Store metadata + chunks
6. prisma.source.update() → Mark as indexed
7. sendEmail() → Notify user on completion
```

### **Extraction Task Trigger**:
- **Async Queue** (`BullMQ` via `src/lib/queue.ts`)
- **Cron Scheduler** (`src/scheduled.ts`) - 5-minute intervals for cleanup
- **Direct Action** - Via server actions in `src/app/console/actions.ts`

### **Table Extraction** (`src/core/extractTable.ts`):
- **indexSource** → generates markdown from images
- **extractTableToSheet()** - Uses GPT-4o-mini with Zod schema validation
- **Dynamic schema mapping** - Maps extracted columns to user-defined sheet columns
- **Credit system** - 10 credits per row extracted (EE feature)

---

## 5. KEY SOURCE FILES & ROLES

### **CORE EXTRACTION MODULES** (`src/core/`)

| File | Lines | Role |
|------|-------|------|
| **indexer.ts** | 138 | Main orchestrator: format detection, extraction routing, vectorization |
| **imageToMarkdown.ts** | 41 | Vision API wrapper: converts images/PDFs to markdown via GPT-4o-mini |
| **transcribe.ts** | 19 | Audio transcription: OpenAI Whisper integration |
| **memory.ts** | 110 | Vector DB operations: Weaviate client, tenant mgmt, embeddings |
| **extractTable.ts** | 170 | Structured extraction: uses Zod + GPT for table-to-sheet mapping |
| **mapper.ts** | 6 | JSONata-based data transformation (schema mapping) |
| **answer.ts** | 54 | Query augmentation: generates answers using extracted context |
| **integrations.ts** | 77 | OAuth token mgmt for external tools (Google Drive, etc) |
| **marker.ts** | 4 | Text annotation placeholder (stub) |
| **yaml.ts** | 8 | YAML config reader for tool definitions |

### **LIBRARY MODULES** (`src/lib/`)

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| **pdf.ts** | Poppler wrapper: page-by-page PDF rasterization |
| **file.ts** | S3 presigned URLs for upload/download |
| **weaviate.ts** | Weaviate vector DB client initialization |
| **queue.ts** | BullMQ singleton for async job processing |
| **auth.ts** | JWT authentication middleware |
| **logger.ts** | Winston + Logtail logging |
| **filename.ts** | Unique filename generation (PID + timestamp) |

### **DATABASE SCHEMA** (`prisma/schema.prisma`)

**Core Models:**
- `User` - Authentication
- `Organization` - Multi-tenancy
- `Member` - Organization membership
- `Sheet` - Data extraction target
- `Column` - Sheet column definitions
- `Billing` - EE credit tracking

**Referenced (Not Yet Implemented):**
- `Source` - Document metadata (fileType, fileName, uploadedById)
- `IndexedSource` - Extracted chunks (referenceText, referenceImageFileName)
- `SheetColumn` - Column instruction/metadata
- `ExtractedSheetRow` - Row data from extraction
- `Integration` - OAuth tool configurations

---

## 6. EXTRACTION DATA FLOW DIAGRAM

```
User Upload (UI)
    ↓
S3 Storage (presigned URL)
    ↓
Queue Task (BullMQ/Redis)
    ↓
indexSource(sourceId)
    ├─→ PDF Branch:
    │   ├─ convertPdfToImages() [Poppler]
    │   ├─ For each page:
    │   │   ├─ imageToMarkdown() [GPT-4o-mini]
    │   │   ├─ indexTextToVectorDB() [OpenAI Embeddings]
    │   │   └─ prisma.indexedSource.create()
    │   └─ prisma.source.update(isIndexed=true)
    │
    ├─→ Image Branch:
    │   ├─ imageToMarkdown() [GPT-4o-mini]
    │   ├─ indexTextToVectorDB() [OpenAI Embeddings]
    │   └─ prisma.indexedSource.create()
    │
    ├─→ Audio Branch:
    │   ├─ transcribeAudio() [Whisper]
    │   ├─ indexTextToVectorDB() [OpenAI Embeddings]
    │   └─ prisma.indexedSource.create()
    │
    └─→ Email Notification

Vector DB (Weaviate)
    ├─ Collections: "Documents"
    ├─ Tenants: organizationId
    ├─ Properties: source (document ID)
    └─ Vectors: text-embedding-3-small
```

---

## 7. KEY EXTRACTION CHARACTERISTICS

### **Vision-Based (Not Text-Extraction Based)**
- Rowfill prioritizes **vision-based extraction** via GPT-4o-mini
- PDFs are converted to images → vision API (not PDF text layer)
- **Advantage**: Works with scanned PDFs, images, handwritten content
- **Cost**: Higher cost per page (vision API usage)

### **Semantic Vectorization**
- All extracted content indexed in Weaviate vector DB
- **Multi-tenant architecture** (organization-level isolation)
- **Query capability**: Semantic search via `queryVectorDB(text, organizationId)`

### **Schema-Driven Extraction**
- User defines target columns with instructions
- GPT-4o-mini extracts data matching user schema
- **Zod validation** ensures structured output

### **Async & Queueable**
- BullMQ queue for background processing
- Cron scheduler for periodic cleanup (5 min intervals)
- Email notifications on completion

---

## 8. DEPENDENCIES SUMMARY

```json
{
  "extraction": {
    "pdf": "node-poppler (v7.2.2)",
    "vision": "openai (v4.78.0) - gpt-4o-mini",
    "audio": "openai (v4.78.0) - whisper-1",
    "vectorization": "openai (v4.78.0) - text-embedding-3-small"
  },
  "infrastructure": {
    "vector_db": "weaviate-client (v3.3.1)",
    "queue": "bullmq (v5.34.6)",
    "storage": "@aws-sdk/client-s3 (v3.723.0)",
    "database": "@prisma/client (v6.16.2)",
    "redis": "ioredis (v5.4.2)"
  },
  "transforms": {
    "mapping": "jsonata (v2.0.6)",
    "schema_validation": "jsonschema (v1.5.0)",
    "zod": "zod (v3.24.1)"
  }
}
```

     6→export async function getPresignedUrlForUpload(filename: string) {
     7→

     9→        credentials: {

    16→    })

    18→    filename = getUniqueFileName(filename)
    19→

    21→        Bucket: process.env.AWS_STORAGE_BUCKET_NAME,
    22→        Key: filename,
    23→        ContentType: "application/octet-stream"
    24→    })
    25→
    26→    const url = await getSignedUrl(s3, command, { expiresIn: 3600 })
    27→
    28→    return { filename: filename, url: url }
    29→
    30→}
    31→
    32→export async function getPresignedUrlForGet(filename: string) {
    33→

    55→
    56→}

                 1→import asyncio
     2→import base64
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→
     6→from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     7→
     8→from app.security import verify_ws_token
     9→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
    10→
    11→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    12→router = APIRouter()
    13→
    14→
    15→@router.websocket("/ws")
    16→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None):
    17→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    18→
    19→    Protocol:
    20→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    21→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    22→    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    23→    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors
    24→
    25→    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    26→    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    27→    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    28→    """
    29→    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    30→    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
    31→        await websocket.close(code=1008)
    32→        return
    33→
    34→    await websocket.accept()
    35→    historique: list[dict] = []
    36→
    37→    async def heartbeat():
    38→        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
    39→        try:
    40→            while True:
    41→                await asyncio.sleep(30)
    42→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
    43→        except Exception:
    44→            pass
    45→
    46→    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())
    47→
    48→    try:
    49→        while True:
    50→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
    51→            try:
    52→                data = json.loads(raw)
    53→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
    54→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
    55→                continue
    56→
    57→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
    58→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
    59→                try:
    60→                    audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
    61→                    user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
    62→                    await websocket.send_json({
    63→                        "type": "transcription",
    64→                        "message": user_message,
    65→                    })
    66→                except RuntimeError as e:
    67→                    # Whisper not installed or model error — recoverable, keep session alive
    68→                    logger.warning(f"Transcription indisponible: {e}")
    69→                    await websocket.send_json({
    70→                        "type": "error",
    71→                        "message": str(e),
    72→                        "recoverable": True,
    73→                    })
    74→                    continue
    75→                except Exception as e:
    76→                    logger.error(f"Erreur transcription Whisper: {e}", exc_info=True)
    77→                    await websocket.send_json({
    78→                        "type": "error",
    79→                        "message": f"Erreur transcription: {str(e)}",
    80→                        "recoverable": True,
    81→                    })
    82→                    continue
    83→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
    84→                user_message = data.get("message", "")
    85→                if not user_message:
    86→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Message vide"})
    87→                    continue
    88→            elif data.get("type") == "pong":
    89→                continue
    90→            else:
    91→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
    92→                continue
    93→
    94→            # Get AI response from Ollama
    95→            try:
    96→                response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique)
    97→            except Exception as e:
    98→                logger.error(f"Erreur Ollama chat: {e}", exc_info=True)
    99→                try:
   100→                    await websocket.send_json({
   101→                        "type": "error",
   102→                        "message": f"Erreur LLM: {str(e)}",
   103→                        "recoverable": True,
   104→                    })
   105→                except Exception:
   106→                    pass
   107→                continue
   108→
   109→            # Update history
   110→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
   111→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
   112→            if len(historique) > 20:
   113→                historique = historique[-20:]
   114→
   115→            # Send text response
   116→            await websocket.send_json({
   117→                "type": "text",
   118→                "message": response_text,
   119→            })
   120→
   121→            # Generate and send audio response
   122→            try:
   123→                tts_text = response_text[:200]
   124→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
   125→                await websocket.send_json({
   126→                    "type": "audio",
   127→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
   128→                })
   129→            except Exception as e:
   130→                logger.warning(f"TTS non disponible: {e}")
   131→
   132→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
   133→        logger.info("Client WebSocket deconnecte")
   134→    except Exception as e:
   135→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   136→    finally:
   137→        heartbeat_task.cancel()
   138→
   139→
   140→@router.get("/status")
   141→async def vocal_status():
   142→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
   143→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
   144→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
   145→    whisper_ok = whisper_service.check_disponible()
   146→    model = None
   147→    if ollama_ok:
   148→        try:
   149→            model = await ollama_service._get_best_model()
   150→        except Exception:
   151→            pass
   152→    return {
   153→        "ollama": ollama_ok,
   154→        "piper": piper_ok,
   155→        "whisper": whisper_ok,
   156→        "model": model,
   157→    }
   158→
            ```

    43→      <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-slate-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: "150ms" }} />

    46→  );

    48→
    49→function SoundWave() {
    50→  return (
    51→    <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 h-5">

    53→        <div
    54→          key={i}
    55→          className="w-1 bg-red-400 rounded-full animate-pulse"
    56→          style={{

    61→        />

    63→    </div>

    66→
    67→function MicIcon({ className }: { className?: string }) {

    75→}
    76→
    77→function SendIcon() {
    78→  return (

    86→function formatTime(date: Date) {
    87→  return date.toLocaleTimeString("fr-FR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
    88→}
    89→
    90→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    91→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
    92→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
    93→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    94→  const [isReconnecting, setIsReconnecting] = useState(false);
    95→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
    96→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    97→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
    98→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
    99→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
   100→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   101→  const retriesRef = useRef(0);
   102→  const maxRetries = 5;
   103→
   104→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
   105→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
   106→  };
   107→
   108→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
   109→
   110→  const mountedRef = useRef(true);
   111→  const reconnectTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   112→
   113→  const addMessage = useCallback((role: Message["role"], content: string) => {
   114→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role, content, timestamp: new Date() }]);
   115→  }, []);
   116→
   117→  const connect = useCallback(() => {
   118→    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   119→    if (wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || wsRef.current?.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) return;
   120→
   121→    const wsProtocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss" : "ws";
   122→    const wsUrl = withAuthQuery(`${wsProtocol}://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
   123→    const ws = new WebSocket(wsUrl);
   124→
   125→    ws.onopen = () => {
   126→      if (!mountedRef.current) { ws.close(); return; }
   127→      setIsConnected(true);
   128→      setIsReconnecting(false);
   129→      retriesRef.current = 0;
   130→    };
   131→
   132→    ws.onclose = (event) => {
   133→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   134→      setIsConnected(false);
   135→      setIsLoading(false);
   136→      if (event.code !== 1000 && retriesRef.current < maxRetries) {
   137→        retriesRef.current++;
   138→        setIsReconnecting(true);
   139→        reconnectTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   140→          if (mountedRef.current) connect();
   141→        }, 2000);
   142→      } else if (retriesRef.current >= maxRetries) {
   143→        setIsReconnecting(false);
   144→        addMessage("system", "Connexion perdue. Rechargez la page pour reessayer.");
   145→      }
   146→    };
   147→
   148→    ws.onerror = () => {};
   149→
   150→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   151→      if (!mountedRef.current) return;
   152→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   153→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
   154→        addMessage("user", data.message);
   155→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
   156→        addMessage("assistant", data.message);
   157→        setIsLoading(false);
   158→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
   159→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
   160→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
   161→      } else if (data.type === "error") {
   162→        addMessage("system", data.message);
   163→        setIsLoading(false);
   164→      } else if (data.type === "ping") {
   165→        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: "pong" }));
   166→      }
   167→    };
   168→
   169→    wsRef.current = ws;
   170→  }, [addMessage]);
   171→
   172→  useEffect(() => {
   173→    mountedRef.current = true;
   174→    connect();
   175→    return () => {
   176→      mountedRef.current = false;
   177→      if (reconnectTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(reconnectTimerRef.current);
   178→      if (wsRef.current) {
   179→        wsRef.current.close(1000);
   180→        wsRef.current = null;
   181→      }
   182→    };
   183→  }, [connect]);
   184→
   185→  const startRecording = async () => {
   186→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
   187→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
   188→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
   189→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
   190→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
   191→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
   192→      const reader = new FileReader();
   193→      reader.onloadend = () => {
   194→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
   195→        wsRef.current?.send(
   196→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
   197→        );
   198→        setIsLoading(true);
   199→      };
   200→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
   201→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
   202→    };
   203→    recorder.start();
   204→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
   205→    setIsRecording(true);
   206→  };
   207→
   208→  const stopRecording = () => {
   209→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
   210→    setIsRecording(false);
   211→  };
   212→
   213→  const sendText = () => {
   214→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
   215→    addMessage("user", inputText);
   216→    wsRef.current.send(
   217→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
   218→    );
   219→    setInputText("");
   220→    setIsLoading(true);
   221→  };
   222→
   223→  return (
   224→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 shadow-xl">
   225→      {/* Header */}
   226→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 border-b border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/50 rounded-t-xl">
   227→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   228→          <ProfessorAvatar />
   229→          <div>
   230→            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-white leading-tight">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   231→            <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 flex items-center gap-1.5">
   232→              <span
   233→                className={`inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${
   234→                  isConnected ? "bg-green-500" : isReconnecting ? "bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse" : "bg-red-500"
   235→                }`}
   236→              />
   237→              {isConnected ? "Connecte" : isReconnecting ? "Reconnexion..." : "Deconnecte"}
   238→            </span>
   239→          </div>
   240→        </div>
   241→        {onClose && (
   242→          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors p-1 rounded hover:bg-slate-700">
   243→            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
   244→              <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" />
   245→            </svg>
   246→          </button>
   247→        )}
   248→      </div>
   249→
   250→      {/* Messages */}
   251→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
   252→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   253→          <div className="text-center mt-12 space-y-3">
   254→            <div className="mx-auto w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-violet-600/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   255→              <ProfessorAvatar />
   256→            </div>
   257→            <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
   258→              Posez une question au professeur...
   259→            </p>
   260→          </div>
   261→        )}
   262→        {messages.map((msg, i) => {
   263→          if (msg.role === "system") {
   264→            return (
   265→              <div key={i} className="flex justify-center">
   266→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-red-900/30 text-red-300 border border-red-800/40 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm">
   267→                  <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" className="shrink-0">
   268→                    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" />
   269→                    <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="13" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" />
   270→                    <circle cx="12" cy="16.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" />
   271→                  </svg>
   272→                  {msg.content}
   273→                </div>
   274→              </div>
   275→            );
   276→          }
   277→
   278→          const isUser = msg.role === "user";
   279→          return (
   280→            <div key={i} className={`flex items-end gap-2 ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
   281→              {isUser ? <UserAvatar /> : <ProfessorAvatar />}
   282→              <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
   283→                <div
   284→                  className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-2.5 ${
   285→                    isUser
   286→                      ? "bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-br-md"
   287→                      : "bg-slate-700 text-slate-100 rounded-bl-md"
   288→                  }`}
   289→                >
   290→                  {msg.content}
   291→                </div>
   292→                <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 px-1">
   293→                  {formatTime(msg.timestamp)}
   294→                </span>
   295→              </div>
   296→            </div>
   297→          );
   298→        })}
   299→        {isLoading && (
   300→          <div className="flex items-end gap-2">
   301→            <ProfessorAvatar />
   302→            <div className="bg-slate-700 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-md px-4 py-2.5">
   303→              <ThinkingDots />
   304→            </div>
   305→          </div>
   306→        )}
   307→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   308→      </div>
   309→
   310→      {/* Recording indicator */}
   311→      {isRecording && (
   312→        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 bg-red-900/20 border-t border-red-800/30 text-red-300 text-sm">
   313→          <SoundWave />
   314→          <span>Enregistrement en cours...</span>
   315→          <SoundWave />
   316→        </div>
   317→      )}
   318→
   319→      {/* Input */}
   320→      <div className="p-3 border-t border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/30">
   321→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-800 rounded-xl border border-slate-600 focus-within:border-violet-500 transition-colors px-3">
   322→          <input
   323→            type="text"
   324→            value={inputText}
   325→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   326→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   327→            placeholder="Tapez votre question..."
   328→            className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white py-3 focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500"
   329→          />
   330→          <button
   331→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   332→            disabled={!isConnected}
   333→            className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors disabled:opacity-40 ${
   334→              isRecording
   335→                ? "bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 animate-pulse"
   336→                : "text-slate-400 hover:text-violet-400 hover:bg-slate-700"
   337→            }`}
   338→            title={isRecording ? "Arreter l'enregistrement" : "Enregistrer un message vocal"}
   339→          >
   340→            <MicIcon />
   341→          </button>
   342→          <button
   343→            onClick={sendText}
   344→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   345→            className="p-2 rounded-lg text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-400 hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-40 disabled:hover:text-slate-400 disabled:hover:bg-transparent"
   346→            title="Envoyer"
   347→          >
   348→            <SendIcon />
   349→          </button>
   350→        </div>
   351→      </div>
   352→    </div>
   353→  );
   354→}
   355→
                ```

   135→                }`}

   142→            Modele: {status.model}

   157→            Votre assistant pour les concours administratifs
   158→          </p>
   159→

   162→            {capabilities.map((cap) => (
   163→              <span
   164→                key={cap}
   165→                className="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/20"
   166→              >
   167→                {cap}
   168→              </span>
   169→            ))}
   170→          </div>
   171→
   172→          {/* CTA button */}
   173→          <button
   174→            onClick={() => setShowChat(true)}
   175→            disabled={!status?.ollama}
   176→            className="mt-10 inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-10 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl text-lg font-semibold hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-blue-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed shadow-lg shadow-violet-900/30 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
   177→          >
   178→            <PlayIcon />
   179→            Demarrer la session
   180→          </button>
   181→
   182→          {/* Model hint */}
   183→          <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-slate-500">
   184→            {status?.model || "qwen2:0.5b"} &middot; Reponse ~15-20s

                                                        ## 👤 user (06:09:51)

                                                        ✅ **Result:**
                                                        ```
                                                             1→import httpx
     2→from app.config import settings
     3→
     4→SYSTEM_PROMPT = """Tu es un professeur de droit public et de préparation aux concours administratifs français.
     5→Tu parles en français de manière claire et pédagogique.
     6→Tu réponds de manière concise mais complète.
     7→Tu utilises des exemples concrets quand c'est pertinent.
     8→Tu corriges les erreurs de l'étudiant avec bienveillance."""
     9→
    10→# Preferred models in order of priority (lightest first for low-RAM machines)
    11→PREFERRED_MODELS = ["qwen2:0.5b", "phi3:mini", "tinyllama", "mistral:latest"]
    12→
    13→
    14→async def _get_best_model() -> str:
    15→    """Find the best available model from preferred list."""
    16→    try:
    17→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    18→            tags_resp = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    19→            if tags_resp.status_code == 200:
    20→                available = [m["name"] for m in tags_resp.json().get("models", [])]
    21→                for model in PREFERRED_MODELS:
    22→                    if model in available:
    23→                        return model
    24→                # Fallback: use first available model
    25→                if available:
    26→                    return available[0]
    27→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    28→        raise RuntimeError("Ollama non accessible. Lancez: ollama serve")
    29→    raise RuntimeError(f"Aucun modele disponible. Lancez: ollama pull qwen2:0.5b")
    30→
    31→
    32→async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None) -> str:
    33→    """Send a message to Ollama and get a response."""
    34→    model = await _get_best_model()
    35→
    36→    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
    37→    if historique:
    38→        messages.extend(historique)
    39→    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
    40→
    41→    try:
    42→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=90.0) as client:
    43→            response = await client.post(
    44→                f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
    45→                json={
    46→                    "model": model,
    47→                    "messages": messages,
    48→                    "stream": False,
    49→                },
    50→            )
    51→            response.raise_for_status()
    52→            data = response.json()
    53→            return data["message"]["content"]
    54→    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e:
    55→        raise RuntimeError(f"Erreur Ollama HTTP {e.response.status_code}: {e.response.text[:200]}")
    56→    except httpx.TimeoutException:
    57→        raise RuntimeError(f"Ollama timeout (>90s) avec {model}. Memoire insuffisante ou modele trop lourd.")
    58→
    59→
    60→async def interroger_sur_document(contenu: str, question: str) -> str:
    61→    """Ask Ollama a question about a specific document content."""
    62→    prompt = f"""Voici un extrait de document de cours:
    63→
    64→{contenu[:3000]}
    65→
    66→Question de l'étudiant: {question}
    67→
    68→Réponds de manière pédagogique en te basant sur le document."""
    69→
    70→    return await chat(prompt)
    71→
    72→
    73→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    74→    """Check if Ollama is running and accessible."""
    75→    try:
    76→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    77→            response = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    78→            return response.status_code == 200
    79→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    80→        return False
    81→
                                                        ```

                                                            ## 👤 user (06:09:51)

                                                            ✅ **Result:**
                                                            ```
                                                                 1→import asyncio
     2→import logging
     3→import os
     4→import shutil
     5→import tempfile
     6→from pathlib import Path
     7→
     8→from app.config import settings
     9→
    10→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    11→
    12→# Lazy-loaded model; None until first successful load.
    13→_model = None
    14→
    15→# Cached availability flag (set on first check, avoids repeated import attempts).
    16→_whisper_available: bool | None = None
    17→
    18→
    19→def _ensure_ffmpeg_binary() -> None:
    20→    """Ensure an ffmpeg binary is discoverable for whisper."""
    21→    if shutil.which("ffmpeg"):
    22→        return
    23→
    24→    try:
    25→        import imageio_ffmpeg
    26→
    27→        ffmpeg_path = Path(imageio_ffmpeg.get_ffmpeg_exe())
    28→        shim_dir = Path(tempfile.gettempdir()) / "iaca-ffmpeg-bin"
    29→        shim_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    30→        shim_path = shim_dir / "ffmpeg"
    31→
    32→        if not shim_path.exists():
    33→            try:
    34→                shim_path.symlink_to(ffmpeg_path)
    35→            except OSError:
    36→                shutil.copy2(ffmpeg_path, shim_path)
    37→            shim_path.chmod(0o755)
    38→
    39→        current_path = os.environ.get("PATH", "")
    40→        shim_dir_str = str(shim_dir)
    41→        if shim_dir_str not in current_path.split(os.pathsep):
    42→            os.environ["PATH"] = (
    43→                f"{shim_dir_str}{os.pathsep}{current_path}" if current_path else shim_dir_str
    44→            )
    45→    except Exception as exc:
    46→        logger.warning(f"FFmpeg indisponible pour Whisper: {exc}")
    47→
    48→
    49→def check_disponible() -> bool:
    50→    """Return True if the whisper module and model can be loaded."""
    51→    global _whisper_available
    52→    if _whisper_available is not None:
    53→        return _whisper_available
    54→    _ensure_ffmpeg_binary()
    55→    try:
    56→        import whisper  # noqa: F401
    57→        _whisper_available = True
    58→    except ModuleNotFoundError:
    59→        logger.warning(
    60→            "Module 'whisper' introuvable. "
    61→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper  "
    62→            "(torch sera installé automatiquement)."
    63→        )
    64→        _whisper_available = False
    65→    return _whisper_available
    66→
    67→
    68→def _get_model():
    69→    global _model
    70→    if _model is None:
    71→        if not check_disponible():
    72→            raise RuntimeError(
    73→                "Whisper non disponible — installez openai-whisper: "
    74→                "pip install openai-whisper"
    75→            )
    76→        import whisper
    77→        logger.info(f"Chargement modèle Whisper '{settings.whisper_model}'…")
    78→        _model = whisper.load_model(settings.whisper_model)
    79→        logger.info("Modèle Whisper chargé.")
    80→    return _model
    81→
    82→
    83→async def transcrire(audio_bytes: bytes, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    84→    """Transcribe audio bytes to text using Whisper.
    85→
    86→    Raises RuntimeError with a clear message if whisper is not installed,
    87→    so the WS handler can forward a JSON error without dropping the session.
    88→    """
    89→    if not check_disponible():
    90→        raise RuntimeError(
    91→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
    92→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
    93→        )
    94→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    95→        tmp.write(audio_bytes)
    96→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    97→    try:
    98→        result = await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, tmp_path, language)
    99→    finally:
   100→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
   101→    return result
   102→
   103→
   104→def _transcrire_sync(file_path: str, language: str) -> str:
   105→    model = _get_model()
   106→    result = model.transcribe(file_path, language=language)
   107→    return result["text"].strip()
   108→
   109→
   110→async def transcrire_fichier(file_path: str, language: str = "fr") -> str:
   111→    """Transcribe an audio file to text."""
   112→    if not Path(file_path).exists():
   113→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Audio file not found: {file_path}")
   114→    if not check_disponible():
   115→        raise RuntimeError(
   116→            "Transcription audio indisponible: module whisper manquant. "
   117→            "Installez-le avec: pip install openai-whisper"
   118→        )
   119→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, file_path, language)
   120→
                                                            ```

                                                                ## 👤 user (06:09:51)

                                                                ✅ **Result:**
                                                                ```
                                                                     1→import asyncio
     2→import tempfile
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→
     8→async def synthetiser(texte: str) -> bytes:
     9→    """Synthesize text to speech using Piper TTS. Returns WAV audio bytes."""
    10→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    11→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    12→    try:
    13→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    14→            "piper",
    15→            "--model", settings.piper_voice,
    16→            "--output_file", tmp_path,
    17→            stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    18→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    19→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    20→        )
    21→        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=texte.encode())
    22→        if process.returncode != 0:
    23→            raise RuntimeError(f"Piper TTS error: {stderr.decode()}")
    24→        return Path(tmp_path).read_bytes()
    25→    finally:
    26→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def synthetiser_fichier(texte: str, output_path: str) -> str:
    30→    """Synthesize text to speech and save to file."""
    31→    audio_bytes = await synthetiser(texte)
    32→    Path(output_path).write_bytes(audio_bytes)
    33→    return output_path
    34→
    35→
    36→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    37→    """Check if Piper TTS is installed and accessible."""
    38→    try:
    39→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    40→            "piper", "--help",
    41→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    42→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    43→        )
    44→        await process.communicate()
    45→        return process.returncode == 0
    46→    except FileNotFoundError:
    47→        return False
    48→
                                                                ```

                                                                      ## 👤 user (06:09:54)

                                                                      ✅ **Result:**
                                                                      ```
                                                                           1→from fastapi import Request
     2→from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
     3→from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→MUTATION_METHODS = {"POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE"}
     8→
     9→
    10→class BearerAuthMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    11→    """Optional Bearer token middleware.
    12→
    13→    If api_auth_token is empty, all requests pass through.
    14→    If api_auth_token is set, all mutation (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) requests
    15→    under /api/ require a valid Authorization: Bearer <token> header.
    16→    """
    17→
    18→    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
    19→        token = settings.api_auth_token
    20→        if not token:
    21→            return await call_next(request)
    22→
    23→        # WebSocket upgrades are GET requests with Upgrade: websocket header.
    24→        # Auth is handled inside the WS handler itself (close code 1008).
    25→        if request.headers.get("upgrade", "").lower() == "websocket":
    26→            return await call_next(request)
    27→
    28→        if request.method in MUTATION_METHODS and request.url.path.startswith("/api/"):
    29→            auth_header = request.headers.get("Authorization", "")
    30→            if not auth_header.startswith("Bearer ") or auth_header[7:] != token:
    31→                return JSONResponse(
    32→                    status_code=401,
    33→                    content={"detail": "Unauthorized: invalid or missing Bearer token"},
    34→                )
    35→
    36→        return await call_next(request)
    37→
    38→
    39→async def verify_ws_token(token_param: str | None, auth_header: str | None) -> bool:
    40→    """Verify WebSocket token from query param or Authorization header.
    41→
    42→    Returns True if auth is valid (or not required), False otherwise.
    43→    """
    44→    required_token = settings.api_auth_token
    45→    if not required_token:
    46→        return True
    47→
    48→    # Check query param first, then header
    49→    if token_param and token_param == required_token:
    50→        return True
    51→    if auth_header and auth_header.startswith("Bearer ") and auth_header[7:] == required_token:
    52→        return True
    53→
    54→    return False
    55→
                                                                      ```

                                                                                                       1→const getRawAuthToken = (): string => {
     2→  return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_AUTH_TOKEN?.trim() || "";
     3→};
     4→
     5→export const withAuthHeaders = (init: RequestInit = {}): RequestInit => {
     6→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return init;
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  const headers = new Headers(init.headers || {});
    12→  if (!headers.has("Authorization")) {
    13→    headers.set("Authorization", `Bearer ${token}`);
    14→  }
    15→
    16→  return { ...init, headers };
    17→};
    18→
    19→export const withAuthQuery = (url: string): string => {
    20→  const token = getRawAuthToken();
    21→  if (!token) {
    22→    return url;
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
    26→  return `${url}${separator}token=${encodeURIComponent(token)}`;
    27→};
    28→
                                                                                                  ```

     6→
     7→from app.config import settings
     8→from app.database import engine, Base
     9→from app.middleware.rate_limit import RateLimitMiddleware

    14→@asynccontextmanager
    15→async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    16→    # Startup: create directories and DB tables
    17→    os.makedirs(settings.upload_path, exist_ok=True)
    18→    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(settings.database_url.replace("sqlite:///", "")), exist_ok=True)
    19→    async with engine.begin() as conn:
    20→        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)
    21→    yield
    22→    # Shutdown: dispose engine
    23→    await engine.dispose()
    24→
    25→
    26→app = FastAPI(
    27→    title=settings.app_name,
    28→    description="IA pour la revision de concours administratifs",
    29→    version="0.1.0",
    30→    lifespan=lifespan,
    31→)
    32→
    33→app.add_middleware(BearerAuthMiddleware)
    34→app.add_middleware(
    35→    RateLimitMiddleware,
    36→    enabled=settings.rate_limit_enabled,
    37→    requests=settings.rate_limit_requests,
    38→    window_seconds=settings.rate_limit_window_seconds,
    39→)
    40→app.add_middleware(
    41→    CORSMiddleware,
    42→    allow_origins=["http://localhost:3000", "http://127.0.0.1:3000"],
    43→    allow_credentials=True,
    44→    allow_methods=["*"],
    45→    allow_headers=["*"],

                                                                                                                              import asyncio
import base64
import json
import logging

from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect

from app.security import verify_ws_token
from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
router = APIRouter()


@router.websocket("/ws")
async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None):
    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.

    Protocol:
    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors

    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    """
    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
        await websocket.close(code=1008)
        return

    await websocket.accept()
    historique: list[dict] = []

    async def heartbeat():
        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
        try:
            while True:
                await asyncio.sleep(30)
                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
        except Exception:
            pass

    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())

    try:
        while True:
            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
                                                                                                                              ```

                                                                                                                                    ## 👤 user (06:10:13)

                                                                                                                                    ✅ **Result:**
                                                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                                                         1→import asyncio
     2→import math
     3→import time
     4→from collections import defaultdict, deque
     5→from typing import Deque
     6→
     7→from fastapi import Request
     8→from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
     9→from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware, RequestResponseEndpoint
    10→from starlette.responses import Response
    11→
    12→
    13→EXEMPT_PATHS = {"/", "/health"}
    14→
    15→
    16→def _get_client_ip(request: Request) -> str:
    17→    forwarded_for = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-for", "")
    18→    if forwarded_for:
    19→        return forwarded_for.split(",")[0].strip() or "unknown"
    20→
    21→    if request.client and request.client.host:
    22→        return request.client.host
    23→
    24→    return "unknown"
    25→
    26→
    27→class _InMemorySlidingWindowLimiter:
    28→    def __init__(self, max_requests: int, window_seconds: int) -> None:
    29→        self.max_requests = max(1, max_requests)
    30→        self.window_seconds = max(1, window_seconds)
    31→        self._requests_by_ip: dict[str, Deque[float]] = defaultdict(deque)
    32→        self._lock = asyncio.Lock()
    33→
    34→    async def check_request(self, client_ip: str) -> tuple[bool, int]:
    35→        now = time.monotonic()
    36→        cutoff = now - self.window_seconds
    37→
    38→        async with self._lock:
    39→            requests = self._requests_by_ip[client_ip]
    40→            while requests and requests[0] <= cutoff:
    41→                requests.popleft()
    42→
    43→            if len(requests) >= self.max_requests:
    44→                retry_after = max(1, math.ceil((requests[0] + self.window_seconds) - now))
    45→                return False, retry_after
    46→
    47→            requests.append(now)
    48→            return True, 0
    49→
    50→
    51→class RateLimitMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    52→    def __init__(
    53→        self,
    54→        app,
    55→        *,
    56→        enabled: bool,
    57→        requests: int,
    58→        window_seconds: int,
    59→    ) -> None:
    60→        super().__init__(app)
    61→        self.enabled = enabled
    62→        self._limiter = _InMemorySlidingWindowLimiter(
    63→            max_requests=requests,
    64→            window_seconds=window_seconds,
    65→        )
    66→
    67→    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next: RequestResponseEndpoint) -> Response:
    68→        if not self.enabled:
    69→            return await call_next(request)
    70→
    71→        if request.method.upper() == "OPTIONS":
    72→            return await call_next(request)
    73→
    74→        path = request.url.path
    75→        if path in EXEMPT_PATHS or not path.startswith("/api/"):
    76→            return await call_next(request)
    77→
    78→        client_ip = _get_client_ip(request)
    79→        is_allowed, retry_after = await self._limiter.check_request(client_ip)
    80→        if is_allowed:
    81→            return await call_next(request)
    82→
    83→        return JSONResponse(
    84→            status_code=429,
    85→            content={"detail": "Too Many Requests"},
    86→            headers={"Retry-After": str(retry_after)},
    87→        )
    88→
                                                                                                                                    ```

                                                                                                                                                                           1→# Plan d'Implémentation: Fiches + Vocal Fiabilité
     2→
     3→## Objectifs
     4→1. Augmenter fortement la qualité des fiches générées.
     5→2. Supprimer l’erreur `No module named whisper` en production locale.
     6→3. Stabiliser le flux WS vocal et le statut de disponibilité.
     7→
     8→## Checklist
     9→- [ ] Renforcer le prompt `generer_fiche` avec format et exigences de couverture strictes.
    10→- [ ] Ajouter post-traitement/normalisation défensive des fiches (sections vides, longueur minimale).
    11→- [ ] Rendre `whisper_service` tolérant: check disponibilité + erreur explicite + fallback sans crash WS.

                                                                                                                                                                                               1→import asyncio
     2→import base64
     3→import json
     4→import logging
     5→
     6→from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     7→
     8→from app.security import verify_ws_token
     9→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
    10→
    11→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    12→router = APIRouter()
    13→
    14→
    15→@router.websocket("/ws")
    16→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket, token: str | None = None):
    17→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    18→
    19→    Protocol:
    20→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    21→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    22→    - Server sends: {"type": "ping"} every 30s as heartbeat
    23→    - Server sends: {"type": "error", "message": "..."} on errors
    24→
    25→    Auth (when API_AUTH_TOKEN is set):
    26→    - Pass token as query param: ?token=<token>
    27→    - Or pass Authorization: Bearer <token> header
    28→    """
    29→    auth_header = websocket.headers.get("Authorization")
    30→    if not await verify_ws_token(token, auth_header):
    31→        await websocket.close(code=1008)
    32→        return
    33→
    34→    await websocket.accept()
    35→    historique: list[dict] = []
    36→
    37→    async def heartbeat():
    38→        """Send periodic pings to keep connection alive."""
    39→        try:
    40→            while True:
    41→                await asyncio.sleep(30)
    42→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "ping"})
    43→        except Exception:
    44→            pass
    45→
    46→    heartbeat_task = asyncio.create_task(heartbeat())
    47→
    48→    try:
    49→        while True:
    50→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
    51→            try:
    52→                data = json.loads(raw)
    53→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
    54→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
    55→                continue
    56→
    57→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
    58→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
    59→                try:
    60→                    audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
    61→                    user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
    62→                    await websocket.send_json({
    63→                        "type": "transcription",
    64→                        "message": user_message,
    65→                    })
    66→                except RuntimeError as e:
    67→                    # Whisper not installed or model error — recoverable, keep session alive
    68→                    logger.warning(f"Transcription indisponible: {e}")
    69→                    await websocket.send_json({
    70→                        "type": "error",
    71→                        "message": str(e),
    72→                        "recoverable": True,
    73→                    })
    74→                    continue
    75→                except Exception as e:
    76→                    logger.error(f"Erreur transcription Whisper: {e}", exc_info=True)
    77→                    await websocket.send_json({
    78→                        "type": "error",
    79→                        "message": f"Erreur transcription: {str(e)}",
    80→                        "recoverable": True,
    81→                    })
    82→                    continue
    83→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
    84→                user_message = data.get("message", "")
    85→                if not user_message:
    86→                    await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Message vide"})
    87→                    continue
    88→            elif data.get("type") == "pong":
    89→                continue
    90→            else:
    91→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
    92→                continue
    93→
    94→            # Get AI response from Ollama
    95→            try:
    96→                response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique)
    97→            except Exception as e:
    98→                logger.error(f"Erreur Ollama chat: {e}", exc_info=True)
    99→                try:
   100→                    await websocket.send_json({
   101→                        "type": "error",
   102→                        "message": f"Erreur LLM: {str(e)}",
   103→                        "recoverable": True,
   104→                    })
   105→                except Exception:
   106→                    pass
   107→                continue
   108→
   109→            # Update history
   110→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
   111→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
   112→            if len(historique) > 20:
   113→                historique = historique[-20:]
   114→
   115→            # Send text response
   116→            await websocket.send_json({
   117→                "type": "text",
   118→                "message": response_text,
   119→            })
   120→
   121→            # Generate and send audio response
   122→            try:
   123→                tts_text = response_text[:200]
   124→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
   125→                await websocket.send_json({
   126→                    "type": "audio",
   127→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
   128→                })
   129→            except Exception as e:
   130→                logger.warning(f"TTS non disponible: {e}")
   131→
   132→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
   133→        logger.info("Client WebSocket deconnecte")
   134→    except Exception as e:
   135→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
   136→    finally:
   137→        heartbeat_task.cancel()
   138→
   139→
   140→@router.get("/status")
   141→async def vocal_status():
   142→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
   143→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
   144→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
   145→    whisper_ok = whisper_service.check_disponible()
   146→    model = None
   147→    if ollama_ok:
   148→        try:
   149→            model = await ollama_service._get_best_model()
   150→        except Exception:
   151→            pass
   152→    return {
   153→        "ollama": ollama_ok,
   154→        "piper": piper_ok,
   155→        "whisper": whisper_ok,
   156→        "model": model,
   157→    }
   158→
                                                                                                                                                                                          ```
