                                      ```
                                           1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→import argparse
     3→import os
     4→import re
     5→import textwrap
     6→from datetime import datetime
     7→
     8→DEFAULT_MARKERS = [
     9→    "debug",
    10→    "fix",
    11→    "error",
    12→    "failed",
    13→    "retry",
    14→    "ralph",
    15→    "blocked",
    16→    "workaround",
    17→    "bug",
    18→    "issue",
    19→]
    20→
    21→STOPWORDS = {
    22→    "a", "an", "and", "the", "for", "to", "of", "in", "on", "with", "by",
    23→    "create", "build", "implement", "add", "update", "fix", "generate",
    24→}
    25→
    26→
    27→def find_memory_file(project_dir, memory_file):
    28→    if memory_file:
    29→        path = memory_file
    30→        if not os.path.isabs(path):
    31→            path = os.path.join(project_dir, path)
    32→        if os.path.isfile(path):
    33→            return path
    34→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"memory file not found: {path}")
    35→
    36→    for name in ("CLAUDE.md", "Claude.md", "claude.md"):
    37→        candidate = os.path.join(project_dir, name)
    38→        if os.path.isfile(candidate):
    39→            return candidate
    40→    raise FileNotFoundError("no memory file found (CLAUDE.md/Claude.md/claude.md)")
    41→
    42→
    43→def read_lines(path):
    44→    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
    45→        return f.read().splitlines()
    46→
    47→
    48→def extract_sections(lines, heading_regex):
    49→    sections = []
    50→    pattern = re.compile(heading_regex)
    51→    i = 0
    52→    while i < len(lines):
    53→        if pattern.match(lines[i]):
    54→            start = i + 1
    55→            i = start
    56→            while i < len(lines) and not re.match(r"^#{1,6}\s", lines[i]):
    57→                i += 1
    58→            sections.append((start, i))
    59→        else:
    60→            i += 1
    61→    return sections
    62→
    63→
    64→def parse_table(lines):
    65→    rows = []
    66→    for line in lines:
    67→        text = line.strip()
    68→        if not text.startswith("|"):
    69→            continue
    70→        cols = [c.strip() for c in text.strip("|").split("|")]
    71→        if len(cols) < 2:
    72→            continue
    73→        if cols[0].lower() == "date" or set(cols[0]) <= {"-"}:
    74→            continue
    75→        rows.append(cols)
    76→    return rows
    77→
    78→
    79→def duration_to_minutes(value):
    80→    if not value:
    81→        return None
    82→    text = value.strip().lower()
    83→    if text in {"-", "n/a", "na"}:
    84→        return None
    85→
    86→    match = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*(min|minutes)", text)
    87→    if match:
    88→        return int(match.group(1))
    89→
    90→    match = re.search(r"(\d+)\s*h(?:\s*(\d+)\s*m)?", text)
    91→    if match:
    92→        hours = int(match.group(1))
    93→        minutes = int(match.group(2) or 0)
    94→        return hours * 60 + minutes
    95→
    96→    if ":" in text:
    97→        parts = text.split(":")
    98→        try:
    99→            nums = [int(p) for p in parts]
   100→        except ValueError:
   101→            return None
   102→        if len(nums) == 2:
   103→            return nums[0] * 60 + nums[1]
   104→        if len(nums) == 3:
   105→            return nums[0] * 60 + nums[1] + (1 if nums[2] >= 30 else 0)
   106→
   107→    return None
   108→
   109→
   110→def contains_marker(text, markers):
   111→    if not text:
   112→        return False
   113→    lower = text.lower()
   114→    return any(marker in lower for marker in markers)
   115→
   116→
   117→def slugify(text):
   118→    if not text:
   119→        return ""
   120→    cleaned = re.sub(r"[^a-zA-Z0-9\s-]", " ", text).lower()
   121→    tokens = [t for t in cleaned.split() if t not in STOPWORDS and len(t) > 2]
   122→    tokens = [t for t in tokens if not any(ch.isdigit() for ch in t)]
   123→    slug = "-".join(tokens)
   124→    return slug[:50].strip("-")
   125→
   126→
   127→def unique_path(base_dir, name):
   128→    candidate = os.path.join(base_dir, name)
   129→    if not os.path.exists(candidate):
   130→        return candidate
   131→    idx = 2
   132→    while True:
   133→        alt = f"{candidate}-v{idx}"
   134→        if not os.path.exists(alt):
   135→            return alt
   136→        idx += 1
   137→
   138→
   139→def parse_task_sections(lines):
   140→    sections = {}
   141→    header_re = re.compile(r"^###\s*\[(.+?)\]\s*(.+)$")
   142→    i = 0
   143→    while i < len(lines):
   144→        match = header_re.match(lines[i])
   145→        if match:
   146→            task_id = match.group(1).strip()
   147→            title = match.group(2).strip()
   148→            start = i + 1
   149→            i = start
   150→            while i < len(lines) and not re.match(r"^##?\s", lines[i]):
   151→                i += 1
   152→            body = lines[start:i]
   153→            sections[task_id] = {"title": title, "body": body}
   154→        else:
   155→            i += 1
   156→    return sections
   157→
   158→
   159→def extract_files_from_section(body_lines):
   160→    files = []
   161→    capture = False
   162→    for line in body_lines:
   163→        text = line.strip()
   164→        if re.match(r"^\*\*Files (Created|Modified|Involved)\*\*", text, re.I) or \
   165→           re.match(r"^Files (Created|Modified|Involved)", text, re.I):
   166→            capture = True
   167→            continue
   168→        if capture:
   169→            if text.startswith("-"):
   170→                path = text.lstrip("- ").strip()
   171→                if path:
   172→                    files.append(path)
   173→                continue
   174→            if text == "" or text.startswith("#"):
   175→                capture = False
   176→    return files
   177→
   178→
   179→def extract_files_from_notes(notes):
   180→    if not notes:
   181→        return []
   182→    matches = re.findall(r"[A-Za-z0-9_./-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9]+", notes)
   183→    return matches
   184→
   185→
   186→def resolve_file_path(project_dir, file_path):
   187→    if not file_path:
   188→        return None
   189→    if os.path.isabs(file_path) and os.path.exists(file_path):
   190→        return file_path
   191→    cleaned = file_path.lstrip("./")
   192→    candidate = os.path.join(project_dir, cleaned)
   193→    if os.path.exists(candidate):
   194→        return candidate
   195→    return None
   196→
   197→
   198→def collect_snippets(project_dir, files, max_snippets):
   199→    snippets = []
   200→    for file_path in files:
   201→        resolved = resolve_file_path(project_dir, file_path)
   202→        if not resolved:
   203→            continue
   204→        try:
   205→            with open(resolved, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
   206→                lines = f.read().splitlines()[:80]
   207→        except OSError:
   208→            continue
   209→        snippets.append((file_path, "\n".join(lines)))
   210→        if len(snippets) >= max_snippets:
   211→            break
   212→    return snippets
   213→
   214→
   215→def build_skill_md(skill_name, title, task_id, llm, duration, status, notes, files):
   216→    desc = title or notes or task_id
   217→    description = (
   218→        f"Reusable workflow derived from session task {task_id}. "
   219→        f"Use when implementing similar tasks to: {desc}."
   220→    )
   221→
   222→    files_block = "\n".join([f"- {f}" for f in files]) if files else "- (no files extracted)"
   223→    duration_text = f"{duration} min" if duration is not None else "unknown"
   224→
   225→    body = f"""---
   226→name: {skill_name}
   227→description: {description}
   228→---
   229→
   230→# {title or skill_name}
   231→
   232→## Context
   233→- Source task: {task_id}
   234→- LLM: {llm}
   235→- Duration: {duration_text}
   236→- Status: {status}
   237→- Notes: {notes}
   238→
   239→## Objectives
   240→- Execute the core workflow for this task type.
   241→- Avoid regressions by keeping edge cases and tests explicit.
   242→
   243→## Steps
   244→1) Review related files and constraints.
   245→2) Apply the workflow from the source task.
   246→3) Run tests and verify expected behavior.
   247→4) Update CLAUDE.md with results.
   248→
   249→## Files (from session memory)
   250→{files_block}
   251→
   252→## Examples
   253→
   254→```text
   255→Task {task_id}: {desc}
   256→When done: update CLAUDE.md with completion and notes.
   257→```
   258→
   259→## Resources
   260→- references/source-task.md
   261→"""
   262→    return body
   263→
   264→
   265→def write_skill(output_dir, skill_name, skill_md, source_task_md):
   266→    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
   267→    skill_dir = unique_path(output_dir, skill_name)
   268→    os.makedirs(skill_dir, exist_ok=True)
   269→
   270→    with open(os.path.join(skill_dir, "SKILL.md"), "w", encoding="ascii", errors="ignore") as f:
   271→        f.write(skill_md)
   272→
   273→    ref_dir = os.path.join(skill_dir, "references")
   274→    os.makedirs(ref_dir, exist_ok=True)
   275→    with open(os.path.join(ref_dir, "source-task.md"), "w", encoding="ascii", errors="ignore") as f:
   276→        f.write(source_task_md)
   277→
   278→    return skill_dir
   279→
   280→
   281→def build_source_task_md(task_id, title, llm, duration, status, notes, body_lines, files, snippets):
   282→    duration_text = f"{duration} min" if duration is not None else "unknown"
   283→    files_block = "\n".join([f"- {f}" for f in files]) if files else "- (no files extracted)"
   284→    body_excerpt = "\n".join(body_lines[:120]) if body_lines else "(no section found)"
   285→    snippet_block = ""
   286→    if snippets:
   287→        rendered = []
   288→        for path, snippet in snippets:
   289→            rendered.append(f"### {path}\n\n```\n{snippet}\n```")
   290→        snippet_block = "\n\n## File Snippets\n\n" + "\n\n".join(rendered)
   291→    return f"""# Source Task {task_id}
   292→
   293→- Title: {title}
   294→- LLM: {llm}
   295→- Duration: {duration_text}
   296→- Status: {status}
   297→- Notes: {notes}
   298→
   299→## Files
   300→{files_block}
   301→{snippet_block}
   302→
   303→## Source Excerpt
   304→
   305→```
   306→{body_excerpt}
   307→```
   308→"""
   309→
   310→
   311→def main():
   312→    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Harvest skills from session memory.")
   313→    parser.add_argument("--project-dir", default=".")
   314→    parser.add_argument("--memory-file", default=None)
   315→    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", default=None)
   316→    parser.add_argument("--min-minutes", type=int, default=30)
   317→    parser.add_argument("--debug-markers", default=",".join(DEFAULT_MARKERS))
   318→    parser.add_argument("--max-skills", type=int, default=10)
   319→    parser.add_argument("--include-snippets", action="store_true")
   320→    parser.add_argument("--max-snippets", type=int, default=3)
   321→    parser.add_argument("--write", action="store_true")
   322→    args = parser.parse_args()
   323→
   324→    project_dir = os.path.abspath(args.project_dir)
   325→    memory_file = find_memory_file(project_dir, args.memory_file)
   326→    output_dir = args.output_dir or os.path.join(
   327→        project_dir,
   328→        "agents_library",
   329→        "agent-orchestrator-universal",
   330→        "skills",
   331→        "generated",
   332→    )
   333→
   334→    markers = [m.strip().lower() for m in args.debug_markers.split(",") if m.strip()]
   335→
   336→    lines = read_lines(memory_file)
   337→
   338→    completion_sections = extract_sections(lines, r"^#{1,6}\s+Task Completion Log\b")
   339→    completion_rows = []
   340→    for start, end in completion_sections:
   341→        completion_rows.extend(parse_table(lines[start:end]))
   342→
   343→    assignment_sections = extract_sections(lines, r"^#{1,6}\s+Task Assignment Queue\b")
   344→    assignment_rows = []
   345→    for start, end in assignment_sections:
   346→        assignment_rows.extend(parse_table(lines[start:end]))
   347→    assignment_map = {row[0]: row[1] for row in assignment_rows if len(row) > 1}
   348→
   349→    task_sections = parse_task_sections(lines)
   350→
   351→    candidates = []
   352→    for row in completion_rows:
   353→        if len(row) < 6:
   354→            continue
   355→        date, llm, task_id, duration, status, notes = row[:6]
   356→        duration_min = duration_to_minutes(duration)
   357→        is_long = duration_min is not None and duration_min >= args.min_minutes
   358→        is_debug = contains_marker(notes, markers) or contains_marker(status, markers)
   359→        if is_long or is_debug:
   360→            title = assignment_map.get(task_id)
   361→            section = task_sections.get(task_id, {})
   362→            if not title:
   363→                title = section.get("title")
   364→            body_lines = section.get("body", [])
   365→            files = extract_files_from_section(body_lines)
   366→            if not files:
   367→                files = extract_files_from_notes(notes)
   368→            snippets = []
   369→            if args.include_snippets:
   370→                snippets = collect_snippets(project_dir, files, args.max_snippets)
   371→            candidates.append({
   372→                "task_id": task_id,
   373→                "llm": llm,
   374→                "duration": duration_min,
   375→                "status": status,
   376→                "notes": notes,
   377→                "title": title or task_id,
   378→                "body": body_lines,
   379→                "files": files,
   380→                "snippets": snippets,
   381→            })
   382→
   383→    if not candidates:
   384→        print("No candidates found.")
   385→        return
   386→
   387→    candidates = candidates[: args.max_skills]
   388→
   389→    print("Candidates:")
   390→    for item in candidates:
   391→        duration_text = f"{item['duration']} min" if item["duration"] is not None else "unknown"
   392→        print(f"- {item['task_id']}: {item['title']} ({duration_text})")
   393→
   394→    if not args.write:
   395→        print("\nDry run complete. Use --write to generate skills.")
   396→        return
   397→
   398→    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
   399→
   400→    for item in candidates:
   401→        desc = item["title"]
   402→        slug = slugify(desc) or item["task_id"].lower().replace("_", "-")
   403→        skill_name = f"{slug}"
   404→        skill_md = build_skill_md(
   405→            skill_name=skill_name,
   406→            title=desc,
   407→            task_id=item["task_id"],
   408→            llm=item["llm"],
   409→            duration=item["duration"],
   410→            status=item["status"],
   411→            notes=item["notes"],
   412→            files=item["files"],
   413→        )
   414→        source_md = build_source_task_md(
   415→            task_id=item["task_id"],
   416→            title=desc,
   417→            llm=item["llm"],
   418→            duration=item["duration"],
   419→            status=item["status"],
   420→            notes=item["notes"],
   421→            body_lines=item["body"],
   422→            files=item["files"],
   423→            snippets=item["snippets"],
   424→        )
   425→        skill_dir = write_skill(output_dir, skill_name, skill_md, source_md)
   426→        print(f"Generated: {skill_dir}")
   427→
   428→
   429→if __name__ == "__main__":
   430→    main()
   431→
                                      ```

                                          ```
                                               1→# Skill: Skill Harvesting (Post-Session)
     2→
     3→> Créer des skills réutilisables après une session de debug ou implémentation complexe
     4→
     5→---
     6→
     7→## Vue d'ensemble
     8→
     9→Le skill harvesting consiste à extraire les patterns et solutions découverts pendant une session pour les transformer en skills réutilisables.
    10→
    11→---
    12→
    13→## Quand Harvester ?
    14→
    15→| Situation | Action |
    16→|-----------|--------|
    17→| Tâche > 3 cycles Ralph | Créer skill debug |
    18→| Pattern réutilisable trouvé | Créer skill pattern |
    19→| Solution non triviale | Documenter dans skill |
    20→| Erreur récurrente résolue | Créer skill fix |
    21→
    22→---
    23→
    24→## Process de Harvesting
    25→
    26→### 1. Identifier le pattern
    27→
    28→```
    29→Questions à se poser :
    30→- Ce problème/solution est-il susceptible de se reproduire ?
    31→- La solution est-elle non triviale (> 5 min de réflexion) ?
    32→- D'autres projets pourraient-ils en bénéficier ?
    33→```
    34→
    35→### 2. Créer le fichier skill
    36→
    37→```bash
    38→# Chemin
    39→agents_library/universal-orchestrator/skills/[nom-du-skill].md
    40→
    41→# Ou dans un dossier agent spécifique
    42→agents_library/[agent]/skills/[nom-du-skill].md
    43→```
    44→
    45→### 3. Remplir le template
    46→
    47→```markdown
    48→# Skill: [NOM]
    49→
    50→> [Description en une ligne]
    51→
    52→---
    53→
    54→## Contexte
    55→
    56→[Quand utiliser ce skill - situation, symptômes]
    57→
    58→## Problème
    59→
    60→[Description du problème résolu]
    61→
    62→## Solution
    63→
    64→[Code/process/commandes]
    65→
    66→```bash
    67→# Exemple de commande
    68→```
    69→
    70→## Exemples d'utilisation
    71→
    72→### Exemple 1
    73→[Cas concret]
    74→
    75→### Exemple 2
    76→[Autre cas]
    77→
    78→## Références
    79→
    80→- [Liens vers docs]
    81→- [Issues liées]
    82→
    83→---
    84→
    85→*Créé le [DATE] suite à [CONTEXTE]*
    86→```
    87→
    88→### 4. Référencer dans CLAUDE.md
    89→
    90→```markdown
    91→## Skills créés cette session
    92→
    93→| Skill | Description | Date |
    94→|-------|-------------|------|
    95→| fix-circular-import | Résoudre imports circulaires Python | 2026-02-27 |
    96→```
    97→
    98→---
    99→
   100→## Exemples de Skills à Harvester
   101→
   102→### Après debug complexe
   103→
   104→```markdown
   105→# Skill: Debug Import Circulaire Python
   106→
   107→> Résoudre les erreurs d'import circulaire dans les projets Python
   108→
   109→## Contexte
   110→Erreur `ImportError: cannot import name 'X' from 'Y'` dans un projet avec models/schemas interdépendants.
   111→
   112→## Solution
   113→Utiliser `TYPE_CHECKING` :
   114→
   115→```python
   116→from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
   117→
   118→if TYPE_CHECKING:
   119→    from models import User
   120→
   121→def get_user() -> "User":
   122→    ...
   123→```
   124→```
   125→
   126→### Après pattern répété
   127→
   128→```markdown
   129→# Skill: FastAPI Router Pattern
   130→
   131→> Template standard pour créer un router FastAPI
   132→
   133→## Solution
   134→
   135→```python
   136→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
   137→from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
   138→
   139→router = APIRouter(prefix="/items", tags=["items"])
   140→
   141→@router.get("/")
   142→def list_items(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
   143→    return db.query(Item).all()
   144→```
   145→```
   146→
   147→---
   148→
   149→## Automatisation
   150→
   151→### Script de harvesting
   152→
   153→```bash
   154→#!/bin/bash
   155→# harvest-skill.sh - Crée un nouveau skill
   156→
   157→NAME=$1
   158→DESC=$2
   159→DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
   160→
   161→cat > "agents_library/universal-orchestrator/skills/$NAME.md" << EOF
   162→# Skill: $NAME
   163→
   164→> $DESC
   165→
   166→---
   167→
   168→## Contexte
   169→
   170→[À compléter]
   171→
   172→## Solution
   173→
   174→[À compléter]
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→*Créé le $DATE*
   179→EOF
   180→
   181→echo "✅ Skill créé: agents_library/universal-orchestrator/skills/$NAME.md"
   182→```
   183→
   184→---
   185→
   186→## Bonnes Pratiques
   187→
   188→1. **Nommer clairement** - Le nom doit indiquer l'usage
   189→2. **Documenter le contexte** - Quand utiliser ce skill
   190→3. **Inclure des exemples** - Code concret, pas abstrait
   191→4. **Référencer les sources** - Liens, issues, docs
   192→5. **Mettre à jour CLAUDE.md** - Traçabilité
   193→
   194→---
   195→
   196→*Skill Harvesting v1.0*
   197→
                                          ```

## Summary: Session Skill Harvester

I found the agent you're looking for: **Session Skill Harvester**, which is specifically designed to methodically create reusable skills from session memory and code.

### Location and Files

**Primary Location:**
`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/agent-orchestrator-universal/skills/session-skill-harvester/`

**Files Structure:**
```
session-skill-harvester/
├── SKILL.md                          (Skill definition and usage)
├── scripts/
│   └── harvest-skills.py             (Python script that generates skills)
├── assets/
│   └── skill-template.md             (Template for generating new skills)
└── references/
    └── heuristics.md                 (Selection & generalization rules)
```

**Reference Documentation:**
`/home/julien/Documents/IACA/agents_library/universal-orchestrator/skills/skill-harvesting.md`

---

### What It Does

The **Session Skill Harvester** is a methodical system that:

1. **Scans CLAUDE.md** for completed tasks (long-running or debug-heavy)
2. **Extracts context** from Task Completion Log including:
   - Task ID, LLM type, duration, status
   - Notes and files involved
   - Code snippets from related files
3. **Generates multiple files per skill**:
   - `SKILL.md` - Main skill definition with objectives, steps, examples
   - `references/source-task.md` - Full source task documentation
   - Optionally includes file snippets and context

---

### Key Script: harvest-skills.py

**Arguments:**
- `--project-dir`: project root (default: current directory)
- `--memory-file`: explicit CLAUDE.md path (optional)
- `--output-dir`: where skills are written (default: `agents_library/universal-orchestrator/skills/generated/`)
- `--min-minutes`: duration threshold for long tasks (default: 30)
- `--debug-markers`: debug keywords to flag (default: debug, fix, error, failed, retry, ralph, blocked, workaround, bug, issue)
- `--max-skills`: max number of skills to generate (default: 10)
- `--include-snippets`: include code snippets from referenced files
- `--max-snippets`: max snippets per skill (default: 3)
- `--write`: actually create files (default: dry-run only)

**Usage Examples:**
```bash
# Dry run (list candidates)
python scripts/harvest-skills.py --project-dir . --min-minutes 30

# Generate skills with write enabled
python scripts/harvest-skills.py --project-dir . --min-minutes 30 --write

# With code snippets and custom markers
python scripts/harvest-skills.py --project-dir . --include-snippets --max-skills 5 --debug-markers "debug,fix,error,blocked" --write
```

---

### Selection Criteria (Heuristics)

Tasks are marked as candidates if ANY are true:
- Duration is >= `min_minutes`
- Notes mention debug/fix cycle keywords
- Status is BLOCKED or FAILED
- Notes mention retry, workaround, error, etc.

**Generated Skills Include:**
- Name (short, lowercase, hyphenated - auto-slugified)
- Description (states when to use it)
- Context section (source task ID, LLM, duration, status)
- Objectives (reusable workflow)
- Steps (actionable, generic)
- Files list (extracted from task)
- Examples (at least one)
- Resources (link to source-task.md)

---

### Output Structure per Skill

Each generated skill creates:
```
[skill-name]/
├── SKILL.md                    (Main skill file)
└── references/
    └── source-task.md          (Full source task details + snippets)
```

---

### Smart Features

1. **Automatic File Extraction**: Parses task sections for "Files Created/Modified/Involved" blocks
2. **Snippet Collection**: Can extract first ~80 lines from referenced source files
3. **Slug Generalization**: Removes project names, vendor names, IDs and creates generic titles
4. **Dry-Run by Default**: Preview candidates before writing (safe for exploration)
5. **Duration Parsing**: Handles multiple formats (30min, 1h30m, 1:30:00, etc.)
6. **Uniqueness**: Avoids overwriting with `-v2`, `-v3` suffixes

---

This agent is designed to **capture institutional knowledge** from completed debugging and implementation tasks, converting them into reusable workflows for future sessions—exactly as you described: generating not just memory but multiple structured files (scripts, references, templates, assets) for each skill.

     3→import { useEffect, useState } from "react";

     5→const API_BASE = "/api";
     6→
     7→interface Stats {
     8→  documents: number;
     9→  flashcards: number;
    10→  quiz: number;
    11→  flashcards_a_reviser: number;
    12→}
    13→

    15→  id: number;
    16→  question: string;

    19→}

    24→  description: string;
    25→  date: string;
    26→  matiere?: string;
    27→}
    28→
    29→export default function Dashboard() {
    30→  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({
    31→    documents: 0,
    32→    flashcards: 0,
    33→    quiz: 0,
    34→    flashcards_a_reviser: 0,
    35→  });
    36→  const [revisions, setRevisions] = useState<Revision[]>([]);
    37→  const [activites, setActivites] = useState<Activite[]>([]);
    38→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    39→
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    const fetchData = async () => {
    42→      try {
    43→        const [statsRes, revisionsRes, activitesRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
    44→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents/`).then(async r => {
    45→            if (!r.ok) return { documents: 0, flashcards: 0, quiz: 0, flashcards_a_reviser: 0 };
    46→            const docs = await r.json();
    47→            const fcRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/`);
    48→            const fc = fcRes.ok ? await fcRes.json() : [];
    49→            const qzRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/`);
    50→            const qz = qzRes.ok ? await qzRes.json() : [];
    51→            const revRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`);
    52→            const rev = revRes.ok ? await revRes.json() : [];
    53→            return { documents: docs.length, flashcards: fc.length, quiz: qz.length, flashcards_a_reviser: rev.length };
    54→          }),
    55→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`),
    56→          Promise.resolve(new Response(JSON.stringify([]))),
    57→        ]);
    58→
    59→        if (statsRes.status === "fulfilled") {
    60→          const val = statsRes.value;
    61→          if (val instanceof Response) {
    62→            if (val.ok) setStats(await val.json());
    63→          } else {
    64→            setStats(val);
    65→          }
    66→        }
    67→        if (revisionsRes.status === "fulfilled" && revisionsRes.value.ok) {
    68→          const data = await revisionsRes.value.json();
    69→          setRevisions(data.slice(0, 5).map((fc: { id: number; question: string; prochaine_revision: string }) => ({
    70→            id: fc.id,
    71→            question: fc.question,
    72→            matiere: "",
    73→            next_review: fc.prochaine_revision,
    74→          })));
    75→        }
    76→        if (activitesRes.status === "fulfilled" && activitesRes.value.ok) {
    77→          setActivites(await activitesRes.value.json());
    78→        }
    79→      } catch (error) {
    80→        console.error("Erreur chargement dashboard:", error);
    81→      } finally {
    82→        setLoading(false);
    83→      }
    84→    };
    85→
    86→    fetchData();
    87→  }, []);
    88→
    89→  const statCards = [

    96→        </svg>
    97→      ),
    98→      gradient: "from-blue-500 to-blue-600",
    99→      bgGlow: "bg-blue-500/10",
   100→      textColor: "text-blue-400",
   101→    },
   102→    {
   103→      label: "Flashcards",
   104→      value: stats.flashcards,
   105→      icon: (

   198→              <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs mt-1">
   199→                Ajoutez des flashcards pour commencer
   200→              </p>
   201→            </div>
   202→          ) : (
   203→            <div className="space-y-3">
   204→              {revisions.map((revision) => (
   205→                <div
   206→                  key={revision.id}
   207→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/50 transition-colors"
   208→                >
   209→                  <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-400" />
   210→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   211→                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-200 truncate">
   212→                      {revision.question}
   213→                    </p>
   214→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">
   215→                      {revision.matiere}
   216→                    </p>
   217→                  </div>
   218→                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0">
   219→                    {new Date(revision.next_review).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   220→                      day: "numeric",
   221→                      month: "short",
   222→                    })}
   223→                  </span>
   224→                </div>
   225→              ))}
   226→            </div>
   227→          )}
   228→        </div>
   229→
   230→        {/* Activite recente */}
   231→        <div className="card">
   232→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   233→            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Activite recente</h2>
   234→          </div>
   235→
   236→          {activites.length === 0 ? (
   237→            <div className="text-center py-8">
   238→              <svg className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   239→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   240→              </svg>
   241→              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Aucune activite recente</p>

   245→            </div>
   246→          ) : (

   253→                };

   258→                  >
   259→                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   260→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   261→                        <span className={typeStyles[activite.type] || "badge-blue"}>
   262→                          {activite.type}
   263→                        </span>
   264→                        {activite.matiere && (

   266→                            {activite.matiere}
   267→                          </span>
   268→                        )}
   269→                      </div>
   270→                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-300">{activite.description}</p>
   271→                    </div>
   272→                    <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-1">
   273→                      {new Date(activite.date).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   274→                        day: "numeric",
   275→                        month: "short",
   276→                        hour: "2-digit",
   277→                        minute: "2-digit",
   278→                      })}
   279→                    </span>
   280→                  </div>
   281→                );
   282→              })}
   283→            </div>
   284→          )}
   285→        </div>
   286→      </div>
   287→
   288→      {/* Raccourcis rapides */}
   289→      <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800/80 to-slate-800/40">
   290→        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4">Actions rapides</h2>
   291→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   292→          <a
   293→            href="/flashcards"
   294→            className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600/10 border border-blue-500/20 hover:bg-blue-600/20 hover:border-blue-500/40 transition-all duration-200 group"
   295→          >
   296→            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 group-hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-colors">
   297→              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   298→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   299→              </svg>
   300→            </div>
   301→            <div>
   302→              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-300">Reviser les flashcards</p>
   303→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Lancer une session de revision</p>

   307→            href="/quiz"
   308→            className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/20 hover:bg-violet-600/20 hover:border-violet-500/40 transition-all duration-200 group"
   309→          >

                   1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
     4→import VocalChat from "../../components/VocalChat";
     5→
     6→interface ServiceStatus {
     7→  ollama: boolean;
     8→  piper: boolean;
     9→  whisper: boolean;
    10→}
    11→
    12→export default function VocalPage() {
    13→  const [status, setStatus] = useState<ServiceStatus | null>(null);
    14→  const [showChat, setShowChat] = useState(false);
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    fetch("/api/vocal/status")
    18→      .then((r) => r.json())
    19→      .then(setStatus)
    20→      .catch(() => setStatus(null));
    21→  }, []);
    22→
    23→  return (
    24→    <div className="p-6">
    25→      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Prof Vocal</h1>
    26→
    27→      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
    28→        <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-4 border border-slate-700">
    29→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
    30→            <div
    31→              className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
    32→                status?.ollama ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
    33→              }`}
    34→            />
    35→            <h3 className="text-white font-medium">Ollama (LLM)</h3>
    36→          </div>
    37→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
    38→            {status?.ollama ? "Connecte - Mistral" : "Non disponible"}
    39→          </p>
    40→        </div>
    41→
    42→        <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-4 border border-slate-700">
    43→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
    44→            <div
    45→              className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
    46→                status?.whisper ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
    47→              }`}
    48→            />
    49→            <h3 className="text-white font-medium">Whisper (STT)</h3>
    50→          </div>
    51→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
    52→            {status?.whisper ? "Pret" : "Non disponible"}
    53→          </p>
    54→        </div>
    55→
    56→        <div className="bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-4 border border-slate-700">
    57→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
    58→            <div
    59→              className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
    60→                status?.piper ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
    61→              }`}
    62→            />
    63→            <h3 className="text-white font-medium">Piper (TTS)</h3>
    64→          </div>
    65→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">
    66→            {status?.piper ? "Pret - voix FR" : "Non disponible"}
    67→          </p>
    68→        </div>
    69→      </div>
    70→
    71→      {!showChat ? (
    72→        <div className="text-center py-16">
    73→          <p className="text-slate-400 mb-6 text-lg">
    74→            Discutez avec votre professeur IA en vocal ou par texte.
    75→            <br />
    76→            Il connait vos cours et peut vous interroger.
    77→          </p>
    78→          <button
    79→            onClick={() => setShowChat(true)}
    80→            disabled={!status?.ollama}
    81→            className="px-8 py-4 bg-violet-600 text-white rounded-lg text-lg font-medium hover:bg-violet-700 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
    82→          >
    83→            Demarrer une conversation
    84→          </button>
    85→          {!status?.ollama && (
    86→            <p className="text-red-400 mt-4 text-sm">
    87→              Ollama doit etre lance (ollama serve) pour utiliser le prof vocal.
    88→            </p>
    89→          )}
    90→        </div>
    91→      ) : (
    92→        <div className="h-[600px]">
    93→          <VocalChat onClose={() => setShowChat(false)} />
    94→        </div>
    95→      )}
    96→    </div>
    97→  );
    98→}
    99→
              ```

                  ## 👤 user (16:53:08)

                  ✅ **Result:**
                  ```
                       1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface Message {
     6→  role: "user" | "assistant";
     7→  content: string;
     8→}
     9→
    10→interface VocalChatProps {
    11→  onClose?: () => void;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    15→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
    16→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
    17→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
    19→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    20→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
    21→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
    22→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
    23→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    24→
    25→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    26→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
    27→  };
    28→
    29→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
    30→
    31→  const connect = useCallback(() => {
    32→    const ws = new WebSocket(`ws://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
    33→    ws.onopen = () => setIsConnected(true);
    34→    ws.onclose = () => setIsConnected(false);
    35→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
    36→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    37→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
    38→        setMessages((prev) => [
    39→          ...prev,
    40→          { role: "user", content: data.message },
    41→        ]);
    42→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
    43→        setMessages((prev) => [
    44→          ...prev,
    45→          { role: "assistant", content: data.message },
    46→        ]);
    47→        setIsLoading(false);
    48→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
    49→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
    50→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
    51→      }
    52→    };
    53→    wsRef.current = ws;
    54→  }, []);
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    connect();
    58→    return () => wsRef.current?.close();
    59→  }, [connect]);
    60→
    61→  const startRecording = async () => {
    62→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
    63→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
    64→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
    65→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
    66→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
    67→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
    68→      const reader = new FileReader();
    69→      reader.onloadend = () => {
    70→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
    71→        wsRef.current?.send(
    72→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
    73→        );
    74→        setIsLoading(true);
    75→      };
    76→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
    77→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
    78→    };
    79→    recorder.start();
    80→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
    81→    setIsRecording(true);
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const stopRecording = () => {
    85→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
    86→    setIsRecording(false);
    87→  };
    88→
    89→  const sendText = () => {
    90→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
    91→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: inputText }]);
    92→    wsRef.current.send(
    93→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
    94→    );
    95→    setInputText("");
    96→    setIsLoading(true);
    97→  };
    98→
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-700">
   101→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-slate-700">
   102→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   103→          <div
   104→            className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
   105→              isConnected ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
   106→            }`}
   107→          />
   108→          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   109→        </div>
   110→        {onClose && (
   111→          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white">
   112→            X
   113→          </button>
   114→        )}
   115→      </div>
   116→
   117→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
   118→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   119→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-center mt-8">
   120→            Posez une question au professeur...
   121→          </p>
   122→        )}
   123→        {messages.map((msg, i) => (
   124→          <div
   125→            key={i}
   126→            className={`flex ${
   127→              msg.role === "user" ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"
   128→            }`}
   129→          >
   130→            <div
   131→              className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 ${
   132→                msg.role === "user"
   133→                  ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   134→                  : "bg-slate-700 text-slate-100"
   135→              }`}
   136→            >
   137→              {msg.content}
   138→            </div>
   139→          </div>
   140→        ))}
   141→        {isLoading && (
   142→          <div className="flex justify-start">
   143→            <div className="bg-slate-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">
   144→              Reflexion...
   145→            </div>
   146→          </div>
   147→        )}
   148→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   149→      </div>
   150→
   151→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700">
   152→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   153→          <input
   154→            type="text"
   155→            value={inputText}
   156→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   157→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   158→            placeholder="Tapez votre question..."
   159→            className="flex-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 border border-slate-600 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none"
   160→          />
   161→          <button
   162→            onClick={sendText}
   163→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   164→            className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
   165→          >
   166→            Envoyer
   167→          </button>
   168→          <button
   169→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   170→            disabled={!isConnected}
   171→            className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg ${
   172→              isRecording
   173→                ? "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
   174→                : "bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700"
   175→            } text-white disabled:opacity-50`}
   176→          >
   177→            {isRecording ? "Stop" : "Micro"}
   178→          </button>
   179→        </div>
   180→      </div>
   181→    </div>
   182→  );
   183→}
   184→
                  ```

    51→    glow: "hover:shadow-violet-500/10",
    52→    icon: "bg-violet-500/20",
    53→  },
    54→  rose: {
    55→    bg: "bg-rose-500/10",
    56→    border: "border-rose-500/30 hover:border-rose-500/50",
    57→    text: "text-rose-400",
    58→    glow: "hover:shadow-rose-500/10",
    59→    icon: "bg-rose-500/20",
    60→  },
    61→  cyan: {
    62→    bg: "bg-cyan-500/10",
    63→    border: "border-cyan-500/30 hover:border-cyan-500/50",
    64→    text: "text-cyan-400",
    65→    glow: "hover:shadow-cyan-500/10",
    66→    icon: "bg-cyan-500/20",
    67→  },
    68→};
    69→
    70→export default function MatieresPage() {
    71→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    72→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    73→  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);
    74→  const [newMatiere, setNewMatiere] = useState({ nom: "", description: "" });
    75→
    76→  useEffect(() => {
    77→    const fetchMatieres = async () => {
    78→      try {
    79→        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    80→        if (res.ok) {
    81→          const data = await res.json();
    82→          setMatieres(data.length > 0 ? data : defaultMatieres);
    83→        } else {
    84→          setMatieres(defaultMatieres);
    85→        }
    86→      } catch {
    87→        setMatieres(defaultMatieres);
    88→      } finally {
    89→        setLoading(false);
    90→      }
    91→    };
    92→
    93→    fetchMatieres();
    94→  }, []);
    95→
    96→  const handleAddMatiere = async () => {
    97→    if (!newMatiere.nom.trim()) return;
    98→
    99→    try {
   100→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`, {
   101→        method: "POST",
   102→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   103→        body: JSON.stringify(newMatiere),
   104→      });
   105→      if (res.ok) {
   106→        const created = await res.json();
   107→        setMatieres([...matieres, created]);
   108→      }
   109→    } catch (error) {
   110→      console.error("Erreur ajout matiere:", error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    setNewMatiere({ nom: "", description: "" });
   114→    setShowAddModal(false);
   115→  };
   116→
   117→  const colors = Object.keys(colorMap);
   118→
   119→  if (loading) {
   120→    return (
   121→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   122→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   123→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   124→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des matieres...</p>
   125→        </div>
   126→      </div>
   127→    );
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  return (
   131→    <div className="space-y-8">
   132→      {/* Header */}
   133→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   134→        <div>
   135→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Matieres</h1>
   136→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   137→            Explorez les matieres du concours et vos ressources
   138→          </p>
   139→        </div>
   140→        <button
   141→          onClick={() => setShowAddModal(true)}
   142→          className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2"
   143→        >
   144→          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   145→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15" />
   146→          </svg>
   147→          Ajouter
   148→        </button>
   149→      </div>
   150→
   151→      {/* Grid matieres */}
   152→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
   153→        {matieres.map((matiere, index) => {
   154→          const colorKey = matiere.couleur || colors[index % colors.length];
   155→          const style = colorMap[colorKey] || colorMap.blue;
   156→
   157→          return (
   158→            <div
   159→              key={matiere.id || index}
   160→              className={`
   161→                relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border p-6
   162→                bg-slate-800/40 backdrop-blur-sm
   163→                transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 cursor-pointer
   164→                ${style.border} ${style.glow}
   165→              `}
   166→            >
   167→              {/* Decorative gradient */}
   168→              <div className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 rounded-full ${style.bg} blur-2xl -translate-y-8 translate-x-8 opacity-50`} />
   169→
   170→              <div className="relative">
   171→                {/* Icon */}
   172→                <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-xl ${style.icon} flex items-center justify-center mb-4`}>
   173→                  <svg className={`w-6 h-6 ${style.text}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   174→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" />
   175→                  </svg>
   176→                </div>
   177→
   178→                {/* Titre + description */}
   179→                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">{matiere.nom}</h3>
   180→                {matiere.description && (
   181→                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4 line-clamp-2">
   182→                    {matiere.description}
   183→                  </p>
   184→                )}
   185→
   186→                {/* Compteurs */}
   187→                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/40">
   188→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   189→                    <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   190→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m2.25 0H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   191→                    </svg>
   192→                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   193→                      <span className="font-semibold text-slate-200">{matiere.nb_documents}</span> docs
   194→                    </span>
   195→                  </div>
   196→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   197→                    <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   198→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   199→                    </svg>
   200→                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   201→                      <span className="font-semibold text-slate-200">{matiere.nb_flashcards}</span> flashcards
   202→                    </span>
   203→                  </div>
   204→                </div>
   205→              </div>
   206→            </div>
   207→          );
   208→        })}
   209→      </div>
   210→
   211→      {/* Modal ajout matiere */}
   212→      {showAddModal && (
   213→        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   214→          <div className="card w-full max-w-md mx-4 border-slate-600/50">
   215→            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   216→              Ajouter une matiere
   217→            </h2>
   218→            <div className="space-y-4">
   219→              <div>
   220→                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5">
   221→                  Nom de la matiere
   222→                </label>
   223→                <input
   224→                  type="text"
   225→                  value={newMatiere.nom}
   226→                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({ ...newMatiere, nom: e.target.value })}
   227→                  className="input-field w-full"
   228→                  placeholder="Ex: Droit constitutionnel"
   229→                />
   230→              </div>
   231→              <div>
   232→                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5">
   233→                  Description
   234→                </label>
   235→                <textarea
   236→                  value={newMatiere.description}
   237→                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({ ...newMatiere, description: e.target.value })}
   238→                  className="input-field w-full h-24 resize-none"
   239→                  placeholder="Description de la matiere..."
   240→                />
   241→              </div>
   242→            </div>
   243→            <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
   244→              <button
   245→                onClick={() => {
   246→                  setShowAddModal(false);
   247→                  setNewMatiere({ nom: "", description: "" });
   248→                }}
   249→                className="btn-ghost"
   250→              >
   251→                Annuler
   252→              </button>
   253→              <button
   254→                onClick={handleAddMatiere}
   255→                className="btn-primary"
   256→                disabled={!newMatiere.nom.trim()}
   257→              >
   258→                Ajouter
   259→              </button>
   260→            </div>
   261→          </div>
   262→        </div>
   263→      )}
   264→    </div>
   265→  );
   266→}
   267→
                      ```

                          ```
                               1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from "react";
     4→import FlashCard from "@/components/FlashCard";
     5→
     6→const API_BASE = "/api";
     7→
     8→interface FlashcardData {
     9→  id: number;
    10→  question: string;
    11→  reponse: string;
    12→  explication?: string;
    13→  matiere_id?: number;
    14→  matiere_nom?: string;
    15→  next_review?: string;
    16→  ease_factor?: number;
    17→  interval?: number;
    18→  repetitions?: number;
    19→}
    20→
    21→interface Matiere {
    22→  id: number;
    23→  nom: string;
    24→}
    25→
    26→export default function FlashcardsPage() {
    27→  const [flashcards, setFlashcards] = useState<FlashcardData[]>([]);
    28→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    29→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
    30→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
    31→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    32→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<"list" | "review">("list");
    33→  const [reviewedCount, setReviewedCount] = useState(0);
    34→  const [sessionResults, setSessionResults] = useState<{ quality: number }[]>([]);
    35→
    36→  const fetchFlashcards = useCallback(async () => {
    37→    setLoading(true);
    38→    try {
    39→      let url = `${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`;
    40→      if (selectedMatiere) {
    41→        url += `?matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`;
    42→      }
    43→      const res = await fetch(url);
    44→      if (res.ok) {
    45→        const data = await res.json();
    46→        setFlashcards(data);
    47→      }
    48→    } catch (error) {
    49→      console.error("Erreur chargement flashcards:", error);
    50→    } finally {
    51→      setLoading(false);
    52→    }
    53→  }, [selectedMatiere]);
    54→
    55→  const fetchMatieres = useCallback(async () => {
    56→    try {
    57→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    58→      if (res.ok) {
    59→        setMatieres(await res.json());
    60→      }
    61→    } catch (error) {
    62→      console.error("Erreur chargement matieres:", error);
    63→    }
    64→  }, []);
    65→
    66→  useEffect(() => {
    67→    fetchMatieres();
    68→  }, [fetchMatieres]);
    69→
    70→  useEffect(() => {
    71→    fetchFlashcards();
    72→  }, [fetchFlashcards]);
    73→
    74→  const handleReview = async (quality: number) => {
    75→    const card = flashcards[currentIndex];
    76→    if (!card) return;
    77→
    78→    // Envoi de la notation au backend (SM-2)
    79→    try {
    80→      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/${card.id}/review`, {
    81→        method: "POST",
    82→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    83→        body: JSON.stringify({ quality }),
    84→      });
    85→    } catch (error) {
    86→      console.error("Erreur envoi review:", error);
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    setSessionResults([...sessionResults, { quality }]);
    90→    setReviewedCount(reviewedCount + 1);
    91→
    92→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
    93→      setCurrentIndex(currentIndex + 1);
    94→    } else {
    95→      // Session terminee
    96→      setMode("list");
    97→    }
    98→  };
    99→
   100→  const startReview = () => {
   101→    setCurrentIndex(0);
   102→    setReviewedCount(0);
   103→    setSessionResults([]);
   104→    setMode("review");
   105→  };
   106→
   107→  const totalCards = flashcards.length;
   108→  const progress = totalCards > 0 ? Math.round((reviewedCount / totalCards) * 100) : 0;
   109→  const avgQuality =
   110→    sessionResults.length > 0
   111→      ? (sessionResults.reduce((s, r) => s + r.quality, 0) / sessionResults.length).toFixed(1)
   112→      : "0";
   113→
   114→  if (loading) {
   115→    return (
   116→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   117→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   118→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-violet-500/30 border-t-violet-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   119→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des flashcards...</p>
   120→        </div>
   121→      </div>
   122→    );
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  // Mode revision
   126→  if (mode === "review") {
   127→    const currentCard = flashcards[currentIndex];
   128→
   129→    // Session terminee
   130→    if (!currentCard || reviewedCount >= totalCards) {
   131→      return (
   132→        <div className="space-y-8">
   133→          <div className="text-center py-12">
   134→            <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   135→              <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   136→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   137→              </svg>
   138→            </div>
   139→            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Session terminee !</h2>
   140→            <p className="text-slate-400 mb-6">
   141→              Vous avez revise {reviewedCount} carte{reviewedCount > 1 ? "s" : ""}
   142→            </p>
   143→
   144→            {/* Stats session */}
   145→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-sm mx-auto mb-8">
   146→              <div className="card text-center">
   147→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{reviewedCount}</p>
   148→                <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Cartes revisees</p>
   149→              </div>
   150→              <div className="card text-center">
   151→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{avgQuality}</p>
   152→                <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Qualite moyenne</p>
   153→              </div>
   154→            </div>
   155→
   156→            <div className="flex justify-center gap-3">
   157→              <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-secondary">
   158→                Retour
   159→              </button>
   160→              <button
   161→                onClick={() => {
   162→                  fetchFlashcards();
   163→                  startReview();
   164→                }}
   165→                className="btn-primary"
   166→              >
   167→                Nouvelle session
   168→              </button>
   169→            </div>
   170→          </div>
   171→        </div>
   172→      );
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    return (
   176→      <div className="space-y-6">
   177→        {/* Header revision */}
   178→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   179→          <button
   180→            onClick={() => setMode("list")}
   181→            className="btn-ghost flex items-center gap-2"
   182→          >
   183→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   184→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   185→            </svg>
   186→            Quitter
   187→          </button>
   188→          <div className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   189→            {currentIndex + 1} / {totalCards}
   190→          </div>
   191→        </div>
   192→
   193→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   194→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
   195→          <div
   196→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-violet-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   197→            style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
   198→          />
   199→        </div>
   200→
   201→        {/* Flashcard */}
   202→        <div className="py-8">
   203→          <FlashCard
   204→            question={currentCard.question}
   205→            reponse={currentCard.reponse}
   206→            explication={currentCard.explication}
   207→            matiere={currentCard.matiere_nom}
   208→            onReview={handleReview}
   209→          />
   210→        </div>
   211→      </div>
   212→    );
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  // Mode liste
   216→  return (
   217→    <div className="space-y-8">
   218→      {/* Header */}
   219→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   220→        <div>
   221→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Flashcards</h1>
   222→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   223→            Revisez vos connaissances avec la repetition espacee
   224→          </p>
   225→        </div>
   226→        {totalCards > 0 && (
   227→          <button onClick={startReview} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   228→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   229→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z" />
   230→            </svg>
   231→            Lancer la revision ({totalCards})
   232→          </button>
   233→        )}
   234→      </div>
   235→
   236→      {/* Filtre par matiere */}
   237→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   238→        <button
   239→          onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   240→          className={`
   241→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   242→            ${!selectedMatiere
   243→              ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   244→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   245→            }
   246→          `}
   247→        >
   248→          Toutes
   249→        </button>
   250→        {matieres.map((matiere) => (
   251→          <button
   252→            key={matiere.id}
   253→            onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(matiere.id)}
   254→            className={`
   255→              px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   256→              ${selectedMatiere === matiere.id
   257→                ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   258→                : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   259→              }
   260→            `}
   261→          >
   262→            {matiere.nom}
   263→          </button>
   264→        ))}
   265→      </div>
   266→
   267→      {/* Stats session precedente */}
   268→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   269→        <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500/5 to-blue-500/5 border-violet-500/20">
   270→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
   271→            <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   272→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z" />
   273→            </svg>
   274→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-violet-300">Derniere session</h3>
   275→          </div>
   276→          <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   277→            {sessionResults.length} cartes revisees - Qualite moyenne : {avgQuality}/5
   278→          </p>
   279→        </div>
   280→      )}
   281→
   282→      {/* Liste ou etat vide */}
   283→      {totalCards === 0 ? (
   284→        <div className="text-center py-16">

## Frontend Files Content Summary

### 1. **frontend/app/sidebar.tsx** (147 lines)
- Client component managing navigation sidebar
- 5 navigation items: Dashboard, Matieres, Flashcards, Quiz, Vocal
- Mobile responsive with hamburger menu overlay
- Logo section showing "IACA" with user info footer (Julien)
- Uses dark theme (slate-900/95 background) with blue/violet accents

### 2. **frontend/app/page.tsx** (339 lines - Dashboard)
- "use client" component
- Fetches stats from `/api/documents/`, `/api/flashcards/`, `/api/quiz/`, `/api/flashcards/revision`
- Displays 4 stat cards: Documents, Flashcards, Quiz, A reviser
- Shows "Prochaines revisions" section (top 5 due flashcards)
- Shows "Activite recente" section (empty in current state)
- Quick action buttons linking to flashcards, quiz, matieres
- Uses gradient cards with colored icons (blue, violet, amber, emerald)

### 3. **frontend/app/vocal/page.tsx** (99 lines)
- Service status display for Ollama (LLM), Whisper (STT), Piper (TTS)
- Shows green/red connection indicators
- Button to "Demarrer une conversation" (start conversation)
- Conditionally renders VocalChat component when showChat is true
- Currently hardcoded text references Mistral but should be phi3:mini based on CLAUDE.md

### 4. **frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx** (184 lines)
- WebSocket client connecting to `ws://localhost:8000/api/vocal/ws`
- Message state with role-based styling (user/assistant)
- Audio recording via MediaRecorder API
- Text input field with Enter key support
- Receives 3 message types: transcription, text, audio
- Auto-play audio responses from server
- Status indicator showing connection state

### 5. **frontend/app/matieres/page.tsx** (266 lines)
- Lists all "Matieres" (subjects) from `/api/matieres`
- Colorful cards (blue, emerald, amber, violet, rose, cyan)
- Shows document and flashcard counts per matiere
- Modal dialog for adding new matieres
- Default matieres array as fallback (6 subjects: Droit public, Finances publiques, Economie, Questions europeennes, Questions sociales, GRH)

### 6. **frontend/app/flashcards/page.tsx** (323 lines)
- Two modes: "list" and "review"
- Fetches from `/api/flashcards/revision` with optional matiere_id filter
- Filter buttons for all matieres
- Starts review session with FlashCard component
- SM-2 algorithm: sends quality scores (0-5) to `/api/flashcards/{id}/review`
- Shows session stats on completion (reviewed count, avg quality)
- Progress bar during review session
- Empty state messaging

### 7. **frontend/app/layout.tsx** (35 lines)
- Server-side root layout (NOT "use client")
- Imports Sidebar as client component
- Metadata configuration (title, description)
- Flex layout: Sidebar + Main content area
- Global CSS imports (globals.css)
- Main content maxes at 7xl width with padding

## Key Observations

1. **API Base URL**: All pages use `const API_BASE = "/api"` (relative proxy)
2. **Language**: Entirely in French UI text
3. **Color Scheme**: Dark theme with slate-900 background, colored accents
4. **State Management**: React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback)
5. **Components Used**: Sidebar, VocalChat, FlashCard (imported from components)
6. **API Endpoints Called**:
   - `/api/documents/`
   - `/api/flashcards/revision`
   - `/api/flashcards/{id}/review`
   - `/api/matieres`
   - `/api/quiz/`
   - `/api/vocal/status`
   - `ws://localhost:8000/api/vocal/ws` (WebSocket)

All files are complete and functional per the CLAUDE.md project status (Phase 7 complete).

                          ```
                               1→"""
     2→Router pour la gestion des flashcards avec revision espacee (algorithme SM-2).
     3→"""
     4→
     5→from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
     6→from typing import Optional
     7→
     8→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
     9→from sqlalchemy import select
    10→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    11→
    12→from app.database import get_db
    13→from app.models.flashcard import Flashcard
    14→from app.schemas.flashcard import FlashcardCreate, FlashcardResponse, FlashcardReview
    15→
    16→router = APIRouter()
    17→
    18→
    19→@router.post("/", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
    20→async def create_flashcard(
    21→    flashcard_in: FlashcardCreate,
    22→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    23→):
    24→    """Cree une nouvelle flashcard."""
    25→    flashcard = Flashcard(
    26→        question=flashcard_in.question,
    27→        reponse=flashcard_in.reponse,
    28→        explication=flashcard_in.explication,
    29→        difficulte=flashcard_in.difficulte,
    30→        matiere_id=flashcard_in.matiere_id,
    31→        document_id=flashcard_in.document_id,
    32→    )
    33→
    34→    db.add(flashcard)
    35→    await db.commit()
    36→    await db.refresh(flashcard)
    37→
    38→    return flashcard
    39→
    40→
    41→@router.get("/", response_model=list[FlashcardResponse])
    42→async def list_flashcards(
    43→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    44→    document_id: Optional[int] = None,
    45→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    46→):
    47→    """Liste les flashcards avec filtres optionnels par matiere et/ou document."""
    48→    query = select(Flashcard).order_by(Flashcard.created_at.desc())
    49→
    50→    if matiere_id is not None:
    51→        query = query.where(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    52→    if document_id is not None:
    53→        query = query.where(Flashcard.document_id == document_id)
    54→
    55→    result = await db.execute(query)
    56→    flashcards = result.scalars().all()
    57→    return flashcards
    58→
    59→
    60→@router.get("/revision", response_model=list[FlashcardResponse])
    61→async def get_revision_flashcards(
    62→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    63→    limit: int = 20,
    64→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    65→):
    66→    """
    67→    Recupere les flashcards dont la prochaine revision est passee ou aujourd'hui.
    68→    Triees par date de revision la plus ancienne en premier (les plus urgentes).
    69→    """
    70→    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    71→    query = (
    72→        select(Flashcard)
    73→        .where(Flashcard.prochaine_revision <= now)
    74→        .order_by(Flashcard.prochaine_revision.asc())
    75→        .limit(limit)
    76→    )
    77→
    78→    if matiere_id is not None:
    79→        query = query.where(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    80→
    81→    result = await db.execute(query)
    82→    flashcards = result.scalars().all()
    83→    return flashcards
    84→
    85→
    86→@router.post("/{flashcard_id}/review", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
    87→async def review_flashcard(
    88→    flashcard_id: int,
    89→    review: FlashcardReview,
    90→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    91→):
    92→    """
    93→    Met a jour une flashcard apres revision en utilisant l'algorithme SM-2.
    94→
    95→    Le champ `qualite` (0-5) represente la qualite de la reponse:
    96→        - 0: Aucun souvenir
    97→        - 1: Mauvaise reponse, mais reconnait la bonne
    98→        - 2: Mauvaise reponse, mais la bonne semble facile a retenir
    99→        - 3: Bonne reponse avec difficulte importante
   100→        - 4: Bonne reponse apres hesitation
   101→        - 5: Reponse parfaite
   102→    """
   103→    if not 0 <= review.qualite <= 5:
   104→        raise HTTPException(
   105→            status_code=400, detail="La qualite doit etre entre 0 et 5"
   106→        )
   107→
   108→    result = await db.execute(
   109→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   110→    )
   111→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   112→
   113→    if flashcard is None:
   114→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   115→
   116→    # --- Algorithme SM-2 ---
   117→    q = review.qualite
   118→    ef = flashcard.facteur_facilite
   119→    reps = flashcard.repetitions
   120→    interval = flashcard.intervalle_jours
   121→
   122→    # Nouveau facteur de facilite (EF)
   123→    # EF' = EF + (0.1 - (5 - q) * (0.08 + (5 - q) * 0.02))
   124→    new_ef = ef + (0.1 - (5 - q) * (0.08 + (5 - q) * 0.02))
   125→    # EF ne doit jamais descendre en dessous de 1.3
   126→    new_ef = max(1.3, new_ef)
   127→
   128→    if q < 3:
   129→        # Reponse incorrecte : on recommence les repetitions
   130→        new_reps = 0
   131→        new_interval = 1.0
   132→    else:
   133→        # Reponse correcte
   134→        if reps == 0:
   135→            new_interval = 1.0
   136→        elif reps == 1:
   137→            new_interval = 6.0
   138→        else:
   139→            new_interval = interval * new_ef
   140→
   141→        new_reps = reps + 1
   142→
   143→    # Calculer la prochaine date de revision
   144→    prochaine_revision = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(days=new_interval)
   145→
   146→    # Mettre a jour la flashcard
   147→    flashcard.facteur_facilite = round(new_ef, 2)
   148→    flashcard.repetitions = new_reps
   149→    flashcard.intervalle_jours = round(new_interval, 1)
   150→    flashcard.prochaine_revision = prochaine_revision
   151→
   152→    await db.commit()
   153→    await db.refresh(flashcard)
   154→
   155→    return flashcard
   156→
   157→
   158→@router.get("/{flashcard_id}", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
   159→async def get_flashcard(
   160→    flashcard_id: int,
   161→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   162→):
   163→    """Recupere une flashcard par son ID."""
   164→    result = await db.execute(
   165→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   166→    )
   167→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   168→
   169→    if flashcard is None:
   170→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   171→
   172→    return flashcard
   173→
   174→
   175→@router.delete("/{flashcard_id}")
   176→async def delete_flashcard(
   177→    flashcard_id: int,
   178→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   179→):
   180→    """Supprime une flashcard."""
   181→    result = await db.execute(
   182→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   183→    )
   184→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   185→
   186→    if flashcard is None:
   187→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   188→
   189→    await db.delete(flashcard)
   190→    await db.commit()
   191→
   192→    return {"message": "Flashcard supprimee", "id": flashcard_id}
   193→
                          ```
