                                                                                                                            ## 👤 user (12:51:58)

                                                                                                                            ✅ **Result:**
                                                                                                                            ```
                                                                                                                                 1→import asyncio
     2→import json
     3→import re
     4→
     5→from google import genai
     6→
     7→from app.config import settings
     8→
     9→
    10→def _get_client():
    11→    return genai.Client(api_key=settings.google_api_key)
    12→
    13→
    14→def _generate_sync(prompt: str) -> str:
    15→    """Synchronous Gemini call, to be run in a thread."""
    16→    client = _get_client()
    17→    response = client.models.generate_content(
    18→        model="gemini-2.0-flash",
    19→        contents=prompt,
    20→    )
    21→    return response.text
    22→
    23→
    24→async def _generate(prompt: str) -> str:
    25→    """Run Gemini generation in a thread to avoid blocking the event loop."""
    26→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_generate_sync, prompt)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def rechercher_ressources(sujet: str, matiere: str) -> dict:
    30→    """Search for external learning resources related to a topic."""
    31→    prompt = f"""Tu es un conseiller pédagogique spécialisé en {matiere} pour la préparation aux concours administratifs français.
    32→
    33→Pour le sujet "{sujet}", recommande des ressources d'apprentissage complémentaires.
    34→
    35→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    36→{{
    37→  "podcasts": [
    38→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "...", "description": "..."}}
    39→  ],
    40→  "videos_youtube": [
    41→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "https://youtube.com/...", "description": "..."}}
    42→  ],
    43→  "articles": [
    44→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "...", "description": "..."}}
    45→  ],
    46→  "livres": [
    47→    {{"titre": "...", "auteur": "...", "description": "..."}}
    48→  ]
    49→}}
    50→
    51→Donne 2-3 ressources par catégorie. Privilégie les sources françaises et académiques."""
    52→
    53→    text = await _generate(prompt)
    54→    match = re.search(r'\{.*\}', text, re.DOTALL)
    55→    if not match:
    56→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    57→    return json.loads(match.group())
    58→
    59→
    60→async def generer_mind_map(contenu: str, sujet: str) -> dict:
    61→    """Generate a mind map structure from content."""
    62→    prompt = f"""Crée une mind map structurée pour le sujet "{sujet}" à partir du contenu suivant.
    63→
    64→CONTENU:
    65→{contenu[:4000]}
    66→
    67→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    68→{{
    69→  "centre": "{sujet}",
    70→  "branches": [
    71→    {{
    72→      "nom": "...",
    73→      "sous_branches": ["...", "..."],
    74→      "details": "..."
    75→    }}
    76→  ]
    77→}}
    78→
    79→Maximum 6 branches principales, chacune avec 2-4 sous-branches."""
    80→
    81→    text = await _generate(prompt)
    82→    match = re.search(r'\{.*\}', text, re.DOTALL)
    83→    if not match:
    84→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    85→    return json.loads(match.group())
    86→
    87→
    88→async def generer_chronologie(contenu: str, sujet: str) -> list[dict]:
    89→    """Generate a timeline from content."""
    90→    prompt = f"""Extrais une chronologie des événements importants liés à "{sujet}" depuis le contenu.
    91→
    92→CONTENU:
    93→{contenu[:4000]}
    94→
    95→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    96→[
    97→  {{"date": "...", "evenement": "...", "importance": "haute/moyenne/basse"}}
    98→]
    99→
   100→Ordonne chronologiquement."""
   101→
   102→    text = await _generate(prompt)
   103→    match = re.search(r'\[.*\]', text, re.DOTALL)
   104→    if not match:
   105→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
   106→    return json.loads(match.group())
   107→
                                                                                                                            ```

                                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                                         1→"""
     2→Router pour la gestion des documents (upload, liste, detail, suppression).
     3→"""
     4→
     5→import os
     6→import shutil
     7→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     8→
     9→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, UploadFile, File, Form
    10→from sqlalchemy import select
    11→from sqlalchemy.orm import defer
    12→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from app.database import get_db
    16→from app.models.document import Document
    17→from app.schemas.document import DocumentResponse, DocumentListItem
    18→from app.config import settings
    19→from app.services.document_parser import parse_document
    20→
    21→router = APIRouter()
    22→
    23→ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = {".pdf", ".pptx", ".docx"}
    24→
    25→
    26→@router.post("/upload", response_model=DocumentResponse)
    27→async def upload_document(
    28→    file: UploadFile = File(...),
    29→    titre: Optional[str] = Form(None),
    30→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = Form(None),
    31→    chapitre: str = Form(""),
    32→    tags: str = Form(""),
    33→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    34→):
    35→    """Upload un fichier PDF, PPTX ou DOCX, extrait le texte et sauvegarde."""
    36→    # Verifier l'extension
    37→    filename = file.filename or "document"
    38→    extension = os.path.splitext(filename)[1].lower()
    39→    if extension not in ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS:
    40→        raise HTTPException(
    41→            status_code=400,
    42→            detail=f"Type de fichier non supporte: {extension}. "
    43→            f"Formats acceptes: {', '.join(ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS)}",
    44→        )
    45→
    46→    # Creer le dossier d'upload si necessaire
    47→    upload_dir = settings.upload_path
    48→    os.makedirs(upload_dir, exist_ok=True)
    49→
    50→    # Generer un nom de fichier unique
    51→    timestamp = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    52→    safe_filename = f"{timestamp}_{filename}"
    53→    file_path = os.path.join(upload_dir, safe_filename)
    54→
    55→    # Sauvegarder le fichier
    56→    try:
    57→        with open(file_path, "wb") as buffer:
    58→            shutil.copyfileobj(file.file, buffer)
    59→    except Exception as e:
    60→        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f"Erreur lors de la sauvegarde: {str(e)}")
    61→    finally:
    62→        await file.close()
    63→
    64→    # Extraire le texte
    65→    try:
    66→        contenu_extrait = await parse_document(file_path)
    67→    except Exception as e:
    68→        # En cas d'erreur d'extraction, on garde le document mais sans contenu
    69→        contenu_extrait = f"[Erreur d'extraction: {str(e)}]"
    70→
    71→    # Creer l'enregistrement en base
    72→    document = Document(
    73→        titre=titre or os.path.splitext(filename)[0],
    74→        fichier_path=file_path,
    75→        type_fichier=extension.lstrip("."),
    76→        contenu_extrait=contenu_extrait,
    77→        matiere_id=matiere_id,
    78→        chapitre=chapitre,
    79→        tags=tags,
    80→    )
    81→
    82→    db.add(document)
    83→    await db.commit()
    84→    await db.refresh(document)
    85→
    86→    return document
    87→
    88→
    89→@router.get("/", response_model=list[DocumentListItem])
    90→async def list_documents(
    91→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    92→    limit: int = 50,
    93→    offset: int = 0,
    94→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    95→):
    96→    """Liste les documents (sans contenu_extrait), avec pagination et filtre optionnel."""
    97→    query = select(Document).options(defer(Document.contenu_extrait)).order_by(Document.created_at.desc()).limit(limit).offset(offset)
    98→    if matiere_id is not None:
    99→        query = query.where(Document.matiere_id == matiere_id)
   100→
   101→    result = await db.execute(query)
   102→    documents = result.scalars().all()
   103→    return documents
   104→
   105→
   106→@router.get("/{document_id}", response_model=DocumentResponse)
   107→async def get_document(
   108→    document_id: int,
   109→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   110→):
   111→    """Recupere un document par son ID."""
   112→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
   113→    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   114→
   115→    if document is None:
   116→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document non trouve")
   117→
   118→    return document
   119→
   120→
   121→@router.delete("/{document_id}")
   122→async def delete_document(
   123→    document_id: int,
   124→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   125→):
   126→    """Supprime un document et son fichier associe."""
   127→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
   128→    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   129→
   130→    if document is None:
   131→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document non trouve")
   132→
   133→    # Supprimer le fichier physique
   134→    if os.path.exists(document.fichier_path):
   135→        try:
   136→            os.remove(document.fichier_path)
   137→        except OSError:
   138→            pass  # Le fichier n'existe plus, on continue
   139→
   140→    await db.delete(document)
   141→    await db.commit()
   142→
   143→    return {"message": "Document supprime", "id": document_id}
   144→
                                                                                                                    ```

                                  ```
     5→from app.database import Base

     7→
     8→class Flashcard(Base):
     9→    __tablename__ = "flashcards"
    10→
    11→    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    12→    question = Column(Text, nullable=False)

    16→    matiere_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("matieres.id"), nullable=True)
    17→    document_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("documents.id"), nullable=True)
    18→    # Spaced repetition fields
    19→    intervalle_jours = Column(Float, default=1.0)
    20→    facteur_facilite = Column(Float, default=2.5)
    21→    repetitions = Column(Integer, default=0)
    22→    prochaine_revision = Column(DateTime, default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    23→    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    24→
    25→    matiere = relationship("Matiere", back_populates="flashcards")
    26→
                                  ```

## Available Workers
- w1 (Haiku) - light/fast tasks
- w2 (Sonnet) - medium complexity
- w3 (Opus) - heavy/complex tasks  
- w4 (AMP/orchestrator) - can also do tasks
- w5 (Codex) - code generation

## 4 Major Features Needed

### Feature 1: Import Missing Documents
- Current: 316 docs in DB from `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/docs/`
- Missing: ~1000 files from `/home/julien/Téléchargements/drive-download-20260226T072425Z-3-001/`

- Existing import script: `scripts/import_docs_v2.py` with hardcoded MATIERE_MAP for 5 matieres
- Document model: id, titre, fichier_path, type_fichier, contenu_extrait, matiere_id, chapitre, tags, created_at

### Feature 2: Fiches (Study Sheets) Feature
- NEW feature: structured study sheets per course section
- Must appear BEFORE flashcards/quizzes in the flow
- Each fiche should have sections (like chapters)
- Flashcards and quizzes should be proposed at the END of each fiche
- Need: backend model + schema + router + service for AI generation + frontend page + sidebar entry
- Backend pattern to follow: same as Flashcard model/router/schema pattern
- Fiche model needs: id, titre, contenu (structured markdown/HTML), matiere_id, document_id, sections (could be JSON or separate table), chapitre, tags, ordre (ordering), created_at

### Feature 3: Fix Vocal Professor
- Error: "La connexion avec ws://localhost:8000/api/vocal/ws a été interrompue pendant le chargement de la page"
- Backend vocal.py WebSocket endpoint exists but has poor error handling
- Ollama was switched from mistral to phi3:mini (which is now downloaded)
- Need: proper error handling, logging, verify ollama is responsive
- Frontend VocalChat.tsx component exists but WS connection drops
- User wants hands-free voice Q&A: speak → transcribe → answer → TTS → speak again (loop)
- Need to fix both backend WS stability and frontend reconnection logic

### Feature 4: Reorganize Navigation (Burger Menu)
- Current sidebar has 5 flat items: Dashboard, Matieres, Flashcards, Quiz, Vocal
- Need: hierarchical navigation organized by matiere → cours → fiches → flashcards/quiz
- Need to add "Fiches" entry in sidebar
- Burger menu on mobile already exists (sidebar.tsx has mobile drawer)
- Need grouped sections in sidebar: "Apprentissage" (Fiches, Flashcards, Quiz), "Outils" (Vocal, MindMap), etc.

## Current Architecture
- Backend: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + SQLite at `backend/app/`
- Frontend: Next.js 14 App Router + Tailwind at `frontend/app/`
- Services: claude_service.py, ollama_service.py, whisper_service.py, piper_service.py, gemini_service.py
- DB: 5 matieres, 316 docs, 21 flashcards, 9 quiz

## Key Files
- backend/app/models/ (matiere.py, document.py, flashcard.py, quiz.py)
- backend/app/routers/ (matiere.py, documents.py, flashcards.py, quiz.py, vocal.py, recommandations.py)
- backend/app/schemas/ (same structure as models)
- backend/app/services/ (claude_service, ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service, document_parser)
- backend/app/main.py, config.py, database.py
- frontend/app/ (page.tsx, layout.tsx, sidebar.tsx, matieres/page.tsx, flashcards/page.tsx, quiz/page.tsx, vocal/page.tsx)
- frontend/components/ (FlashCard.tsx, QuizQuestion.tsx, VocalChat.tsx, MindMap.tsx)
- scripts/import_docs_v2.py

## Requirements
1. Design the plan as PHASES with clear task IDs
2. Assign each task to a specific worker (w1-w5)
3. Tasks should be atomic (15-30 min each), with clear acceptance criteria
4. Maximize parallelism - all 5 workers should be busy
5. Consider dependencies between tasks (e.g., backend model must exist before frontend page)
6. The user wants fiches to be the main learning flow: browse matiere → read fiche → do flashcards/quiz at end

Please produce a detailed plan with phases, task assignments, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.

                  ```
                       1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Import bulk des documents de cours dans l'API IACA.
     4→Mappe chaque dossier docs/<matiere>/ au bon matiere_id.
     5→Usage: python3 scripts/import_docs_v2.py [docs_root]
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import os
     9→import sys
    10→import json
    11→import time
    12→import urllib.request
    13→import urllib.error
    14→import mimetypes
    15→import io
    16→
    17→BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
    18→DOCS_ROOT = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "docs"
    19→LOG_FILE = "logs/import_docs.log"
    20→
    21→# Mapping dossier → matiere_id
    22→MATIERE_MAP = {
    23→    "droit-public": 1,
    24→    "economie-finances-publiques": 2,
    25→    "questions-contemporaines": 3,
    26→    "questions-sociales": 4,
    27→    "relations-internationales": 5,
    28→}
    29→
    30→ALLOWED_EXT = {".pdf", ".pptx", ".docx"}
    31→
    32→
    33→def multipart_encode(fields, files):
    34→    """Encode multipart/form-data."""
    35→    boundary = b"----PythonImportBoundary7369421"
    36→    body = io.BytesIO()
    37→    for name, value in fields.items():
    38→        body.write(b"--" + boundary + b"\r\n")
    39→        body.write(f'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="{name}"\r\n\r\n'.encode())
    40→        body.write(str(value).encode() + b"\r\n")
    41→    for name, (filename, data, content_type) in files.items():
    42→        body.write(b"--" + boundary + b"\r\n")
    43→        body.write(f'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="{name}"; filename="{filename}"\r\n'.encode())
    44→        body.write(f"Content-Type: {content_type}\r\n\r\n".encode())
    45→        body.write(data + b"\r\n")
    46→    body.write(b"--" + boundary + b"--\r\n")
    47→    return body.getvalue(), b"multipart/form-data; boundary=" + boundary
    48→
    49→
    50→def upload_file(file_path, matiere_id, chapitre, tags):
    51→    """Upload un fichier via POST /api/documents/upload."""
    52→    filename = os.path.basename(file_path)
    53→    ext = os.path.splitext(filename)[1].lower()
    54→    content_type = {
    55→        ".pdf": "application/pdf",
    56→        ".docx": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document",
    57→        ".pptx": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation",
    58→    }.get(ext, "application/octet-stream")
    59→
    60→    with open(file_path, "rb") as f:
    61→        file_data = f.read()
    62→
    63→    fields = {
    64→        "matiere_id": str(matiere_id),
    65→        "chapitre": chapitre,
    66→        "tags": tags,
    67→    }
    68→    files = {"file": (filename, file_data, content_type)}
    69→    body, content_type_header = multipart_encode(fields, files)
    70→
    71→    req = urllib.request.Request(
    72→        f"{BASE_URL}/api/documents/upload",
    73→        data=body,
    74→        headers={"Content-Type": content_type_header.decode()},
    75→        method="POST",
    76→    )
    77→    try:
    78→        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp:
    79→            return resp.status, json.loads(resp.read())
    80→    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    81→        return e.code, e.read().decode()
    82→    except Exception as e:
    83→        return 0, str(e)
    84→
    85→
    86→def collect_files():
    87→    """Collecte tous les fichiers à importer avec leur matiere_id."""
    88→    files = []
    89→    for matiere_slug, matiere_id in MATIERE_MAP.items():
    90→        matiere_dir = os.path.join(DOCS_ROOT, matiere_slug)
    91→        if not os.path.isdir(matiere_dir):
    92→            print(f"[WARN] Dossier manquant: {matiere_dir}")
    93→            continue
    94→        for root, _, filenames in os.walk(matiere_dir):
    95→            for fname in sorted(filenames):
    96→                ext = os.path.splitext(fname)[1].lower()
    97→                if ext not in ALLOWED_EXT:
    98→                    continue
    99→                full_path = os.path.join(root, fname)
   100→                relative = os.path.relpath(full_path, matiere_dir)
   101→                chapitre = os.path.dirname(relative)
   102→                if chapitre == ".":
   103→                    chapitre = ""
   104→                files.append({
   105→                    "path": full_path,
   106→                    "matiere_id": matiere_id,
   107→                    "matiere_slug": matiere_slug,
   108→                    "chapitre": chapitre,
   109→                    "tags": matiere_slug,
   110→                })
   111→    return files
   112→
   113→
   114→def main():
   115→    os.makedirs("logs", exist_ok=True)
   116→    files = collect_files()
   117→    total = len(files)
   118→    print(f"Fichiers à importer: {total}")
   119→    print(f"Destination: {BASE_URL}")
   120→    print("-" * 60)
   121→
   122→    uploaded = 0
   123→    failed = 0
   124→    skipped = 0
   125→
   126→    with open(LOG_FILE, "w") as log:
   127→        log.write(f"Import démarré: {time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n")
   128→        log.write(f"Total fichiers: {total}\n\n")
   129→
   130→        for i, f in enumerate(files, 1):
   131→            path = f["path"]
   132→            size_mb = os.path.getsize(path) / 1024 / 1024
   133→            fname = os.path.basename(path)
   134→            print(f"[{i:3d}/{total}] {f['matiere_slug']}/{fname[:50]} ({size_mb:.1f}MB)...", end=" ", flush=True)
   135→
   136→            status, resp = upload_file(path, f["matiere_id"], f["chapitre"], f["tags"])
   137→
   138→            if 200 <= status < 300:
   139→                uploaded += 1
   140→                doc_id = resp.get("id", "?") if isinstance(resp, dict) else "?"
   141→                print(f"OK (id={doc_id})")
   142→                log.write(f"[OK] {path} → doc_id={doc_id}\n")
   143→            else:
   144→                failed += 1
   145→                err = resp if isinstance(resp, str) else json.dumps(resp)[:100]
   146→                print(f"ERREUR HTTP {status}: {err[:80]}")
   147→                log.write(f"[KO] {path} HTTP {status}: {err}\n")
   148→
   149→        log.write(f"\nImport terminé: {time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n")
   150→        log.write(f"Résultat: {uploaded} OK, {failed} KO, {skipped} ignorés\n")
   151→
   152→    print("=" * 60)
   153→    print(f"Résultat: {uploaded} uploadés, {failed} erreurs")
   154→    print(f"Log: {LOG_FILE}")
   155→
   156→
   157→if __name__ == "__main__":
   158→    main()
   159→
                  ```

                                              ## 👤 user (16:42:48)

                                              ✅ **Result:**
                                              ```
                                                   1→import base64
     2→import json
     3→import logging
     4→
     5→from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
     6→
     7→from app.services import ollama_service, whisper_service, piper_service
     8→
     9→logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    10→router = APIRouter()
    11→
    12→
    13→@router.websocket("/ws")
    14→async def vocal_chat(websocket: WebSocket):
    15→    """WebSocket endpoint for vocal chat with the AI professor.
    16→
    17→    Protocol:
    18→    - Client sends: {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 audio>"} or {"type": "text", "message": "..."}
    19→    - Server responds: {"type": "text", "message": "..."} then {"type": "audio", "data": "<base64 wav>"}
    20→    """
    21→    await websocket.accept()
    22→    historique: list[dict] = []
    23→
    24→    try:
    25→        while True:
    26→            raw = await websocket.receive_text()
    27→            try:
    28→                data = json.loads(raw)
    29→            except json.JSONDecodeError:
    30→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "JSON invalide"})
    31→                continue
    32→
    33→            # Get user message (either from audio transcription or direct text)
    34→            if data.get("type") == "audio":
    35→                audio_bytes = base64.b64decode(data["data"])
    36→                user_message = await whisper_service.transcrire(audio_bytes)
    37→                await websocket.send_json({
    38→                    "type": "transcription",
    39→                    "message": user_message,
    40→                })
    41→            elif data.get("type") == "text":
    42→                user_message = data["message"]
    43→            else:
    44→                await websocket.send_json({"type": "error", "message": "Type invalide"})
    45→                continue
    46→
    47→            # Get AI response from Ollama
    48→            response_text = await ollama_service.chat(user_message, historique)
    49→
    50→            # Update history
    51→            historique.append({"role": "user", "content": user_message})
    52→            historique.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response_text})
    53→            # Keep history manageable
    54→            if len(historique) > 20:
    55→                historique = historique[-20:]
    56→
    57→            # Send text response
    58→            await websocket.send_json({
    59→                "type": "text",
    60→                "message": response_text,
    61→            })
    62→
    63→            # Generate and send audio response (limit TTS to 500 chars to stay under WS 1MB limit)
    64→            try:
    65→                tts_text = response_text[:200]
    66→                audio_bytes = await piper_service.synthetiser(tts_text)
    67→                await websocket.send_json({
    68→                    "type": "audio",
    69→                    "data": base64.b64encode(audio_bytes).decode(),
    70→                })
    71→            except Exception:
    72→                # TTS not available, text-only fallback
    73→                pass
    74→
    75→    except WebSocketDisconnect:
    76→        pass
    77→    except Exception as e:
    78→        logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket vocal: {type(e).__name__}: {e}", exc_info=True)
    79→
    80→
    81→@router.get("/status")
    82→async def vocal_status():
    83→    """Check availability of vocal services."""
    84→    ollama_ok = await ollama_service.check_disponible()
    85→    piper_ok = await piper_service.check_disponible()
    86→    return {
    87→        "ollama": ollama_ok,
    88→        "piper": piper_ok,
    89→        "whisper": True,  # Whisper is always available (Python package)
    90→    }
    91→
                                              ```

                                                  ```
                                                       1→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
     2→from sqlalchemy import select
     3→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
     4→
     5→from app.database import get_db
     6→from app.models.document import Document
     7→from app.models.flashcard import Flashcard
     8→from app.models.matiere import Matiere
     9→from app.models.quiz import Quiz, QuizQuestion
    10→from app.services import claude_service, gemini_service, document_parser
    11→
    12→router = APIRouter()
    13→
    14→
    15→@router.post("/generer-flashcards/{document_id}")
    16→async def pipeline_flashcards(
    17→    document_id: int,
    18→    nb: int = 10,
    19→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    20→):
    21→    """O10: Pipeline complet - Document → extraction → Claude → flashcards en DB."""
    22→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
    23→    doc = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    24→    if not doc:
    25→        raise HTTPException(404, "Document non trouvé")
    26→
    27→    # Extract content if not already done
    28→    contenu = doc.contenu_extrait
    29→    if not contenu:
    30→        contenu = await document_parser.parse_document(doc.fichier_path)
    31→        doc.contenu_extrait = contenu
    32→        await db.commit()
    33→
    34→    # Get matiere name
    35→    matiere_nom = "droit public"
    36→    if doc.matiere_id:
    37→        mat_result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == doc.matiere_id))
    38→        mat = mat_result.scalar_one_or_none()
    39→        if mat:
    40→            matiere_nom = mat.nom
    41→
    42→    # Generate flashcards via Claude
    43→    flashcards_data = await claude_service.generer_flashcards(contenu, matiere_nom, nb)
    44→
    45→    # Save to DB
    46→    created = []
    47→    for fc in flashcards_data:
    48→        flashcard = Flashcard(
    49→            question=fc["question"],
    50→            reponse=fc["reponse"],
    51→            explication=fc.get("explication", ""),
    52→            difficulte=fc.get("difficulte", 1),
    53→            matiere_id=doc.matiere_id,
    54→            document_id=doc.id,
    55→        )
    56→        db.add(flashcard)
    57→        created.append(fc)
    58→
    59→    await db.commit()
    60→    return {"generated": len(created), "flashcards": created}
    61→
    62→
    63→@router.post("/generer-qcm/{document_id}")
    64→async def pipeline_qcm(
    65→    document_id: int,
    66→    nb: int = 5,
    67→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    68→):
    69→    """Pipeline: Document → Claude → QCM en DB."""
    70→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
    71→    doc = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    72→    if not doc:
    73→        raise HTTPException(404, "Document non trouvé")
    74→
    75→    contenu = doc.contenu_extrait
    76→    if not contenu:
    77→        contenu = await document_parser.parse_document(doc.fichier_path)
    78→        doc.contenu_extrait = contenu
    79→        await db.commit()
    80→
    81→    matiere_nom = "droit public"
    82→    if doc.matiere_id:
    83→        mat_result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == doc.matiere_id))
    84→        mat = mat_result.scalar_one_or_none()
    85→        if mat:
    86→            matiere_nom = mat.nom
    87→
    88→    qcm_data = await claude_service.generer_qcm(contenu, matiere_nom, nb)
    89→
    90→    quiz = Quiz(
    91→        titre=f"QCM - {doc.titre}",
    92→        matiere_id=doc.matiere_id,
    93→        document_id=doc.id,
    94→    )
    95→    db.add(quiz)
    96→    await db.flush()
    97→
    98→    for q in qcm_data:
    99→        question = QuizQuestion(
   100→            quiz_id=quiz.id,
   101→            question=q["question"],
   102→            choix=q["choix"],
   103→            reponse_correcte=q["reponse_correcte"],
   104→            explication=q.get("explication", ""),
   105→            difficulte=q.get("difficulte", 1),
   106→        )
   107→        db.add(question)
   108→
   109→    await db.commit()
   110→    return {"quiz_id": quiz.id, "questions_generated": len(qcm_data)}
   111→
   112→
   113→@router.get("/ressources/{matiere_id}")
   114→async def pipeline_recommandations(
   115→    matiere_id: int,
   116→    sujet: str = "",
   117→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   118→):
   119→    """O11: Pipeline recommandations externes via Gemini."""
   120→    result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == matiere_id))
   121→    matiere = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   122→    if not matiere:
   123→        raise HTTPException(404, "Matière non trouvée")
   124→
   125→    query = sujet if sujet else matiere.nom
   126→    ressources = await gemini_service.rechercher_ressources(query, matiere.nom)
   127→    return ressources
   128→
   129→
   130→@router.get("/mindmap/{document_id}")
   131→async def generer_mind_map(
   132→    document_id: int,
   133→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   134→):
   135→    """Generate a mind map from document content via Gemini."""
   136→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
   137→    doc = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   138→    if not doc:
   139→        raise HTTPException(404, "Document non trouvé")
   140→
   141→    contenu = doc.contenu_extrait
   142→    if not contenu:
   143→        contenu = await document_parser.parse_document(doc.fichier_path)
   144→
   145→    mindmap = await gemini_service.generer_mind_map(contenu, doc.titre)
   146→    return mindmap
   147→
                                                  ```

                                                      ## 👤 user (16:42:50)

                                                      ✅ **Result:**
                                                      ```
                                                           1→"""
     2→Router pour la gestion des flashcards avec revision espacee (algorithme SM-2).
     3→"""
     4→
     5→from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
     6→from typing import Optional
     7→
     8→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
     9→from sqlalchemy import select
    10→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    11→
    12→from app.database import get_db
    13→from app.models.flashcard import Flashcard
    14→from app.schemas.flashcard import FlashcardCreate, FlashcardResponse, FlashcardReview
    15→
    16→router = APIRouter()
    17→
    18→
    19→@router.post("/", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
    20→async def create_flashcard(
    21→    flashcard_in: FlashcardCreate,
    22→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    23→):
    24→    """Cree une nouvelle flashcard."""
    25→    flashcard = Flashcard(
    26→        question=flashcard_in.question,
    27→        reponse=flashcard_in.reponse,
    28→        explication=flashcard_in.explication,
    29→        difficulte=flashcard_in.difficulte,
    30→        matiere_id=flashcard_in.matiere_id,
    31→        document_id=flashcard_in.document_id,
    32→    )
    33→
    34→    db.add(flashcard)
    35→    await db.commit()
    36→    await db.refresh(flashcard)
    37→
    38→    return flashcard
    39→
    40→
    41→@router.get("/", response_model=list[FlashcardResponse])
    42→async def list_flashcards(
    43→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    44→    document_id: Optional[int] = None,
    45→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    46→):
    47→    """Liste les flashcards avec filtres optionnels par matiere et/ou document."""
    48→    query = select(Flashcard).order_by(Flashcard.created_at.desc())
    49→
    50→    if matiere_id is not None:
    51→        query = query.where(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    52→    if document_id is not None:
    53→        query = query.where(Flashcard.document_id == document_id)
    54→
    55→    result = await db.execute(query)
    56→    flashcards = result.scalars().all()
    57→    return flashcards
    58→
    59→
    60→@router.get("/revision", response_model=list[FlashcardResponse])
    61→async def get_revision_flashcards(
    62→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    63→    limit: int = 20,
    64→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    65→):
    66→    """
    67→    Recupere les flashcards dont la prochaine revision est passee ou aujourd'hui.
    68→    Triees par date de revision la plus ancienne en premier (les plus urgentes).
    69→    """
    70→    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    71→    query = (
    72→        select(Flashcard)
    73→        .where(Flashcard.prochaine_revision <= now)
    74→        .order_by(Flashcard.prochaine_revision.asc())
    75→        .limit(limit)
    76→    )
    77→
    78→    if matiere_id is not None:
    79→        query = query.where(Flashcard.matiere_id == matiere_id)
    80→
    81→    result = await db.execute(query)
    82→    flashcards = result.scalars().all()
    83→    return flashcards
    84→
    85→
    86→@router.post("/{flashcard_id}/review", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
    87→async def review_flashcard(
    88→    flashcard_id: int,
    89→    review: FlashcardReview,
    90→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    91→):
    92→    """
    93→    Met a jour une flashcard apres revision en utilisant l'algorithme SM-2.
    94→
    95→    Le champ `qualite` (0-5) represente la qualite de la reponse:
    96→        - 0: Aucun souvenir
    97→        - 1: Mauvaise reponse, mais reconnait la bonne
    98→        - 2: Mauvaise reponse, mais la bonne semble facile a retenir
    99→        - 3: Bonne reponse avec difficulte importante
   100→        - 4: Bonne reponse apres hesitation
   101→        - 5: Reponse parfaite
   102→    """
   103→    if not 0 <= review.qualite <= 5:
   104→        raise HTTPException(
   105→            status_code=400, detail="La qualite doit etre entre 0 et 5"
   106→        )
   107→
   108→    result = await db.execute(
   109→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   110→    )
   111→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   112→
   113→    if flashcard is None:
   114→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   115→
   116→    # --- Algorithme SM-2 ---
   117→    q = review.qualite
   118→    ef = flashcard.facteur_facilite
   119→    reps = flashcard.repetitions
   120→    interval = flashcard.intervalle_jours
   121→
   122→    # Nouveau facteur de facilite (EF)
   123→    # EF' = EF + (0.1 - (5 - q) * (0.08 + (5 - q) * 0.02))
   124→    new_ef = ef + (0.1 - (5 - q) * (0.08 + (5 - q) * 0.02))
   125→    # EF ne doit jamais descendre en dessous de 1.3
   126→    new_ef = max(1.3, new_ef)
   127→
   128→    if q < 3:
   129→        # Reponse incorrecte : on recommence les repetitions
   130→        new_reps = 0
   131→        new_interval = 1.0
   132→    else:
   133→        # Reponse correcte
   134→        if reps == 0:
   135→            new_interval = 1.0
   136→        elif reps == 1:
   137→            new_interval = 6.0
   138→        else:
   139→            new_interval = interval * new_ef
   140→
   141→        new_reps = reps + 1
   142→
   143→    # Calculer la prochaine date de revision
   144→    prochaine_revision = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(days=new_interval)
   145→
   146→    # Mettre a jour la flashcard
   147→    flashcard.facteur_facilite = round(new_ef, 2)
   148→    flashcard.repetitions = new_reps
   149→    flashcard.intervalle_jours = round(new_interval, 1)
   150→    flashcard.prochaine_revision = prochaine_revision
   151→
   152→    await db.commit()
   153→    await db.refresh(flashcard)
   154→
   155→    return flashcard
   156→
   157→
   158→@router.get("/{flashcard_id}", response_model=FlashcardResponse)
   159→async def get_flashcard(
   160→    flashcard_id: int,
   161→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   162→):
   163→    """Recupere une flashcard par son ID."""
   164→    result = await db.execute(
   165→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   166→    )
   167→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   168→
   169→    if flashcard is None:
   170→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   171→
   172→    return flashcard
   173→
   174→
   175→@router.delete("/{flashcard_id}")
   176→async def delete_flashcard(
   177→    flashcard_id: int,
   178→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   179→):
   180→    """Supprime une flashcard."""
   181→    result = await db.execute(
   182→        select(Flashcard).where(Flashcard.id == flashcard_id)
   183→    )
   184→    flashcard = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   185→
   186→    if flashcard is None:
   187→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard non trouvee")
   188→
   189→    await db.delete(flashcard)
   190→    await db.commit()
   191→
   192→    return {"message": "Flashcard supprimee", "id": flashcard_id}
   193→
                                                      ```

                                                          ```
                                                               1→"""
     2→Router pour la gestion des documents (upload, liste, detail, suppression).
     3→"""
     4→
     5→import os
     6→import shutil
     7→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     8→
     9→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, UploadFile, File, Form
    10→from sqlalchemy import select
    11→from sqlalchemy.orm import defer
    12→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from app.database import get_db
    16→from app.models.document import Document
    17→from app.schemas.document import DocumentResponse, DocumentListItem
    18→from app.config import settings
    19→from app.services.document_parser import parse_document
    20→
    21→router = APIRouter()
    22→
    23→ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = {".pdf", ".pptx", ".docx"}
    24→
    25→
    26→@router.post("/upload", response_model=DocumentResponse)
    27→async def upload_document(
    28→    file: UploadFile = File(...),
    29→    titre: Optional[str] = Form(None),
    30→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = Form(None),
    31→    chapitre: str = Form(""),
    32→    tags: str = Form(""),
    33→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    34→):
    35→    """Upload un fichier PDF, PPTX ou DOCX, extrait le texte et sauvegarde."""
    36→    # Verifier l'extension
    37→    filename = file.filename or "document"
    38→    extension = os.path.splitext(filename)[1].lower()
    39→    if extension not in ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS:
    40→        raise HTTPException(
    41→            status_code=400,
    42→            detail=f"Type de fichier non supporte: {extension}. "
    43→            f"Formats acceptes: {', '.join(ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS)}",
    44→        )
    45→
    46→    # Creer le dossier d'upload si necessaire
    47→    upload_dir = settings.upload_path
    48→    os.makedirs(upload_dir, exist_ok=True)
    49→
    50→    # Generer un nom de fichier unique
    51→    timestamp = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    52→    safe_filename = f"{timestamp}_{filename}"
    53→    file_path = os.path.join(upload_dir, safe_filename)
    54→
    55→    # Sauvegarder le fichier
    56→    try:
    57→        with open(file_path, "wb") as buffer:
    58→            shutil.copyfileobj(file.file, buffer)
    59→    except Exception as e:
    60→        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=f"Erreur lors de la sauvegarde: {str(e)}")
    61→    finally:
    62→        await file.close()
    63→
    64→    # Extraire le texte
    65→    try:
    66→        contenu_extrait = await parse_document(file_path)
    67→    except Exception as e:
    68→        # En cas d'erreur d'extraction, on garde le document mais sans contenu
    69→        contenu_extrait = f"[Erreur d'extraction: {str(e)}]"
    70→
    71→    # Creer l'enregistrement en base
    72→    document = Document(
    73→        titre=titre or os.path.splitext(filename)[0],
    74→        fichier_path=file_path,
    75→        type_fichier=extension.lstrip("."),
    76→        contenu_extrait=contenu_extrait,
    77→        matiere_id=matiere_id,
    78→        chapitre=chapitre,
    79→        tags=tags,
    80→    )
    81→
    82→    db.add(document)
    83→    await db.commit()
    84→    await db.refresh(document)
    85→
    86→    return document
    87→
    88→
    89→@router.get("/", response_model=list[DocumentListItem])
    90→async def list_documents(
    91→    matiere_id: Optional[int] = None,
    92→    limit: int = 50,
    93→    offset: int = 0,
    94→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    95→):
    96→    """Liste les documents (sans contenu_extrait), avec pagination et filtre optionnel."""
    97→    query = select(Document).options(defer(Document.contenu_extrait)).order_by(Document.created_at.desc()).limit(limit).offset(offset)
    98→    if matiere_id is not None:
    99→        query = query.where(Document.matiere_id == matiere_id)
   100→
   101→    result = await db.execute(query)
   102→    documents = result.scalars().all()
   103→    return documents
   104→
   105→
   106→@router.get("/{document_id}", response_model=DocumentResponse)
   107→async def get_document(
   108→    document_id: int,
   109→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   110→):
   111→    """Recupere un document par son ID."""
   112→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
   113→    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   114→
   115→    if document is None:
   116→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document non trouve")
   117→
   118→    return document
   119→
   120→
   121→@router.delete("/{document_id}")
   122→async def delete_document(
   123→    document_id: int,
   124→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   125→):
   126→    """Supprime un document et son fichier associe."""
   127→    result = await db.execute(select(Document).where(Document.id == document_id))
   128→    document = result.scalar_one_or_none()
   129→
   130→    if document is None:
   131→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document non trouve")
   132→
   133→    # Supprimer le fichier physique
   134→    if os.path.exists(document.fichier_path):
   135→        try:
   136→            os.remove(document.fichier_path)
   137→        except OSError:
   138→            pass  # Le fichier n'existe plus, on continue
   139→
   140→    await db.delete(document)
   141→    await db.commit()
   142→
   143→    return {"message": "Document supprime", "id": document_id}
   144→
                                                          ```

                                                                      ```
                                                                           1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface Message {
     6→  role: "user" | "assistant";
     7→  content: string;
     8→}
     9→
    10→interface VocalChatProps {
    11→  onClose?: () => void;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    15→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
    16→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
    17→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
    19→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    20→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
    21→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
    22→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
    23→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    24→
    25→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    26→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
    27→  };
    28→
    29→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
    30→
    31→  const connect = useCallback(() => {
    32→    const ws = new WebSocket(`ws://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
    33→    ws.onopen = () => setIsConnected(true);
    34→    ws.onclose = () => setIsConnected(false);
    35→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
    36→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    37→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
    38→        setMessages((prev) => [
    39→          ...prev,
    40→          { role: "user", content: data.message },
    41→        ]);
    42→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
    43→        setMessages((prev) => [
    44→          ...prev,
    45→          { role: "assistant", content: data.message },
    46→        ]);
    47→        setIsLoading(false);
    48→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
    49→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
    50→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
    51→      }
    52→    };
    53→    wsRef.current = ws;
    54→  }, []);
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    connect();
    58→    return () => wsRef.current?.close();
    59→  }, [connect]);
    60→
    61→  const startRecording = async () => {
    62→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
    63→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
    64→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
    65→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
    66→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
    67→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
    68→      const reader = new FileReader();
    69→      reader.onloadend = () => {
    70→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
    71→        wsRef.current?.send(
    72→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
    73→        );
    74→        setIsLoading(true);
    75→      };
    76→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
    77→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
    78→    };
    79→    recorder.start();
    80→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
    81→    setIsRecording(true);
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const stopRecording = () => {
    85→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
    86→    setIsRecording(false);
    87→  };
    88→
    89→  const sendText = () => {
    90→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
    91→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: inputText }]);
    92→    wsRef.current.send(
    93→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
    94→    );
    95→    setInputText("");
    96→    setIsLoading(true);
    97→  };
    98→
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-700">
   101→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-slate-700">
   102→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   103→          <div
   104→            className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
   105→              isConnected ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
   106→            }`}
   107→          />
   108→          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   109→        </div>
   110→        {onClose && (
   111→          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white">
   112→            X
   113→          </button>
   114→        )}
   115→      </div>
   116→
   117→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
   118→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   119→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-center mt-8">
   120→            Posez une question au professeur...
   121→          </p>
   122→        )}
   123→        {messages.map((msg, i) => (
   124→          <div
   125→            key={i}
   126→            className={`flex ${
   127→              msg.role === "user" ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"
   128→            }`}
   129→          >
   130→            <div
   131→              className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 ${
   132→                msg.role === "user"
   133→                  ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   134→                  : "bg-slate-700 text-slate-100"
   135→              }`}
   136→            >
   137→              {msg.content}
   138→            </div>
   139→          </div>
   140→        ))}
   141→        {isLoading && (
   142→          <div className="flex justify-start">
   143→            <div className="bg-slate-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">
   144→              Reflexion...
   145→            </div>
   146→          </div>
   147→        )}
   148→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   149→      </div>
   150→
   151→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700">
   152→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   153→          <input
   154→            type="text"
   155→            value={inputText}
   156→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   157→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   158→            placeholder="Tapez votre question..."
   159→            className="flex-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 border border-slate-600 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none"
   160→          />
   161→          <button
   162→            onClick={sendText}
   163→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   164→            className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
   165→          >
   166→            Envoyer
   167→          </button>
   168→          <button
   169→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   170→            disabled={!isConnected}
   171→            className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg ${
   172→              isRecording
   173→                ? "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
   174→                : "bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700"
   175→            } text-white disabled:opacity-50`}
   176→          >
   177→            {isRecording ? "Stop" : "Micro"}
   178→          </button>
   179→        </div>
   180→      </div>
   181→    </div>
   182→  );
   183→}
   184→
                                                                      ```

                                                                              ```
                                                                                   1→import httpx
     2→from app.config import settings
     3→
     4→SYSTEM_PROMPT = """Tu es un professeur de droit public et de préparation aux concours administratifs français.
     5→Tu parles en français de manière claire et pédagogique.
     6→Tu réponds de manière concise mais complète.
     7→Tu utilises des exemples concrets quand c'est pertinent.
     8→Tu corriges les erreurs de l'étudiant avec bienveillance."""
     9→
    10→
    11→async def chat(message: str, historique: list[dict] | None = None) -> str:
    12→    """Send a message to Ollama and get a response."""
    13→    messages = [{"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT}]
    14→    if historique:
    15→        messages.extend(historique)
    16→    messages.append({"role": "user", "content": message})
    17→
    18→    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=120.0) as client:
    19→        response = await client.post(
    20→            f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/chat",
    21→            json={
    22→                "model": "phi3:mini",
    23→                "messages": messages,
    24→                "stream": False,
    25→            },
    26→        )
    27→        response.raise_for_status()
    28→        data = response.json()
    29→        return data["message"]["content"]
    30→
    31→
    32→async def interroger_sur_document(contenu: str, question: str) -> str:
    33→    """Ask Ollama a question about a specific document content."""
    34→    prompt = f"""Voici un extrait de document de cours:
    35→
    36→{contenu[:3000]}
    37→
    38→Question de l'étudiant: {question}
    39→
    40→Réponds de manière pédagogique en te basant sur le document."""
    41→
    42→    return await chat(prompt)
    43→
    44→
    45→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    46→    """Check if Ollama is running and accessible."""
    47→    try:
    48→        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:
    49→            response = await client.get(f"{settings.ollama_host}/api/tags")
    50→            return response.status_code == 200
    51→    except (httpx.ConnectError, httpx.TimeoutException):
    52→        return False
    53→
                                                                              ```

                                                                                  ```
                                                                                       1→import asyncio
     2→import json
     3→import os
     4→import re
     5→
     6→
     7→async def run_claude_cli(prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 4096) -> str:
     8→    """Execute Claude via CLI (uses the user's Claude subscription)."""
     9→    env = os.environ.copy()
    10→    for key in list(env.keys()):
    11→        if key.startswith("CLAUDE"):
    12→            del env[key]
    13→    cmd = ["claude", "--print", "--output-format", "text"]
    14→    process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    15→        *cmd,
    16→        stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    17→        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    18→        stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    19→        env=env,
    20→    )
    21→    stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=prompt.encode())
    22→    if process.returncode != 0:
    23→        raise RuntimeError(f"Claude CLI error: {stderr.decode()}")
    24→    return stdout.decode().strip()
    25→
    26→
    27→async def generer_flashcards(contenu: str, matiere: str, nb: int = 10) -> list[dict]:
    28→    """Generate flashcards from document content using Claude."""
    29→    prompt = f"""Tu es un expert en {matiere} pour la préparation aux concours administratifs français.
    30→
    31→À partir du contenu suivant, génère exactement {nb} flashcards de révision.
    32→
    33→CONTENU:
    34→{contenu[:8000]}
    35→
    36→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide, sans texte avant ou après:
    37→[
    38→  {{
    39→    "question": "...",
    40→    "reponse": "...",
    41→    "explication": "...",
    42→    "difficulte": 1
    43→  }}
    44→]
    45→
    46→Difficulté de 1 (basique) à 5 (expert). Les questions doivent tester la compréhension, pas juste la mémorisation."""
    47→
    48→    result = await run_claude_cli(prompt)
    49→    match = re.search(r'\[.*\]', result, re.DOTALL)
    50→    if not match:
    51→        raise ValueError("Claude n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    52→    return json.loads(match.group())
    53→
    54→
    55→async def generer_qcm(contenu: str, matiere: str, nb: int = 5) -> list[dict]:
    56→    """Generate QCM questions from document content using Claude."""
    57→    prompt = f"""Tu es un expert en {matiere} pour la préparation aux concours administratifs français.
    58→
    59→À partir du contenu suivant, génère exactement {nb} questions à choix multiples.
    60→
    61→CONTENU:
    62→{contenu[:8000]}
    63→
    64→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide, sans texte avant ou après:
    65→[
    66→  {{
    67→    "question": "...",
    68→    "choix": ["A. ...", "B. ...", "C. ...", "D. ..."],
    69→    "reponse_correcte": 0,
    70→    "explication": "...",
    71→    "difficulte": 1
    72→  }}
    73→]
    74→
    75→reponse_correcte = index (0-3) du bon choix. Difficulté de 1 à 5.
    76→Inclus des cas pratiques juridiques quand pertinent."""
    77→
    78→    result = await run_claude_cli(prompt)
    79→    match = re.search(r'\[.*\]', result, re.DOTALL)
    80→    if not match:
    81→        raise ValueError("Claude n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    82→    return json.loads(match.group())
    83→
    84→
    85→async def analyser_document(contenu: str) -> dict:
    86→    """Analyze a document to extract key concepts, summary, tags."""
    87→    prompt = f"""Analyse ce document académique et extrais les informations structurées.
    88→
    89→CONTENU:
    90→{contenu[:6000]}
    91→
    92→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    93→{{
    94→  "resume": "résumé en 3-5 phrases",
    95→  "concepts_cles": ["concept1", "concept2", ...],
    96→  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", ...],
    97→  "matiere_suggeree": "nom de la matière",
    98→  "difficulte_estimee": 3
    99→}}"""
   100→
   101→    result = await run_claude_cli(prompt)
   102→    match = re.search(r'\{.*\}', result, re.DOTALL)
   103→    if not match:
   104→        raise ValueError("Claude n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
   105→    return json.loads(match.group())
   106→
                                                                                  ```

                                                                                      ```
                                                                                           1→import asyncio
     2→import tempfile
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→
     8→async def synthetiser(texte: str) -> bytes:
     9→    """Synthesize text to speech using Piper TTS. Returns WAV audio bytes."""
    10→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    11→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    12→    try:
    13→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    14→            "piper",
    15→            "--model", settings.piper_voice,
    16→            "--output_file", tmp_path,
    17→            stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    18→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    19→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    20→        )
    21→        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate(input=texte.encode())
    22→        if process.returncode != 0:
    23→            raise RuntimeError(f"Piper TTS error: {stderr.decode()}")
    24→        return Path(tmp_path).read_bytes()
    25→    finally:
    26→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def synthetiser_fichier(texte: str, output_path: str) -> str:
    30→    """Synthesize text to speech and save to file."""
    31→    audio_bytes = await synthetiser(texte)
    32→    Path(output_path).write_bytes(audio_bytes)
    33→    return output_path
    34→
    35→
    36→async def check_disponible() -> bool:
    37→    """Check if Piper TTS is installed and accessible."""
    38→    try:
    39→        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
    40→            "piper", "--help",
    41→            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    42→            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
    43→        )
    44→        await process.communicate()
    45→        return process.returncode == 0
    46→    except FileNotFoundError:
    47→        return False
    48→
                                                                                      ```

                                                                                          ```
                                                                                               1→import asyncio
     2→import tempfile
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from app.config import settings
     6→
     7→_model = None
     8→
     9→
    10→def _get_model():
    11→    global _model
    12→    if _model is None:
    13→        import whisper
    14→        _model = whisper.load_model(settings.whisper_model)
    15→    return _model
    16→
    17→
    18→async def transcrire(audio_bytes: bytes, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    19→    """Transcribe audio bytes to text using Whisper."""
    20→    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".wav", delete=False) as tmp:
    21→        tmp.write(audio_bytes)
    22→        tmp_path = tmp.name
    23→    try:
    24→        result = await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, tmp_path, language)
    25→    finally:
    26→        Path(tmp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
    27→    return result
    28→
    29→
    30→def _transcrire_sync(file_path: str, language: str) -> str:
    31→    model = _get_model()
    32→    result = model.transcribe(file_path, language=language)
    33→    return result["text"].strip()
    34→
    35→
    36→async def transcrire_fichier(file_path: str, language: str = "fr") -> str:
    37→    """Transcribe an audio file to text."""
    38→    if not Path(file_path).exists():
    39→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Audio file not found: {file_path}")
    40→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_transcrire_sync, file_path, language)
    41→
                                                                                          ```

                                                                                                ```
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→const API_BASE = "/api";
     6→
     7→interface Stats {
     8→  documents: number;
     9→  flashcards: number;
    10→  quiz: number;
    11→  flashcards_a_reviser: number;
    12→}
    13→
    14→interface Revision {
    15→  id: number;
    16→  question: string;
    17→  matiere: string;
    18→  next_review: string;
    19→}
    20→
    21→interface Activite {
    22→  id: number;
    23→  type: string;
    24→  description: string;
    25→  date: string;
    26→  matiere?: string;
    27→}
    28→
    29→export default function Dashboard() {
    30→  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({
    31→    documents: 0,
    32→    flashcards: 0,
    33→    quiz: 0,
    34→    flashcards_a_reviser: 0,
    35→  });
    36→  const [revisions, setRevisions] = useState<Revision[]>([]);
    37→  const [activites, setActivites] = useState<Activite[]>([]);
    38→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    39→
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    const fetchData = async () => {
    42→      try {
    43→        const [statsRes, revisionsRes, activitesRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
    44→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/documents/`).then(async r => {
    45→            if (!r.ok) return { documents: 0, flashcards: 0, quiz: 0, flashcards_a_reviser: 0 };
    46→            const docs = await r.json();
    47→            const fcRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/`);
    48→            const fc = fcRes.ok ? await fcRes.json() : [];
    49→            const qzRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/`);
    50→            const qz = qzRes.ok ? await qzRes.json() : [];
    51→            const revRes = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`);
    52→            const rev = revRes.ok ? await revRes.json() : [];
    53→            return { documents: docs.length, flashcards: fc.length, quiz: qz.length, flashcards_a_reviser: rev.length };
    54→          }),
    55→          fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`),
    56→          Promise.resolve(new Response(JSON.stringify([]))),
    57→        ]);
    58→
    59→        if (statsRes.status === "fulfilled") {
    60→          const val = statsRes.value;
    61→          if (val instanceof Response) {
    62→            if (val.ok) setStats(await val.json());
    63→          } else {
    64→            setStats(val);
    65→          }
    66→        }
    67→        if (revisionsRes.status === "fulfilled" && revisionsRes.value.ok) {
    68→          const data = await revisionsRes.value.json();
    69→          setRevisions(data.slice(0, 5).map((fc: { id: number; question: string; prochaine_revision: string }) => ({
    70→            id: fc.id,
    71→            question: fc.question,
    72→            matiere: "",
    73→            next_review: fc.prochaine_revision,
    74→          })));
    75→        }
    76→        if (activitesRes.status === "fulfilled" && activitesRes.value.ok) {
    77→          setActivites(await activitesRes.value.json());
    78→        }
    79→      } catch (error) {
    80→        console.error("Erreur chargement dashboard:", error);
    81→      } finally {
    82→        setLoading(false);
    83→      }
    84→    };
    85→
    86→    fetchData();
    87→  }, []);
    88→
    89→  const statCards = [
    90→    {
    91→      label: "Documents",
    92→      value: stats.documents,
    93→      icon: (
    94→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
    95→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m2.25 0H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
    96→        </svg>
    97→      ),
    98→      gradient: "from-blue-500 to-blue-600",
    99→      bgGlow: "bg-blue-500/10",
   100→      textColor: "text-blue-400",
   101→    },
   102→    {
   103→      label: "Flashcards",
   104→      value: stats.flashcards,
   105→      icon: (
   106→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   107→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   108→        </svg>
   109→      ),
   110→      gradient: "from-violet-500 to-violet-600",
   111→      bgGlow: "bg-violet-500/10",
   112→      textColor: "text-violet-400",
   113→    },
   114→    {
   115→      label: "Quiz",
   116→      value: stats.quiz,
   117→      icon: (
   118→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   119→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   120→        </svg>
   121→      ),
   122→      gradient: "from-amber-500 to-amber-600",
   123→      bgGlow: "bg-amber-500/10",
   124→      textColor: "text-amber-400",
   125→    },
   126→    {
   127→      label: "A reviser",
   128→      value: stats.flashcards_a_reviser,
   129→      icon: (
   130→        <svg className="w-7 h-7" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   131→          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   132→        </svg>
   133→      ),
   134→      gradient: "from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600",
   135→      bgGlow: "bg-emerald-500/10",
   136→      textColor: "text-emerald-400",
   137→    },
   138→  ];
   139→
   140→  if (loading) {
   141→    return (
   142→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   143→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   144→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   145→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement du dashboard...</p>
   146→        </div>
   147→      </div>
   148→    );
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  return (
   152→    <div className="space-y-8">
   153→      {/* Header */}
   154→      <div>
   155→        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Dashboard</h1>
   156→        <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   157→          Vue d&apos;ensemble de votre preparation aux concours administratifs
   158→        </p>
   159→      </div>
   160→
   161→      {/* Stats Cards */}
   162→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
   163→        {statCards.map((card) => (
   164→          <div key={card.label} className="card-hover group">
   165→            <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
   166→              <div>
   167→                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-400">{card.label}</p>
   168→                <p className="mt-2 text-3xl font-bold text-white">{card.value}</p>
   169→              </div>
   170→              <div className={`p-3 rounded-xl ${card.bgGlow}`}>
   171→                <span className={card.textColor}>{card.icon}</span>
   172→              </div>
   173→            </div>
   174→          </div>
   175→        ))}
   176→      </div>
   177→
   178→      {/* Sections grid */}
   179→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
   180→        {/* Prochaines revisions */}
   181→        <div className="card">
   182→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   183→            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Prochaines revisions</h2>
   184→            <a
   185→              href="/flashcards"
   186→              className="text-sm text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 transition-colors"
   187→            >
   188→              Voir tout
   189→            </a>
   190→          </div>
   191→
   192→          {revisions.length === 0 ? (
   193→            <div className="text-center py-8">
   194→              <svg className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   195→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   196→              </svg>
   197→              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Aucune revision en attente</p>
   198→              <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs mt-1">
   199→                Ajoutez des flashcards pour commencer
   200→              </p>
   201→            </div>
   202→          ) : (
   203→            <div className="space-y-3">
   204→              {revisions.map((revision) => (
   205→                <div
   206→                  key={revision.id}
   207→                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30 hover:border-slate-600/50 transition-colors"
   208→                >
   209→                  <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-400" />
   210→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   211→                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-200 truncate">
   212→                      {revision.question}
   213→                    </p>
   214→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5">
   215→                      {revision.matiere}
   216→                    </p>
   217→                  </div>
   218→                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0">
   219→                    {new Date(revision.next_review).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   220→                      day: "numeric",
   221→                      month: "short",
   222→                    })}
   223→                  </span>
   224→                </div>
   225→              ))}
   226→            </div>
   227→          )}
   228→        </div>
   229→
   230→        {/* Activite recente */}
   231→        <div className="card">
   232→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
   233→            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Activite recente</h2>
   234→          </div>
   235→
   236→          {activites.length === 0 ? (
   237→            <div className="text-center py-8">
   238→              <svg className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   239→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   240→              </svg>
   241→              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Aucune activite recente</p>
   242→              <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs mt-1">
   243→                Commencez a reviser pour voir votre historique
   244→              </p>
   245→            </div>
   246→          ) : (
   247→            <div className="space-y-3">
   248→              {activites.map((activite) => {
   249→                const typeStyles: Record<string, string> = {
   250→                  flashcard: "badge-violet",
   251→                  quiz: "badge-amber",
   252→                  document: "badge-blue",
   253→                };
   254→                return (
   255→                  <div
   256→                    key={activite.id}
   257→                    className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-700/30"
   258→                  >
   259→                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   260→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   261→                        <span className={typeStyles[activite.type] || "badge-blue"}>
   262→                          {activite.type}
   263→                        </span>
   264→                        {activite.matiere && (
   265→                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   266→                            {activite.matiere}
   267→                          </span>
   268→                        )}
   269→                      </div>
   270→                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-300">{activite.description}</p>
   271→                    </div>
   272→                    <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-1">
   273→                      {new Date(activite.date).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   274→                        day: "numeric",
   275→                        month: "short",
   276→                        hour: "2-digit",
   277→                        minute: "2-digit",
   278→                      })}
   279→                    </span>
   280→                  </div>
   281→                );
   282→              })}
   283→            </div>
   284→          )}
   285→        </div>
   286→      </div>
   287→
   288→      {/* Raccourcis rapides */}
   289→      <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800/80 to-slate-800/40">
   290→        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4">Actions rapides</h2>
   291→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   292→          <a
   293→            href="/flashcards"
   294→            className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-blue-600/10 border border-blue-500/20 hover:bg-blue-600/20 hover:border-blue-500/40 transition-all duration-200 group"
   295→          >
   296→            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 group-hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-colors">
   297→              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   298→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   299→              </svg>
   300→            </div>
   301→            <div>
   302→              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-300">Reviser les flashcards</p>
   303→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Lancer une session de revision</p>
   304→            </div>
   305→          </a>
   306→          <a
   307→            href="/quiz"
   308→            className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-violet-600/10 border border-violet-500/20 hover:bg-violet-600/20 hover:border-violet-500/40 transition-all duration-200 group"
   309→          >
   310→            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400 group-hover:bg-violet-500/30 transition-colors">
   311→              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   312→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   313→              </svg>
   314→            </div>
   315→            <div>
   316→              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-violet-300">Passer un quiz</p>
   317→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Testez vos connaissances</p>
   318→            </div>
   319→          </a>
   320→          <a
   321→            href="/matieres"
   322→            className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl bg-emerald-600/10 border border-emerald-500/20 hover:bg-emerald-600/20 hover:border-emerald-500/40 transition-all duration-200 group"
   323→          >
   324→            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 group-hover:bg-emerald-500/30 transition-colors">
   325→              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   326→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" />
   327→              </svg>
   328→            </div>
   329→            <div>
   330→              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-300">Parcourir les matieres</p>
   331→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">Explorer par domaine</p>
   332→            </div>
   333→          </a>
   334→        </div>
   335→      </div>
   336→    </div>
   337→  );
   338→}
   339→
                                                                                                ```
