                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                         1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→const API_BASE = "/api";
     6→
     7→interface Matiere {
     8→  id: number;
     9→  nom: string;
    10→  description?: string;
    11→  couleur?: string;
    12→  nb_documents: number;
    13→  nb_flashcards: number;
    14→}
    15→
    16→const defaultMatieres: Matiere[] = [
    17→  { id: 0, nom: "Droit public", description: "Droit constitutionnel, administratif, collectivites", couleur: "blue", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    18→  { id: 0, nom: "Finances publiques", description: "Budget, comptabilite publique, fiscalite", couleur: "emerald", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    19→  { id: 0, nom: "Economie", description: "Politique economique, macro et microeconomie", couleur: "amber", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    20→  { id: 0, nom: "Questions europeennes", description: "Institutions UE, politiques europeennes", couleur: "violet", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    21→  { id: 0, nom: "Questions sociales", description: "Protection sociale, politiques sociales", couleur: "rose", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    22→  { id: 0, nom: "GRH", description: "Gestion des ressources humaines dans la fonction publique", couleur: "cyan", nb_documents: 0, nb_flashcards: 0 },
    23→];
    24→
    25→const colorMap: Record<string, { bg: string; border: string; text: string; glow: string; icon: string }> = {
    26→  blue: {
    27→    bg: "bg-blue-500/10",
    28→    border: "border-blue-500/30 hover:border-blue-500/50",
    29→    text: "text-blue-400",
    30→    glow: "hover:shadow-blue-500/10",
    31→    icon: "bg-blue-500/20",
    32→  },
    33→  emerald: {
    34→    bg: "bg-emerald-500/10",
    35→    border: "border-emerald-500/30 hover:border-emerald-500/50",
    36→    text: "text-emerald-400",
    37→    glow: "hover:shadow-emerald-500/10",
    38→    icon: "bg-emerald-500/20",
    39→  },
    40→  amber: {
    41→    bg: "bg-amber-500/10",
    42→    border: "border-amber-500/30 hover:border-amber-500/50",
    43→    text: "text-amber-400",
    44→    glow: "hover:shadow-amber-500/10",
    45→    icon: "bg-amber-500/20",
    46→  },
    47→  violet: {
    48→    bg: "bg-violet-500/10",
    49→    border: "border-violet-500/30 hover:border-violet-500/50",
    50→    text: "text-violet-400",
    51→    glow: "hover:shadow-violet-500/10",
    52→    icon: "bg-violet-500/20",
    53→  },
    54→  rose: {
    55→    bg: "bg-rose-500/10",
    56→    border: "border-rose-500/30 hover:border-rose-500/50",
    57→    text: "text-rose-400",
    58→    glow: "hover:shadow-rose-500/10",
    59→    icon: "bg-rose-500/20",
    60→  },
    61→  cyan: {
    62→    bg: "bg-cyan-500/10",
    63→    border: "border-cyan-500/30 hover:border-cyan-500/50",
    64→    text: "text-cyan-400",
    65→    glow: "hover:shadow-cyan-500/10",
    66→    icon: "bg-cyan-500/20",
    67→  },
    68→};
    69→
    70→export default function MatieresPage() {
    71→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    72→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    73→  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);
    74→  const [newMatiere, setNewMatiere] = useState({ nom: "", description: "" });
    75→
    76→  useEffect(() => {
    77→    const fetchMatieres = async () => {
    78→      try {
    79→        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    80→        if (res.ok) {
    81→          const data = await res.json();
    82→          setMatieres(data.length > 0 ? data : defaultMatieres);
    83→        } else {
    84→          setMatieres(defaultMatieres);
    85→        }
    86→      } catch {
    87→        setMatieres(defaultMatieres);
    88→      } finally {
    89→        setLoading(false);
    90→      }
    91→    };
    92→
    93→    fetchMatieres();
    94→  }, []);
    95→
    96→  const handleAddMatiere = async () => {
    97→    if (!newMatiere.nom.trim()) return;
    98→
    99→    try {
   100→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`, {
   101→        method: "POST",
   102→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   103→        body: JSON.stringify(newMatiere),
   104→      });
   105→      if (res.ok) {
   106→        const created = await res.json();
   107→        setMatieres([...matieres, created]);
   108→      }
   109→    } catch (error) {
   110→      console.error("Erreur ajout matiere:", error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    setNewMatiere({ nom: "", description: "" });
   114→    setShowAddModal(false);
   115→  };
   116→
   117→  const colors = Object.keys(colorMap);
   118→
   119→  if (loading) {
   120→    return (
   121→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   122→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   123→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   124→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des matieres...</p>
   125→        </div>
   126→      </div>
   127→    );
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  return (
   131→    <div className="space-y-8">
   132→      {/* Header */}
   133→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   134→        <div>
   135→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Matieres</h1>
   136→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   137→            Explorez les matieres du concours et vos ressources
   138→          </p>
   139→        </div>
   140→        <button
   141→          onClick={() => setShowAddModal(true)}
   142→          className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2"
   143→        >
   144→          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   145→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15" />
   146→          </svg>
   147→          Ajouter
   148→        </button>
   149→      </div>
   150→
   151→      {/* Grid matieres */}
   152→      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
   153→        {matieres.map((matiere, index) => {
   154→          const colorKey = matiere.couleur || colors[index % colors.length];
   155→          const style = colorMap[colorKey] || colorMap.blue;
   156→
   157→          return (
   158→            <div
   159→              key={matiere.id || index}
   160→              className={`
   161→                relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border p-6
   162→                bg-slate-800/40 backdrop-blur-sm
   163→                transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 cursor-pointer
   164→                ${style.border} ${style.glow}
   165→              `}
   166→            >
   167→              {/* Decorative gradient */}
   168→              <div className={`absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 rounded-full ${style.bg} blur-2xl -translate-y-8 translate-x-8 opacity-50`} />
   169→
   170→              <div className="relative">
   171→                {/* Icon */}
   172→                <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-xl ${style.icon} flex items-center justify-center mb-4`}>
   173→                  <svg className={`w-6 h-6 ${style.text}`} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   174→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 0 0 6 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 1 6 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 0 1 6-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0 0 18 18a8.967 8.967 0 0 0-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" />
   175→                  </svg>
   176→                </div>
   177→
   178→                {/* Titre + description */}
   179→                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1">{matiere.nom}</h3>
   180→                {matiere.description && (
   181→                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4 line-clamp-2">
   182→                    {matiere.description}
   183→                  </p>
   184→                )}
   185→
   186→                {/* Compteurs */}
   187→                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/40">
   188→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   189→                    <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   190→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m2.25 0H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z" />
   191→                    </svg>
   192→                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   193→                      <span className="font-semibold text-slate-200">{matiere.nb_documents}</span> docs
   194→                    </span>
   195→                  </div>
   196→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   197→                    <svg className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   198→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   199→                    </svg>
   200→                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   201→                      <span className="font-semibold text-slate-200">{matiere.nb_flashcards}</span> flashcards
   202→                    </span>
   203→                  </div>
   204→                </div>
   205→              </div>
   206→            </div>
   207→          );
   208→        })}
   209→      </div>
   210→
   211→      {/* Modal ajout matiere */}
   212→      {showAddModal && (
   213→        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
   214→          <div className="card w-full max-w-md mx-4 border-slate-600/50">
   215→            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   216→              Ajouter une matiere
   217→            </h2>
   218→            <div className="space-y-4">
   219→              <div>
   220→                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5">
   221→                  Nom de la matiere
   222→                </label>
   223→                <input
   224→                  type="text"
   225→                  value={newMatiere.nom}
   226→                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({ ...newMatiere, nom: e.target.value })}
   227→                  className="input-field w-full"
   228→                  placeholder="Ex: Droit constitutionnel"
   229→                />
   230→              </div>
   231→              <div>
   232→                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5">
   233→                  Description
   234→                </label>
   235→                <textarea
   236→                  value={newMatiere.description}
   237→                  onChange={(e) => setNewMatiere({ ...newMatiere, description: e.target.value })}
   238→                  className="input-field w-full h-24 resize-none"
   239→                  placeholder="Description de la matiere..."
   240→                />
   241→              </div>
   242→            </div>
   243→            <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 mt-6">
   244→              <button
   245→                onClick={() => {
   246→                  setShowAddModal(false);
   247→                  setNewMatiere({ nom: "", description: "" });
   248→                }}
   249→                className="btn-ghost"
   250→              >
   251→                Annuler
   252→              </button>
   253→              <button
   254→                onClick={handleAddMatiere}
   255→                className="btn-primary"
   256→                disabled={!newMatiere.nom.trim()}
   257→              >
   258→                Ajouter
   259→              </button>
   260→            </div>
   261→          </div>
   262→        </div>
   263→      )}
   264→    </div>
   265→  );
   266→}
   267→
                                                                                                    ```

                                                                                                        ```
                                                                                                             1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from "react";
     4→import FlashCard from "@/components/FlashCard";
     5→
     6→const API_BASE = "/api";
     7→
     8→interface FlashcardData {
     9→  id: number;
    10→  question: string;
    11→  reponse: string;
    12→  explication?: string;
    13→  matiere_id?: number;
    14→  matiere_nom?: string;
    15→  next_review?: string;
    16→  ease_factor?: number;
    17→  interval?: number;
    18→  repetitions?: number;
    19→}
    20→
    21→interface Matiere {
    22→  id: number;
    23→  nom: string;
    24→}
    25→
    26→export default function FlashcardsPage() {
    27→  const [flashcards, setFlashcards] = useState<FlashcardData[]>([]);
    28→  const [matieres, setMatieres] = useState<Matiere[]>([]);
    29→  const [selectedMatiere, setSelectedMatiere] = useState<number | null>(null);
    30→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
    31→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    32→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<"list" | "review">("list");
    33→  const [reviewedCount, setReviewedCount] = useState(0);
    34→  const [sessionResults, setSessionResults] = useState<{ quality: number }[]>([]);
    35→
    36→  const fetchFlashcards = useCallback(async () => {
    37→    setLoading(true);
    38→    try {
    39→      let url = `${API_BASE}/flashcards/revision`;
    40→      if (selectedMatiere) {
    41→        url += `?matiere_id=${selectedMatiere}`;
    42→      }
    43→      const res = await fetch(url);
    44→      if (res.ok) {
    45→        const data = await res.json();
    46→        setFlashcards(data);
    47→      }
    48→    } catch (error) {
    49→      console.error("Erreur chargement flashcards:", error);
    50→    } finally {
    51→      setLoading(false);
    52→    }
    53→  }, [selectedMatiere]);
    54→
    55→  const fetchMatieres = useCallback(async () => {
    56→    try {
    57→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/matieres`);
    58→      if (res.ok) {
    59→        setMatieres(await res.json());
    60→      }
    61→    } catch (error) {
    62→      console.error("Erreur chargement matieres:", error);
    63→    }
    64→  }, []);
    65→
    66→  useEffect(() => {
    67→    fetchMatieres();
    68→  }, [fetchMatieres]);
    69→
    70→  useEffect(() => {
    71→    fetchFlashcards();
    72→  }, [fetchFlashcards]);
    73→
    74→  const handleReview = async (quality: number) => {
    75→    const card = flashcards[currentIndex];
    76→    if (!card) return;
    77→
    78→    // Envoi de la notation au backend (SM-2)
    79→    try {
    80→      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/flashcards/${card.id}/review`, {
    81→        method: "POST",
    82→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    83→        body: JSON.stringify({ quality }),
    84→      });
    85→    } catch (error) {
    86→      console.error("Erreur envoi review:", error);
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    setSessionResults([...sessionResults, { quality }]);
    90→    setReviewedCount(reviewedCount + 1);
    91→
    92→    if (currentIndex < flashcards.length - 1) {
    93→      setCurrentIndex(currentIndex + 1);
    94→    } else {
    95→      // Session terminee
    96→      setMode("list");
    97→    }
    98→  };
    99→
   100→  const startReview = () => {
   101→    setCurrentIndex(0);
   102→    setReviewedCount(0);
   103→    setSessionResults([]);
   104→    setMode("review");
   105→  };
   106→
   107→  const totalCards = flashcards.length;
   108→  const progress = totalCards > 0 ? Math.round((reviewedCount / totalCards) * 100) : 0;
   109→  const avgQuality =
   110→    sessionResults.length > 0
   111→      ? (sessionResults.reduce((s, r) => s + r.quality, 0) / sessionResults.length).toFixed(1)
   112→      : "0";
   113→
   114→  if (loading) {
   115→    return (
   116→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   117→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   118→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-violet-500/30 border-t-violet-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   119→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement des flashcards...</p>
   120→        </div>
   121→      </div>
   122→    );
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  // Mode revision
   126→  if (mode === "review") {
   127→    const currentCard = flashcards[currentIndex];
   128→
   129→    // Session terminee
   130→    if (!currentCard || reviewedCount >= totalCards) {
   131→      return (
   132→        <div className="space-y-8">
   133→          <div className="text-center py-12">
   134→            <div className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/20 flex items-center justify-center">
   135→              <svg className="w-10 h-10 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   136→                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   137→              </svg>
   138→            </div>
   139→            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Session terminee !</h2>
   140→            <p className="text-slate-400 mb-6">
   141→              Vous avez revise {reviewedCount} carte{reviewedCount > 1 ? "s" : ""}
   142→            </p>
   143→
   144→            {/* Stats session */}
   145→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-sm mx-auto mb-8">
   146→              <div className="card text-center">
   147→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{reviewedCount}</p>
   148→                <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Cartes revisees</p>
   149→              </div>
   150→              <div className="card text-center">
   151→                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{avgQuality}</p>
   152→                <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Qualite moyenne</p>
   153→              </div>
   154→            </div>
   155→
   156→            <div className="flex justify-center gap-3">
   157→              <button onClick={() => setMode("list")} className="btn-secondary">
   158→                Retour
   159→              </button>
   160→              <button
   161→                onClick={() => {
   162→                  fetchFlashcards();
   163→                  startReview();
   164→                }}
   165→                className="btn-primary"
   166→              >
   167→                Nouvelle session
   168→              </button>
   169→            </div>
   170→          </div>
   171→        </div>
   172→      );
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    return (
   176→      <div className="space-y-6">
   177→        {/* Header revision */}
   178→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   179→          <button
   180→            onClick={() => setMode("list")}
   181→            className="btn-ghost flex items-center gap-2"
   182→          >
   183→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   184→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   185→            </svg>
   186→            Quitter
   187→          </button>
   188→          <div className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   189→            {currentIndex + 1} / {totalCards}
   190→          </div>
   191→        </div>
   192→
   193→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   194→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
   195→          <div
   196→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-violet-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   197→            style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
   198→          />
   199→        </div>
   200→
   201→        {/* Flashcard */}
   202→        <div className="py-8">
   203→          <FlashCard
   204→            question={currentCard.question}
   205→            reponse={currentCard.reponse}
   206→            explication={currentCard.explication}
   207→            matiere={currentCard.matiere_nom}
   208→            onReview={handleReview}
   209→          />
   210→        </div>
   211→      </div>
   212→    );
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  // Mode liste
   216→  return (
   217→    <div className="space-y-8">
   218→      {/* Header */}
   219→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   220→        <div>
   221→          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Flashcards</h1>
   222→          <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   223→            Revisez vos connaissances avec la repetition espacee
   224→          </p>
   225→        </div>
   226→        {totalCards > 0 && (
   227→          <button onClick={startReview} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   228→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   229→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z" />
   230→            </svg>
   231→            Lancer la revision ({totalCards})
   232→          </button>
   233→        )}
   234→      </div>
   235→
   236→      {/* Filtre par matiere */}
   237→      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   238→        <button
   239→          onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(null)}
   240→          className={`
   241→            px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   242→            ${!selectedMatiere
   243→              ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   244→              : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   245→            }
   246→          `}
   247→        >
   248→          Toutes
   249→        </button>
   250→        {matieres.map((matiere) => (
   251→          <button
   252→            key={matiere.id}
   253→            onClick={() => setSelectedMatiere(matiere.id)}
   254→            className={`
   255→              px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200
   256→              ${selectedMatiere === matiere.id
   257→                ? "bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/30"
   258→                : "bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600"
   259→              }
   260→            `}
   261→          >
   262→            {matiere.nom}
   263→          </button>
   264→        ))}
   265→      </div>
   266→
   267→      {/* Stats session precedente */}
   268→      {sessionResults.length > 0 && (
   269→        <div className="card bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500/5 to-blue-500/5 border-violet-500/20">
   270→          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
   271→            <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   272→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z" />
   273→            </svg>
   274→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-violet-300">Derniere session</h3>
   275→          </div>
   276→          <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   277→            {sessionResults.length} cartes revisees - Qualite moyenne : {avgQuality}/5
   278→          </p>
   279→        </div>
   280→      )}
   281→
   282→      {/* Liste ou etat vide */}
   283→      {totalCards === 0 ? (
   284→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   285→          <svg className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   286→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6.429 9.75 2.25 12l4.179 2.25m0-4.5 5.571 3 5.571-3m-11.142 0L2.25 7.5 12 2.25l9.75 5.25-4.179 2.25m0 0L21.75 12l-4.179 2.25m0 0 4.179 2.25L12 21.75 2.25 16.5l4.179-2.25m11.142 0-5.571 3-5.571-3" />
   287→          </svg>
   288→          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-300 mb-2">
   289→            Aucune flashcard a reviser
   290→          </h3>
   291→          <p className="text-slate-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
   292→            Importez des documents dans vos matieres pour generer automatiquement des flashcards,
   293→            ou attendez la prochaine date de revision.
   294→          </p>
   295→        </div>
   296→      ) : (
   297→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   298→          {flashcards.map((card) => (
   299→            <div key={card.id} className="card-hover">
   300→              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
   301→                {card.matiere_nom && (
   302→                  <span className="badge-blue">{card.matiere_nom}</span>
   303→                )}
   304→                {card.next_review && (
   305→                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   306→                    {new Date(card.next_review).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   307→                      day: "numeric",
   308→                      month: "short",
   309→                    })}
   310→                  </span>
   311→                )}
   312→              </div>
   313→              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-200 mb-2 line-clamp-3">
   314→                {card.question}
   315→              </p>
   316→              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 line-clamp-2">{card.reponse}</p>
   317→            </div>
   318→          ))}
   319→        </div>
   320→      )}
   321→    </div>
   322→  );
   323→}
   324→
                                                                                                        ```

                                                                                                                          ```
                                                                                                                               1→"""
     2→Router pour la gestion des matières (CRUD).
     3→"""
     4→
     5→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
     6→from sqlalchemy import select
     7→from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
     8→
     9→from app.database import get_db
    10→from app.models.matiere import Matiere
    11→from app.schemas.matiere import MatiereCreate, MatiereResponse
    12→
    13→router = APIRouter()
    14→
    15→
    16→@router.post("/", response_model=MatiereResponse, status_code=201)
    17→async def create_matiere(
    18→    matiere_in: MatiereCreate,
    19→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    20→):
    21→    """Crée une nouvelle matière."""
    22→    existing = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.nom == matiere_in.nom))
    23→    if existing.scalar_one_or_none():
    24→        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Une matière avec ce nom existe déjà")
    25→
    26→    matiere = Matiere(
    27→        nom=matiere_in.nom,
    28→        description=matiere_in.description,
    29→        couleur=matiere_in.couleur,
    30→    )
    31→    db.add(matiere)
    32→    await db.commit()
    33→    await db.refresh(matiere)
    34→    return matiere
    35→
    36→
    37→@router.get("/", response_model=list[MatiereResponse])
    38→async def list_matieres(db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
    39→    """Liste toutes les matières."""
    40→    result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).order_by(Matiere.nom))
    41→    return result.scalars().all()
    42→
    43→
    44→@router.get("/{matiere_id}", response_model=MatiereResponse)
    45→async def get_matiere(matiere_id: int, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
    46→    """Récupère une matière par son ID."""
    47→    result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == matiere_id))
    48→    matiere = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    49→    if matiere is None:
    50→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Matière non trouvée")
    51→    return matiere
    52→
    53→
    54→@router.put("/{matiere_id}", response_model=MatiereResponse)
    55→async def update_matiere(
    56→    matiere_id: int,
    57→    matiere_in: MatiereCreate,
    58→    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    59→):
    60→    """Met à jour une matière."""
    61→    result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == matiere_id))
    62→    matiere = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    63→    if matiere is None:
    64→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Matière non trouvée")
    65→
    66→    matiere.nom = matiere_in.nom
    67→    matiere.description = matiere_in.description
    68→    matiere.couleur = matiere_in.couleur
    69→
    70→    await db.commit()
    71→    await db.refresh(matiere)
    72→    return matiere
    73→
    74→
    75→@router.delete("/{matiere_id}")
    76→async def delete_matiere(matiere_id: int, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
    77→    """Supprime une matière."""
    78→    result = await db.execute(select(Matiere).where(Matiere.id == matiere_id))
    79→    matiere = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    80→    if matiere is None:
    81→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Matière non trouvée")
    82→
    83→    await db.delete(matiere)
    84→    await db.commit()
    85→    return {"message": "Matière supprimée", "id": matiere_id}
    86→
                                                                                                                          ```
                                                                                                                          ```

     3→

    10→

    14→
                                                                                                                              ```

                                                                                                                                  ```
                                                                                                                                       1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from "react";
     4→import QuizQuestion from "@/components/QuizQuestion";
     5→
     6→const API_BASE = "/api";
     7→
     8→interface Quiz {
     9→  id: number;
    10→  titre: string;
    11→  matiere_nom?: string;
    12→  nb_questions: number;
    13→  created_at?: string;
    14→}
    15→
    16→interface Question {
    17→  id: number;
    18→  question: string;
    19→  choix: string[];
    20→  reponse_correcte: number;
    21→  explication?: string;
    22→}
    23→
    24→interface QuizResult {
    25→  questionIndex: number;
    26→  selectedIndex: number;
    27→  isCorrect: boolean;
    28→  question: string;
    29→  correctAnswer: string;
    30→}
    31→
    32→export default function QuizPage() {
    33→  const [quizList, setQuizList] = useState<Quiz[]>([]);
    34→  const [currentQuiz, setCurrentQuiz] = useState<Quiz | null>(null);
    35→  const [questions, setQuestions] = useState<Question[]>([]);
    36→  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);
    37→  const [results, setResults] = useState<QuizResult[]>([]);
    38→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    39→  const [mode, setMode] = useState<"list" | "quiz" | "results">("list");
    40→
    41→  const fetchQuizList = useCallback(async () => {
    42→    setLoading(true);
    43→    try {
    44→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/`);
    45→      if (res.ok) {
    46→        const data = await res.json();
    47→        setQuizList(data.map((q: { id: number; titre: string; created_at: string; questions?: { id: number }[] }) => ({
    48→          ...q,
    49→          nb_questions: q.questions?.length || 0,
    50→        })));
    51→      }
    52→    } catch (error) {
    53→      console.error("Erreur chargement quiz:", error);
    54→    } finally {
    55→      setLoading(false);
    56→    }
    57→  }, []);
    58→
    59→  useEffect(() => {
    60→    fetchQuizList();
    61→  }, [fetchQuizList]);
    62→
    63→  const startQuiz = async (quiz: Quiz) => {
    64→    setCurrentQuiz(quiz);
    65→    setLoading(true);
    66→
    67→    try {
    68→      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/${quiz.id}`);
    69→      if (res.ok) {
    70→        const data = await res.json();
    71→        setQuestions(data.questions || []);
    72→        setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);
    73→        setResults([]);
    74→        setMode("quiz");
    75→      }
    76→    } catch (error) {
    77→      console.error("Erreur chargement questions:", error);
    78→    } finally {
    79→      setLoading(false);
    80→    }
    81→  };
    82→
    83→  const handleAnswer = (selectedIndex: number, isCorrect: boolean) => {
    84→    const question = questions[currentQuestionIndex];
    85→    const result: QuizResult = {
    86→      questionIndex: currentQuestionIndex,
    87→      selectedIndex,
    88→      isCorrect,
    89→      question: question.question,
    90→      correctAnswer: question.choix[question.reponse_correcte],
    91→    };
    92→
    93→    setResults([...results, result]);
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  const nextQuestion = () => {
    97→    if (currentQuestionIndex < questions.length - 1) {
    98→      setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
    99→    } else {
   100→      // Quiz termine, envoyer les resultats au backend
   101→      submitResults();
   102→      setMode("results");
   103→    }
   104→  };
   105→
   106→  const submitResults = async () => {
   107→    if (!currentQuiz) return;
   108→
   109→    const score = results.filter((r) => r.isCorrect).length;
   110→    try {
   111→      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/quiz/${currentQuiz.id}/submit`, {
   112→        method: "POST",
   113→        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   114→        body: JSON.stringify({
   115→          reponses: results.map((r, i) => ({
   116→            question_id: questions[r.questionIndex]?.id || i + 1,
   117→            reponse: r.selectedIndex,
   118→          })),
   119→        }),
   120→      });
   121→    } catch (error) {
   122→      console.error("Erreur envoi resultats:", error);
   123→    }
   124→  };
   125→
   126→  const resetQuiz = () => {
   127→    setCurrentQuiz(null);
   128→    setQuestions([]);
   129→    setResults([]);
   130→    setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);
   131→    setMode("list");
   132→  };
   133→
   134→  const hasAnsweredCurrent = results.length > currentQuestionIndex;
   135→  const score = results.filter((r) => r.isCorrect).length;
   136→  const totalQuestions = questions.length;
   137→  const scorePercent = totalQuestions > 0 ? Math.round((score / totalQuestions) * 100) : 0;
   138→
   139→  if (loading) {
   140→    return (
   141→      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
   142→        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   143→          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-amber-500/30 border-t-amber-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   144→          <p className="text-slate-400 text-sm">Chargement...</p>
   145→        </div>
   146→      </div>
   147→    );
   148→  }
   149→
   150→  // Mode resultats
   151→  if (mode === "results") {
   152→    return (
   153→      <div className="space-y-8">
   154→        {/* Header resultat */}
   155→        <div className="text-center py-8">
   156→          <div
   157→            className={`w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${
   158→              scorePercent >= 70
   159→                ? "bg-emerald-500/20"
   160→                : scorePercent >= 40
   161→                ? "bg-amber-500/20"
   162→                : "bg-red-500/20"
   163→            }`}
   164→          >
   165→            <span
   166→              className={`text-3xl font-bold ${
   167→                scorePercent >= 70
   168→                  ? "text-emerald-400"
   169→                  : scorePercent >= 40
   170→                  ? "text-amber-400"
   171→                  : "text-red-400"
   172→              }`}
   173→            >
   174→              {scorePercent}%
   175→            </span>
   176→          </div>
   177→
   178→          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
   179→            {currentQuiz?.titre || "Quiz termine"}
   180→          </h2>
   181→          <p className="text-slate-400">
   182→            Score : {score} / {totalQuestions} bonnes reponses
   183→          </p>
   184→
   185→          {/* Barre score */}
   186→          <div className="max-w-sm mx-auto mt-6">
   187→            <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-3 overflow-hidden">
   188→              <div
   189→                className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-out ${
   190→                  scorePercent >= 70
   191→                    ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-400"
   192→                    : scorePercent >= 40
   193→                    ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-400"
   194→                    : "bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 to-red-400"
   195→                }`}
   196→                style={{ width: `${scorePercent}%` }}
   197→              />
   198→            </div>
   199→          </div>
   200→        </div>
   201→
   202→        {/* Detail par question */}
   203→        <div className="card">
   204→          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   205→            Detail des reponses
   206→          </h3>
   207→          <div className="space-y-3">
   208→            {results.map((result, index) => (
   209→              <div
   210→                key={index}
   211→                className={`
   212→                  flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border
   213→                  ${
   214→                    result.isCorrect
   215→                      ? "bg-emerald-500/5 border-emerald-500/20"
   216→                      : "bg-red-500/5 border-red-500/20"
   217→                  }
   218→                `}
   219→              >
   220→                <div className="flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
   221→                  {result.isCorrect ? (
   222→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   223→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   224→                    </svg>
   225→                  ) : (
   226→                    <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   227→                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="m9.75 9.75 4.5 4.5m0-4.5-4.5 4.5M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   228→                    </svg>
   229→                  )}
   230→                </div>
   231→                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   232→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-200">
   233→                    Q{index + 1}. {result.question}
   234→                  </p>
   235→                  {!result.isCorrect && (
   236→                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">
   237→                      Reponse correcte : {result.correctAnswer}
   238→                    </p>
   239→                  )}
   240→                </div>
   241→              </div>
   242→            ))}
   243→          </div>
   244→        </div>
   245→
   246→        {/* Actions */}
   247→        <div className="flex justify-center gap-3">
   248→          <button onClick={resetQuiz} className="btn-secondary">
   249→            Retour aux quiz
   250→          </button>
   251→          {currentQuiz && (
   252→            <button
   253→              onClick={() => startQuiz(currentQuiz)}
   254→              className="btn-primary"
   255→            >
   256→              Refaire ce quiz
   257→            </button>
   258→          )}
   259→        </div>
   260→      </div>
   261→    );
   262→  }
   263→
   264→  // Mode quiz (question par question)
   265→  if (mode === "quiz" && questions.length > 0) {
   266→    const currentQuestion = questions[currentQuestionIndex];
   267→
   268→    return (
   269→      <div className="space-y-6">
   270→        {/* Header quiz */}
   271→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   272→          <button onClick={resetQuiz} className="btn-ghost flex items-center gap-2">
   273→            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   274→              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5 3 12m0 0 7.5-7.5M3 12h18" />
   275→            </svg>
   276→            Quitter
   277→          </button>
   278→          <div className="text-center">
   279→            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">
   280→              {currentQuiz?.titre}
   281→            </p>
   282→            <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   283→              Question {currentQuestionIndex + 1} / {totalQuestions}
   284→            </p>
   285→          </div>
   286→          <div className="text-sm text-slate-400">
   287→            Score : {score}/{results.length}
   288→          </div>
   289→        </div>
   290→
   291→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   292→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
   293→          <div
   294→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-400 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   295→            style={{
   296→              width: `${((currentQuestionIndex + 1) / totalQuestions) * 100}%`,
   297→            }}
   298→          />
   299→        </div>
   300→
   301→        {/* Question */}
   302→        <div className="py-4">
   303→          <QuizQuestion
   304→            key={currentQuestionIndex}
   305→            question={currentQuestion.question}
   306→            choix={currentQuestion.choix}
   307→            reponse_correcte={currentQuestion.reponse_correcte}
   308→            explication={currentQuestion.explication}
   309→            onAnswer={handleAnswer}
   310→          />
   311→        </div>
   312→
   313→        {/* Bouton suivant (apres reponse) */}
   314→        {hasAnsweredCurrent && (
   315→          <div className="flex justify-center">
   316→            <button onClick={nextQuestion} className="btn-primary flex items-center gap-2">
   317→              {currentQuestionIndex < totalQuestions - 1 ? (
   318→                <>
   319→                  Question suivante
   320→                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   321→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3" />
   322→                  </svg>
   323→                </>
   324→              ) : (
   325→                <>
   326→                  Voir les resultats
   327→                  <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   328→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3 13.125C3 12.504 3.504 12 4.125 12h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v6.75C7.5 20.496 6.996 21 6.375 21h-2.25A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 19.875v-6.75ZM9.75 8.625c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v11.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V8.625ZM16.5 4.125c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25C20.496 3 21 3.504 21 4.125v15.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125h-2.25a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V4.125Z" />
   329→                  </svg>
   330→                </>
   331→              )}
   332→            </button>
   333→          </div>
   334→        )}
   335→      </div>
   336→    );
   337→  }
   338→
   339→  // Mode liste des quiz
   340→  return (
   341→    <div className="space-y-8">
   342→      {/* Header */}
   343→      <div>
   344→        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">Quiz</h1>
   345→        <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">
   346→          Testez vos connaissances avec des QCM generes par IA
   347→        </p>
   348→      </div>
   349→
   350→      {/* Liste des quiz */}
   351→      {quizList.length === 0 ? (
   352→        <div className="text-center py-16">
   353→          <svg className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto text-slate-600 mb-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1} stroke="currentColor">
   354→            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   355→          </svg>
   356→          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-300 mb-2">
   357→            Aucun quiz disponible
   358→          </h3>
   359→          <p className="text-slate-500 max-w-md mx-auto">
   360→            Importez des documents pour generer automatiquement des quiz adaptes a votre preparation.
   361→          </p>
   362→        </div>
   363→      ) : (
   364→        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
   365→          {quizList.map((quiz) => (
   366→            <div
   367→              key={quiz.id}
   368→              className="card-hover cursor-pointer group"
   369→              onClick={() => startQuiz(quiz)}
   370→            >
   371→              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
   372→                <div className="p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 group-hover:bg-amber-500/20 transition-colors">
   373→                  <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   374→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008Z" />
   375→                  </svg>
   376→                </div>
   377→                {quiz.matiere_nom && (
   378→                  <span className="badge-amber">{quiz.matiere_nom}</span>
   379→                )}
   380→              </div>
   381→
   382→              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-1 group-hover:text-amber-100 transition-colors">
   383→                {quiz.titre}
   384→              </h3>
   385→
   386→              <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-700/40">
   387→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-slate-400">
   388→                  <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={1.5} stroke="currentColor">
   389→                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M8.625 12a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H8.25m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0H12m4.125 0a.375.375 0 1 1-.75 0 .375.375 0 0 1 .75 0Zm0 0h-.375M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" />
   390→                  </svg>
   391→                  {quiz.nb_questions} questions
   392→                </div>
   393→                {quiz.created_at && (
   394→                  <span className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   395→                    {new Date(quiz.created_at).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
   396→                      day: "numeric",
   397→                      month: "short",
   398→                    })}
   399→                  </span>
   400→                )}
   401→              </div>
   402→
   403→              {/* CTA */}
   404→              <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-amber-400 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200">
   405→                <span className="font-medium">Commencer le quiz</span>
   406→                <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   407→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M13.5 4.5 21 12m0 0-7.5 7.5M21 12H3" />
   408→                </svg>
   409→              </div>
   410→            </div>
   411→          ))}
   412→        </div>
   413→      )}
   414→    </div>
   415→  );
   416→}
   417→
                                                                                                                                  ```

                                                                                                                                      ```
    10→    explication: str = ""

    13→

    15→    pass
    16→
    17→

    21→

    30→

    35→
                                                                                                                                      ```

                                                                                                                                                    ## 👤 user (16:43:29)

                                                                                                                                                    ✅ **Result:**
                                                                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                                                                         1→"""
     2→Service d'extraction de texte depuis des documents PDF, PPTX et DOCX.
     3→"""
     4→
     5→import os
     6→
     7→
     8→async def parse_document(file_path: str) -> str:
     9→    """
    10→    Extrait le texte brut d'un fichier PDF, PPTX ou DOCX.
    11→
    12→    Args:
    13→        file_path: Chemin absolu vers le fichier a parser.
    14→
    15→    Returns:
    16→        Le texte brut extrait du document.
    17→
    18→    Raises:
    19→        ValueError: Si le type de fichier n'est pas supporte.
    20→        FileNotFoundError: Si le fichier n'existe pas.
    21→    """
    22→    if not os.path.exists(file_path):
    23→        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Fichier non trouve: {file_path}")
    24→
    25→    extension = os.path.splitext(file_path)[1].lower()
    26→
    27→    if extension == ".pdf":
    28→        return _extract_pdf(file_path)
    29→    elif extension == ".pptx":
    30→        return _extract_pptx(file_path)
    31→    elif extension == ".docx":
    32→        return _extract_docx(file_path)
    33→    else:
    34→        raise ValueError(f"Type de fichier non supporte: {extension}")
    35→
    36→
    37→def _extract_pdf(file_path: str) -> str:
    38→    """Extrait le texte d'un fichier PDF via pymupdf (fitz)."""
    39→    import fitz  # pymupdf
    40→
    41→    text_parts: list[str] = []
    42→    with fitz.open(file_path) as doc:
    43→        for page in doc:
    44→            page_text = page.get_text()
    45→            if page_text.strip():
    46→                text_parts.append(page_text)
    47→    return "\n\n".join(text_parts)
    48→
    49→
    50→def _extract_pptx(file_path: str) -> str:
    51→    """Extrait le texte d'un fichier PowerPoint PPTX."""
    52→    from pptx import Presentation
    53→
    54→    text_parts: list[str] = []
    55→    prs = Presentation(file_path)
    56→    for slide_num, slide in enumerate(prs.slides, start=1):
    57→        slide_texts: list[str] = []
    58→        for shape in slide.shapes:
    59→            if shape.has_text_frame:
    60→                for paragraph in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
    61→                    para_text = paragraph.text.strip()
    62→                    if para_text:
    63→                        slide_texts.append(para_text)
    64→        if slide_texts:
    65→            text_parts.append(f"--- Slide {slide_num} ---\n" + "\n".join(slide_texts))
    66→    return "\n\n".join(text_parts)
    67→
    68→
    69→def _extract_docx(file_path: str) -> str:
    70→    """Extrait le texte d'un fichier Word DOCX."""
    71→    from docx import Document
    72→
    73→    text_parts: list[str] = []
    74→    doc = Document(file_path)
    75→    for paragraph in doc.paragraphs:
    76→        para_text = paragraph.text.strip()
    77→        if para_text:
    78→            text_parts.append(para_text)
    79→    return "\n\n".join(text_parts)
    80→
                                                                                                                                                    ```

                                                                                                                                                                                                                     1→import asyncio
     2→import json
     3→import re
     4→
     5→from google import genai
     6→
     7→from app.config import settings
     8→
     9→
    10→def _get_client():
    11→    return genai.Client(api_key=settings.google_api_key)
    12→
    13→
    14→def _generate_sync(prompt: str) -> str:
    15→    """Synchronous Gemini call, to be run in a thread."""
    16→    client = _get_client()
    17→    response = client.models.generate_content(
    18→        model="gemini-2.0-flash",
    19→        contents=prompt,
    20→    )
    21→    return response.text
    22→
    23→
    24→async def _generate(prompt: str) -> str:
    25→    """Run Gemini generation in a thread to avoid blocking the event loop."""
    26→    return await asyncio.to_thread(_generate_sync, prompt)
    27→
    28→
    29→async def rechercher_ressources(sujet: str, matiere: str) -> dict:
    30→    """Search for external learning resources related to a topic."""
    31→    prompt = f"""Tu es un conseiller pédagogique spécialisé en {matiere} pour la préparation aux concours administratifs français.
    32→
    33→Pour le sujet "{sujet}", recommande des ressources d'apprentissage complémentaires.
    34→
    35→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    36→{{
    37→  "podcasts": [
    38→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "...", "description": "..."}}
    39→  ],
    40→  "videos_youtube": [
    41→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "https://youtube.com/...", "description": "..."}}
    42→  ],
    43→  "articles": [
    44→    {{"titre": "...", "url": "...", "description": "..."}}
    45→  ],
    46→  "livres": [
    47→    {{"titre": "...", "auteur": "...", "description": "..."}}
    48→  ]
    49→}}
    50→
    51→Donne 2-3 ressources par catégorie. Privilégie les sources françaises et académiques."""
    52→
    53→    text = await _generate(prompt)
    54→    match = re.search(r'\{.*\}', text, re.DOTALL)
    55→    if not match:
    56→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    57→    return json.loads(match.group())
    58→
    59→
    60→async def generer_mind_map(contenu: str, sujet: str) -> dict:
    61→    """Generate a mind map structure from content."""
    62→    prompt = f"""Crée une mind map structurée pour le sujet "{sujet}" à partir du contenu suivant.
    63→
    64→CONTENU:
    65→{contenu[:4000]}
    66→
    67→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    68→{{
    69→  "centre": "{sujet}",
    70→  "branches": [
    71→    {{
    72→      "nom": "...",
    73→      "sous_branches": ["...", "..."],
    74→      "details": "..."
    75→    }}
    76→  ]
    77→}}
    78→
    79→Maximum 6 branches principales, chacune avec 2-4 sous-branches."""
    80→
    81→    text = await _generate(prompt)
    82→    match = re.search(r'\{.*\}', text, re.DOTALL)
    83→    if not match:
    84→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
    85→    return json.loads(match.group())
    86→
    87→
    88→async def generer_chronologie(contenu: str, sujet: str) -> list[dict]:
    89→    """Generate a timeline from content."""
    90→    prompt = f"""Extrais une chronologie des événements importants liés à "{sujet}" depuis le contenu.
    91→
    92→CONTENU:
    93→{contenu[:4000]}
    94→
    95→Réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
    96→[
    97→  {{"date": "...", "evenement": "...", "importance": "haute/moyenne/basse"}}
    98→]
    99→
   100→Ordonne chronologiquement."""
   101→
   102→    text = await _generate(prompt)
   103→    match = re.search(r'\[.*\]', text, re.DOTALL)
   104→    if not match:
   105→        raise ValueError("Gemini n'a pas retourné un JSON valide")
   106→    return json.loads(match.group())
   107→
                                                                                                                                                                                                                ```

                                                                                                                                                                                                                         1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface FlashCardProps {
     6→  question: string;
     7→  reponse: string;
     8→  explication?: string;
     9→  matiere?: string;
    10→  onReview: (quality: number) => void;
    11→}
    12→
    13→const ratingLabels: Record<number, { label: string; color: string; description: string }> = {
    14→  1: { label: "1", color: "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 border-red-500", description: "Aucune idee" },
    15→  2: { label: "2", color: "bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 border-orange-500", description: "Tres difficile" },
    16→  3: { label: "3", color: "bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 border-amber-500", description: "Difficile" },
    17→  4: { label: "4", color: "bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 border-emerald-500", description: "Correct" },
    18→  5: { label: "5", color: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 border-green-500", description: "Facile" },
    19→};
    20→
    21→export default function FlashCard({
    22→  question,
    23→  reponse,
    24→  explication,
    25→  matiere,
    26→  onReview,
    27→}: FlashCardProps) {
    28→  const [isFlipped, setIsFlipped] = useState(false);
    29→  const [showExplication, setShowExplication] = useState(false);
    30→
    31→  const handleFlip = () => {
    32→    setIsFlipped(!isFlipped);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleReview = (quality: number) => {
    36→    setIsFlipped(false);
    37→    setShowExplication(false);
    38→    onReview(quality);
    39→  };
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
    43→      {/* Badge matiere */}
    44→      {matiere && (
    45→        <div className="mb-4 flex justify-center">
    46→          <span className="badge-blue">{matiere}</span>
    47→        </div>
    48→      )}
    49→
    50→      {/* Card avec flip */}
    51→      <div
    52→        className="flip-card cursor-pointer"
    53→        style={{ minHeight: "320px" }}
    54→        onClick={handleFlip}
    55→      >
    56→        <div className={`flip-card-inner ${isFlipped ? "flipped" : ""}`}>
    57→          {/* Face avant - Question */}
    58→          <div className="flip-card-front">
    59→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-blue-500/20 glow-blue">
    60→              <div className="mb-4">
    61→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    62→                  Question
    63→                </span>
    64→              </div>
    65→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    66→                {question}
    67→              </p>
    68→              <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-500">
    69→                Cliquer pour retourner
    70→              </div>
    71→            </div>
    72→          </div>
    73→
    74→          {/* Face arriere - Reponse */}
    75→          <div className="flip-card-back">
    76→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-violet-500/20 glow-violet">
    77→              <div className="mb-4">
    78→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-violet-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    79→                  Reponse
    80→                </span>
    81→              </div>
    82→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    83→                {reponse}
    84→              </p>
    85→
    86→              {/* Explication */}
    87→              {explication && (
    88→                <div className="mt-4 w-full px-4">
    89→                  {!showExplication ? (
    90→                    <button
    91→                      onClick={(e) => {
    92→                        e.stopPropagation();
    93→                        setShowExplication(true);
    94→                      }}
    95→                      className="text-sm text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors"
    96→                    >
    97→                      Voir l&apos;explication
    98→                    </button>
    99→                  ) : (
   100→                    <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-slate-900/50 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/50">
   101→                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">
   102→                        {explication}
   103→                      </p>
   104→                    </div>
   105→                  )}
   106→                </div>
   107→              )}
   108→            </div>
   109→          </div>
   110→        </div>
   111→      </div>
   112→
   113→      {/* Boutons de notation - visibles apres flip */}
   114→      {isFlipped && (
   115→        <div className="mt-6 space-y-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-300">
   116→          <p className="text-center text-sm text-slate-400 font-medium">
   117→            Evaluez votre connaissance
   118→          </p>
   119→          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2">
   120→            {Object.entries(ratingLabels).map(([quality, { label, color, description }]) => (
   121→              <button
   122→                key={quality}
   123→                onClick={(e) => {
   124→                  e.stopPropagation();
   125→                  handleReview(Number(quality));
   126→                }}
   127→                className={`
   128→                  flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-white font-semibold
   129→                  transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95
   130→                  border border-opacity-30 ${color}
   131→                `}
   132→                title={description}
   133→              >
   134→                <span className="text-lg">{label}</span>
   135→                <span className="text-[10px] opacity-80 font-normal">{description}</span>
   136→              </button>
   137→            ))}
   138→          </div>
   139→        </div>
   140→      )}
   141→    </div>
   142→  );
   143→}
   144→
                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ```

# IACA Phase 8: Implementation Plan

## Codebase Analysis Summary

**Current state:**
- Backend: FastAPI at `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/backend/app/` with 5 models (Matiere, Document, Flashcard, Quiz, QuizQuestion), 6 routers, 6 services
- Frontend: Next.js 14 App Router at `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/` with 5 pages (Dashboard, Matieres, Flashcards, Quiz, Vocal) and 4 components
- DB: SQLite with 316 docs across 5 matieres, 21 flashcards, 9 quizzes
- Downloads: 1128 importable files (pdf/docx/pptx), of which ~480 in Licence 2 Assas, ~431 in Licence 3 assas, plus scattered directories
- Import script: `scripts/import_docs_v2.py` with hardcoded `MATIERE_MAP` for 5 matieres
- Vocal: WebSocket at `/api/vocal/ws`, uses phi3:mini via ollama, Piper TTS, Whisper STT. Connection drops with no reconnection logic on the frontend.

**Key patterns to follow:**
- Models: SQLAlchemy in `backend/app/models/`, one file per entity, registered in `__init__.py` and imported by `database.py`'s `Base.metadata.create_all`
- Schemas: Pydantic in `backend/app/schemas/`, Base/Create/Response pattern
- Routers: FastAPI `APIRouter()` in `backend/app/routers/`, registered in `main.py` with `app.include_router()`
- Services: Async functions in `backend/app/services/`, Claude CLI for AI generation (no API key), Gemini for resources/mindmap
- Frontend pages: `"use client"` directives, `const API_BASE = "/api"`, fetch + useState pattern, Tailwind dark theme
- Sidebar: Flat `navigation` array in `sidebar.tsx`, mobile burger already works

---

## PHASE 8A: Foundation (No dependencies, all workers in parallel)

**Duration: ~30 min | All 5 workers active**

### P8A-1: Map and categorize all unmapped directories
- **Worker:** w1 (Haiku) -- light analysis task
- **Description:** Audit all directories in `/home/julien/Telechargements/drive-download-20260226T072425Z-3-001/` and produce a definitive mapping of directory -> matiere name. Must handle:
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/ADMIN S03` -> "Droit administratif (L2)"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/DAF` -> "Droit administratif des biens (L2)"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/DCO` -> "Droit constitutionnel (L2)"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/HDO` -> "Histoire du droit des obligations (L2)"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/PGDE` -> "Politique gen. de l'entreprise (L2)"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/Anglais S03` -> "Anglais juridique"
  - `Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 4/` -> same pattern for S4 subjects
  - `Licence 2 Assas/Fiche de revision 2025 - 2026/` -> attach to parent L2 matiere or "Fiches de revision L2"
  - `Licence 3 assas/Semestre 5/*` and `Semestre 6/*` -> individual matieres (DIP, DUE, Droit du travail, etc.)
  - `Licence 3 assas/TEDS` -> "Travail, emploi et dialogue social (L3)"
  - `Espagnol/*` -> "Espagnol"
  - `S1_M1_Droit et legistique` -> "Droit et legistique (M1)"
  - `S1_M1_Politique economique` -> roll into existing "Economie et finances publiques" or create separate
  - `S1_Management et egalites pro` -> "Management et egalites professionnelles (M1)"
  - `Livres et manuels` -> attach to relevant matieres or create "Manuels generaux"
  - Root-level PDF/DOCX files -> map to best-fit matieres
- **Output:** A JSON mapping file at `scripts/matiere_mapping.json` with format:
  ```json
  {
    "Licence 2 Assas/DROIT L2 Semestre 3/ADMIN S03": {"matiere_nom": "Droit administratif (L2)", "description": "...", "couleur": "#..."},
    ...
  }
  ```
- **Acceptance criteria:** All 15+ subdirectories mapped, no orphan directories, JSON validates

### P8A-2: Create Fiche + FicheSection backend models and schemas
- **Worker:** w3 (Opus) -- complex design task
- **Description:** Create the full Fiche feature backend foundation following the exact Flashcard pattern:
  
  **Model: `backend/app/models/fiche.py`**
  ```python
  class Fiche(Base):
      __tablename__ = "fiches"
      id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
      titre = Column(String, nullable=False)
      resume = Column(Text, default="")
      matiere_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("matieres.id"), nullable=True)
      document_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("documents.id"), nullable=True)
      chapitre = Column(String, default="")
      tags = Column(String, default="")
      ordre = Column(Integer, default=0)
      created_at = Column(DateTime, default=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
      
      matiere = relationship("Matiere", back_populates="fiches")
      sections = relationship("FicheSection", back_populates="fiche", cascade="all, delete-orphan", order_by="FicheSection.ordre")
  
  class FicheSection(Base):
      __tablename__ = "fiche_sections"
      id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
      fiche_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("fiches.id"), nullable=False)
      titre = Column(String, nullable=False)
      contenu = Column(Text, nullable=False)
      ordre = Column(Integer, default=0)
      
      fiche = relationship("Fiche", back_populates="sections")
  ```
  
  **Schema: `backend/app/schemas/fiche.py`**
  - `FicheSectionBase(titre, contenu, ordre)`
  - `FicheSectionCreate(FicheSectionBase)` 
  - `FicheSectionResponse(FicheSectionBase + id, fiche_id)`
  - `FicheBase(titre, resume, matiere_id?, document_id?, chapitre, tags, ordre)`
  - `FicheCreate(FicheBase + sections: list[FicheSectionCreate])`
  - `FicheResponse(FicheBase + id, created_at, sections: list[FicheSectionResponse])`
  - `FicheListItem(id, titre, resume, matiere_id, chapitre, ordre, nb_sections: int, created_at)` -- lightweight for list views
  
  **Also update:**
  - `backend/app/models/__init__.py` -- add Fiche, FicheSection
  - `backend/app/schemas/__init__.py` -- add all Fiche schemas
  - `backend/app/models/matiere.py` -- add `fiches = relationship("Fiche", back_populates="matiere")` to Matiere model

- **Acceptance criteria:** `python -c "from app.models.fiche import Fiche, FicheSection"` succeeds, schemas validate with Pydantic, DB table creation succeeds on backend startup

### P8A-3: Diagnose and fix vocal WebSocket stability
- **Worker:** w2 (Sonnet) -- medium debugging task
- **Description:** Fix the vocal professor feature end-to-end:
  
  **Backend fixes in `backend/app/routers/vocal.py`:**
  1. Add proper try/except around `ollama_service.chat()` call with a user-friendly error message sent back via WebSocket instead of silently crashing
  2. Add try/except around `whisper_service.transcrire()` with error response
  3. Add a heartbeat/ping mechanism: backend sends `{"type": "ping"}` every 30 seconds to keep WS alive
  4. Add logging at each step (receive, transcribe, chat, TTS, send) for debugging
  5. Handle `httpx.HTTPStatusError` specifically from ollama, returning the error message to the client
  6. Wrap the initial `websocket.accept()` in try/except
  
  **Backend fix in `backend/app/services/ollama_service.py`:**
  1. Add explicit error handling in `chat()`: catch `httpx.HTTPStatusError`, log the response body, raise a more descriptive error
  2. Add a timeout parameter (default 120s is fine but must handle timeout gracefully)
  3. Validate that phi3:mini is actually loaded before attempting chat (call `/api/tags` first)
  
  **Frontend fixes in `frontend/components/VocalChat.tsx`:**
  1. Add auto-reconnection logic: on `ws.onclose`, attempt reconnect after 2 seconds, max 5 retries
  2. Handle `{"type": "ping"}` messages (respond with pong or just ignore)
  3. Handle `{"type": "error"}` messages from server -- display them in the chat
  4. Add a visual "reconnecting..." state
  5. Fix the WS URL: currently `ws://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws` -- this should go through the Next.js proxy or use a configurable URL. For WS, since Next.js rewrites don't proxy WebSockets, keep the direct URL but handle connection failure gracefully.
  
  **Frontend fix in `frontend/app/vocal/page.tsx`:**
  1. Update the status text: "Mistral" -> "phi3:mini" for accuracy
  
- **Acceptance criteria:** 
  - Backend starts without error
  - `wscat -c ws://localhost:8000/api/vocal/ws` connects and stays connected for 60s
  - Sending `{"type": "text", "message": "Bonjour"}` returns a text response
  - If ollama is down, client gets `{"type": "error", "message": "..."}` instead of disconnect
  - Frontend reconnects automatically after disconnect

### P8A-4: Design new sidebar navigation structure
- **Worker:** w5 (Codex) -- code generation
- **Description:** Rewrite `frontend/app/sidebar.tsx` with hierarchical grouped navigation:
  
  ```

  TABLEAU DE BORD
    - Dashboard (/)
  ```

### P8A-5: Create the import script v3 with dynamic matiere mapping
- **Worker:** w4 (AMP/orchestrator) -- infrastructure task
- **Description:** Create `scripts/import_docs_v3.py` that:
  1. Reads the mapping from `scripts/matiere_mapping.json` (produced by P8A-1)
  2. For each matiere in the mapping, checks if it exists in the API (GET /api/matieres), creates it if not (POST /api/matieres)
  3. Walks the source directory (`/home/julien/Telechargements/drive-download-20260226T072425Z-3-001/`), maps each file to the correct matiere based on its path matching a key in the mapping
  4. Skips `.xlsx` files (not supported by document_parser)
  5. Before uploading, checks if a document with the same title already exists for that matiere (to prevent duplicates)
  6. Uploads via POST /api/documents/upload with proper matiere_id, chapitre (derived from subdirectory), and tags
  7. Produces a summary log at `logs/import_v3.log`
  8. Handles root-level files and edge cases (files in `Fiche de revision`, `Livres et manuels`, etc.)
  
  Based on `scripts/import_docs_v2.py` pattern but with dynamic mapping instead of hardcoded.
  
- **Dependencies:** Needs P8A-1 output (matiere_mapping.json). Can start coding the script structure in parallel, waiting only for the JSON file.
- **Acceptance criteria:** Script runs, creates new matieres, uploads at least 10 test files successfully, no duplicate documents, log file produced

## PHASE 8B: Feature Assembly (Depends on 8A completion)

**Duration: ~30 min | All 5 workers active**
**Blocked by:** P8A-2 (models must exist), P8A-4 (sidebar must have fiches entry)

### P8B-1: Create Fiche backend router
- **Worker:** w3 (Opus) -- complex backend
- **Blocked by:** P8A-2
- **Description:** Create `backend/app/routers/fiches.py` following the flashcards router pattern exactly:
  
  Endpoints:
  - `POST /` -- Create a fiche with sections (from FicheCreate schema)
  - `GET /` -- List fiches with optional `matiere_id`, `document_id` filters, pagination (limit/offset). Returns FicheListItem (lightweight, no sections content).
  - `GET /{fiche_id}` -- Get full fiche with all sections (FicheResponse)
  - `PUT /{fiche_id}` -- Update fiche (title, sections, order)
  - `DELETE /{fiche_id}` -- Delete fiche and cascade-delete sections
  - `GET /{fiche_id}/next` -- Return the associated flashcards and quiz for this fiche's document_id (the "propose flashcards/quiz at end of fiche" feature). Query flashcards where `document_id = fiche.document_id` and quizzes where `document_id = fiche.document_id`.
  
  Register in `backend/app/main.py`:
  ```python
  from app.routers import fiches
  app.include_router(fiches.router, prefix="/api/fiches", tags=["fiches"])
  ```
  
  Update `backend/app/routers/__init__.py` to add fiches.
  
- **Acceptance criteria:** All 6 endpoints respond correctly, POST creates fiche+sections in one call, GET /{id}/next returns linked flashcards/quiz, `curl` tests pass

### P8B-2: Add Fiche AI generation service
- **Worker:** w2 (Sonnet) -- medium complexity
- **Blocked by:** P8A-2 (schemas needed for type hints)
- **Description:** Add a `generer_fiche` function to `backend/app/services/claude_service.py` following the existing `generer_flashcards` pattern:
  
  ```python
  async def generer_fiche(contenu: str, matiere: str, titre_doc: str) -> dict:
      """Generate a structured study sheet from document content."""
      prompt = f"""Tu es un expert en {matiere} pour la preparation aux concours administratifs francais.
      
      A partir du contenu suivant, genere une fiche de revision structuree.
      
      CONTENU:
      {contenu[:10000]}
      
      Reponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide:
      {{
        "titre": "Fiche - {titre_doc}",
        "resume": "Resume en 2-3 phrases",
        "sections": [
          {{
            "titre": "I. [Titre de section]",
            "contenu": "[Contenu detaille avec points cles, definitions, jurisprudences...]",
            "ordre": 1
          }}
        ]
      }}
      
      La fiche doit avoir 4-8 sections. Chaque section = un aspect du sujet.
      Format cours structure: definitions, principes, exceptions, jurisprudence, exemples."""
      
      result = await run_claude_cli(prompt)
      # Parse JSON same pattern as generer_flashcards
  ```
  
  Then add to `backend/app/routers/recommandations.py`:
  ```python
  @router.post("/generer-fiche/{document_id}")
  async def pipeline_fiche(document_id: int, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
      # Same pattern as pipeline_flashcards: get doc, extract content, call claude, save Fiche+FicheSection to DB
  ```
  
- **Acceptance criteria:** `POST /api/recommandations/generer-fiche/1` returns HTTP 200 with a fiche containing 4+ sections, fiche persisted in DB

### P8B-4: Create Fiches frontend page
- **Worker:** w5 (Codex) -- code generation
- **Blocked by:** P8A-4 (sidebar entry exists), P8B-1 (API must exist)
- **Description:** Create `frontend/app/fiches/page.tsx` following the same pattern as `flashcards/page.tsx`:
  
  **List mode:**
  - Header "Fiches de revision" with subtitle
  - Filter by matiere (same matiere pill buttons as flashcards page)
  - Grid of fiche cards showing: titre, resume (truncated), matiere badge, nb_sections, date
  - Click opens the fiche detail view
  
  **Detail mode (inline, not a separate route):**
  - Back button
  - Fiche title + matiere badge + resume
  - Sections displayed as an accordion or sequential cards:
    - Section title (clickable to expand/collapse)
    - Section content (rendered as structured text with paragraphs)
  - At the bottom of the fiche: "Continuer l'apprentissage" section with:
    - "Flashcards sur ce sujet" button -> links to `/flashcards?document_id={fiche.document_id}`
    - "Quiz sur ce sujet" button -> links to `/quiz?document_id={fiche.document_id}` (or filters by same document)
    - "Generer une fiche IA" button (if no fiche exists for a document) -> calls `POST /api/recommandations/generer-fiche/{document_id}`
  
  Uses API endpoints:
  - `GET /api/fiches/?matiere_id=X` for list
  - `GET /api/fiches/{id}` for detail
  - `GET /api/fiches/{id}/next` for linked flashcards/quiz
  
  Styling: Same dark slate theme, card-hover classes, consistent with existing pages.
  
- **Acceptance criteria:** Page renders fiche list with matiere filter, clicking a fiche shows sections, "Continuer" section links work, `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
