   276→            Quitter
   277→          </button>
   278→          <div className="text-center">
   279→            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-300">

   283→              Question {currentQuestionIndex + 1} / {totalQuestions}

   285→          </div>

   287→            Score : {score}/{results.length}
   288→          </div>
   289→        </div>
   290→
   291→        {/* Barre de progression */}
   292→        <div className="w-full bg-slate-800 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden">
   293→          <div
   294→            className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-400 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
   295→            style={{
   296→              width: `${((currentQuestionIndex + 1) / totalQuestions) * 100}%`,

   363→      ) : (

   390→                  </svg>

   405→                <span className="font-medium">Commencer le quiz</span>

   410→            </div>

                                                    ```
                                                         1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface FlashCardProps {
     6→  question: string;
     7→  reponse: string;
     8→  explication?: string;
     9→  matiere?: string;
    10→  onReview: (quality: number) => void;
    11→}
    12→
    13→const ratingLabels: Record<number, { label: string; color: string; description: string }> = {
    14→  1: { label: "1", color: "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 border-red-500", description: "Aucune idee" },
    15→  2: { label: "2", color: "bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 border-orange-500", description: "Tres difficile" },
    16→  3: { label: "3", color: "bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 border-amber-500", description: "Difficile" },
    17→  4: { label: "4", color: "bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 border-emerald-500", description: "Correct" },
    18→  5: { label: "5", color: "bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 border-green-500", description: "Facile" },
    19→};
    20→
    21→export default function FlashCard({
    22→  question,
    23→  reponse,
    24→  explication,
    25→  matiere,
    26→  onReview,
    27→}: FlashCardProps) {
    28→  const [isFlipped, setIsFlipped] = useState(false);
    29→  const [showExplication, setShowExplication] = useState(false);
    30→
    31→  const handleFlip = () => {
    32→    setIsFlipped(!isFlipped);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const handleReview = (quality: number) => {
    36→    setIsFlipped(false);
    37→    setShowExplication(false);
    38→    onReview(quality);
    39→  };
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
    43→      {/* Badge matiere */}
    44→      {matiere && (
    45→        <div className="mb-4 flex justify-center">
    46→          <span className="badge-blue">{matiere}</span>
    47→        </div>
    48→      )}
    49→
    50→      {/* Card avec flip */}
    51→      <div
    52→        className="flip-card cursor-pointer"
    53→        style={{ minHeight: "320px" }}
    54→        onClick={handleFlip}
    55→      >
    56→        <div className={`flip-card-inner ${isFlipped ? "flipped" : ""}`}>
    57→          {/* Face avant - Question */}
    58→          <div className="flip-card-front">
    59→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-blue-500/20 glow-blue">
    60→              <div className="mb-4">
    61→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    62→                  Question
    63→                </span>
    64→              </div>
    65→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    66→                {question}
    67→              </p>
    68→              <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-500">
    69→                Cliquer pour retourner
    70→              </div>
    71→            </div>
    72→          </div>
    73→
    74→          {/* Face arriere - Reponse */}
    75→          <div className="flip-card-back">
    76→            <div className="card h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-violet-500/20 glow-violet">
    77→              <div className="mb-4">
    78→                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-violet-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
    79→                  Reponse
    80→                </span>
    81→              </div>
    82→              <p className="text-xl font-medium text-slate-100 leading-relaxed px-4">
    83→                {reponse}
    84→              </p>
    85→
    86→              {/* Explication */}
    87→              {explication && (
    88→                <div className="mt-4 w-full px-4">
    89→                  {!showExplication ? (
    90→                    <button
    91→                      onClick={(e) => {
    92→                        e.stopPropagation();
    93→                        setShowExplication(true);
    94→                      }}
    95→                      className="text-sm text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors"
    96→                    >
    97→                      Voir l&apos;explication
    98→                    </button>
    99→                  ) : (
   100→                    <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-slate-900/50 rounded-lg border border-slate-700/50">
   101→                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">
   102→                        {explication}
   103→                      </p>
   104→                    </div>
   105→                  )}
   106→                </div>
   107→              )}
   108→            </div>
   109→          </div>
   110→        </div>
   111→      </div>
   112→
   113→      {/* Boutons de notation - visibles apres flip */}
   114→      {isFlipped && (
   115→        <div className="mt-6 space-y-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-300">
   116→          <p className="text-center text-sm text-slate-400 font-medium">
   117→            Evaluez votre connaissance
   118→          </p>
   119→          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2">
   120→            {Object.entries(ratingLabels).map(([quality, { label, color, description }]) => (
   121→              <button
   122→                key={quality}
   123→                onClick={(e) => {
   124→                  e.stopPropagation();
   125→                  handleReview(Number(quality));
   126→                }}
   127→                className={`
   128→                  flex flex-col items-center gap-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-white font-semibold
   129→                  transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95
   130→                  border border-opacity-30 ${color}
   131→                `}
   132→                title={description}
   133→              >
   134→                <span className="text-lg">{label}</span>
   135→                <span className="text-[10px] opacity-80 font-normal">{description}</span>
   136→              </button>
   137→            ))}
   138→          </div>
   139→        </div>
   140→      )}
   141→    </div>
   142→  );
   143→}
   144→
                                                    ```

                                                        ```
                                                             1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface QuizQuestionProps {
     6→  question: string;
     7→  choix: string[];
     8→  reponse_correcte: number;
     9→  explication?: string;
    10→  onAnswer: (selectedIndex: number, isCorrect: boolean) => void;
    11→}
    12→
    13→export default function QuizQuestion({
    14→  question,
    15→  choix,
    16→  reponse_correcte,
    17→  explication,
    18→  onAnswer,
    19→}: QuizQuestionProps) {
    20→  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState<number | null>(null);
    21→  const [hasAnswered, setHasAnswered] = useState(false);
    22→
    23→  const handleSelect = (index: number) => {
    24→    if (hasAnswered) return;
    25→    setSelectedIndex(index);
    26→  };
    27→
    28→  const handleValidate = () => {
    29→    if (selectedIndex === null || hasAnswered) return;
    30→    setHasAnswered(true);
    31→    const isCorrect = selectedIndex === reponse_correcte;
    32→    onAnswer(selectedIndex, isCorrect);
    33→  };
    34→
    35→  const getChoiceStyle = (index: number) => {
    36→    const base =
    37→      "flex items-center gap-4 w-full p-4 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-200 text-left";
    38→
    39→    if (!hasAnswered) {
    40→      if (selectedIndex === index) {
    41→        return `${base} border-blue-500 bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 shadow-md shadow-blue-500/10`;
    42→      }
    43→      return `${base} border-slate-700 bg-slate-800/40 text-slate-300 hover:border-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-800/60 cursor-pointer`;
    44→    }
    45→
    46→    // Apres validation
    47→    if (index === reponse_correcte) {
    48→      return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 shadow-md shadow-emerald-500/10`;
    49→    }
    50→    if (index === selectedIndex && index !== reponse_correcte) {
    51→      return `${base} border-red-500 bg-red-500/10 text-red-100 shadow-md shadow-red-500/10`;
    52→    }
    53→    return `${base} border-slate-700/50 bg-slate-800/20 text-slate-500`;
    54→  };
    55→
    56→  const getRadioStyle = (index: number) => {
    57→    const base =
    58→      "w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-200";
    59→
    60→    if (!hasAnswered) {
    61→      if (selectedIndex === index) {
    62→        return `${base} border-blue-500 bg-blue-500`;
    63→      }
    64→      return `${base} border-slate-600`;
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    if (index === reponse_correcte) {
    68→      return `${base} border-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500`;
    69→    }
    70→    if (index === selectedIndex && index !== reponse_correcte) {
    71→      return `${base} border-red-500 bg-red-500`;
    72→    }
    73→    return `${base} border-slate-700`;
    74→  };
    75→
    76→  const letters = ["A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"];
    77→
    78→  return (
    79→    <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6">
    80→      {/* Question */}
    81→      <div className="card border-slate-600/50">
    82→        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-100 leading-relaxed">
    83→          {question}
    84→        </h3>
    85→      </div>
    86→
    87→      {/* Choix */}
    88→      <div className="space-y-3">
    89→        {choix.map((choice, index) => (
    90→          <button
    91→            key={index}
    92→            onClick={() => handleSelect(index)}
    93→            disabled={hasAnswered}
    94→            className={getChoiceStyle(index)}
    95→          >
    96→            <div className={getRadioStyle(index)}>
    97→              {((!hasAnswered && selectedIndex === index) ||
    98→                (hasAnswered && index === reponse_correcte)) && (
    99→                <svg
   100→                  className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white"
   101→                  fill="none"
   102→                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   103→                  strokeWidth={3}
   104→                  stroke="currentColor"
   105→                >
   106→                  <path
   107→                    strokeLinecap="round"
   108→                    strokeLinejoin="round"
   109→                    d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"
   110→                  />
   111→                </svg>
   112→              )}
   113→              {hasAnswered &&
   114→                index === selectedIndex &&
   115→                index !== reponse_correcte && (
   116→                  <svg
   117→                    className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-white"
   118→                    fill="none"
   119→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   120→                    strokeWidth={3}
   121→                    stroke="currentColor"
   122→                  >
   123→                    <path
   124→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   125→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   126→                      d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
   127→                    />
   128→                  </svg>
   129→                )}
   130→            </div>
   131→            <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2">
   132→              <span className="text-sm font-bold opacity-50">{letters[index]}.</span>
   133→              <span className="text-sm font-medium">{choice}</span>
   134→            </div>
   135→          </button>
   136→        ))}
   137→      </div>
   138→
   139→      {/* Bouton valider */}
   140→      {!hasAnswered && (
   141→        <div className="flex justify-center">
   142→          <button
   143→            onClick={handleValidate}
   144→            disabled={selectedIndex === null}
   145→            className={`
   146→              btn-primary px-8 py-3 text-base
   147→              ${selectedIndex === null ? "opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed" : ""}
   148→            `}
   149→          >
   150→            Valider la reponse
   151→          </button>
   152→        </div>
   153→      )}
   154→
   155→      {/* Resultat + Explication */}
   156→      {hasAnswered && (
   157→        <div className="space-y-3">
   158→          {/* Message resultat */}
   159→          <div
   160→            className={`
   161→              p-4 rounded-xl border flex items-center gap-3
   162→              ${
   163→                selectedIndex === reponse_correcte
   164→                  ? "bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-300"
   165→                  : "bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/30 text-red-300"
   166→              }
   167→            `}
   168→          >
   169→            {selectedIndex === reponse_correcte ? (
   170→              <>
   171→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 flex-shrink-0" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   172→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9 12.75L11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
   173→                </svg>
   174→                <span className="font-medium">Bonne reponse !</span>
   175→              </>
   176→            ) : (
   177→              <>
   178→                <svg className="w-6 h-6 flex-shrink-0" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth={2} stroke="currentColor">
   179→                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.75 9.75l4.5 4.5m0-4.5l-4.5 4.5M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" />
   180→                </svg>
   181→                <span className="font-medium">
   182→                  Mauvaise reponse. La bonne reponse etait : {letters[reponse_correcte]}. {choix[reponse_correcte]}
   183→                </span>
   184→              </>
   185→            )}
   186→          </div>
   187→
   188→          {/* Explication */}
   189→          {explication && (
   190→            <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-800/60 border border-slate-700/50">
   191→              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-violet-400 mb-1">Explication</p>
   192→              <p className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed">{explication}</p>
   193→            </div>
   194→          )}
   195→        </div>
   196→      )}
   197→    </div>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
                                                        ```

                                                            ## 👤 user (12:51:46)

                                                            ✅ **Result:**
                                                            ```
                                                                 1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
     4→
     5→interface Message {
     6→  role: "user" | "assistant";
     7→  content: string;
     8→}
     9→
    10→interface VocalChatProps {
    11→  onClose?: () => void;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export default function VocalChat({ onClose }: VocalChatProps) {
    15→  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
    16→  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
    17→  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);
    18→  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState("");
    19→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    20→  const wsRef = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);
    21→  const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
    22→  const audioChunksRef = useRef<Blob[]>([]);
    23→  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    24→
    25→  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    26→    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
    27→  };
    28→
    29→  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);
    30→
    31→  const connect = useCallback(() => {
    32→    const ws = new WebSocket(`ws://${window.location.hostname}:8000/api/vocal/ws`);
    33→    ws.onopen = () => setIsConnected(true);
    34→    ws.onclose = () => setIsConnected(false);
    35→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
    36→      const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
    37→      if (data.type === "transcription") {
    38→        setMessages((prev) => [
    39→          ...prev,
    40→          { role: "user", content: data.message },
    41→        ]);
    42→      } else if (data.type === "text") {
    43→        setMessages((prev) => [
    44→          ...prev,
    45→          { role: "assistant", content: data.message },
    46→        ]);
    47→        setIsLoading(false);
    48→      } else if (data.type === "audio") {
    49→        const audio = new Audio(`data:audio/wav;base64,${data.data}`);
    50→        audio.play().catch(() => {});
    51→      }
    52→    };
    53→    wsRef.current = ws;
    54→  }, []);
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    connect();
    58→    return () => wsRef.current?.close();
    59→  }, [connect]);
    60→
    61→  const startRecording = async () => {
    62→    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
    63→    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
    64→    audioChunksRef.current = [];
    65→    recorder.ondataavailable = (e) => audioChunksRef.current.push(e.data);
    66→    recorder.onstop = async () => {
    67→      const blob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: "audio/wav" });
    68→      const reader = new FileReader();
    69→      reader.onloadend = () => {
    70→        const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(",")[1];
    71→        wsRef.current?.send(
    72→          JSON.stringify({ type: "audio", data: base64 })
    73→        );
    74→        setIsLoading(true);
    75→      };
    76→      reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
    77→      stream.getTracks().forEach((t) => t.stop());
    78→    };
    79→    recorder.start();
    80→    mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder;
    81→    setIsRecording(true);
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const stopRecording = () => {
    85→    mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop();
    86→    setIsRecording(false);
    87→  };
    88→
    89→  const sendText = () => {
    90→    if (!inputText.trim() || !wsRef.current) return;
    91→    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "user", content: inputText }]);
    92→    wsRef.current.send(
    93→      JSON.stringify({ type: "text", message: inputText })
    94→    );
    95→    setInputText("");
    96→    setIsLoading(true);
    97→  };
    98→
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-700">
   101→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-slate-700">
   102→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   103→          <div
   104→            className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${
   105→              isConnected ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-500"
   106→            }`}
   107→          />
   108→          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Prof Vocal IA</h2>
   109→        </div>
   110→        {onClose && (
   111→          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-white">
   112→            X
   113→          </button>
   114→        )}
   115→      </div>
   116→
   117→      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
   118→        {messages.length === 0 && (
   119→          <p className="text-slate-500 text-center mt-8">
   120→            Posez une question au professeur...
   121→          </p>
   122→        )}
   123→        {messages.map((msg, i) => (
   124→          <div
   125→            key={i}
   126→            className={`flex ${
   127→              msg.role === "user" ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"
   128→            }`}
   129→          >
   130→            <div
   131→              className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 ${
   132→                msg.role === "user"
   133→                  ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   134→                  : "bg-slate-700 text-slate-100"
   135→              }`}
   136→            >
   137→              {msg.content}
   138→            </div>
   139→          </div>
   140→        ))}
   141→        {isLoading && (
   142→          <div className="flex justify-start">
   143→            <div className="bg-slate-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">
   144→              Reflexion...
   145→            </div>
   146→          </div>
   147→        )}
   148→        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
   149→      </div>
   150→
   151→      <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-700">
   152→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   153→          <input
   154→            type="text"
   155→            value={inputText}
   156→            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
   157→            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendText()}
   158→            placeholder="Tapez votre question..."
   159→            className="flex-1 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 border border-slate-600 focus:border-blue-500 focus:outline-none"
   160→          />
   161→          <button
   162→            onClick={sendText}
   163→            disabled={!inputText.trim() || !isConnected}
   164→            className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
   165→          >
   166→            Envoyer
   167→          </button>
   168→          <button
   169→            onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording}
   170→            disabled={!isConnected}
   171→            className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg ${
   172→              isRecording
   173→                ? "bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
   174→                : "bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700"
   175→            } text-white disabled:opacity-50`}
   176→          >
   177→            {isRecording ? "Stop" : "Micro"}
   178→          </button>
   179→        </div>
   180→      </div>
   181→    </div>
   182→  );
   183→}
   184→
                                                            ```

     3→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useState, type CSSProperties } from "react";
     4→
     5→export interface MindMapNode {

     8→  x: number;
     9→  y: number;

    35→

    40→

    43→interface MindMapProps {

    64→

    66→
    67→const CANVAS_WIDTH = 1000;
    68→const CANVAS_HEIGHT = 700;
    69→
    70→const NODE_THEME_CLASSES = [
    71→  "border-blue-400/40 bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-100 shadow-blue-500/20",
    72→  "border-violet-400/40 bg-violet-500/10 text-violet-100 shadow-violet-500/20",
    73→  "border-emerald-400/40 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-100 shadow-emerald-500/20",
    74→  "border-amber-400/40 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-100 shadow-amber-500/20",
    75→  "border-cyan-400/40 bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-100 shadow-cyan-500/20",
    76→  "border-rose-400/40 bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-100 shadow-rose-500/20",
    77→];
    78→
    79→const NODE_SIZE_CLASSES: Record<NonNullable<MindMapNode["size"]>, string> = {
    80→  sm: "min-w-[110px] max-w-[160px] px-3 py-2 text-xs",
    81→  md: "min-w-[140px] max-w-[200px] px-4 py-2.5 text-sm",
    82→  lg: "min-w-[170px] max-w-[230px] px-5 py-3 text-sm",
    83→};
    84→
    85→function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    86→  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
    87→}
    88→
    89→function normalizeId(value: string): string {
    90→  const normalized = value.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-");
    91→  return normalized.replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "") || "node";
    92→}
    93→
    94→function createUniqueId(value: string, usedIds: Set<string>): string {
    95→  const baseId = normalizeId(value);
    96→  let candidateId = baseId;
    97→  let counter = 1;
    98→
    99→  while (usedIds.has(candidateId)) {
   100→    candidateId = `${baseId}-${counter}`;
   101→    counter += 1;
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  usedIds.add(candidateId);
   105→  return candidateId;
   106→}
   107→
   108→function resolveNodePosition(node: MindMapNode, coordinateMode: CoordinateMode): { x: number; y: number } {
   109→  if (coordinateMode === "pixel") {
   110→    return {
   111→      x: clamp(node.x, 24, CANVAS_WIDTH - 24),
   112→      y: clamp(node.y, 24, CANVAS_HEIGHT - 24),
   113→    };
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  return {
   117→    x: clamp((node.x / 100) * CANVAS_WIDTH, 24, CANVAS_WIDTH - 24),
   118→    y: clamp((node.y / 100) * CANVAS_HEIGHT, 24, CANVAS_HEIGHT - 24),
   119→  };
   120→}
   121→
   122→function getNodeStyle(index: number, node: PositionedNode, isSelected: boolean, isConnected: boolean): CSSProperties {
   123→  const style: CSSProperties = {
   124→    left: `${node.position.x}px`,
   125→    top: `${node.position.y}px`,
   126→    opacity: isConnected ? 1 : 0.3,
   127→  };
   128→
   129→  if (!node.color) {
   130→    return style;
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  style.borderColor = node.color;
   134→  style.backgroundColor = "rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95)";
   135→  style.color = "#e2e8f0";
   136→  style.boxShadow = isSelected
   137→    ? `0 0 0 1px ${node.color}, 0 0 0 8px ${node.color}33, 0 14px 30px ${node.color}33`
   138→    : `0 10px 24px ${node.color}26`;
   139→
   140→  return style;
   141→}
   142→
   143→function getNodeClass(index: number, node: PositionedNode, isSelected: boolean, isConnected: boolean): string {
   144→  const sizeClass = NODE_SIZE_CLASSES[node.size ?? "md"];
   145→  const themeClass = node.color ? "" : NODE_THEME_CLASSES[index % NODE_THEME_CLASSES.length];
   146→
   147→  return [
   148→    "absolute -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-2xl border text-left shadow-xl backdrop-blur-sm",
   149→    "transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-300/45",
   150→    sizeClass,
   151→    themeClass,
   152→    isSelected ? "scale-105 ring-2 ring-blue-300/40" : "hover:scale-105",
   153→    isConnected ? "" : "saturate-0",
   154→  ]
   155→    .filter(Boolean)
   156→    .join(" ");
   157→}
   158→
   159→export function convertGeminiMindMapToGraph(mindMap: GeminiMindMapData): MindMapData {
   160→  const nodes: MindMapNode[] = [];
   161→  const links: MindMapLink[] = [];
   162→  const usedIds = new Set<string>();
   163→
   164→  const centerLabel = mindMap.centre?.trim() || "Sujet";
   165→  const centerId = createUniqueId(centerLabel, usedIds);
   166→  nodes.push({
   167→    id: centerId,
   168→    label: centerLabel,
   169→    x: 50,
   170→    y: 50,
   171→    size: "lg",
   172→    color: "#38bdf8",
   173→  });
   174→
   175→  const branchCount = Math.max(mindMap.branches.length, 1);
   176→  const branchPalette = ["#a78bfa", "#34d399", "#f59e0b", "#f472b6", "#22d3ee", "#60a5fa"];
   177→
   178→  mindMap.branches.forEach((branch, branchIndex) => {
   179→    const branchLabel = branch.nom?.trim() || `Branche ${branchIndex + 1}`;
   180→    const branchId = createUniqueId(branchLabel, usedIds);
   181→    const branchAngle = (Math.PI * 2 * branchIndex) / branchCount - Math.PI / 2;
   182→    const branchX = clamp(50 + 30 * Math.cos(branchAngle), 10, 90);
   183→    const branchY = clamp(50 + 30 * Math.sin(branchAngle), 10, 90);
   184→    const branchColor = branchPalette[branchIndex % branchPalette.length];
   185→
   186→    nodes.push({
   187→      id: branchId,
   188→      label: branchLabel,
   189→      x: branchX,
   190→      y: branchY,
   191→      size: "md",
   192→      color: branchColor,
   193→      description: branch.details,
   194→    });
   195→
   196→    links.push({
   197→      id: `${centerId}-${branchId}`,
   198→      source: centerId,
   199→      target: branchId,
   200→      thickness: 2.2,
   201→      color: `${branchColor}88`,
   202→    });
   203→
   204→    const subBranches = branch.sous_branches ?? [];
   205→    const subCount = subBranches.length;
   206→
   207→    subBranches.forEach((subBranch, subIndex) => {
   208→      const subLabel = subBranch.trim();
   209→      if (!subLabel) return;
   210→
   211→      const offset = subCount > 1 ? subIndex - (subCount - 1) / 2 : 0;
   212→      const subAngle = branchAngle + offset * 0.42;
   213→      const subX = clamp(branchX + 13 * Math.cos(subAngle), 6, 94);
   214→      const subY = clamp(branchY + 13 * Math.sin(subAngle), 6, 94);
   215→      const subId = createUniqueId(`${branchId}-${subLabel}`, usedIds);
   216→
   217→      nodes.push({
   218→        id: subId,
   219→        label: subLabel,
   220→        x: subX,
   221→        y: subY,
   222→        size: "sm",
   223→        color: branchColor,
   224→      });
   225→
   226→      links.push({
   227→        id: `${branchId}-${subId}`,
   228→        source: branchId,
   229→        target: subId,
   230→        dashed: true,
   231→        thickness: 1.6,
   232→        color: `${branchColor}70`,
   233→      });
   234→    });
   235→  });
   236→
   237→  return { nodes, links };
   238→}
   239→
   240→export default function MindMap({
   241→  data,
   242→  title = "Mind Map",
   243→  className,
   244→  height = 560,
   245→  coordinateMode = "percent",
   246→  showControls = true,
   247→  enablePanZoom = true,
   248→  initialZoom = 1,
   249→  minZoom = 0.55,
   250→  maxZoom = 2.3,
   251→  onNodeClick,
   252→}: MindMapProps) {
   253→  const defaultScale = clamp(initialZoom, minZoom, maxZoom);
   254→  const [selectedNodeId, setSelectedNodeId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   255→  const [view, setView] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0, scale: defaultScale });
   256→  const [isPanning, setIsPanning] = useState(false);
   257→  const panStateRef = useRef<PanState | null>(null);
   258→
   259→  const positionedNodes = useMemo<PositionedNode[]>(() => {
   260→    return data.nodes.map((node) => ({
   261→      ...node,
   262→      position: resolveNodePosition(node, coordinateMode),
   263→    }));
   264→  }, [data.nodes, coordinateMode]);
   265→
   266→  const nodeById = useMemo(() => {
   267→    return new Map(positionedNodes.map((node) => [node.id, node]));
   268→  }, [positionedNodes]);
   269→
   270→  const validLinks = useMemo(() => {
   271→    return data.links.filter((link) => nodeById.has(link.source) && nodeById.has(link.target));
   272→  }, [data.links, nodeById]);
   273→
   274→  const connectedNodeIds = useMemo(() => {
   275→    const ids = new Set<string>();
   276→    if (!selectedNodeId) return ids;
   277→
   278→    validLinks.forEach((link) => {
   279→      if (link.source === selectedNodeId) ids.add(link.target);
   280→      if (link.target === selectedNodeId) ids.add(link.source);
   281→    });
   282→
   283→    return ids;
   284→  }, [selectedNodeId, validLinks]);
   285→
   286→  const selectedNode = selectedNodeId ? nodeById.get(selectedNodeId) ?? null : null;
   287→  const wrapperClassName = className ? `card ${className}` : "card";
   288→
   289→  const adjustZoom = useCallback(
   290→    (delta: number) => {
   291→      setView((previous) => ({
   292→        ...previous,
   293→        scale: clamp(previous.scale + delta, minZoom, maxZoom),
   294→      }));
   295→    },
   296→    [maxZoom, minZoom]
   297→  );
   298→
   299→  const resetView = useCallback(() => {
   300→    setView({ x: 0, y: 0, scale: clamp(initialZoom, minZoom, maxZoom) });
   301→  }, [initialZoom, maxZoom, minZoom]);
   302→
   303→  const handleWheel = useCallback(
   304→    (event: React.WheelEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
   305→      if (!enablePanZoom) return;
   306→      event.preventDefault();
   307→
   308→      const bounds = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
   309→      const cursorX = event.clientX - bounds.left;
   310→      const cursorY = event.clientY - bounds.top;
   311→      const delta = event.deltaY < 0 ? 0.12 : -0.12;
   312→
   313→      setView((previous) => {
   314→        const nextScale = clamp(previous.scale + delta, minZoom, maxZoom);
   315→        if (nextScale === previous.scale) return previous;
   316→
   317→        const worldX = (cursorX - previous.x) / previous.scale;
   318→        const worldY = (cursorY - previous.y) / previous.scale;
   319→
   320→        return {
   321→          x: cursorX - worldX * nextScale,
   322→          y: cursorY - worldY * nextScale,
   323→          scale: nextScale,
   324→        };
   325→      });
   326→    },
   327→    [enablePanZoom, maxZoom, minZoom]
   328→  );
   329→
   330→  const handlePointerDown = useCallback(
   331→    (event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
   332→      if (!enablePanZoom || event.button !== 0) return;
   333→
   334→      panStateRef.current = {
   335→        pointerId: event.pointerId,
   336→        startX: event.clientX,
   337→        startY: event.clientY,
   338→        originX: view.x,
   339→        originY: view.y,
   340→      };
   341→      setIsPanning(true);
   342→      event.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
   343→    },
   344→    [enablePanZoom, view.x, view.y]
   345→  );
   346→
   347→  const handlePointerMove = useCallback((event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
   348→    const panState = panStateRef.current;
   349→    if (!panState || panState.pointerId !== event.pointerId) return;
   350→
   351→    const deltaX = event.clientX - panState.startX;
   352→    const deltaY = event.clientY - panState.startY;
   353→
   354→    setView((previous) => ({
   355→      ...previous,
   356→      x: panState.originX + deltaX,
   357→      y: panState.originY + deltaY,
   358→    }));
   359→  }, []);
   360→
   361→  const finishPan = useCallback((event: React.PointerEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => {
   362→    const panState = panStateRef.current;
   363→    if (!panState || panState.pointerId !== event.pointerId) return;
   364→
   365→    panStateRef.current = null;
   366→    setIsPanning(false);
   367→    if (event.currentTarget.hasPointerCapture(event.pointerId)) {
   368→      event.currentTarget.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
   369→    }
   370→  }, []);
   371→
   372→  if (positionedNodes.length === 0) {
   373→    return (
   374→      <div className={wrapperClassName}>
   375→        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-100">{title}</h3>
   376→        <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
   377→          Aucune donnee a afficher. Fournissez au moins un noeud dans `data.nodes`.
   378→        </p>
   379→      </div>
   380→    );
   381→  }
   382→
   383→  return (
   384→    <section className={wrapperClassName}>
   385→      <div className="mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
   386→        <div>
   387→          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-100">{title}</h3>
   388→          <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">
   389→            Cliquez un noeud pour voir ses connexions. Glisser + molette pour naviguer.
   390→          </p>
   391→        </div>
   392→        {showControls && enablePanZoom && (
   393→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   394→            <button
   395→              type="button"
   396→              onClick={() => adjustZoom(-0.15)}
   397→              className="btn-secondary px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
   398→              aria-label="Zoom out"
   399→            >
   400→              -
   401→            </button>
   402→            <button
   403→              type="button"
   404→              onClick={() => adjustZoom(0.15)}
   405→              className="btn-secondary px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
   406→              aria-label="Zoom in"
   407→            >
   408→              +
   409→            </button>
   410→            <button
   411→              type="button"
   412→              onClick={resetView}
   413→              className="btn-ghost px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
   414→            >
   415→              Reset
   416→            </button>
   417→          </div>
   418→        )}
   419→      </div>
   420→
   421→      <div
   422→        className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70"
   423→        style={{ height: `${height}px` }}
   424→      >
   425→        <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top_right,rgba(59,130,246,0.20),transparent_50%)]" />
   426→        <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,rgba(148,163,184,0.10)_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,rgba(148,163,184,0.10)_1px,transparent_1px)] [background-size:48px_48px]" />
   427→
   428→        <div
   429→          className={[
   430→            "absolute inset-0 touch-none",
   431→            enablePanZoom ? (isPanning ? "cursor-grabbing" : "cursor-grab") : "cursor-default",
   432→          ].join(" ")}
   433→          onWheel={handleWheel}
   434→          onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
   435→          onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}
   436→          onPointerUp={finishPan}
   437→          onPointerCancel={finishPan}
   438→          onDoubleClick={() => setSelectedNodeId(null)}
   439→        >
   440→          <div
   441→            className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 origin-top-left"
   442→            style={{
   443→              width: `${CANVAS_WIDTH}px`,
   444→              height: `${CANVAS_HEIGHT}px`,
   445→              transform: `translate(-50%, -50%) translate(${view.x}px, ${view.y}px) scale(${view.scale})`,
   446→              transition: isPanning ? "none" : "transform 120ms ease-out",
   447→            }}
   448→          >
   449→            <svg
   450→              className="absolute inset-0 h-full w-full pointer-events-none"
   451→              viewBox={`0 0 ${CANVAS_WIDTH} ${CANVAS_HEIGHT}`}
   452→              aria-hidden="true"
   453→            >
   454→              {validLinks.map((link, index) => {
   455→                const sourceNode = nodeById.get(link.source);
   456→                const targetNode = nodeById.get(link.target);
   457→                if (!sourceNode || !targetNode) return null;
   458→
   459→                const isSelectedLink =
   460→                  selectedNodeId !== null &&
   461→                  (link.source === selectedNodeId || link.target === selectedNodeId);
   462→                const opacity = selectedNodeId ? (isSelectedLink ? 0.95 : 0.2) : 0.7;
   463→                const strokeWidth = link.thickness ?? (isSelectedLink ? 2.6 : 1.9);
   464→
   465→                return (
   466→                  <g key={link.id ?? `${link.source}-${link.target}-${index}`}>
   467→                    <line
   468→                      x1={sourceNode.position.x}
   469→                      y1={sourceNode.position.y}
   470→                      x2={targetNode.position.x}
   471→                      y2={targetNode.position.y}
   472→                      stroke={link.color ?? "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.7)"}
   473→                      strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
   474→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   475→                      strokeDasharray={link.dashed ? "7 6" : undefined}
   476→                      opacity={opacity}
   477→                    />
   478→                    {link.label && (
   479→                      <text
   480→                        x={(sourceNode.position.x + targetNode.position.x) / 2}
   481→                        y={(sourceNode.position.y + targetNode.position.y) / 2}
   482→                        fill="rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.9)"
   483→                        fontSize="11"
   484→                        textAnchor="middle"
   485→                        dominantBaseline="middle"
   486→                      >
   487→                        {link.label}
   488→                      </text>
   489→                    )}
   490→                  </g>
   491→                );
   492→              })}
   493→            </svg>
   494→
   495→            {positionedNodes.map((node, index) => {
   496→              const isSelected = selectedNodeId === node.id;
   497→              const isConnected = !selectedNodeId || isSelected || connectedNodeIds.has(node.id);
   498→
   499→              return (
   500→                <button
   501→                  key={node.id}
   502→                  type="button"
   503→                  className={getNodeClass(index, node, isSelected, isConnected)}
   504→                  style={getNodeStyle(index, node, isSelected, isConnected)}
   505→                  onPointerDown={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
   506→                  onClick={() => {
   507→                    setSelectedNodeId(node.id);
   508→                    onNodeClick?.(node);
   509→                  }}
   510→                  aria-pressed={isSelected}
   511→                  aria-label={`Noeud ${node.label}`}
   512→                >
   513→                  <p className="font-semibold leading-tight">{node.label}</p>
   514→                  {isSelected && node.description && (
   515→                    <p className="mt-1.5 text-[11px] leading-snug text-slate-300/90">
   516→                      {node.description}
   517→                    </p>
   518→                  )}
   519→                </button>
   520→              );
   521→            })}
   522→          </div>
   523→        </div>
   524→      </div>
   525→
   526→      {selectedNode && (
   527→        <div className="mt-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-4">
   528→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
   529→            <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-100">{selectedNode.label}</h4>
   530→            <span className="badge-blue">Noeud actif</span>
   531→          </div>
   532→          <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-300">
   533→            {selectedNode.description || "Aucune description disponible pour ce noeud."}
   534→          </p>
   535→          <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500">
   536→            Connexions directes: {connectedNodeIds.size}
   537→          </p>
   538→        </div>
   539→      )}
   540→    </section>
   541→  );
   542→}
   543→
                                                                ```

    46→  }

    49→    @apply bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 text-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all duration-200 placeholder:text-slate-500;
    50→  }

    54→  }
    55→
    56→  .badge-blue {

    58→  }

    61→    @apply badge bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-400 border border-violet-500/30;
    62→  }
    63→

    65→    @apply badge bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30;
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  .badge-green {
    69→    @apply badge bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30;
    70→  }
    71→}
    72→
    73→@layer utilities {
    74→  .text-gradient {
    75→    @apply bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-violet-400;
    76→  }
    77→
    78→  .glow-blue {
    79→    box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15);
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  .glow-violet {
    83→    box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.15);
    84→  }
    85→}
    86→
    87→/* Flip animation for flashcards */
    88→.flip-card {
    89→  perspective: 1000px;
    90→}
    91→
    92→.flip-card-inner {
    93→  position: relative;
    94→  width: 100%;
    95→  height: 100%;
    96→  transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    97→  transform-style: preserve-3d;
    98→}
    99→
   100→.flip-card-inner.flipped {
   101→  transform: rotateY(180deg);
   102→}
   103→
   104→.flip-card-front,
   105→.flip-card-back {
   106→  position: absolute;
   107→  width: 100%;
   108→  height: 100%;
   109→  backface-visibility: hidden;
   110→  -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
   111→}
   112→
   113→.flip-card-back {
   114→  transform: rotateY(180deg);
   115→}
   116→
                                                                      ```

## FRONTEND STRUCTURE ANALYSIS - IACA PLATFORM

---

## 1. PAGE STRUCTURE

**All Pages Located in `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/app/`**

### Deployed Pages:
1. **`page.tsx`** - Dashboard (home page `/`)
   - Stats cards (Documents, Flashcards, Quiz, À réviser)
   - Prochaines révisions widget
   - Recent activity widget
   - Quick action shortcuts
   
2. **`matieres/page.tsx`** - Subjects listing and management (`/matieres`)
   - Grid of subject cards with color coding (blue, emerald, amber, violet, rose, cyan)
   - Shows doc count and flashcard count per subject
   - Modal to add new subjects
   - Responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop)

3. **`flashcards/page.tsx`** - Flashcard review system (`/flashcards`)
   - List mode: Shows all flashcards in grid with filters
   - Review mode: Single card flip animation with answer reveal
   - Quality rating system (1-5 using SM-2 spaced repetition)
   - Matiere filter buttons
   - Session progress tracking
   - Session results summary on completion

4. **`quiz/page.tsx`** - Quiz/QCM system (`/quiz`)
   - Quiz list mode: Shows all available quizzes
   - Quiz mode: Question-by-question MCQ interface
   - Multiple choice with A-B-C-D-E-F labels
   - Answer validation with feedback
   - Results mode: Score percentage, detailed answer review
   - Progress bar showing question completion

5. **`vocal/page.tsx`** - Vocal professor AI (`/vocal`)
   - Service status display (Ollama, Whisper STT, Piper TTS)
   - Start conversation button (disabled if Ollama unavailable)
   - Embeds VocalChat component in 600px height container
   - Currently broken: WebSocket connection issue

---

## 2. LAYOUT & NAVIGATION STRUCTURE

### **`layout.tsx`** (Root Layout - Server Component)
- Metadata: "IACA - Concours Administratifs"
- Structure: `<html>` > `<body>` > `<div class="flex h-screen">` with:
  - `<Sidebar />` component (extracted to client component)
  - Main content area with scroll overflow
  - Max-width constraint (7xl) with padding

### **`sidebar.tsx`** (Client Component - Mobile + Desktop Navigation)
- **Mobile**: Hamburger menu (lg:hidden), shows overlay on open
- **Desktop**: Fixed left sidebar (64px wide), collapsible
- **Navigation Items** (5 total):
  1. Dashboard (`/`) - grid icon
  2. Matieres (`/matieres`) - book icon
  3. Flashcards (`/flashcards`) - card deck icon
  4. Quiz (`/quiz`) - question mark icon
  5. Vocal (`/vocal`) - microphone icon

- **Active state styling**: Blue background/border with text color change
- **Footer**: User profile section with avatar (JL initials)
- **Branding**: "IA" logo + "IACA - Concours Administratifs" subtitle

---

## 3. COMPONENT LIBRARY

**Location**: `/home/julien/Documents/IACA/frontend/components/`

### **FlashCard.tsx** (Reusable Flashcard Component)
- Props: `question`, `reponse`, `explication?`, `matiere?`, `onReview(quality: number)`
- Features:
  - 3D flip animation (perspective 1000px, 180deg rotation)
  - Front: Shows question (blue theme)
  - Back: Shows answer (violet theme) + optional explanation
  - Quality rating buttons (1-5) appear after flip
  - Color-coded ratings: Red (1) → Orange (2) → Amber (3) → Green (4) → Bright green (5)
  - Animations: Flip transition 0.6s cubic-bezier, rating buttons fade-in

### **QuizQuestion.tsx** (MCQ Component)
- Props: `question`, `choix[]`, `reponse_correcte`, `explication?`, `onAnswer(index, isCorrect)`
- Features:
  - Question displayed in card
  - Multiple choice options (A-F labels)
  - Radio button UI with selection/validation states
  - Before answer: blue selection highlight
  - After answer: Green (correct) or Red (incorrect) feedback
  - Shows correct answer if user was wrong
  - Optional explanation panel below
  - Validate button only appears before answering

### **VocalChat.tsx** (WebSocket Chat Component)
- Props: `onClose?: () => void`
- Features:
  - WebSocket connection to `ws://localhost:8000/api/vocal/ws`
  - Message types: transcription, text, audio
  - Chat history display
  - Text input + Send button
  - Microphone button for voice input
  - Audio playback for TTS responses
  - Connection status indicator (green/red dot)
- **ISSUE**: Currently broken - WS connection closes immediately after opening (backend issue)

### **MindMap.tsx** (Interactive Mind Map Visualization)
- Props: `data: MindMapData`, `title?`, `height?`, `onNodeClick?`, zoom controls
- Features:
  - SVG-based node/link rendering
  - Pan & zoom functionality (mouse wheel zoom)
  - Click node to highlight connections
  - Grayscale for non-connected nodes
  - Color-coded node themes (6 colors)
  - Node sizing (sm/md/lg)
  - Converts Gemini mind map format via `convertGeminiMindMapToGraph()`
  - Grid background
  - Control buttons (+/- zoom, reset)

---

## 4. STYLING SYSTEM

**Global CSS Components** (`globals.css`):
- `.card` - Base dark card with backdrop blur
- `.card-hover` - Interactive card with hover effects
- `.btn-primary` - Blue CTA button
- `.btn-secondary` - Gray secondary button
- `.btn-ghost` - Text-only button
- `.input-field` - Consistent form input
- `.badge`, `.badge-blue`, `.badge-violet`, `.badge-amber`, `.badge-green`
- `.text-gradient` - Blue-to-violet gradient text
- `.glow-blue`, `.glow-violet` - Glow shadow effects
- Flip card animations (3D transforms)

**Tailwind Color Palette Used**:
- Primary: Blue (600, 500)
- Accents: Violet, Emerald, Amber, Rose, Cyan
- Background: Slate (950, 900, 800)
- Text: Slate (100, 300, 400, 500)

---

## 5. API INTEGRATION PATTERN

**Base URL**: `/api` (proxied to `http://localhost:8000/api/*` via next.config.js)

**Key Endpoints Used**:
- `GET /api/matieres` - List subjects
- `POST /api/matieres` - Create subject
- `GET /api/documents/` - List documents
- `GET /api/flashcards/` - List flashcards
- `GET /api/flashcards/revision` - Get cards due for review
- `POST /api/flashcards/{id}/review` - Submit review quality rating
- `GET /api/quiz/` - List quizzes
- `GET /api/quiz/{id}` - Get quiz with questions
- `POST /api/quiz/{id}/submit` - Submit quiz answers
- `GET /api/vocal/status` - Check service status
- `WS /api/vocal/ws` - WebSocket connection for vocal chat

---

## 6. STATE MANAGEMENT PATTERN

All components use **React hooks** (no Redux/Context):
- `useState` for local state
- `useCallback` for memoized functions
- `useRef` for DOM refs (VocalChat, MindMap)
- `useEffect` for side effects (API calls, WebSocket setup)
- `useMemo` for expensive computations (MindMap graph)

---

## 7. DATA FLOW ARCHITECTURE

```
User Action (sidebar click)
  ↓
Next.js routing to page.tsx
  ↓
useEffect hook in page
  ↓
fetch to /api/[endpoint]
  ↓
Response formatted to local state
  ↓
Components rendered with state
  ↓
User interactions (click, input, etc.)
  ↓
Callback to parent or API POST
  ↓
State update & re-render
```

---

## 8. RESPONSIVE DESIGN PATTERN

**Breakpoints**:
- Mobile (no prefix): Base styling
- Tablet (`sm:`): 640px+
- Desktop (`lg:`): 1024px+

**Key Responsive Features**:
- Sidebar: Fixed on desktop, overlay drawer on mobile
- Grids: 1 col (mobile) → 2-3 cols (tablet/desktop)
- Header: Mobile header with burger, hidden on desktop
- Padding: Adjusted for screen size (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8)

---

## 9. CURRENT KNOWN ISSUES

1. **Vocal Professor Broken** (`vocal/page.tsx`):
   - WebSocket closes immediately after opening
   - Backend returns HTTP 500 on `/api/chat` (memory issue with mistral model)
   - Fix in progress: Switching from mistral to phi3:mini model

2. **Missing Fiches Feature**:
   - No "Fiches" page in sidebar navigation
   - No `fiches/page.tsx` component

3. **No Grouped Navigation**:
   - All menu items at same level
   - No categorization (e.g., "Learning" vs "Review" sections)

---

## 10. READY FOR IMPLEMENTATION

**Frontend is production-ready for**:
- Adding Fiches page (`/fiches`)
- Reorganizing sidebar with burger menu groups
- Adding new features without architectural changes
- All styling/component patterns established

---
